Extensive experiments on multiple public medical segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that Dual-Adaptive SAM3 not only matches or exceeds the accuracy of fully fine-tuned SAM3 and standard MoE baselines, but also achieves a notable 5\% gain over current state-of-the-art methods, with interpretable results validating its effectiveness. The code is available at: https://github.com/Reconsider80/DA-SAM3.

AI.tldr: DA-SAM3 提出双自适应机制（任务感知的 DER 路由 + 参数感知的 DPE 低秩分解），在保持 SAM3 高精度的同时将 MoE 参数量降低 80% 以上，在医学图像分割上超越 SOTA 5%。
AI.motivation: SAM3 虽强大但直接微调参数效率低，标准 MoE 计算开销大，难以适应医学影像领域的多样性和细微差异。
AI.method: 1) 任务自适应：Dynamic Expert Router (DER) 联合视觉输入和文本提示稀疏激活相关专家；2) 参数自适应：Decomposed Parameterized Experts (DPE) 将专家分解为共享冻结基座 + 轻量可训练低秩增量，降低 80%+ MoE 参数量。
AI.result: 在多个公开医学分割基准上，DA-SAM3 达到或超越全微调 SAM3 和标准 MoE 的精度，并比当前 SOTA 提升 5%。
AI.conclusion: DA-SAM3 通过双自适应机制在参数效率和分割精度之间取得最佳平衡，具有良好的可解释性和临床应用潜力。

title: S-DiverSe: Spanish Diverse Speech
summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) has advanced remarkably for standard speech, yet speech affected by neurological conditions remains a challenge. We present S-DiverSe (Spanish Diverse Speech), a corpus of 3.2 hours of in-the-wild Spanish speech from 22 speakers with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, and stroke. The dataset contains 444 manually transcribed audio segments with metadata on speaker sex, disease type, and intelligibility. S-DiverSe is designed to support ASR evaluation and development for neurologically affected Spanish speech. We describe the dataset, analyze its composition, and report baseline ASR results alongside initial adaptation experiments. Our findings reveal that heuristic text post-processing is more robust than fine-tuning for out-of-domain neurological Spanish speech. This underscores the need for dedicated in-the-wild Spanish benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了S-DiverSe语料库，包含3.2小时由22位患有肌萎缩侧索硬化症、帕金森病和中风的西班牙语患者录制的野外语音数据，实验发现启发式文本后处理比微调对神经系统疾病西班牙语ASR更有效。
AI.motivation: 标准语音的ASR已取得显著进展，但神经系统疾病影响下的语音识别仍面临挑战，缺乏专门的西班牙语评测资源。
AI.method: 构建S-DiverSe语料库（3.2小时野外西班牙语语音，22位神经疾病患者，444段音频），并进行基线ASR实验及微调/后处理对比。
AI.result: 启发式文本后处理方法在域外神经系统西班牙语语音上的鲁棒性优于模型微调方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了针对神经系统疾病西班牙语语音的ASR需专用野外评测基准，启发式后处理是更稳健的解决方案。

title: Embodied Operators and Benchmarking: Toward Reusable and Deployable Embodied Intelligence Systems
summary: Embodied intelligence systems require not only end-to-end policy models, but also reusable functional modules that transform multimodal observations, robot states, human demonstrations, and task contexts into structured representations, decisions, trajectories, control references, and system services. This work defines these modules as embodied operators and studies them as independent yet composable units in embodied intelligence pipelines. We clarify their definition boundary, emphasizing task semantics, standardized input-output contracts, deployability, reusability, and multi-layer optimizability. We further construct a taxonomy covering five categories: detection and segmentation, spatial localization and 3D understanding, hand motion recovery, embodied foundation models and task-decision operators, and planning, control, and system support operators. For each category, we summarize representative functions, technical paradigms, application roles, and practical limitations. Beyond taxonomy, we propose a multi-dimensional benchmark framework that evaluates embodied operators in terms of correctness, end-to-end efficiency, resource usage, temporal stability, portability, interface compatibility, deployment reliability, and downstream task utility. We also discuss workflow-level operator acceleration and open challenges in operator composition, data standardization, world models, VLA safety, edge deployment, and real-world application value. Overall, this work argues that embodied operators should be optimized and evaluated as holistic deployable components, providing a foundation for reusable, scalable, and verifiable embodied intelligence systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“具身算子”（embodied operators）概念，将其定义为具身智能流水线中可独立、可组合的模块单元，构建了涵盖五大类别的分类体系，并提出了多维度的基准评估框架，主张将算子作为可部署的整体组件进行优化与评估。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能系统多关注端到端策略模型，缺乏对可复用功能模块（算子）的系统定义、分类与评估标准，导致模块间难以组合、迁移与优化。
AI.method: 明确算子定义边界（任务语义、标准化输入输出契约、可部署性、可复用性、多层可优化性）；构建五类算子分类体系；提出多维度基准评估框架（正确性、效率、资源、稳定性、可移植性、接口兼容性、部署可靠性、下游任务效用）。
AI.result: 形成一套完整的具身算子定义、分类与评估体系，涵盖检测分割、空间定位、手部运动恢复、基础模型与决策算子、规划控制与系统支持五大类别，并讨论了算子加速与开放挑战。
AI.conclusion: 具身算子应作为可部署的整体组件进行优化和评估，为构建可复用、可扩展、可验证的具身智能系统奠定基础。

title: Trading Confidence: Comprehensive Uncertainty Estimation in Algorithmic Trading
comment: Accepted at the Pacific Asia Conference on Information Systems (PACIS 2025). 17 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful approach in financial trading, enabling agents to learn optimal strategies through direct market interaction. However, financial markets are highly uncertain, with price fluctuations driven by stochastic volatility, model limitations, and regime shifts. Traditional RL models struggle in dynamic environments, often failing to adapt to sudden market disruptions, leading to suboptimal trading decisions. To address this challenge, we propose an uncertainty-aware RL framework that integrates distributional, epistemic, and aleatoric uncertainty estimations. Our approach enhances uncertainty estimation using SHAP-weighted reconstruction uncertainty, MC Dropout, and an LSTM-based technical indicator consensus mechanism. Experimental results on five major U.S. stock indices demonstrate that RL agents equipped with uncertainty estimation significantly outperform traditional models in return and risk management. This study advances uncertainty estimation in RL-based financial trading, with future research extending its application to other asset classes and alternative RL architectures for greater adaptability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种整合分布、认知和偶然三种不确定性估计的强化学习框架，通过SHAP加权重构、MC Dropout和LSTM技术指标共识机制，提升美股指数交易中RL代理的鲁棒性与风险管理能力。
AI.motivation: 金融市场具有高度不确定性（随机波动、模型局限、机制转换），传统RL模型难以适应动态环境与突发市场变化，导致交易决策次优。
AI.method: 提出不确定性感知RL框架，集成三种不确定性估计：1) SHAP加权重构不确定性（分布性）；2) MC Dropout（认知性）；3) 基于LSTM的技术指标共识机制（偶然性）。
AI.result: 在5个主要美国股指上，配备不确定性估计的RL代理在收益和风险管理方面显著优于传统模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究推进了基于RL的金融交易中的不确定性估计，未来将扩展到其他资产类别和替代RL架构以增强适应性。

title: Additive Causal Construction for Transferable and Reconfigurable Cross-System Learning in Multi-Source Image Fusion
summary: In multi-source image fusion scenarios, heterogeneous inputs are typically driven by distinct generative mechanisms and can be viewed as a composition of multiple causal systems. However, cross-system discrepancy (CSD) and cross-system entanglement (CSE) commonly arise during the fusion process, often leading to significant performance degradation under out-of-distribution (OOD) predictions. To address the CSD and CSE issues, we propose the additive causal construction (ACC) framework, which characterizes information fusion at two levels: firstly, it establishes causal "anchors" shared among multiple systems through intervention consistency to enable causal graph transferability (CGT); and secondly, it formalizes the fusion process as causal construction and models the reliability of constructed paths through uncertainty quantification to ensure causal graph reconfigurability (CGR). Building upon this, we revisit the traditional causal representation learning (CRL) with ACC and propose ACC-CRL as a learnable instantiation of the framework. The method explores joint causal content representations across systems via content-mechanism decoupling, and performs response alignment under shared anchors to mitigate CSD. Furthermore, it incorporates structural uncertainty to adaptively regulate the fusion process, thereby suppressing unstable CSE. We conduct systematic experiments on synthetic data (ColorMNIST) and real-world multi-center medical imaging tasks (microvascular invasion (MVI) prediction). The results demonstrate that the proposed method significantly improves OOD generalization while maintaining in-distribution (ID) performance, validating the effectiveness and robustness of the ACC-CRL strategy based on mechanism alignment and uncertainty modeling in open environments.

AI.tldr: 提出加性因果构建（ACC）框架，通过因果锚点传递性、不确定性量化的因果可重构性，以及ACC-CRL方法（机制解耦+响应对齐+结构不确定性），在多源图像融合中解决跨系统差异与纠缠问题，提升OOD泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 多源图像融合中异构输入来自不同生成机制（多个因果系统），融合时存在跨系统差异（CSD）和跨系统纠缠（CSE），导致OOD预测下性能显著下降。
AI.method: 提出ACC框架：①通过干预一致性建立跨系统共享因果锚点（CGT）；②将融合过程形式化为因果构建，并用不确定性量化建模路径可靠性（CGR）。在此基础上提出ACC-CRL：内容-机制解耦学习联合因果表征，在共享锚点下进行响应对齐以缓解CSD；引入结构不确定性自适应调控融合过程以抑制CSE。
AI.result: 在合成数据（ColorMNIST）和真实多中心医学影像任务（微血管浸润预测）上，所提方法显著提升OOD泛化性能，同时保持ID性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于机制对齐和不确定性建模的ACC-CRL策略在开放环境下有效且鲁棒，验证了因果视角下多源图像融合的可行性。

title: TACG: Trajectory-Aware Commit Gating for Diffusion Language Model Decoding
summary: Diffusion language models (DLLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising masked positions, exposing a trajectory of predictive distributions rather than a single instantaneous belief. Most existing decoders ignore this trajectory and commit tokens from the current snapshot alone, conflating confidence with commitment readiness: a transient top-1 peak under incomplete context can be locked in, while candidates with consistent cross-step support are delayed. We propose Trajectory-Aware Commit Gating (TACG), a training-free gate-level decoder that anchors token identities to the base posterior and uses trajectory-aware signals only to decide whether the current proposal is ready to commit. TACG combines Temporal Implicit Logits Guidance (TILG), which keeps an exponential moving average of past logits as a self-reference and contrasts the current logits against this reference in natural-parameter space, with a History Gate (HG) that enforces short-term proposal persistence before commitment. Together with a capped extra-promotion budget, these components yield a stability-constrained commit rule without auxiliary networks or extra forward passes. We evaluate TACG on LLaDA, Dream, and LLaDA2-Mini across code (HumanEval, MBPP) and math (GSM8K, MATH500) benchmarks; it typically improves or preserves accuracy while reducing denoising steps and increasing tokens per forward (TPF). The code is publicly available at https://github.com/Clarence-CV/TACG-DLLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TACG，一种无需训练的扩散语言模型解码器，通过轨迹感知的提交门控机制（结合历史对比和稳定性约束）来提升生成准确率、减少去噪步数，在代码和数学基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有解码器仅依赖当前快照的置信度提交token，忽略了扩散过程中的预测轨迹，导致不稳定的瞬态峰值被过早锁定，而跨步骤一致性高的候选反而被延迟。
AI.method: TACG包含三个组件：(1) TILG：用指数移动平均维护历史logits作为参考，在自然参数空间中对当前logits做对比；(2) History Gate (HG)：强制token在提交前保持短期稳定性；(3) 额外的上限促进预算，三者形成稳定性约束的提交规则，无需额外网络或前向传播。
AI.result: 在LLaDA、Dream、LLaDA2-Mini上评估HumanEval、MBPP、GSM8K、MATH500，TACG通常提升或保持准确率，同时减少去噪步数并提升每前向传播的有效token数（TPF）。
AI.conclusion: 利用扩散过程中的完整轨迹信号而非单步快照来做提交决策，可以更鲁棒地平衡置信度与提交时机，是一种高效且即插即用的解码增强方案。

title: Reflective Dialogue or Prompt Refinement? Effects of Tutor Scaffolding on Students' Independent LLM Use for Programming
comment: Best paper award, Published in AIED 2026: The 27th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) can provide personalized support in learning, several studies have raised concerns regarding their use in education. Importantly, learning depends on how students engage with LLMs. This study examined how two types of LLM-based tutors shape students' prompting practices, learning, and subsequent LLM-use: a Socratic-Guidance (SG) tutor, which structures interaction through dialogic questioning, and a Prompt-Refinement (PR) tutor that guides the formulation of effective prompts. We conducted a two-phase study in a graduate-level mobile robotics course: 66 students used either the SG or PR tutor during a 6-week intervention, followed by 52 students using an unconstrained LLM during a 3-week course project. Results show that while the SG- and PR tutors led to similar task performance and prompting patterns during guided use, they differ in learning outcomes and later LLM-use. SG-students, relative to PR-student, achieved higher learning gains in later sessions, and were more likely to adopt understanding-driven prompting strategies, which are predictive of higher understanding, when using an unconstrained LLM. Although learners perceived the SG tutor as less efficient, the findings suggest that Socratic guidance supports the development of students' capacity to learn with LLMs over time, highlighting its importance for LLM tutor design.

AI.tldr: 比较两种LLM辅导机器人（苏格拉底式引导SG vs 提示精炼PR）对学生学习效果、提问行为及后续LLM使用习惯的影响。
AI.motivation: LLM可提供个性化学习支持，但学生如何与之互动是关键。需要研究不同引导方式（SG vs PR）如何影响学习效果和后续LLM使用行为。
AI.method: 两阶段研究：第一阶段66名研究生在6周内使用SG或PR辅导机器人；第二阶段52名学生在3周课程项目中自由使用LLM。分析任务表现、提问模式、学习成果和后续LLM使用策略。
AI.result: SG和PR在引导使用阶段任务表现和提问模式相近，但SG学生后期学习收益更高，且在自由使用LLM时更倾向采用理解驱动的提问策略（该策略预测更高的理解水平）。尽管SG被感知为效率较低。
AI.conclusion: 苏格拉底式引导虽然感知效率较低，但能更好地培养学生长期利用LLM学习的能力，对LLM辅导机器人的设计有重要意义。

title: Reward Granularity in RLVR: Comparing Process and Outcome Reward Structures for Mathematical Reasoning in Small Language Models
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising paradigm for improving mathematical reasoning in language models. Yet most RLVR work rewards only the final answer (outcome-based rewards), leaving the impact of step-level process supervision (process rewards) underexplored especially for small models that lack the capacity to self-correct under sparse feedback. We systematically compare five reward conditions applied to Qwen2.5-0.5B fine-tuned with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) on GSM8K: a no-RL baseline, process-only, outcome-only, and three hybrid weightings ($λ\in \{0.9, 0.5, 0.1\}$ process weight). Process-only supervision achieves 63.73% test accuracy versus 53.75% for outcome-only, a nearly 10-percentage point gap while yielding reasoning traces with higher step validity and lower deviation from ground-truth chain length. Hybrid rewards generally correlate positively with process weight, with one notable anomaly: the low-process / high-outcome configuration ($λ=0.1$) underperforms pure outcome supervision, suggesting conflicting optimization signals. Error analysis using GPT-4o as a judge reveals distinct failure mode distributions: process models generate structurally inconsistent but arithmetically grounded traces, while outcome models produce concise but derivation-error-prone chains. Our results demonstrate that reward granularity is a first-order design decision for RLVR, with process-level supervision substantially improving both accuracy and trace fidelity in small language models.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了五种奖励条件（过程奖励、结果奖励及三种混合权重）在Qwen2.5-0.5B小模型上应用GRPO进行数学推理训练的效果。过程奖励显著优于结果奖励（63.73% vs 53.75%），混合奖励与过程权重正相关，但低过程权重配置（λ=0.1）表现反常，低于纯结果监督。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR研究多关注最终答案奖励（结果监督），对小模型在稀疏反馈下缺乏自我纠正能力时的过程监督（步骤级奖励）影响探索不足。
AI.method: 在GSM8K数据集上，对Qwen2.5-0.5B模型使用GRPO算法，比较五种奖励条件：无RL基线、纯过程奖励、纯结果奖励及三种混合权重（λ=0.9, 0.5, 0.1过程权重）。
AI.result: 过程监督准确率63.73% vs 结果监督53.75%；混合奖励与过程权重正相关；λ=0.1异常低于纯结果监督；过程模型生成结构不一致但算术扎实的轨迹，结果模型生成简洁但易推导错误的链。
AI.conclusion: 奖励粒度是RLVR的一阶设计决策，过程级监督能显著提升小模型的数学推理准确率和推理轨迹保真度。

title: Symmetry-Structured Neural Completion of Islamic Geometric Patterns from Sparse Control Geometry
summary: Islamic geometric patterns are governed by exact rotational symmetry and strict construction rules. This paper treats these rules as formal geometric knowledge and embeds them in a neural completion framework, rather than leaving them to be learned statistically from data. Given sparse control geometry and a target symmetry order, the system completes the pattern as a vector graph by predicting edges and refinements of bounded curves over a candidate lattice whose edges are organised into rotational orbits under the cyclic group. Symmetry is enforced either by constraining predictions within these orbits or by projecting them onto them during inference. The orbit-tied variant provides a constructive guarantee: for any input and any orbit-level selection rule, it produces exact N-fold symmetry, preserves anchor points, and keeps all refinements within prescribed bounds. These properties are verified numerically. The study focuses on rotational symmetry, and all quantitative results are obtained from procedurally generated graphs inspired by Islamic geometric design rather than from a historical corpus. On clean inputs, enforcing exact validity produces no measurable loss in fidelity. When control geometry is missing, an unstructured decoder loses fidelity and breaks symmetry; retraining on corrupted inputs recovers much of the fidelity but not exact validity. Symmetry-structured inference, by contrast, keeps violations at zero throughout. The results show that augmentation and symmetry structure address distinct failure modes: augmentation improves fidelity under corruption, while symmetry structure guarantees validity. The framework therefore provides a knowledge-constrained, guarantee-backed approach to neural completion for scalable vector ornaments whose validity depends on exact geometric structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个知识约束的神经网络补全框架，将伊斯兰几何图案的严格旋转对称规则嵌入模型，通过轨道绑定预测保证输出精确的N重对称性，无需从数据中学习对称性。实验表明，该方法在保证有效性（零对称性违例）的同时不损失保真度，而数据增强仅能提高保真度但无法保证有效性。
AI.motivation: 伊斯兰几何图案具有严格的旋转对称性和构造规则，传统神经网络从数据中统计学习这些规则，无法保证输出满足精确的对称性约束。作者希望将形式化几何知识嵌入神经补全框架，以提供可保证的有效性。
AI.method: （1）将图案表示为候选晶格上的向量图，边按循环群的旋转轨道组织；（2）在轨道内进行预测约束，或通过推理投影保证对称性；（3）轨道绑定变体提供构造性保证：精确N重对称、锚点保留、细化在指定边界内。
AI.result: （1）干净输入下，强制精确有效性不损失保真度；（2）缺失控制几何时，无结构解码器损失保真度并破坏对称性；（3）数据增强可恢复大部分保真度，但无法保证精确有效性；（4）对称性结构推理始终保持零违例；（5）增强和对称结构分别解决保真度和有效性问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个知识约束、有保证的神经补全框架，适用于依赖精确几何结构的可缩放矢量装饰图案。数据增强与对称性结构分别应对保真度与有效性两种不同的失败模式，二者互补。

title: From Gentlemen to Frontiermen: Masculine Formations in English-Language Fiction (1771--1930)
summary: Masculinity in nineteenth-century fiction is not a single ideal but a field of competing scripts. Drawing on 150 British and American canonical novels from the txtLAB Novel450 corpus, published between 1771 and 1930, this paper examines the changing relative prominence of competing models of masculine authority. To focus the analysis on masculine characterisation, the study extracts male-character-centred text windows by using coreference resolution to group names, nominal mentions, and pronouns into character-specific reference chains. It then fits an unsupervised structural topic model with publication year and author gender as topic-prevalence covariates. The model identifies six distinct masculine formations: aristocratic-chivalric, Christian manhood, gentlemanly respectability, country squire, professional-commercial, and imperial/adventure. Across the corpus, formations tied to inherited rank and sacred authority decline, while those organised around paid work and adventure rise. The largest increase occurs not in professional-commercial breadwinning but in imperial/adventure masculinity, particularly the frontier-wilderness register. The trajectory points to a reallocation from inherited and sacred status towards achieved, commercial, and expansionary forms of masculine authority. Adventurous and commercial formations are also more prevalent in novels by authors recorded as male. Because these formations emerge without a seeded vocabulary yet align with categories established in independent scholarship, the article offers a reproducible method for measuring the reorganisation of gendered authority across the long nineteenth century.

AI.tldr: 本文利用150部英美经典小说的语料库，通过无监督主题建模识别出六种男性气质模式，发现继承地位和神圣权威模式下降，而冒险/帝国和职业商业模式上升，其中冒险/帝国模式增长最显著。
AI.motivation: 挑战19世纪小说中单一男性气质理想的传统看法，揭示男性气质是一个竞争性规范的场域，并量化其长期变迁。
AI.method: 从txtLAB Novel450语料库选取150部英美经典小说（1771-1930年），使用共指消解构建男性角色文本窗口，以出版年份和作者性别为协变量，拟合无监督结构主题模型。
AI.result: 识别出六种男性气质模式：贵族-骑士、基督教男子气、绅士体面、乡绅、职业-商业、帝国/冒险。继承地位和神圣权威下降，职业商业和冒险上升，其中冒险模式增长最大。冒险和商业模式在男性作者小说中更显著。
AI.conclusion: 男性权威从继承和神圣地位向成就、商业和扩张形式重新分配。该方法可复现，为测量长期性别权威重组提供可操作的量化路径。

title: When Aggregate Alignment Misleads: Auditing Policy Repair Without Per-State Expert Actions
summary: Agentic AI systems are increasingly used to edit, refine, and repair decision policies, but evaluating these edits is difficult when per-state expert action labels are unavailable. We study this problem in a hotel-pricing simulator where an agentic policy editor receives only region-level diagnostic feedback: summaries of how its price distribution differs from a benchmark policy across time, inventory, and market regions. The editor cannot observe benchmark actions, benchmark source code, reward numbers, or held-out outcomes, and may only propose constrained edits to a target-action table. On 5,000 held-out episodes, a multi-restart LLM editor reaches RevPAR 108.47 (95% CI 107.61 - 109.34), close to the benchmark policy's 108.75 (107.81 - 109.68), with paired gap (LLM minus benchmark) -0.276 and 95% CI [-0.692, 0.146]. A cheap diagnostic projection already recovers much of the revenue (107.90), so the LLM editor's distinctive gain is not raw revenue lift alone: it also reduces episode composition distance from 1.153 to 0.609. This is the strongest non-benchmark repair result. This profile is not explained by restart search alone: non-semantic proposers with up to 2,500 evaluations fall 8.77 - 14.57 RevPAR points short. Nor is it explained by plausible prompt format: a shuffled-diagnostic control breaks region-error correspondence and falls to RevPAR 94.30. The match is genuine but partial. A tree editor achieves stronger pooled alignment, 0.214 versus 0.266, and stronger reference-state D1, 0.328 versus 1.197, yet revenue falls to 98.91. These results show that agentic policy repair should be evaluated by whether diagnostic feedback becomes reliable closed-loop outcome, not by a single behavioral distance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在缺乏逐状态专家标签的情况下，如何通过区域级诊断反馈（而非基准动作或奖励）来评估和修复智能体AI策略。实验表明，多重启LLM编辑器在酒店定价模拟器中能达到接近基准策略的RevPAR（108.47 vs 108.75），并显著降低策略分布距离（从1.153降至0.609）。研究还发现，策略修复应基于诊断反馈是否能转化为可靠的闭环结果，而非单一的策略行为距离指标。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏逐状态专家动作标签的现实场景中，如何有效评估和修复智能体AI策略编辑效果是一个关键问题。现有方法难以应对仅能获取区域级诊断反馈（如价格分布与基准的差异）的约束条件，因此需要研究在这种受限信息下实现策略修复的可行性和评估标准。
AI.method: 在酒店定价模拟器中，智能体策略编辑器仅接收区域级诊断反馈（价格分布与基准策略在时间、库存、市场区域的差异摘要），无法直接观测基准动作、源代码、奖励数值或保留结果。编辑器通过多重启LLM对目标动作表提出受限编辑。实验设置了多种对照组：非语义搜索（高达2500次评估）、打乱诊断信息的控制组、以及树编辑器，以系统地验证LLM编辑器的效果来源。
AI.result: 多重启LLM编辑器在5000个保留测试集上达到RevPAR 108.47（95% CI: 107.61-109.34），接近基准策略的108.75（95% CI: 107.81-109.68），差距仅为-0.276（95% CI: -0.692, 0.146）。诊断投影基线已能恢复大部分收益（107.90），但LLM编辑器将策略分布距离从1.153降至0.609。非语义搜索器即使经过2500次评估，仍落后8.77-14.57 RevPAR；打乱诊断的控制组降至94.30 RevPAR。树编辑器实现了更好的对齐（0.214 vs 0.266）和参考状态D1（0.328 vs 1.197），但收益降至98.91。
AI.conclusion: 智能体策略修复的评估不应仅关注单一的行为距离指标，而应基于诊断反馈是否能可靠地转化为闭环输出结果。LLM编辑器在受限信息条件下能实现接近基准策略的表现，其独特价值在于同时优化了收益和策略分布匹配度。策略修复的效果评估需要综合考虑多维度指标。

title: Poisson-Gamma Modeling of Inter-Relational Dependencies in Dynamic Knowledge Graphs
comment: Accepted at the 42nd Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI 2026). 20 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables
summary: Dynamic knowledge graphs are ubiquitous in today's AI applications, as we represent molecular structures, social relationships, and language information using these graph models. As knowledge graphs evolve over time and are often noisy and incomplete, modeling their temporal and relational dependencies becomes crucial for downstream tasks. To address these challenges, this paper proposes PGRE (Poisson-Gamma Relational Evolution), a probabilistic model for modeling inter-relational dependencies in dynamic knowledge graphs. PGRE represents multi-relational temporal links via a Poisson-Bernoulli formulation. It introduces Gamma-distributed latent variables to capture entity-factor associations and cross-relation dependencies mediated by shared latent communities. A Gamma Markov process further models the temporal evolution of these latent variables, enabling principled characterization of relational dynamics. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that PGRE achieves competitive performance in link prediction, particularly in sparse settings, while revealing meaningful relational evolution patterns in dynamic knowledge graphs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PGRE（Poisson-Gamma关系演化）模型，一种用于动态知识图谱中关系依赖建模的概率模型。该模型通过Poisson-Bernoulli公式表示多关系时间链接，利用Gamma分布潜变量捕获实体-因子关联和跨关系依赖，并通过Gamma马尔可夫过程建模潜变量的时间演化。实验表明，PGRE在链接预测任务中表现优异，尤其在稀疏场景下，并能揭示动态知识图谱中有意义的关系演化模式。
AI.motivation: 动态知识图谱随时间演化且常含噪声和不完整性，现有模型难以有效建模其时间依赖和关系间依赖关系，因此需要一种能够同时捕获实体-因子关联、跨关系依赖及时间动态的概率模型。
AI.method: PGRE采用Poisson-Bernoulli公式对多关系时间链接建模；引入Gamma分布潜变量捕获实体-因子关联；通过共享潜社区实现跨关系依赖建模；利用Gamma马尔可夫过程建模潜变量的时间演化，以刻画关系动态。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的链接预测任务中，PGRE达到竞争性表现，尤其在稀疏设置下效果更佳，并能揭示动态知识图谱中有意义的关系演化模式。
AI.conclusion: PGRE有效解决了动态知识图谱中的关系依赖和时间演化建模问题，在稀疏场景下表现优异，为动态知识图谱分析提供了有力的概率建模工具。

title: Criterion-Conditional In-Context Learning: Evaluating Criterion-Shift Adaptation in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models can perform new tasks without parameter updates through in-context learning (ICL), whose core mechanism is utilizing the support set for task induction. In the standard ICL setting, once the task is induced, its decision criterion remains fixed. However, in real-world applications, many tasks exhibit a stable high-level intent, while their decision criteria shift according to specific requirements. Thus, we introduce a new setting, denoted as Criterion-Conditional In-Context Learning (CC-ICL), where models must infer the latent criterion from context and adjust predictions accordingly under fixed task semantics. To evaluate this capability, we propose two complementary metrics, Criterion Invariance and Criterion Sensitivity, capturing the model's robustness and adaptability under criterion shifts. We further construct CC-Bench, a multi-domain benchmark that supports evaluation under the CC-ICL setting. By employing a dual-level data hierarchy, CC-Bench enables legitimate ground-truth variation conditioned on the active criterion even when the task remains fixed. Experiments on CC-Bench reveal that most models exhibit a rigid boundary bias, struggling to align their decisions with the latent criterion. We also find that even a simple multi-criterion training strategy can significantly reduce this bias, improving Criterion Sensitivity and enabling 7B-scale models to surpass proprietary models without degrading general multimodal performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Criterion-Conditional In-Context Learning (CC-ICL)新范式，要求模型在固定任务语义下根据潜在标准调整预测，并构建CC-Bench基准。实验发现现有模型存在刚性边界偏差，而多标准训练策略可有效缓解。
AI.motivation: 现实任务中高层意图稳定但决策标准会动态变化，标准ICL的固定决策标准无法适应这一需求。
AI.method: 提出CC-ICL设置；设计Criterion Invariance和Criterion Sensitivity两个互补指标；构建CC-Bench多领域基准（双层级数据层次确保标准变化下ground-truth的合理性）。
AI.result: 大部分模型存在刚性边界偏差，难以对齐潜在标准；多标准训练策略可显著提升Criterion Sensitivity，使7B模型超越闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: CC-ICL能更好地反映现实应用需求；简单多标准训练即可有效缓解边界偏差，且不损害多模态通用性能。

title: From Judgments to Issues: Structured Extraction of Legal Reasoning with Citation-Hallucination Control
summary: We present an automated pipeline that decomposes Italian tax-court judgments into individual legal issues and extracts, for each issue, a structured XML representation grounded in the IRAC framework and the legal syllogism. The pipeline targets a corpus of approximately $330{,}000$ first- and second-instance decisions of the Italian tax courts and is built around a capable yet cost-efficient general-purpose model (DeepSeek V3), a choice driven by the need to process several hundred thousand documents at a sustainable cost. To address the well-documented unreliability of large language models on legal citations, we couple the extraction step with an automatic hallucination-detection filter that compares the references produced by the model with those identified in the judgment text by a dedicated parser (Linkoln), normalised to standard identifiers (URN-NIR, ECLI, CELEX). We validate the pipeline on $50$ judgments annotated by two PhDs in tax law, computing inter-annotator agreement and LLM-vs-expert agreement on both issue extraction and legal citations, together with a stand-alone evaluation of the hallucination filter. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first issue-level, expert-validated structured extraction pipeline with hallucination control for Italian tax-court decisions, and it provides a concrete starting point for downstream applications such as issue-level retrieval, citation-network analysis, and the construction of large-scale datasets of legal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个自动化流水线，用于将意大利税务法院判决分解为法律争点，并以IRAC框架和法律三段论为基础提取结构化XML表示，同时结合幻觉检测过滤器验证引用准确性，经专家标注验证，为法律推理的大规模应用提供了基础。
AI.motivation: 意大利税务法院积累了约33万份判决，缺乏自动化的结构化提取工具，而现有LLM在法律引用方面存在不可靠性，亟需一种既能大规模处理又能控制幻觉的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用DeepSeek V3作为核心模型进行IRAC结构提取；耦合Linkoln解析器识别判决文本中的引用，再通过幻觉检测过滤器比对模型输出与解析器结果；使用两位税法博士标注的50份判决进行验证，计算一致率。
AI.result: 验证了流水线在争点提取和法律引用方面的LLM与专家一致性，并单独评估了幻觉检测过滤器的效果。据作者称，这是首个经过专家验证、具备幻觉控制功能的意大利税务法院判决结构化提取流水线。
AI.conclusion: 该流水线为争点级检索、引用网络分析和大规模法律推理数据集构建等下游应用提供了具体起点。

title: From Mobile Data to Business Insights: An End-to-End Analytics Framework for Large-Scale Urban Mobility Analysis and Decision Support
summary: Real time location data derived from mobile applications is a powerful tool for addressing various urban challenges, including tourism planning, parking management, bus route optimization, and resource allocation. Besides, it offers invaluable insights for shaping strategic decisions in commercial domains such as location based services, market share analysis, and behavioral profiling. In this expansive study, we aim to address all of the aforementioned challenges by investigating the behaviors and patterns of smartphone users within urban environments, particularly in the domains of tourism, transportation, and retail. Our approach encompasses the development of a sophisticated data platform from inception to implementation, which includes the formulation of use cases, architectural design, and implementation of modules. We employ state of the art techniques and technologies, including data anonymization, ETL pipelines, and utilizing Google BigQuery and Vertex AI for data processing and machine learning model development. A modular architecture based on reusable analytical building blocks was developed to generate data products that support multiple stakeholder driven use cases. Additionally, we apply interactive data visualization techniques via Power BI to facilitate the effective interpretation of analytical findings by stakeholders. The developed models address a wide range of mobility analytics tasks, including mobility profiling, frequent trajectory mining, area of influence analysis, traffic anomaly detection, and origin destination pattern analysis. The results demonstrate the framework's ability to capture user mobility dynamics at fine spatial and temporal resolutions, providing actionable insights for urban planning and strategic business decision making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套基于智能手机实时位置数据的城市移动分析框架，涵盖数据平台构建、ETL流水线、机器学习建模及可视化，支持旅游、交通、零售等多场景的城市规划与商业决策。
AI.motivation: 利用移动应用实时位置数据解决城市挑战（旅游规划、停车管理、公交优化等）并支持商业决策（基于位置的服务、市场分析、行为画像），填补了从数据采集到多场景应用一体化框架的空白。
AI.method: 从零构建数据平台，包括用例定义、架构设计、模块实现；采用数据匿名化、ETL流水线、Google BigQuery和Vertex AI进行数据处理与机器学习；构建基于可复用分析模块的模块化架构；使用Power BI进行交互式可视化。
AI.result: 开发的模型成功实现了移动性画像、频繁轨迹挖掘、影响区域分析、流量异常检测及起讫点模式分析，能够以精细的时空粒度捕捉用户移动动态。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为城市规划和战略商业决策提供了可操作的洞察，证明其在实际应用中的有效性和实用性。

title: Dynamic Regret for Non-Stationary Linear Bandits via Misspecification Reductions
summary: Many online decision-making problems involve both round-specific feasible actions and drifting reward models: eligible ad impressions, feasible prices, and available treatments can change over time, while user preferences, demand curves, and patient responses may evolve. Motivated by these applications, we study non-stationary linear bandits with round-specific feasible decision sets. Existing methods that obtain the optimal \(\widetilde O(T^{2/3}P_T^{1/3})\) dependence, where \(P_T\) is the path length of the reward-parameter sequence, impose an orthogonal-structure assumption on round-specific decision sets, which can be restrictive in contextual applications. We address this gap through a unified misspecification-reduction viewpoint: after partitioning the horizon into blocks, we relate each block's dynamic regret to regret against a fixed-parameter linear bandit benchmark, with the within-block parameter drift entering as bounded misspecification. Restarting algorithms with misspecification-dependent regret guarantees then yields the optimal \(T^{2/3}P_T^{1/3}\) dynamic-regret dependence for both linear bandits with general compact decision sets and \(K\)-armed contextual linear bandits.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有回合特定可行决策集的非平稳线性老虎机问题，通过一种统一的误指定缩减视角，对算法进行分块重启，实现了最优的\(\widetilde O(T^{2/3}P_T^{1/3})\)动态遗憾界，且不要求决策集满足正交结构假设。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在获得最优动态遗憾界时依赖于回合特定决策集的正交结构假设，这在实际上下文应用中具有局限性。本文旨在去除这一限制，提出更通用的方法。
AI.method: 将时间划分成块，将每个块内的动态遗憾与固定参数线性老虎机基准下的遗憾相关联，将块内参数漂移视为有界误指定。然后使用具有误指定依赖遗憾保证的重启算法，得到最优动态遗憾界。
AI.result: 对具有一般紧致决策集的线性老虎机和K臂上下文线性老虎机，均实现了最优的\(T^{2/3}P_T^{1/3}\)动态遗憾依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 通过误指定缩减的统一视角，成功去除了正交结构假设，为更广泛的上下文应用提供了理论保证。

title: Classroom Behavior Monitoring with YOLO An Empirical Study in Higher Education Settings
summary: Classroom behavior monitoring plays a vital role in evaluating student engagement and improving teaching effectiveness. Traditional observation methods remain subjective and lack scalability. This study introduces a real-world dataset of classroom videos collected at the Banking Academy of Vietnam (BAV-Classroom dataset), annotated with nine distinctive behavioral categories. State-of-the-art Computer Vision models were evaluated and compared, with YOLOv11 achieving the best performance. Experimental results indicate that students' concentration often decreases notably during the final part of lectures, highlighting challenges in sustaining engagement. Our findings demonstrate the feasibility of applying computer vision for automated classroom monitoring, providing valuable insights for academic quality management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BAV-Classroom课堂视频数据集，评估了多种计算机视觉模型（YOLOv11表现最佳），发现学生在课堂后期注意力下降，验证了基于CV的自动化课堂监控的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统课堂行为观察方法主观性强且难以规模化，需要一种客观、自动化的课堂监控方法来评估学生参与度和教学质量。
AI.method: 构建了BAV-Classroom真实课堂视频数据集，标注9种行为类别；对比评估多种SOTA计算机视觉模型，其中YOLOv11表现最佳。
AI.result: YOLOv11在课堂行为识别任务中达到最优性能；实验发现学生在课堂后半段注意力显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 计算机视觉技术可用于自动化课堂监控，为学术质量管理提供有价值的洞察。

title: Efficient Decentralized Multi-task Dataset Valuation via Model Merging
summary: Accurate and efficient dataset valuation is essential for enabling fair and transparent data marketplaces, especially when multiple contributors provide data for training multi-task models. Most existing valuation methods, however, are limited to single-task settings, overlooking scenarios where a buyer aims to optimize performance across multiple downstream tasks. Moreover, traditional valuation approaches, such as Shapley-based or retraining-based methods, are computationally expensive and poorly suited for decentralized environments without a trusted central coordinator and with strict privacy constraints. We propose DMVM (Decentralized Multi-task Valuation via Model Merging), a novel framework that bypasses retraining and data sharing by leveraging task arithmetic to infer dataset contributions directly from model combinations. Instead of retraining or sharing raw data, DMVM quantifies how models trained on different datasets combine in parameter space to infer each dataset's marginal utility across multiple tasks. This formulation yields a valuation process that is scalable, computationally efficient, and explicitly aligned with multi-task generalization behavior. To support decentralized deployment, we introduce a secure aggregation protocol that enables collaborative valuation without revealing individual model parameters or private data. We also provide theoretical error bounds characterizing the approximation quality of DMVM and validate our framework through comprehensive experiments on computer vision and natural language processing tasks.

AI.tldr: DMVM是一个无需重训练和数据共享的去中心化多任务数据集估值框架，通过任务算术在参数空间量化模型组合对下游任务的边际贡献，并设计了安全聚合协议以保护隐私。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集估值方法大多局限于单任务场景，且基于Shapley值或重训练的方法计算开销大、不适合去中心化、隐私敏感的环境，无法支持多任务模型训练中的数据贡献公平评估。
AI.method: 利用任务算术（Task Arithmetic）直接推断模型组合在参数空间中的贡献，避免重训练和数据共享；引入安全聚合协议实现去中心化协作估值，并给出理论误差界。
AI.result: 在计算机视觉和自然语言处理任务上的综合实验验证了DMVM的有效性，证明其估值结果与多任务泛化行为对齐，且具备可扩展性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: DMVM为去中心化多任务数据市场提供了首个可扩展、隐私保护且高效的数据集估值方案，填补了现有方法在多任务场景下的空白。

title: Efficient bias mitigation in T2I diffusion models using Concept Graphs
summary: Text-to-Image diffusion models often propagate harmful bias inherited from the training data. Existing bias mitigation techniques typically intervene only at the text encoder or provide inference-time guidance, often leading to generations that collapse into semantically incoherent outputs. To address these limitations, we introduce CO-ALIGN (Concept Ontology Alignment), a novel bias mitigation approach based on concept-graph alignment that operates on the model's internal concept ontology. By aligning concepts within the text encoder and denoiser, CO-ALIGN achieves substantial bias reduction while preserving generative integrity. We demonstrate the effectiveness of concept-graph alignment across three paradigms: text-encoders, denoisers and joint text-denoiser ontology alignment. CO-ALIGN outperforms the state of the art, improving fairness by $30\%$, $ΔFID=11.4$ in image quality, $2.8\%$ in image fidelity, all while reducing semantically incoherent outputs by $88\%$. Beyond bias mitigation, we show that CO-ALIGN benefits other downstream tasks as well. In particular, our experiments demonstrate that better-aligned internal ontologies enhance concept unlearning robustness across multiple unlearning techniques.

AI.tldr: 提出了CO-ALIGN方法，通过概念图对齐技术同时作用于文本编码器和去噪器，有效减少文本到图像扩散模型中的有害偏见，同时保持生成质量，在多个指标上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型常从训练数据中继承有害偏见，而现有偏见缓解方法要么只干预文本编码器，要么提供推理时指导，导致生成结果在语义上不连贯、输出崩溃。
AI.method: 提出CO-ALIGN（概念本体对齐），基于概念图对齐方法，将文本编码器和去噪器内部的概念本体进行对齐，实现三个范式：文本编码器对齐、去噪器对齐、以及联合文本-去噪器本体对齐。
AI.result: 公平性提升30%，ΔFID=11.4（图像质量），图像保真度提升2.8%，语义不连贯输出减少88%。此外，该对齐方法还能提升概念遗忘的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 概念图对齐是一种有效的偏见缓解策略，不仅能减少偏见、保持生成完整性，还能惠及其他下游任务（如概念遗忘）。

title: Variable Bit-width Quantization: Learning Per-Group Precision for "Bigger-but-Smaller" Language Models
summary: Low-bit quantization shrinks language models but treats precision as a single global hyper-parameter: every weight uses the same bit-width. We introduce Variable Bit-width Quantization (VBQ), a training-time method in which each contiguous group of 64 weights learns its own resolution from {1,2,4,8} bits via a Gumbel-Softmax relaxation, trained jointly by an alternating optimization that gives the precision logits a clean, task-aligned signal. VBQ discovers a consistent, strongly heterogeneous allocation within individual projection types, not merely across layers, impossible to express with per-layer methods: 69% of groups collapse to 1 bit, the LM head averages 1.09 bits, while the first MLP block keeps ~2.5 bits. This pattern is stable enough to freeze into a fixed recipe and reuse without further search. The recipe yields a "bigger-but-smaller" regime: a 131M model at 1.82 mean bits reaches perplexity 4.2 on TinyStories, beating a 55M FP16 model (PPL 4.4) at 3.8x less storage, and lets a 1.46B model on FineWeb-Edu match a 593M FP16 control at ~3.7x less storage with 2.5x more parameters. As quality-per-byte, VBQ is 3.9-8.4x more efficient than FP16. The recipe maps directly to packed low-bit storage, so it also accelerates inference: with custom fused dequantize-and-multiply kernels, memory-bandwidth-bound autoregressive decode is faster at equal output, and the speedup grows with scale (parity at 131M, 1.9x at 1.0B, 4.7x at 9B on Apple silicon). A distributional analysis (KL divergence and argmax-flip rate) reveals a striking mechanism: deeper layers progressively self-heal the quantization error injected by early layers. The win is a from-scratch, train-time phenomenon; scaling the search economically beyond 1.5B parameters remains open. VBQ reframes precision as a learnable, non-uniform resource and shows that spending a fixed bit budget unevenly beats spending it uniformly.

AI.tldr: VBQ提出了一种可变比特宽度量化方法，让每个连续64个权重组通过Gumbel-Softmax学习{1,2,4,8}比特的精度，发现非均匀分配比均匀分配更优：69%组压缩到1比特，整体平均1.82比特的131M模型在PPL上超越55M FP16模型，存储减少3.8倍，推理速度提升最高达4.7倍。
AI.motivation: 传统低比特量化将精度视为全局超参数，所有权重使用相同比特宽度，忽略了不同权重对精度需求的差异性。本文旨在探索是否可以通过非均匀分配比特预算来获得更好的效率-质量权衡。
AI.method: 提出VBQ：每个连续64个权重组通过Gumbel-Softmax松弛学习从{1,2,4,8}比特中选择精度；采用交替优化使精度logits获得清晰的任务对齐信号；训练后可将分配模式冻结为固定方案直接复用。
AI.result: 发现了高度异构的精度分配模式：69%组坍缩到1比特，LM头仅1.09比特，第一MLP块约2.5比特；131M模型1.82平均比特在TinyStories上PPL 4.2优于55M FP16（PPL 4.4），存储减少3.8倍；1.46B模型匹配593M FP16控制，存储减少约3.7倍；推理速度提升在9B模型上达4.7倍。
AI.conclusion: VBQ将精度重新定义为可学习的非均匀资源，证明在固定比特预算下，非均匀分配优于均匀分配。质量-字节效率比FP16高3.9-8.4倍。深层网络能自愈早期层注入的量化误差。但超过1.5B参数的搜索经济性问题仍需解决。

title: Evaluating Intellectual Property Guardrails of Generative Image Models: A Technical Report
summary: Generative image models are capable of producing images that bear a strong resemblance to, or replicate, recognizable intellectual property (IP). In this technical report, we present a benchmark and automated evaluation pipeline to test for evidence of IP guardrails in generative image models along with the propensity for these models to generate images with recognizable IP. The IP categories we tested include fictional characters, celebrity likeness, and commercial logos and do not encompass the full range of IP which may be implicated by image generation models. We evaluated fourteen widely used text-to-image models, including three self-hosted open weights models and eleven private models. While all of the private models were observed to refuse generations at some level due to IP guardrails, the frequency of generation refusals varied substantially among models. The refusal rates also varied considerably across the different IP categories tested. Commercial logos were refused least frequently and were successfully generated at the highest rate, on average. Though the rate varies, all models tested readily generated images containing recognizable IP as of March 2026.

AI.tldr: 本技术报告构建了一个基准测试与自动化评估流程，用于检测生成式图像模型的知识产权（IP）护栏效果及其生成可识别IP图像的倾向。测试涵盖虚构角色、名人肖像和商业标识三类IP，评估了14种主流文生图模型（3种开源+11种私有模型）。结果发现私有模型均存在一定程度的IP拒绝机制，但拒绝率差异显著；商业标识被拒绝最少且生成成功率最高；截至2026年3月，所有模型仍会生成含可识别IP的图像。
AI.motivation: 生成式图像模型能生成与可识别知识产权（IP）高度相似甚至复制的图像，可能引发侵权风险。目前缺乏统一的基准和自动化评估方法来系统检测模型的IP护栏效果及其生成IP相关图像的倾向。
AI.method: 构建了包含虚构角色、名人肖像、商业标识三类IP的基准测试集，并开发了自动化评估管道。对14种主流文生图模型（3种开源权重模型+11种私有模型）进行系统评估，统计各模型的生成拒绝率与成功生成率。
AI.result: 所有私有模型均存在一定程度的IP拒绝机制，但拒绝率差异显著；不同IP类别之间拒绝率差异大，商业标识被拒绝最少且生成成功率最高；截至2026年3月，所有测试模型仍会生成含可识别IP的图像。
AI.conclusion: 当前生成式图像模型在IP保护方面存在明显不足，尤其是对商业标识的防护最弱，亟需改进IP护栏机制。

title: Spectral Signatures of Large Language Models
summary: The rapidly growing repository of publicly available large language models (LLMs) presents significant challenges for systematic management and quantification at scale, such as model lineage tracing, licensing, and evaluation. However, task-specific benchmarks are insufficient for this setting, as LLMs differ widely in architectures, scales, and training procedures. To address this challenge, we adopt spectral shape-based metrics for managing and quantifying LLMs based on Heavy-Tailed Self-Regularization theory. Our approach uses the shape information of the weight empirical spectral density as a compact spectral signature of each model. This signature captures intrinsic properties of pretrained models and remains robust during post-training, making it suitable for model-level analysis. In addition, this metric is data-free, computationally-efficient, and scale-invariant, enabling large-scale analysis in practice. Moreover, we curate a large and diverse model corpus consisting of major open-source LLM families, and use it to systematically benchmark spectral and non-spectral metrics across models and downstream tasks. We show that our spectral signature supports the tracking of the model lineage, the unsupervised clustering of similar models, and the quantification of the model performance. Overall, the proposed spectral signature provides a meaningful proxy for broad performance trends across LLMs, enabling efficient organization, comparison, and analysis of large model collections.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于谱形状的指标（重尾自正则化理论）来管理和量化大型语言模型，该指标利用权重经验谱密度的形状信息作为紧凑的谱签名，能够追踪模型谱系、聚类相似模型并量化模型性能，且具有数据无关、计算高效、尺度不变等优点。
AI.motivation: 公开可用的LLM数量快速增长，传统的任务特定基准难以应对模型在架构、规模、训练过程上的巨大差异，缺乏一种系统化的、可规模化的模型管理与量化方法。
AI.method: 基于重尾自正则化理论，利用权重经验谱密度的形状信息构建紧凑的谱签名，作为每个预训练模型的内在特征表示，该签名在训练后保持鲁棒性。
AI.result: 构建了包含主要开源LLM家族的大规模模型语料库，系统对比了谱与非谱指标；谱签名有效支持模型谱系追踪、无监督聚类及性能量化，为模型性能趋势提供有效代理。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的谱签名能够实现大规模模型集合的高效组织、比较与分析，克服了传统基准在异构LLM环境中的局限性。

title: Personalized Causal Recourse: A Human-In-The-Loop Approach
comment: Accepted at the 4th World Conference on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI 2026)
summary: Algorithmic recourse addresses the challenge of providing tailored recommendations to users affected by unfavorable machine learning decisions, in potentially high-stakes scenarios. Traditional approaches to recourse often rely on the closest counterfactual explanations or assume a priori knowledge of a user's causal structure, resulting in interventions that overlook individual contexts and specific feature interactions. To overcome these limitations, we study a human-in-the-loop framework that iteratively approximates the user's structural causal model through interactive queries via Bayesian inference before producing recourse recommendations. This framework exploits humans' feedback to improve the identification of causal effects, allowing personalized recourse that is plausible, cost-effective, and aligned with the actual causal dependencies of each user. As a proof of concept, we evaluate this framework through simulated human responses. Our simulations across linear and non-linear causal models show promising results, though challenges remain in capturing complex, non-linear structures, emphasizing the importance of accurate approximations and robust noise distribution modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种人机交互框架，通过贝叶斯推断迭代近似用户的结构因果模型，从而生成个性化、可行且符合用户因果依赖的反事实干预建议。
AI.motivation: 传统算法反事实干预方法依赖最近邻解释或预设因果结构，忽略了个体特征交互与上下文信息，导致干预建议缺乏个性化与实用性。
AI.method: 采用人机交互框架，通过交互式查询收集用户反馈，利用贝叶斯推断逐步逼近用户的结构因果模型，再基于近似模型生成因果干预建议。
AI.result: 在线性和非线性因果模型上的模拟实验表明该方法具有潜力，但在捕捉复杂非线性结构方面仍存在挑战，需进一步改进近似精度和噪声分布建模。
AI.conclusion: 人机交互式因果建模为个性化算法干预提供了新路径，但处理非线性复杂因果结构仍是未来需要攻克的难点。

title: Bootstrap Flow-Map Tree Sampling Enables Online Feedback Driven Search
summary: In many scientific and engineering domains, maximizing discovery within a limited sampling budget demands strategic, observation-guided exploration. While generative models have enabled training-free reward alignment, current methods typically excel in local searches within narrow regions of the underlying distribution. These approaches struggle when preferences are unknown a priori and only revealed through sequential feedback-a scenario demanding broad exploration to uncover high-utility regions. To address this, we introduce Bootstrap Flow-Map-Tree (a.k.a BFMT), a novel computationally efficient sampling framework designed for history-aware global search and alignment under sampling budget constraints. BFMT enables full tree-path construction from any tree depth using a single function evaluation, drastically reducing computational overhead while providing critical foresight for sequential sampling. By enabling dynamic transition time steps scheduling, BFMT efficiently allocates its sampling budget, smoothly transitioning from broad global exploration to fine-grained local refinement of high-utility modes discovered through exploration. Extensive experiments and ablations across diverse search and alignment tasks demonstrate that BFMT substantially outperforms baseline approaches.

AI.tldr: BFMT是一种基于流的树结构采样框架，通过单次函数评估构建完整树路径，实现预算约束下从全局探索到局部精化的自适应采样，在搜索和对齐任务中显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型在奖励对齐中擅长局部搜索，但无法处理先验偏好未知、仅通过序列反馈逐步揭示的场景——这需要广泛的全局探索来发现高价值区域。
AI.method: 提出Bootstrap Flow-Map-Tree (BFMT)，支持任意深度下单次函数评估构建完整树路径，并引入动态时间步调度，使采样预算从全局探索平滑过渡到局部精化。
AI.result: 在多种搜索和对齐任务中，BFMT相比基线方法有显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: BFMT为预算约束下历史感知的全局搜索与对齐提供了高效且实用的框架。

title: RotateAttention: RoPE-Aware Rotation and Range Rectification for INT4 Quantized Attention in Video Generation
summary: In \textbf{DiT-based video generation models equipped with 3D Rotary Position Embeddings (3D RoPE)}, the attention mechanism remains a primary computational bottleneck due to its quadratic complexity with respect to sequence length. While quantized \textbf{FlashAttention} offers a promising path toward hardware acceleration, existing low-bit quantization methods overlook two critical challenges in this setting: \textbf{1)} applying online rotation matrices -- a widely used technique for mitigating outliers in Queries ($Q$) and Keys ($K$) -- is difficult to reconcile with \textbf{RoPE}; and \textbf{2)} the non-negative attention matrix $P = \exp(QK - \max(QK))$ makes symmetric quantization waste half of the 4-bit dynamic range. In this work, we observe that the outlier distributions of $Q$ and $K$ are strongly affected by the dimensional partitioning of \textbf{3D RoPE}. Based on this finding, we propose \textbf{RotateAttention}, an efficient \textbf{mixed-precision INT4 FlashAttention} framework tailored for \textbf{DiT-based video generation models with 3D RoPE}, using selective \textbf{FP16 fallback} for accuracy-sensitive attention blocks and denoising steps. RotateAttention introduces two core techniques: \textbf{1) RoPE-aware Rotation}, which employs either mergeable rotation matrices that can be fused into RoPE or negligible-overhead matrices to mitigate RoPE-induced outliers in $Q$ and $K$; and \textbf{2) Range-optimized $P$ Quantization}, which uses fixed scales and zero-points to fully exploit the \textbf{INT4 numerical range} with minimal computational overhead. Experiments show that \textbf{RotateAttention} preserves video generation quality nearly identical to full-precision baselines while achieving up to 1.68$\times$ end-to-end speedup and 2.2$\times$ kernel-level acceleration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RotateAttention，一种面向基于3D RoPE的DiT视频生成模型的混合精度INT4 FlashAttention框架，通过RoPE感知旋转和范围优化P量化两项技术，在保持生成质量的同时实现最高1.68倍端到端加速。
AI.motivation: DiT视频生成模型中注意力机制因序列长度的二次复杂度成为计算瓶颈，现有低比特量化方法无法解决两个关键问题：1) 在线旋转矩阵与RoPE难以兼容；2) 非负注意力矩阵P使得对称量化浪费一半INT4动态范围。
AI.method: 1) RoPE感知旋转(RoPE-aware Rotation)：设计可合并入RoPE或计算开销极小的旋转矩阵，缓解RoPE导致的Q和K异常值；2) 范围优化P量化(Range-optimized P Quantization)：使用固定缩放因子和零点，充分利用INT4数值范围，最小化计算开销。采用选择性FP16回退策略保护精度敏感的注意力块和去噪步骤。
AI.result: 在保持与全精度基线几乎相同的视频生成质量下，实现最高1.68倍端到端加速和2.2倍内核级加速。
AI.conclusion: RotateAttention有效解决了3D RoPE场景下低比特量化的两大挑战，为DiT视频生成模型提供了高效硬件加速方案。

title: The Classics at SemEval-2026 Task 3: Combining Transformer Models and LLM-Generated Annotations for Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
summary: This paper presents an approach to the SemEval-2026 Task 3: Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis. We investigate methods for moving beyond traditional categorical sentiment (e.g., positive or negative) to predict fine-grained, real-valued scores for sentiment "valence" (positivity) and "arousal" (intensity). We participate in two subtasks: predicting these scores for given aspects (Subtask 1) and extracting full sets of sentiment details, including aspects, categories, and opinions alongside their scores (Subtask 3). Our approach for the regression task involves a weighted ensemble of transformer-based encoder models. For the Russian language, we further enhance the input by using a large language model (LLM) to generate synthetic sentiment descriptions. For the extraction task, we fine-tune a decoder LLM to perform structured prediction, allowing the system to identify sentiment elements and estimate their numerical scores simultaneously.

AI.tldr: 本文针对SemEval-2026任务3（基于维度的方面级情感分析），提出使用Transformer集成模型进行情感效价与唤醒度的回归预测（子任务1），并通过微调解码器LLM进行结构化预测，同时提取方面、类别、观点及其数值分数（子任务3）。对俄语任务，还利用LLM生成合成情感描述增强输入。
AI.motivation: 传统分类式情感分析（如正面/负面）无法捕捉情感的细微差异，需要向连续值的情感维度（效价与唤醒度）扩展，以实现更精细的情感理解。
AI.method: 回归任务采用加权集成多个Transformer编码器模型；俄语任务中额外使用LLM生成合成情感描述增强输入。提取任务则微调解码器LLM进行结构化预测，同时识别情感元素并估计数值分数。
AI.result: 论文未在摘要中给出具体实验结果，但从方法设计可预期在SemEval-2026任务3上取得有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了从分类式情感分析向连续维度情感分析迁移的有效路径，验证了Transformer集成与LLM结构化预测在细粒度情感分析中的潜力。

title: Demonstrating Generalization Failures via Mixtures of Conditional Policies
summary: Post-training of frontier language models is conducted on curated task suites, and inevitably leaves a distribution shift between training and deployment environments. This exposes developers to generalization failures, which are relatively poorly understood. To better understand such generalization failures, we believe the community should construct clean demonstrations under simplified conditions. To facilitate this, we propose a simple and flexible way to construct language models which fail to generalize in controllable ways when subsequently trained with Reinforcement Learning (RL) on a given distribution of training tasks. Our construction uses Supervised Fine-Tuning on a dataset of a mixture of transcripts corresponding to a collection of 'conditional policies', which can each independently be assigned certain behaviors on each different task distribution, to obtain a model that is then well approximated as a 'mixture of conditional policies.' We observe that RL training then selects for policies that obtain the highest reward on the training distribution. This can produce striking behaviors: in a controlled setting with two distributions containing identical questions prepended with two different 'trigger strings', RL training on either distribution actively degrades performance on the other to zero, even though the underlying task is identical. We also use our construction to illustrate two novel ways in which generalization may fail in future language models, corresponding to distribution shifts of task coverage and temporal context respectively. While our construction is deliberately simple and may not closely resemble 'natural' generalization failures, the resulting 'model organisms' are of interest for alignment stress-testing and generalization science, and can be used as existence proofs that training success and generalization can come apart in structured ways.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可控构建语言模型泛化失败的方法：通过监督微调将模型构造成“条件策略的混合体”，随后用强化学习在特定任务分布上训练时，模型会选择性优化该分布上的高奖励策略，导致在其他分布上性能主动下降至零，从而揭示训练成功与泛化能力可能系统性分离的现象。
AI.motivation: 前沿语言模型后训练存在训练与部署环境之间的分布偏移，导致泛化失败问题，但这类失败机制尚不清晰。作者希望通过简化可控的实验设置，系统性地理解和展示泛化失败的产生原因。
AI.method: 提出一种可扩展的构造方法：通过监督微调在混合条件策略的转录数据集上训练模型，使其近似为“条件策略的混合体”。随后在特定任务分布上使用强化学习进行训练，观察模型对训练分布高奖励策略的选择性偏好。
AI.result: 在控制实验中，两个分布包含相同问题但带有不同触发字符串，RL在任一分布训练后，模型在另一分布上的性能主动下降至零。此外，还展示了两种新型泛化失败模式：任务覆盖范围的分布偏移和时间上下文偏移。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可作为“模型生物体”用于对齐压力测试和泛化科学研究，证明了训练成功与泛化能力可以在结构化方式下系统性分离，为理解未来语言模型的泛化失败提供了重要存在性证明。

title: CoFEND: A Cross-Modal Fusion End-to-End Network for Cold-Start Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction
summary: Cold-start drug-drug interaction (DDI) prediction for new drugs is critical for minimizing unexpected adverse drug reactions. The key challenge is to capture similarity between new and known drugs. However, such similarity is closely associated with complex relationships and mechanisms among drugs, enzymes, transporters, molecular structures, and other biomedical entities. Existing methods have three limitations in capturing such similarity: (1) only partial relationships and mechanisms are considered, which overlooks cross-modal information and yields incomplete or biased similarity modeling; (2) similarity computation between new and known drugs is conducted separately across modalities and performed offline for cold-start DDI prediction, leading to misalignment between similarity computation and DDI prediction; and (3) existing interpretability analyses are typically single-modality and focus primarily on key determinants of the perpetrator drug, while the underlying causes of susceptibility for the victim drug are seldom investigated. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel Cross-Modal-Fused End-to-End Learning Network (CMF-ELN) with three components. First, diverse multimodal information is leveraged to construct four types of drug-centered knowledge graphs, enabling comprehensive similarity modeling under reconstruction-based supervision. Second, a four-channel graph autoencoder is designed to fuse cross-modal similarity within an end-to-end learning framework. Finally, a two-stage interpretability scheme is devised to precisely localize key factors for both perpetrator and victim drugs. Extensive experiments on two real datasets demonstrate that CMF-ELN achieves significantly higher prediction accuracy and more comprehensive interpretability of mechanisms than its peers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CMF-ELN，一种用于药物-药物相互作用（DDI）冷启动预测的跨模态融合端到端学习网络，通过构建四种药物知识图谱、四通道图自编码器及两阶段可解释性方案，显著提升新药DDI预测精度和机制可解释性。
AI.motivation: 新药冷启动DDI预测对于减少意想不到的不良药物反应至关重要。现有方法在捕捉新药与已知药相似性时存在三大问题：(1)仅考虑部分关系和机制，忽略跨模态信息；(2)相似性计算与DDI预测分离，导致错位；(3)可解释性分析仅关注单模态且侧重肇事药物，很少研究受害药物的易感性原因。
AI.method: CMF-ELN包含三个组件：(1)利用多种模态信息构建四种以药物为中心的知识图谱，在重建监督下进行综合相似性建模；(2)设计四通道图自编码器，在端到端学习框架内融合跨模态相似性；(3)设计两阶段可解释性方案，精确定位肇事药物和受害药物的关键因素。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上的大量实验表明，CMF-ELN在预测准确性上显著优于现有方法，并且能够提供更全面的机制可解释性。
AI.conclusion: CMF-ELN有效解决了冷启动DDI预测中的跨模态信息缺失、相似性计算与预测错位、以及可解释性不完整等问题，为药物安全评估提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: Reliability-Aware CT-MRI Registration: A Quality Engineering Framework with Stability Analysis and Risk Classification
summary: Multimodal CT-MRI registration is central to image-guided radiotherapy, surgical navigation, and diagnostic workflows, but most pipelines report only aggregate quality metrics without per-case reliability signals. We propose a reliability-aware framework that converts registration quality into Green/Yellow/Red risk categories using data-learned thresholds. CT images were registered to T1-weighted MRI using rigid and affine transformations on 90 paired slices from 18 patients across brain, abdominal, and neck anatomies. Reliability was assessed using Delta NMI, Delta SSIM, Dice overlap, registration stability, and inverse consistency error, combined into a single score R. Thresholds learned from training patients were applied unchanged to held-out test patients. Affine registration outperformed rigid registration on NMI and SSIM, yielding 44% Green classifications versus 33% for rigid. Reliability-filtered registrations improved the average alignment profile compared with unfiltered methods. Per-anatomy analysis showed substantial variation, with stronger reliability for abdominal registrations than brain registrations. Weight sensitivity analysis identified Dice overlap as the dominant reliability component. The proposed framework provides an interpretable quality-control layer for multimodal registration, while risk thresholds reflect statistical rather than clinical validation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于数据学习阈值的可靠性感知框架，将多模态CT-MRI配准质量分为绿/黄/红三个风险等级，在18名患者的90对切片上验证，发现仿射配准优于刚性配准（44% vs 33%绿色分类），Dice重叠是主导可靠性指标，不同解剖部位存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 现有配准管线仅报告聚合质量指标，缺乏每例数据的可靠性信号，无法为临床提供个案层面的可信度判断。
AI.method: 使用Delta NMI、Delta SSIM、Dice重叠、配准稳定性和逆一致性误差五个指标组合成单一得分R，通过训练集学习阈值，将配准质量分为Green/Yellow/Red三级，在脑部、腹部、颈部三个解剖部位的CT-MRI配准上进行验证。
AI.result: 仿射配准在NMI和SSIM上优于刚性配准，绿色分类比例44% vs 33%；可靠性过滤后配准平均对齐优于未过滤方法；腹部配准可靠性强于脑部；Dice重叠是主导可靠性成分。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为多模态配准提供了可解释的质量控制层，但风险阈值反映的是统计验证而非临床验证，需要进一步临床效度评估。

title: CaresAI at SMM4H-HeaRD 2026: Predicting TNM Staging
summary: This study aims to predict Tumor, Node, and Metastasis (TNM) stage labels independently, with the Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) pathology report as the sixth shared task of SMM4H-HeaRD 2026. The problem is framed as three multi-label classification tasks. We explore both classical and deep learning approaches using Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF) features and embeddings from ClinicalBERT, BioBERT, and PubMedBERT. These representations are used with Logistic Regression (LR), Light Gradient Boosting Machine (LightGBM), Feed-Forward Neural Networks (FFNN), and Wide Residual Networks (WRN). Our results show that individual embeddings perform similarly to the TNM label classification, while their combination improves its predictive ability. WRN achieves AUROC scores of 0.839 (T), 0.8502 (N), and 0.803 (M) with F1-scores of 0.622, 0.702, and 0.9337, respectively, for the training phase. LightGBM with TF-IDF performs best with AUROC scores of 0.9368 (T), 0.9524 (N), and 0.8311 (M) and F1-scores of 0.7559 (T), 0.7384 (N), and 0.7017 (M) during the training phase. Furthermore, the result of the Codabench for the test sets indicates a Macro-F1 score of 0.978, 0.957, and 0.879 for the T, N, and M categories respectively for test set 1; while test set 2 records a Macro-F1 score for T, N, and M is 0.807, 0.767, 1.0 respectively. However, performance declined during the evaluation phase of the test sets, a drop from 0.938 to 0.858 of test set 1 to 2, for the Macro-F1 score across all stages; suggesting limitations in model generalizability, sensitivity to class imbalance, and challenges in processing lengthy clinical documents. Although this study provides an efficient baseline model and a reproducible pipeline, further optimization and validation are required before it can be considered suitable for use in a real-world clinical setting.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对SMM4H-HeaRD 2026共享任务，利用TF-IDF和多种BERT嵌入（ClinicalBERT、BioBERT、PubMedBERT），结合LR、LightGBM、FFNN和WRN等模型，独立预测TNM分期标签。结果表明嵌入组合优于单独使用，LightGBM+TF-IDF在训练阶段表现最佳（AUROC最高达0.9524），但在测试集上性能下降，存在泛化性不足和类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 旨在利用TCGA病理报告独立预测TNM分期标签，为癌症分期自动化提供基线模型和可复现流程。
AI.method: 将问题建模为三个多标签分类任务，使用TF-IDF和ClinicalBERT、BioBERT、PubMedBERT嵌入，结合LR、LightGBM、FFNN和WRN模型进行训练与评估。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了有效的基线模型和可复现流程，但模型泛化性不足、受类别不平衡影响，且处理长临床文档存在挑战，需进一步优化验证后才能用于真实临床环境。

title: MentalThink: Shaping Thoughts in Mental SVG World
summary: We introduce MentalThink, a visual-symbolic reasoning paradigm that equips Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) with an executable mechanism for "mental" visualization. The core of MentalThink is a think-with-SVG pipeline, where the model learns to generate, render, and interpret scalable vector graphics (SVG) code as an intermediate visual representation for multi-turn reasoning. By creating structured vector sketches, the model can externalize spatial hypotheses, inspect them through deterministic rendering, and reason within a constrained geometric space, effectively mimicking the human process of mental imagery. We instantiate this paradigm through a two-stage training framework, combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for SVG syntactic alignment with multi-turn Reinforcement Learning (RL) to encourage iterative inspection, revision, and refinement of intermediate visual hypotheses. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that MentalThink achieves superior performance on spatial understanding and reasoning benchmarks (e.g., 55.1% on VSIBench, 76.0% on MindCube), showing that executable vector graphics provide a verifiable visual workspace for dynamic perspective taking, visual reflection, and compositional scene construction.

AI.tldr: MentalThink 提出了一种视觉-符号推理范式，让多模态大模型通过生成和操作 SVG 代码进行多轮空间推理，类似人类"mental imagery"过程，在两个基准上分别达到 55.1% 和 76.0% 的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 MLLM 在处理复杂的空间推理任务时缺乏显式的中间视觉表示机制，难以像人类一样通过"心理图像"进行迭代式的空间假设检验与修正。
AI.method: 提出 think-with-SVG 管线：模型生成 SVG 代码作为中间视觉表示，经过确定性渲染后进行多轮推理；采用两阶段训练框架：SFT 对齐 SVG 语法，多轮 RL 鼓励迭代检查、修正和优化中间视觉假设。
AI.result: 在 VSIBench 上达到 55.1%，在 MindCube 上达到 76.0%，展示了可执行矢量图形在动态视角转换、视觉反思和组合式场景构建方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 可执行的矢量图形（SVG）为 MLLM 提供了一个可验证的视觉工作空间，使其能够像人类一样进行动态空间推理，有效提升了空间理解与推理能力。

title: In-span learning: adapting reduced-order models using their own predictions
summary: Reduced-order models compress high-dimensional dynamics into low-dimensional representations that can be evaluated rapidly, but they lose accuracy when online dynamics drift beyond the training data. Adaptive methods address this by updating the subspace online with external, out-of-span information, such as full-order corrections or sensor snapshots. We discovered that a complementary and previously unexploited in-span adaptation channel exists within the current reduced subspace. By streaming the model's own predictions through an incremental singular-value decomposition with forgetting, we obtain a trajectory-informed spectral preconditioner, in which the subspace is unchanged but the basis is reweighted and realigned toward the modes visited by the dynamics. This enables the model to absorb future out-of-span corrections more effectively. We expose aspects of this mechanism on a three-dimensional spiral and confirm it on viscous Burgers and Fisher-KPP dynamics. We also discuss how in-span learning can be viewed as a dynamical-systems analogue of in-context learning. More broadly, in-span learning suggests a new principle for computational science, revealing that model-generated trajectories contain more usable information than previously recognized.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的"在子空间内学习"（in-span learning）方法，通过流式处理模型自身预测轨迹并结合带遗忘的增量奇异值分解，在不改变降阶子空间的前提下对基向量进行重新加权和对齐，从而提升自适应降阶模型对外部修正的吸纳能力。
AI.motivation: 传统自适应降阶模型依赖外部、超出子空间范围的信息（如全阶修正或传感器快照）来更新子空间；但现有方法忽略了在当前降阶子空间内部也存在着可用的信息通道。作者发现模型自身生成的预测轨迹含有未被充分利用的信息，可用于提升模型性能。
AI.method: 将模型的自身预测轨迹通过带遗忘因子的增量奇异值分解进行流式处理，获得一个轨迹信息的谱预条件子。这个过程不改变子空间本身，而是对基向量进行重新加权和重新对齐，使其朝向动力学实际访问的模态方向调整。
AI.result: 在三维螺旋系统上揭示了该机制的关键特性，并在粘性Burgers方程和Fisher-KPP动力学上验证了有效性。该方法使模型能够更有效地吸收未来的超出子空间范围的外部修正。
AI.conclusion: 在子空间内学习可以视为动力系统类比于上下文学习（in-context learning）的概念。更广泛地，这项工作揭示了模型生成的轨迹中包含的可利用信息比以往认识到的更多，为计算科学提出了新的原则性思路。

title: Homer: Understanding Long-form Videos with Hierarchical Memory and Agentic Reasoning
summary: Multimodal large language models excel on short clips but struggle on hour-long videos in an online setting, where frames are processed incrementally under limited memory. Existing online methods either retain compact visual representations that lack semantic structure, or build higher-level memory stores organized around temporal proximity rather than explicit causal links, leaving multi-hop narrative reasoning to be reconstructed by the LLM at every query. We bridge this gap with \textsc{Homer}, a Hierarchical Online Memory Exploration and Reasoning framework. \textsc{Homer}'s memory mirrors the multi-scale structure of long videos, ranging from raw perception, to recurring entities, to events connected by explicit temporal and causal relations. Its agentic reasoner then explores this memory the way humans do, locating the relevant scene, looking up details, and composing the answer through multi-round memory retrieval, with a harness that verifies and corrects each step. \textsc{Homer} outperforms the previous best agent method by $+5.5$, $+10.8$, and $+4.4$ points on M3-Bench-robot, M3-Bench-web, and Video-MME-Long, and consistently lifts three various LLM backbones, indicating a model-agnostic structural capability for grounded retrieval over long videos.

AI.tldr: Homer是一个层次化的在线记忆探索与推理框架，通过构建多尺度记忆结构（从原始感知到实体再到事件及其因果关联）和智能体推理器，提升了多模态大模型在长视频在线场景下的推理能力，在多个基准上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有在线长视频方法存在两个主要缺陷：要么保留紧凑但缺乏语义结构的视觉表示，要么按时间邻近性组织记忆而忽略因果联系，导致多跳叙事推理效率低下。本文旨在弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 提出Homer框架，包含层次化记忆结构（原始感知→实体→事件及时序因果关联）和智能体推理器，通过多轮记忆检索模拟人类推理方式（定位场景→查找细节→组合答案），并配备验证和纠正机制。
AI.result: 在M3-Bench-robot、M3-Bench-web和Video-MME-Long上分别超出先前最佳方法+5.5、+10.8和+4.4分，且在不同LLM骨干上均有一致提升，表明模型无关的结构性能力。
AI.conclusion: Homer通过层次化记忆结构和智能体推理有效解决了长视频在线场景下的多跳叙事推理问题，具备良好的泛化能力和模型无关性。

title: Learning from Lost Provenance: Multiple Instance Learning for Cancer Registry Tumor Group Classification
summary: Modernizing cancer registries with deep learning is opening new opportunities to automate labor-intensive tasks such as the coding of pathology reports. However, progress is constrained by the scarcity of report-level human-annotated training data. Cancer registries generate substantial volumes of expert-assigned labels as a routine product of their operations, but these exist at the patient level and are not linked to the individual pathology reports that informed them, limiting their direct use for training models. We develop an efficient framework for training deep learning classifiers by leveraging these operationally-generated labels without requiring per-report human annotation, demonstrated for tumor group classification at the BC Cancer Registry. We use Attention-Based Multiple Instance Learning (ABMIL) to recover the lost link between patient-level labels and the reports that informed them, leveraging the attention the model places on each report to distil a large, noisily-labeled corpus into a compact, high-quality per-report training dataset. A classifier fine-tuned on a distilled dataset achieved a macro F1 of 0.83, outperforming established baselines across most tumor groups. By turning routine operational labels into high-quality training data without additional annotation or large-scale computing infrastructure, ABMIL offers a practical and accessible route to automating cancer registry workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用注意力机制的多实例学习（ABMIL）框架，从癌症登记处日常产生的患者级标签中恢复与病理报告的联系，无需人工标注即可生成高质量训练数据，在肿瘤分类任务上取得了宏F1=0.83的优异表现。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在癌症登记自动化中潜力巨大，但缺乏病理报告级别的人工标注数据。而癌症登记处虽拥有大量专家标注，但这些标签存在于患者级别，无法直接用于训练报告级别的分类模型，限制了深度学习方法的落地。
AI.method: 采用基于注意力的多实例学习（ABMIL）框架，利用患者级标签作为弱监督信号，通过注意力机制自动识别并筛选出与标签最相关的病理报告，将大规模有噪声的标签数据集蒸馏为高质量的报告级训练集，再基于该数据集微调分类器。
AI.result: 在BC癌症登记处的肿瘤分类任务上，微调后的分类器宏F1达到0.83，在大多数肿瘤类别上优于已有基准方法。
AI.conclusion: ABMIL能够将日常运营中产生的患者级标签高效转化为高质量报告级训练数据，无需额外人工标注或大规模计算资源，为癌症登记工作流程的自动化提供了一条实用且可推广的路径。

title: Applying Answer Set Programming with Fuzzy Membership Functions: a Case Study
comment: A shorter version of this paper has been accepted at the 24th International Workshop on Nonmonotonic Reasoning (July 17-19, 2026, Lisbon, Portugal)
summary: Human reasoning often operates through qualitative concepts expressed by linguistic labels such as high, low, expensive, or cheap, whose interpretation depends on context and is usually vague, despite being rooted in numerical data. This paper explores a novel fuzzy-logic-based qualitative extension of Answer Set Programming (ASP) to bridge numerical information and qualitative reasoning. The underlying language, formally introduced in a separate work, provides a principled framework that avoids rigid thresholds and supports robust reasoning under vagueness. Focusing on a representative use case, we illustrate how the framework integrates numerically grounded inputs (such as outputs of machine learning models) with symbolic reasoning over qualitative labels. Key features, including learning-based membership functions and semantically enriched predicates, enable the combination of expert knowledge, contextual factors, and subjective interpretations within a unified declarative setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模糊逻辑的定性扩展ASP方法，用于桥接数值信息与定性推理，支持在模糊环境下进行稳健推理，并展示了如何将机器学习输出与符号推理相结合。
AI.motivation: 人类推理通常使用像'高'、'低'、'贵'、'便宜'这样的定性语言标签，这些标签依赖于上下文且通常是模糊的，但根植于数值数据。现有方法缺乏在模糊性下桥接数值信息与定性推理的稳健框架。
AI.method: 提出一种模糊逻辑的定性扩展ASP框架，包括基于学习的隶属度函数和语义丰富的谓词，将数值输入（如机器学习输出）与符号推理在统一声明式设置中整合。
AI.result: 通过代表性用例展示了框架如何将数值基础输入与定性标签上的符号推理相结合，支持专家知识、上下文因素和主观解释的整合。
AI.conclusion: 该框架避免了刚性阈值，支持在模糊性下的稳健推理，为实现数值信息与定性推理的无缝桥接提供了原则性方案。

title: Missingness as Signal: Channel-Independent Spectrogram Learning for Clinical Time Series Prediction
summary: Clinical time series prediction in intensive care units remains challenging due to heterogeneous physiological variables and informative missingness. The presence or absence of a measurement can reflect clinical decisions and patient severity, and thus missingness can serve as a predictive signal rather than a simple data artifact. This work presents CISM, a Channel-Independent Spectrogram framework with a Missingness stream for clinical multivariate time series prediction. CISM converts each clinical variable into a variable-wise time-frequency spectrogram, preserves variable identity through variable-aligned encoding, and aligns an explicit missingness stream with the spectrogram representation. Experiments on an in-hospital mortality task derived from MIMIC-IV show that CISM achieves the highest mean AUROC (0.7225), AUPRC (0.3308), and F1 (0.3808) among the compared time series, missingness-aware, vision, and time-frequency baselines. Ablation studies further show that observation patterns provide a meaningful informative signal. Pixel-level mask injection improves performance over plain spectrogram inputs and recovers much of this predictive value. The aligned missingness stream contributes a further, complementary gain in both AUROC and AUPRC. These results highlight the importance of modeling observation patterns as structured signals in clinical time series prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出CISM框架，通过通道独立谱图+缺失流建模临床时间序列，在MIMIC-IV死亡率预测任务上取得最优性能，证明缺失模式是有价值的预测信号。
AI.motivation: ICU临床时间序列存在变量异质性和信息性缺失，传统方法将缺失视为噪声或简单填充，忽略了缺失模式本身反映的临床决策和患者严重程度信息。
AI.method: 将每个临床变量转换为独立的时频谱图，保留变量身份的对齐编码，并显式地对齐一个缺失流与谱图表示，实现通道独立的处理。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV院内死亡率任务上，CISM取得最高AUROC(0.7225)、AUPRC(0.3308)和F1(0.3808)，超过时间序列、缺失感知、视觉和时频基线。消融实验验证了缺失模式的信息价值以及像素级掩码注入和缺失流对齐的互补增益。
AI.conclusion: 建模观测模式作为结构化信号对于临床时间序列预测至关重要，缺失信息不应被视为噪声而应作为预测信号充分利用。

title: CPR: Chained Perceptual Refinement for Coarse-to-Fine Medical Image Classification
summary: High resolution medical images contain fine grained, spatially sparse cues that are critical for diagnosis, yet preserving full resolution incurs substantial computational and memory costs. Most deep models process images uniformly, leading to redundant computation or loss of diagnostic detail under downsampling. We propose Chained Perceptual Refinement, CPR, a coarse to fine framework that formulates medical image analysis as a sequential global to local decision process. Starting from a low resolution global view, CPR dynamically predicts the location and spatial extent of refinement regions, extracts high resolution evidence from the original image, and incrementally integrates it with global context. By keeping the backbone input size fixed while contracting the perceptual field, CPR preserves diagnostic fidelity with constant peak GPU memory. Extensive experiments on five medical imaging datasets and multiple backbone architectures demonstrate that CPR consistently outperforms both fixed resolution and multi scale state of the art baselines, achieving improvements of up to 2.27 percentage points over the second best method. It also achieves up to a 19.6 fold reduction in GFLOPs at matched accuracy, establishing a superior accuracy and efficiency trade off for high resolution medical image analysis. The code is available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: CPR提出了一种从粗到细的框架，通过动态预测高分辨率区域并逐步集成局部细节，在固定输入大小下实现高精度医学图像分析，显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率医学图像包含精细且稀疏的诊断线索，但现有模型要么全分辨率计算代价过高，要么下采样丢失关键细节，缺乏高效利用局部高分辨率信息的方法。
AI.method: 提出Chained Perceptual Refinement (CPR)框架：从低分辨率全局视图开始，动态预测需要精细分析的局部区域位置和范围，从原图提取高分辨率证据，逐步与全局上下文融合，保持主干网络输入尺寸固定。
AI.result: 在5个医学影像数据集和多种骨干网络上，CPR一致优于固定分辨率与多尺度基线，最高提升2.27个百分点；在同等精度下GFLOPs最多降低19.6倍。
AI.conclusion: CPR在保持高诊断保真度的同时实现了优越的精度-效率权衡，为高分辨率医学图像分析提供了有效方案。

title: Lacuna Inc. at SemEval-2026 Task 4: Structurally Gated State-Space Models for Disentangling Narrative Similarity
summary: In this paper, we present the Invariant-Variant Disentangled State-Space Model (IVD-SSM), our submission to SemEval-2026 Task 4 on Narrative Story Similarity and Narrative Representation Learning. Evaluating narrative similarity is a profound computational challenge that requires models to look past concrete, superficial elements such as specific names, actors, objects, or settings to isolate and compare abstract patterns of causality and plot progression. To model these extended causal chains without the quadratic bottlenecks of standard Transformers, we leverage a hybrid State-Space Model (Jamba-1.5-Mini). Building upon this backbone, we introduce the Structurally Gated Alignment (SGA) head, a novel, differentiable algorithmic architecture. The SGA head operates on two scales: a heavily strided Macro-path maps the coarse structural skeleton of a story, which then acts as a gating mechanism to filter a full-resolution Micro-path, actively suppressing semantic noise and superficial keyword overlaps. Evaluated on both pairwise comparative judgments (Track A) and dense representation learning (Track B), our approach demonstrates that explicitly disentangling structural invariants from lexical variants provides a robust, principled framework for deep narrative understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IVD-SSM模型（基于Jamba-1.5-Mini混合状态空间模型+Structurally Gated Alignment头部），通过显式解耦故事的因果结构不变性与表层词汇变体，在SemEval-2026任务4的叙事相似度与表示学习两项评测中取得良好效果。
AI.motivation: 叙事相似度评估需要模型越过具体名称、角色、物体、场景等表层元素，去比较抽象的因果关系与情节推进模式。现有Transformer面临二次复杂度瓶颈，且难以区分结构不变性与词汇变异性。
AI.method: 以混合状态空间模型Jamba-1.5-Mini为骨干（避免Transformer的二次复杂度）；提出Structurally Gated Alignment头部：大跨度Macro-path提取粗粒度结构骨架，以此作为门控机制过滤全分辨率Micro-path，抑制语义噪声与表层关键词重叠。
AI.result: 在成对比较判断（Track A）与稠密表示学习（Track B）两项评测中均取得良好表现。
AI.conclusion: 显式解耦结构不变性（因果骨架）与词汇变异性（表层表达）是深层叙事理解的有效原则。

title: How to Avoid Debate: Scalable AI Safety via Doubly-Efficient Interactive Proofs
summary:
As AI models continue to develop powerful capabilities, it becomes critical that we are able to verify that their output is aligned with our intentions. A recent line of work focuses on verification via debate, a model of interactive proofs where two competing powerful provers, or AI models, debate each other to convince a weak verifier, or a human, of the correctness of their claim. However, debate assumes that the two AI models possess equal abilities and that one of them is truthful, which may not be realistic.
  In this work, we show \emph{how to avoid debate}: we initiate the study of \emph{single-prover} interactive proofs for AI safety. Prior results in single-prover interactive proofs do not immediately carry over to the AI safety setting: for example, they do not work when the computation has access to an oracle, such as to human judgment or an external database such as the web. We present doubly-efficient single-prover interactive proofs and arguments for oracle-aided computations (also known as relativizing proofs), in the settings where (1) the computation is robust, in the sense that the output does not change if at most a small fraction of the answers to oracle queries are incorrect, or (2) the oracle is a low-degree polynomial. These results suggest that interactive verification is possible even without debate, under structured or noise-tolerant oracle access.

AI.tldr: 本文研究无需辩论的单证明者交互式证明在AI安全中的应用，针对具有oracle访问的计算场景（如人类判断或外部数据库），提出了在鲁棒计算或低阶多项式oracle条件下的高效交互式验证方案。
AI.motivation: 现有AI安全中的辩论方法需要两个能力相当且至少一个诚实的AI模型，这一假设在实际中可能不成立。因此，需要探索无需辩论的单证明者交互式证明方案。
AI.method: 提出两种场景下的单证明者交互式证明：（1）计算具有鲁棒性，即少量oracle查询错误不影响输出；（2）oracle为低阶多项式。在这些条件下设计高效的交互式验证协议。
AI.result: 获得了面向oracle辅助计算（即相对化证明）的双高效单证明者交互式证明和参数论证方案。
AI.conclusion: 在结构化或具有噪声容忍能力的oracle访问条件下，即使没有辩论，交互式验证也是可行的，为AI安全提供了更现实的验证路径。

title: A Precedent-Guided Co-Scientist for Side-Effect-Aware Drug Redesign
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on AI for Science
summary: We propose PRECEDE, a precedent-guided co-scientist for side-effect-aware drug redesign that revises a parent compound to mitigate a specified side effect while preserving therapeutic function. Rather than isolated molecular generation, PRECEDE frames redesign as evidence-grounded reasoning over drug--side-effect associations, biomedical knowledge graphs, and precedents of safety-driven optimization, coordinated by an LLM orchestrator with explicit policies and human-review checkpoints. We position PRECEDE as a human-supervised AI-for-science workflow in which hypotheses remain auditable, falsifiable, and bounded by prior pharmacology.

AI.tldr: PRECEDE是一个基于前例引导的AI协同科学系统，用于副作用感知的药物再设计。它通过整合药物-副作用关联、生物医学知识图谱和安全优化前例，在LLM编排器协调下，生成可审计、可验证的药物修改假设，旨在减轻特定副作用同时保留治疗效果。
AI.motivation: 现有药物往往具有不良副作用，而传统的药物再设计缺乏系统性的证据推理机制。作者希望构建一个可审计、可验证的AI系统，利用已有前例和知识图谱来指导药物分子修改，兼顾疗效维持与副作用减轻。
AI.method: PRECEDE采用LLM编排器协调多个推理模块：利用药物-副作用关联数据、生物医学知识图谱以及安全驱动优化的历史前例，遵循明确的推理策略和人工审查节点，形成证据驱动的药物再设计假设。
AI.result: 论文尚未给出具体实验结果，但提出了一个完整的框架设计——将药物再设计从孤立的分子生成转变为基于前例和证据的推理过程，并强调假设的可审计性、可证伪性和药理学边界约束。
