Taken together, these results support SHiPPO as a mechanistically grounded transported-memory prior, with evidence focused on memory mechanisms rather than broad sequence-modeling dominance.

AI.tldr: SHiPPO通过将HiPPO的系数记忆提升到移动通道框架中，为选择性状态空间模型（SSM）引入了一种传输投影记忆先验，使得记忆能够沿着右传输路径移动，并保持左在线记忆算子不变，同时添加右作用传输。实验表明，传输记忆变体能够恢复有序敏感信号，而普通HiPPO无法做到。
AI.motivation: HiPPO为循环状态赋予记忆语义（在线多项式投影系数），但系数固定在固定通道坐标中；现代选择性SSM依赖于token相关的控制和通道交互。作者希望将HiPPO的固定通道记忆扩展为可移动的记忆先验，使记忆能够沿路径传输，同时保留HiPPO的在线投影性质。
AI.method: 提出SHiPPO（Sylvester HiPPO），通过右传输路径将HiPPO系数记忆提升到移动通道框架中。对于任意固定的右传输路径，SHiPPO同时传输近似族和通道度量；状态遵循Sylvester系数动力学，保留左在线记忆算子，添加右作用传输。为实现选择性SSM执行，推导了受限群局部实现、指数调整更新、精确块仿射扫描和循环解码，并给出了同时可约性准则。
AI.result: 控制诊断表明，更大的当前token写入秩能改善普通预测误差，但无法恢复已写记忆的顺序敏感变化；传输记忆变体能恢复这一信号，而去除传输路径后信号消失。有限域联想回忆诊断提供了互补的自回归证据。
AI.conclusion: SHiPPO是一种机制上具有扎实基础的传输记忆先验，证据聚焦于记忆机制本身而非广泛的序列建模优势，为选择性SSM提供了更丰富的记忆结构支持。

title: SE-UNet: Singular Equivariant Imaging for Real-World Constrained Generation
summary: While diffusion models have revolutionized image synthesis, their application to real-world inverse problems is often hampered by the need for massive datasets and the difficulty of imposing strict physical constraints. In this work, we introduce \textbf{SE-UNet} (Singular Equivariant UNet), a framework designed to solve ill-posed imaging tasks without extensive pre-training. By treating generation as an optimization problem constrained by geometric equivariance ($D_4$ group) and singular value gating, SE-UNet effectively standardizes the solution space. We demonstrate that these strong inductive biases allow for state-of-the-art zero-shot inpainting results (80\% missing pixels) on CIFAR-10. Our method surpasses Deep Image Prior (DIP) baselines by over 4 dB in PSNR and exhibits a characteristic "singular snap" convergence -- rapidly locking into the signal manifold. SE-UNet thus offers a data-efficient pathway for constrained generation, aligning with the ReALM-GEN goal of bridging theoretical priors with practical deployment.

AI.tldr: SE-UNet利用奇异等变性和D4群几何等变性，将图像生成建模为优化问题，无需大规模预训练即可在零样本图像修复（80%像素缺失）任务上超越Deep Image Prior方法4 dB以上PSNR，并展现出"奇异快照"收敛特性。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在逆问题中依赖大数据集且难以施加严格的物理约束，作者希望设计一种无需大量预训练、能通过强归纳偏置约束解空间的方法来解决不适定成像任务。
AI.method: 提出SE-UNet框架，将生成过程建模为受几何等变性（D4群）和奇异值门控约束的优化问题，利用强归纳偏置标准化解空间。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上实现零样本图像修复（80%像素缺失），PSNR超过Deep Image Prior基线4 dB以上，并表现出独特的"奇异快照"收敛现象。
AI.conclusion: SE-UNet提供了一条数据高效的约束生成路径，弥合了理论先验与实际部署之间的差距，符合ReALM-GEN目标。

title: Rethinking Scientific Discovery in an Agentic Era
summary: Artificial intelligence has advanced scientific discovery, but most AI4Science systems remain fragmented tools that rely on humans to coordinate problem formulation, literature grounding, model use, simulation, validation, and knowledge reuse. This paper presents \textbf{SCION (Scientific Collaborative Innovation with Agentic Organizational Nexus)}, an agentic scientific operating system that acts as an \textbf{organizational nexus}. Through a Science Agent serving as a \textbf{Meta-Harness}, SCION connects scientific tasks, tools, agents, artifacts, and memory, transforming research into an executable, auditable, and reusable operational process. At its core is the \textbf{Research Execution Plan (REP)}, which compiles high-level scientific intent into staged objectives, dependencies, verification checkpoints, tool requirements, expected artifacts, and fallback conditions. SCION further integrates hierarchical multi-agent execution, profile-driven specialization, selective context construction, governed delegation, and layered epistemic memory to support long-horizon scientific work. We formulate discovery under SCION as \textbf{Target-conditioned Inverse Search} and extend it to hidden-target settings through batch active search under finite experimental budgets. Applications in materials analysis, molecule design, and protein or antibody screening, together with experiments on scientific reading, idea generation, molecule generation, and antibody screening, show that SCION outperforms existing autonomous research-agent baselines, especially in decomposition, verification, refinement, and memory reuse. Overall, SCION shifts AI from isolated tools toward a coordinated operational layer for traceable and reusable scientific innovation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCION，一个基于智能体的科学操作系统，通过Research Execution Plan（REP）将科研任务转化为可执行、可审计、可复用的操作流程，在材料分析、分子设计、蛋白质/抗体筛选等任务上超越了现有自主研究智能体基线。
AI.motivation: 现有AI4Science系统多为碎片化工具，依赖人工协调问题表述、文献基础、模型使用、模拟、验证和知识复用等环节，缺乏一个统一的、可执行的、可审计的、可复用的操作平台。
AI.method: SCION作为"组织纽带"，通过Science Agent（元驾驭器）连接任务、工具、智能体、工件和记忆；核心是Research Execution Plan (REP)将高层科学意图编译为阶段性目标、依赖关系、验证检查点、工具需求、预期工件和回退条件；集成层级式多智能体执行、配置文件驱动专业化、选择性上下文构建、受控委派和分层认知记忆；将科学发现形式化为Target-conditioned Inverse Search，并拓展到隐藏目标设置下的批量主动搜索。
AI.result: 在材料分析、分子设计、蛋白质/抗体筛选等应用中，以及在科学阅读、想法生成、分子生成和抗体筛选实验上，SCION优于现有自主研究智能体基线，尤其在分解、验证、细化和记忆复用方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: SCION将AI从孤立工具转变为协调的操作层，实现了可追溯、可复用的科学创新，为AI4Science提供了一种系统化的新范式。

title: Explainable AI for Screening Abuse-Related Trauma in Bangladeshi Children: A Training-Free Multimodal Framework Evaluated on Noise-Aware Synthetic Data
summary: Bangladesh has an estimated 1.17 mental-health professionals per 100,000 population and only six child psychiatrists nationwide. No Bengali-language, culturally adapted tool exists for early screening of abuse-related psychological trauma in children. We present ShishuRaksha AI, a decision-support (not diagnostic) framework that fuses four screening modalities: validated questionnaires (SDQ, CPSS), Bengali narrative text, House-Tree-Person (HTP) drawing features, and facial affect. The fusion is training-free and clinically weighted, uses cross-modal attention, and includes a single-modality override rule. Every risk score is explained through clinically weighted, perturbation-based additive attribution and rendered as a bilingual (Bangla/English) report with referral routing to national child-protection services (OCC, DSS, NMHH) under the Children Act 2013. No clinical dataset of abused children can be collected ethically at this stage, so we introduce a noise-aware synthetic benchmark (500 cases, 116 positive [23.2%], four deliberate noise layers, literature-grounded HTP priors) and evaluate tree-ensemble surrogates of the fusion design (facial channel excluded) under 5-fold stratified cross-validation. The fused model reaches an AUC of 0.874 [0.834-0.908], against 0.756 [0.705-0.803] for an SDQ-only baseline, with ablation, operating-point, subgroup, and calibration analyses. We state all limitations openly, including synthetic-only data, no held-out set, text-feature circularity, and an urban-rural subgroup gap. This work is a feasibility study and a design contribution toward ethically deployable child-protection screening in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ShishuRaksha AI，一种融合问卷、孟加拉语文本、绘画和面部表情四种模态的无训练临床决策支持框架，用于孟加拉国儿童虐待相关心理创伤的早期筛查。在合成数据集上，融合模型AUC达0.874，优于仅使用SDQ基线的0.756。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉国心理健康专业人员极度匮乏（每10万人仅1.17名），全国仅有6名儿童精神科医生，且缺乏孟加拉语、文化适应的儿童虐待心理创伤早期筛查工具。
AI.method: 提出ShishuRaksha AI框架，融合四种筛查模态（SDQ/CPSS问卷、孟加拉语叙事文本、房树人绘画特征、面部表情），采用无训练、临床加权的跨模态注意力机制，包含单模态覆盖规则，并使用基于扰动的加性归因解释风险评分，生成双语报告并路由至国家儿童保护机构。
AI.conclusion: 本研究是一项可行性研究，为低资源环境下可伦理部署的儿童保护筛查提供了设计方案，但需注意仅使用合成数据、无独立测试集、文本特征循环性及城乡亚组差距等局限性。

title: LACE-SVD: Loss-Aware SVD with Cumulative Error Correction for LLM Compression
summary: The rapid growth in the parameter scale of large language models (LLMs) has created a strong demand for efficient compression techniques. As a hardware-agnostic and highly compatible approach, low-rank compression has been widely adopted to reduce both memory footprint and computational cost. However, existing SVD-based methods are still largely driven by local reconstruction objectives, overlooking two critical limitations: rank budgets are often allocated without explicitly considering layer-wise loss sensitivity, and local approximation errors can propagate and accumulate through the residual stream, leading to amplified global deviations from the original model. To address these issues, we propose LACE-SVD, a Loss-Aware SVD framework with Cumulative Error correction for LLM compression. LACE-SVD first estimates the calibration negative-log-likelihood increase induced by candidate layer-wise compression ratios and solves a budget-constrained allocation problem to assign rank budgets. It then refines the compressed model with closed-form local updates and introduces a propagation-aware correction for residual-stream output modules, reducing layer-output discrepancy as a proxy for cumulative error propagation. Experimental results demonstrate that at a high compression ratio (0.6), the WikiText-2 PPL of our method on LLaMA-7B (32.57) is significantly better than that of Dobi-SVD (46.18).

AI.tldr: 提出了LACE-SVD，一种损失感知的SVD框架，通过考虑层间损失敏感性和累积误差传播来改进大语言模型的低秩压缩，在LLaMA-7B上取得了显著更好的PPL（32.57 vs Dobi-SVD的46.18）。
AI.motivation: 现有SVD压缩方法仅基于局部重构目标分配秩预算，忽视了不同层级对损失的敏感性差异，且局部近似误差会在残差流中累积传播，导致与原始模型的全局偏差放大。
AI.method: 首先通过校准负对数似然增量估计各层的压缩敏感度，求解预算约束分配问题；然后通过闭式局部更新精炼压缩模型，并对残差流输出模块引入传播感知校正来减少层输出差异。
AI.result: 在高压缩比(0.6)下，LLaMA-7B的WikiText-2 PPL达到32.57，显著优于Dobi-SVD的46.18。
AI.conclusion: LACE-SVD通过损失感知的秩分配和累积误差校正，有效提升了低秩压缩在大模型上的效果，验证了考虑全局误差传播的重要性。

title: CLABTOOLKIT: An Open-Source Toolkit for Routine Processing, Manipulation, and Visualization of Neuroimaging Data
comment: Presented at OHBM 2026 in Bordeaux, France. Submitted to Aperture Neuro
summary: Neuroimaging research requires manipulating heterogeneous data structures, including raw MRI volumes, volumetric parcellations, cortical surface meshes, tractograms, and connectivity matrices, across tools with incompatible interfaces and file formats, forcing researchers to repeatedly re-implement routine but technically demanding operations. We present CLABTOOLKIT, an open-source Python package that consolidates these operations into a single, coherent framework by representing volumetric, surface, and streamline data as interoperable Python objects. Five core data structures (Parcellation, Surface, AnnotParcellation, Tractogram, and Connectome) encapsulate common neuroanatomical entities and provide consistent methods for loading, processing, and exporting data across standard neuroimaging formats (e.g., NIfTI, GIFTI, FreeSurfer annotations, TCK/TRK), including connectome generation from a parcellation and scalar-map projection onto tractogram streamlines. Complementary modules support BIDS dataset management, FreeSurfer integration, diffusion MRI processing, morphometric analysis, graph-theoretical network analysis, and GPU-accelerated multi-panel visualization via PyVista. The toolkit comprises 19 modules organised into six layers, exposing 13 object-oriented classes with 234 methods and 207 standalone functions, and a JSON-based configuration system enables workflow customization without code changes. Unlike existing neuroimaging libraries, which typically address these tasks separately, CLABTOOLKIT combines color and lookup-table management, parcellation manipulation, multi-surface visualization, and tractography utilities within a single framework. CLABTOOLKIT is compatible with Python 3.9-3.12 and released under the Apache 2.0 license. Source code, documentation, and example workflows are available at https://github.com/connectomicslab/clabtoolkit.

AI.tldr: CLABTOOLKIT 是一个开源的 Python 工具包，它将神经影像研究中涉及的异构数据操作（包括体积、表面和流线数据）统一为五个核心数据结构（Parcellation、Surface、AnnotParcellation、Tractogram、Connectome），提供跨多种标准格式的一致加载、处理和导出方法，并包含 BIDS 管理、FreeSurfer 集成、扩散 MRI 处理、形态测量、图论网络分析和 GPU 加速可视化等 19 个模块，旨在减少研究人员重复实现繁琐操作的工作量。
AI.motivation: 神经影像研究需要处理多种异构数据结构（如 MRI 体积、皮层表面网格、纤维束图、连接矩阵等），而现有工具接口不兼容、文件格式各异，导致研究人员不得不反复重复实现常规但技术要求高的操作，缺乏一个统一的框架来整合这些任务。
AI.method: CLABTOOLKIT 定义了五个核心数据结构（Parcellation、Surface、AnnotParcellation、Tractogram、Connectome）作为可互操作的 Python 对象，封装了常见的神经解剖实体，并提供跨标准格式（NIfTI、GIFTI、FreeSurfer 注释、TCK/TRK）的统一方法。工具包包含 19 个模块（分六层）、13 个面向对象类（234 个方法、207 个独立函数），并采用 JSON 配置系统实现无需修改代码的工作流定制。
AI.result: 成功整合了体积分割、皮层表面、纤维束和连接矩阵等异构数据的处理流程，支持连接矩阵生成、标量图投影到纤维束、GPU 加速多面板可视化等功能。工具包兼容 Python 3.9-3.12，采用 Apache 2.0 许可证开源发布。
AI.conclusion: CLABTOOLKIT 填补了现有神经影像库的空白，通过统一的面向对象框架将原本分散在不同工具中的颜色/LUT 管理、分割操作、多表面可视化和纤维束处理等功能整合在一起，显著降低了神经影像研究的重复性工作负担。

title: Consistent but Miscalibrated: Evaluating LLM Limitations for Risk Communication in Natural Language
summary: LLMs are increasingly deployed as post-hoc explainers of AI-generated outputs, yet it remains unclear whether they can reliably communicate probabilistic information in natural language. For this role to be viable, models must produce identical verbal descriptions for identical inputs, and select descriptions that accurately reflect the magnitude of the underlying numerical quantities. We evaluate whether nine LLMs meet these requirements within a two-stage prediction pipeline, in which an upstream model has produced probabilistic outputs characterized by their likelihood and uncertainty, and LLMs are tasked with selecting an appropriate verbal descriptor for each. We simulate predictions from an upstream model by taking samples from a Beta distribution parameterized by its mode and prior sample size. We then prompt LLMs to explain these predictions under six domain contexts and with ten temperature settings, and repeating each experiment ten times. We find that LLMs are generally consistent but miscalibrated, with substantially weaker performance on uncertainty than on likelihood tasks. Providing models with precomputed summary statistics (mode and prior sample size) reduced sensitivity to contextual framing but did not resolve the underlying miscalibration, suggesting that the bottleneck resides in the verbalization step itself. These findings indicate that current LLMs do not yet constitute reliable zero-shot standalone risk communication tools for probabilistic predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了9个LLM在将概率预测（似然和不确定性）转化为自然语言描述时的一致性和校准性，发现LLM虽然一致性尚可，但校准性差，尤其在不确定性任务上表现更弱，表明当前LLM尚不能作为可靠的风险沟通工具。
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多地被用作AI输出的事后解释器，但其能否可靠地将概率信息用自然语言传达尚不清楚。作者希望验证LLM是否满足两个基本要求：对相同输入产生相同描述，以及选择的描述准确反映数值量级。
AI.method: 使用Beta分布（通过mode和prior sample size参数化）模拟上游模型的概率预测结果，让9个LLM在6个领域上下文和10个温度设置下为这些预测选择恰当的言语描述符，每个实验重复10次，评估一致性和校准性。
AI.result: LLM总体上一致性较好但校准性差，在不确定性任务上的表现明显弱于似然任务。提供预计算的统计量（mode和先验样本量）减少了上下文框架的敏感性，但未能解决校准偏差问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前的LLM还不能作为可靠的零样本独立风险沟通工具用于概率预测，校准瓶颈在于语言化（verbalization）步骤本身。

title: What is Left for Us? Second Scholarship Against the Degradation of Research by AI
summary: We argue that generative AI can degrade research by eroding the very practices through which scholarly judgement is formed and academic trust is built. As constitutive conditions for the production and validation of knowledge, these practices cannot be reduced to the final outputs of research, which is what AI so effectively simulate. Accordingly, when researchers delegate central tasks of inquiry to systems like Large Language Models, they may stop enacting these practices and, with them, lose access to the formation they provide. An individual research output generated by AI may even appear improved but the researcher behind it fails to develop. Against this risk, merely keeping humans in the loop as prompters or quality checkers of AI outputs is insufficient to preserve research as a site of intellectual formation. What is needed instead is a renewed commitment to research as a lived practice in which judgement is formed gradually, often through frictions, and participation in a scholarly community. We defend it because it rests on four sources and warrants of research that cannot be automated: tacit knowledge, personal commitment, socialisation, and deep reading. This practice enacts what we call second scholarship, by which we understand the reappropriation of scholarly craft, chosen out of a critical experience of what generative AI can and cannot do. What cannot and should not be delegated becomes what research communities must value and answer for. This is what is left for us.

AI.tldr: 本文指出生成式AI会侵蚀学术判断的形成和学术信任的构建，因为AI模拟的是研究产出而非研究实践。研究者将核心任务委托给AI后，会失去实践中所蕴含的养成过程。作者提出“第二学术”概念，主张重新扎根于隐性知识、个人承诺、社会化和深度阅读这四种不可自动化的研究基础。
AI.motivation: 揭示生成式AI对学术研究实践本质的潜在危害，批判当前“人在回路中”作为提示者或质检者的解决方案不足，呼吁重新审视研究作为养成实践的根本价值。
AI.method: 理论分析：从认识论和实践哲学角度论证AI替代研究实践对学者判断力养成的破坏，提出“第二学术”作为重新占有学术手艺的应对路径。
AI.result: 识别出不可自动化的四个研究来源与保证：隐性知识、个人承诺、社会化、深度阅读。论证这些实践构成学术判断形成的必要条件，AI无法替代。
AI.conclusion: 研究必须回归为一种活生生的实践，通过摩擦和共同体参与逐渐形成判断。不能被委托给AI的东西，恰恰是学术共同体必须珍视和负责的。

title: Spectral Rewiring for Exploration, Purification, and Model Merging
summary: Reinforcement learning has become a standard post-training recipe for large language models, but dense full-parameter updates create two deployment-relevant bottlenecks: suppressed reasoning performance, often reflected by premature saturation of test-time scaling, and interference when consolidating multiple capabilities through multi-domain training or model merging. We show that the reasoning-effective component of these updates is largely concentrated in the base model's spectral space, motivating Subspace-Aligned Rewiring (SAR), a post-hoc editing method that retains this spectral core while removing orthogonal components. SAR therefore preserves reasoning gains and filters residual update directions that suppress performance or amplify cross-domain interference. Across several model families and scales, SAR extracts compact reasoning cores using as little as approximately 0.58% of total parameters: it preserves over 99% of post-training performance and improves high-k exploration in mathematical reasoning, and generalizes to agentic coding by improving six of seven open benchmarks on an in-house model. SAR also purifies mixed-domain training updates by releasing suppressed coding capability while maintaining math reasoning and instruction following. It further enables model merging across experts, yielding cross-domain generalization that surpasses previous merging baselines and even the best single-domain experts. Overall, SAR shows that extracting reasoning-effective updates from parameter geometry can serve as a training-free mechanism to improve reasoning and multi-domain performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出子空间对齐重连（SAR）方法，通过保留模型参数更新中的频谱核心成分、去除正交干扰分量，仅用约0.58%的参数即可保留99%以上的后训练推理性能，并提升跨域泛化与模型融合效果。
AI.motivation: 针对强化学习后训练中全参数更新导致的两个部署瓶颈：推理性能过早饱和（测试时缩放受限）和多领域训练或模型融合时的能力干扰。
AI.method: Subspace-Aligned Rewiring (SAR)，一种事后编辑方法，保留模型频谱空间中与推理相关的核心成分，去除正交的干扰更新方向。
AI.result: 仅用约0.58%的参数保留99%以上后训练性能；提升数学推理中的高k探索；在内部模型的7个agentic编程基准中改进6个；净化混合领域训练更新，释放编码能力同时保持数学推理和指令遵循；跨专家模型融合超越之前基线甚至最佳单领域专家。
AI.conclusion: 从参数几何中提取推理有效更新可作为一种免训练的机制来提升推理和多领域性能。

title: BiSLW: Bi-Spectral Latent Watermarking for Generative Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion-based generative models have transformed visual content synthesis, yet they remain vulnerable to unauthorized usage and lack reliable attribution methods. Existing watermarking techniques often treat latent tensors as static spatial feature maps or depend on pixel-domain modification, and most do not explicitly leverage the internal frequency structure of the latent space for dual-band redundant embedding, leaving them susceptible to the stochastic nature of diffusion and regeneration attacks. We introduce BiSLW, a trainable bi-spectral latent watermarking framework that jointly embeds aligned identity signals across complementary spectral bands of the decoded diffusion latent using learned encoders and decoders, going beyond fixed-pattern frequency approaches. We leverage the inherent frequency structure of diffusion latents to design a dual-band watermarking framework. Low-frequency components encode global semantics, while high-frequency components capture fine texture. We exploit this structure to embed watermarks across complementary spectral bands. The watermark is independently injected into both bands via learned encoders and recombined before decoding, ensuring it becomes intrinsic to the generative trajectory. Dual spectral decoders recover the watermark from each band, while a cross-band consistency constraint enforces alignment between semantic and textural embeddings. Experiments show that BiSLW achieves a strong balance between perceptual fidelity and robustness, improving PSNR by over 3 dB compared to prior latent diffusion watermarking methods while preserving near-perfect bit accuracy under aggressive regeneration and common distortions, all with negligible computational overhead.

AI.tldr: BiSLW 是一种可训练的双频谱潜在水印框架，通过在扩散潜变量的互补频带中联合嵌入身份信号，实现对扩散生成模型的鲁棒归属与保护，在感知质量和鲁棒性上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型面临未经授权使用和缺乏可靠归属方法的问题；已有水印技术未充分利用潜在空间的频率结构，易受扩散随机性和再生攻击影响。
AI.method: 利用扩散潜变量的内在频率结构，设计双波段水印框架：低频嵌入全局语义，高频嵌入细粒度纹理。通过可学习编码器独立注入水印，再组合后解码，并引入跨波段一致性约束确保语义与纹理嵌入对齐。
AI.result: 相比已有潜在扩散水印方法，PSNR 提升超过 3 dB，在强再生攻击和常见失真下保持接近完美的比特准确率，计算开销可忽略。
AI.conclusion: BiSLW 通过双频谱冗余嵌入策略，在不增加显著计算负担的前提下，实现了感知保真度与鲁棒性的优异平衡，有效提升了扩散模型水印的可靠性。

title: Probe, Don't Prompt: A Hidden-State Probe for Metadata Filtering in Multi-Meta-RAG
summary: Multi-Meta-RAG improves retrieval for multi-hop question answering by filtering a vector store on metadata (the news source) that it extracts from each query by prompting gpt-3.5-turbo. We show this proprietary, free-form extractor can be replaced by a local, deterministic probe trained on the hidden states of a small open-source language model. On all 2556 MultiHop-RAG queries the probe reaches 90.9% set-exact accuracy against 88.0% for a model-free substring baseline and 80.9% for GPT-3.5, a margin that comes entirely from null queries, on which GPT-3.5 never abstains; on non-null queries all three stay within about a point. Because the probe's output space is exactly the fixed 49-source vocabulary, it cannot drift outside the allow-list as the prompted model does. Three design choices make it work: selecting a shallow layer, mean pooling, and class-imbalance-aware multi-label training over the long tail of sources. A 135M-parameter model lands within ~1.5 points of a 1.5B one, so the filter is cheap to output: a partial forward pass through the first few layers plus one linear head, with no API. The code is available at https://github.com/mxpoliakov/Multi-Meta-RAG.

AI.tldr: 提出Multi-Meta-RAG改进方案：用本地轻量级探针（基于小语言模型隐状态）替代GPT-3.5提取查询元数据，在多跳问答中实现更高且稳定的元数据过滤准确率，且避免API调用和输出漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 原始Multi-Meta-RAG依赖GPT-3.5进行自由形式的元数据提取，存在API成本高、输出可能超出允许列表（49个新闻来源）以及在小样本上表现不佳（GPT-3.5从不弃权导致错误）等问题。
AI.method: 使用一个确定性探针（probe）训练在小开源语言模型的隐状态上，预测49个新闻来源标签。关键设计：1) 选择浅层隐状态；2) 均值池化；3) 类别不平衡感知的多标签训练（针对长尾分布）。探针仅需模型前几层的部分前向传播加一个线性分类头。
AI.result: 在2556个MultiHop-RAG查询上，探针达90.9% set-exact准确率，高于无模型子串基线（88.0%）和GPT-3.5（80.9%）；优势完全来自空查询（GPT-3.5从不弃权）。非空查询三者差距约1个百分点。135M参数模型与1.5B模型仅差约1.5个点。
AI.conclusion: 本地确定性探针可有效替代GPT-3.5进行元数据提取，成本更低、更可控（输出固定在49个来源），性能更优，适合实际RAG系统部署。

title: PLACEMEM: Toward a Compute-Aware Memory Plane for Lifelong Agents
summary: Lifelong agents need more than larger context windows and better retrieval. They need memories that can persist, evolve, and be corrected without forcing the serving stack to recompute the same history on every turn or silently reuse stale runtime state. We present PLACEMEM as a systems position on lifelong-agent memory, instantiated by an executable control-plane prototype. The central claim is that agent memory should be represented as versioned capsules that unify semantics, provenance, validity, and reusable runtime state under one correction-aware identity. In the current prototype, capsules drive prompt-level text retrieval, KV-aware routing, and cascading invalidation over live streamed backends; prospective layer-frontier replay is intentionally framed as a deeper integration agenda rather than a claimed engine feature. We describe a vLLM-first prototype with persistent capsule state, concurrency-safe invalidation, an OpenAI-compatible routing sidecar, a typed metadata contract, and a benchmark harness that measures live first-token latency, reuse, and post-correction behavior. The result is both an executable artifact that demonstrates correction-aware control-plane behavior today and a concrete roadmap for replay-aware serving integration in future lifelong-agent systems.

AI.tldr: PLACEMEM提出了一种基于版本化胶囊（capsules）的终身智能体记忆系统，通过统一语义、来源、有效性和可复用运行时状态，实现可纠正、持久化、可演化的记忆管理。当前原型支持提示级文本检索、KV感知路由和级联失效，并包含vLLM实现、并发安全失效机制和OpenAI兼容路由。该工作既是可执行的控制面原型，也是未来重放感知服务集成的路线图。
AI.motivation: 现有终身智能体依赖更大的上下文窗口或更好的检索，但缺乏持久化、可演化、可纠正的记忆机制，也无法避免每次交互重复计算历史或静默复用过期状态。
AI.method: 提出版本化胶囊（capsules）统一表示语义、来源、有效性和运行时状态；实现提示级文本检索、KV感知路由、级联失效机制；基于vLLM构建原型，包含持久化胶囊状态、并发安全失效、OpenAI兼容路由侧车、类型化元数据契约和基准测试框架。
AI.result: 提供了可执行的控制面原型，测量了首token延迟、复用率和修正后行为；展示了纠正感知控制面行为的可行性，并明确了重放感知服务集成的未来路线图。
AI.conclusion: PLACEMEM证明了终身智能体记忆应基于版本化胶囊实现纠正感知控制面，现有原型已验证核心设计，但层前沿重放（layer-frontier replay）等深度集成仍需未来工作推进。

title: Robustness Meets Uncertainty: Evidential Adversarial Training for Robust Selective Classification
summary: Safety-critical applications require classifiers that are both robust and reliable. Adversarial training is a widely adopted defense for improving robustness in deep neural networks; however, its effect on the reliability of predictive uncertainty remains underexplored. We investigate this gap through the lens of selective classification, which has rarely been systematically analyzed alongside adversarial robustness. We introduce a unified benchmark for the robustness-uncertainty trade-off. It standardizes architectures, augmentations, threat models, and evaluation metrics across clean, adversarial, and common-corruption settings. Across a wide range of state-of-the-art adversarial training methods, we uncover a recurring failure mode: several approaches improve robust accuracy while degrading uncertainty ranking, leading to poorer selective behavior. To address this, we propose Evidential Adversarial Training (EV-AT), which models uncertainty through a Dirichlet distribution and combines (i) an evidence-based loss promoting clean accuracy and reliable uncertainty with (ii) a robust evidence-alignment loss matching clean and adversarial predictions in log Dirichlet-parameter space. Extensive experiments show that EV-AT shifts the Pareto frontier of robustness-uncertainty trade-offs beyond prior state-of-the-art adversarial training methods. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/NicolasSournac/Robustness_Meets_Uncertainty.EV-AT.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对抗训练对选择性分类中预测不确定性的影响，发现许多方法在提升鲁棒性的同时损害了不确定性排序。为此提出证据对抗训练（EV-AT），通过Dirichlet分布建模不确定性并结合两种损失函数，在鲁棒性-不确定性权衡上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 安全关键应用需要分类器既鲁棒又可靠。对抗训练虽广泛用于提升鲁棒性，但其对预测不确定性可靠性的影响尚未被充分探索。作者通过选择性分类视角系统分析这一空白。
AI.method: 提出Evidential Adversarial Training (EV-AT)，核心包括：(1) 通过Dirichlet分布对不确定性建模；(2) 基于证据的损失函数促进干净准确率和可靠的不确定性；(3) 鲁棒证据对齐损失，在log Dirichlet参数空间中匹配干净与对抗预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，EV-AT在鲁棒性-不确定性权衡的Pareto前沿上超越了先前最先进的对抗训练方法。同时揭示了一个反复出现的失败模式：多种方法在提高鲁棒准确率的同时降低了不确定性排序，导致选择性行为变差。
AI.conclusion: EV-AT有效改善了对抗训练中鲁棒性与不确定性可靠性的权衡，为安全关键应用提供了更好保障。

title: EmoteGPT: 3D Human Facial Expressions from Natural Language Descriptions
summary: Precise control of 3D facial expressions from text is crucial for virtual avatars, animation, and human-computer interaction, yet existing text-to-3D methods jointly generate identity, expression, and texture, making fine-grained expression control difficult. We instead formulate text-driven expression synthesis as a regression problem in the disentangled parameter space of a 3D Morphable Model (3DMM). This setting, however, requires paired data linking detailed language to precise expression parameters, which are missing from existing resources. To fill this gap, we introduce Txt2Emote, a benchmark of diverse 3D facial expressions with fine-grained textual annotations obtained from GPT-4o and a high-fidelity face tracker, providing both explicit descriptions detailing facial features and implicit descriptions referencing the situational context behind the expression. Leveraging this dataset, we present EmoteGPT, a text-to-3D expression framework based on a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) with a dedicated <Expr> token to semantically ground expression representations, which are then decoded into 3DMM parameters. We further improve EmoteGPT by augmenting training with large-scale image-to-3DMM data, enabling it to surpass state-of-the-art text-to-3D face synthesis methods on emotion recognition metrics and in perceived expressiveness. Integrated into avatar pipelines, our method enables photorealistic and stylized 3D avatars, as well as expressive 3D-consistent 2D face synthesis from textual input.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Txt2Emote基准数据集和EmoteGPT框架，将文本到3D面部表情合成建模为3DMM解耦参数空间中的回归问题，利用多模态大语言模型实现细粒度表情控制，在情感识别和表现力上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到3D方法联合生成身份、表情和纹理，难以实现细粒度表情控制，且缺乏细粒度文本标注与精确表情参数配对的数据。
AI.method: 1) 构建Txt2Emote数据集：使用GPT-4o和高保真面部追踪器生成细粒度文本标注（显式描述+隐式情境描述）与3DMM参数配对；2) 提出EmoteGPT框架：基于多模态大语言模型，引入<Expr>标记语义化表情表征，解码为3DMM参数；3) 利用大规模图像到3DMM数据增强训练。
AI.result: 在情感识别指标和感知表现力上超越最先进的文本到3D人脸合成方法，可集成到虚拟形象管线中生成真实感和风格化3D虚拟形象及表情一致的2D人脸合成。
AI.conclusion: 将文本驱动的表情合成建模为3DMM解耦空间中的回归问题，结合MLLM和精心构建的数据集，能够实现细粒度、高表现力的文本到3D表情控制。

title: Can Dialects Be Steered Like Languages? Sparse Neurons and Distributed Directions in Arabic LLMs
summary: A key challenge in Arabic NLP is the scarcity of dialectal data relative to Modern Standard Arabic (MSA), causing LLMs to overproduce MSA and struggle with dialectally accurate generation. From an interpretability perspective, this raises a fundamental question: where and how are dialectal features encoded within model internals, and can these representations be leveraged to improve dialect generation without fine-tuning? This study investigates two complementary inference-time approaches that serve simultaneously as interpretability probes and control mechanisms. First, we conduct a neuron-level analysis, identifying sparse neuron populations that encode dialect-specific features and showing that amplifying or suppressing these neurons can steer model outputs toward target dialects. Second, motivated by the entanglement of dialectal features at the single-neuron level, we apply a vector-steering approach that extracts dialect-specific activation directions and injects them during inference. Together, these methods illuminate the geometry of dialectal knowledge in Arabic LLMs and offer a principled, interpretability-grounded framework for dialect control without requiring dialect-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过神经元级分析和向量引导两种推理时方法，探索了阿拉伯语大语言模型中方言特征的编码机制，并实现了无需微调的方言控制。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语NLP面临方言数据稀缺的挑战，LLMs倾向于过度生成现代标准阿拉伯语（MSA），难以生成准确的方言内容。从可解释性角度出发，需要理解方言特征在模型内部如何编码，以及能否利用这些表征提升方言生成能力。
AI.method: 提出两种互补的推理时方法：(1) 神经元级分析——识别编码方言特征的稀疏神经元群体，通过放大或抑制这些神经元来引导输出方言；(2) 向量引导方法——提取方言特定的激活方向，在推理时注入这些方向向量。
AI.result: 发现方言特征在单神经元层面呈稀疏分布且存在纠缠；两种方法均可有效引导模型生成目标方言，揭示了阿拉伯语LLMs中方言知识的几何结构。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种基于可解释性的原则性方言控制框架，无需方言特定的微调即可实现方言生成控制，同时作为理解模型内部方言表征的探针。

title: Forethought: Verifiable Reasoning from Neurosymbolic Primitive Programming
summary: Current agentic workflows usually involve decomposing user requests into sequences of tool calls with correctly resolved parameters, the results of which are processed through reasoning traces in the language model's context window. The prevailing route to improve such reasoning is test-time scaling, which trains models to search over long chains of thought; but the resulting capability is entangled in model weights, is not verifiable step-by-step, and is costly at inference. We present Forethought, a neurosymbolic reasoning system that instead treats reasoning as an explicit, verifiable program, that builds from a library of symbolic and neural primitives which are composed through a domain-specific language. The result are reasoning programs, which are concrete representations of the model's work, and as such can be inspected and modified before deployment. Instantiated as a tool-calling execution kernel and evaluated across five benchmarks, Forethought improves base-model accuracy by about 30% relative and outperforms vanilla prompting, reinforcement learning scaffolds, and prompt-evolution methods, enabling small models to match or exceed frontier models capabilities. In a direct comparison, a non-reasoning model augmented with Forethought competes with a dedicated reasoning model while requiring roughly three orders of magnitude less post-training investment, and remains model-agnostic and auditable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Forethought，一种将推理过程显式化为可验证程序的神经符号推理系统，通过组合符号和神经原语，在多个基准测试上显著提升模型性能，使小模型可媲美前沿模型，且无需大量后训练投入。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体工作流依赖测试时扩展（test-time scaling）来提升推理能力，但该方法将能力纠缠在模型权重中、无法逐步验证、且推理成本高昂。为此，作者希望设计一种可检查、可修改、可验证的显式推理系统。
AI.method: Forethought将推理视为显式、可验证的程序，通过领域特定语言（DSL）组合符号原语和神经原语，生成具体的推理程序。这些程序可被检查、修改，并以工具调用执行内核的形式实例化。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试上，Forethought将基础模型准确率相对提升约30%，优于普通提示、强化学习框架和提示进化方法。非推理模型借助Forethought可与专用推理模型竞争，后训练投入减少约三个数量级，且保持模型无关和可审计性。
AI.conclusion: Forethought通过将推理显式化为可编程、可验证的程序，提供了一种高效、低成本、可审计的推理增强方案，在小模型上实现了接近甚至超越前沿模型的能力，为推理系统的设计提供了新方向。

title: STELLA: Efficient Sensor-to-LLM Translation for On-Device Human Activity Recognition
summary: HAR is increasingly expected to run continuously on edge devices, yet recent LLM-based methods remain hard to deploy: raw sensor prompts are long, cloud inference adds latency and privacy risk, and fine-tuned LLM pipelines turn general-purpose models into task-specific classifiers. We present STELLA, an efficient sensor-to-LLM translation framework for on-device HAR that shifts the burden from LLM adaptation to sensor tokenization. A lightweight hierarchical tokenizer compresses an entire multi-channel inertial window into a fixed set of compact latent sensor tokens, which are projected into the embedding space of a frozen pretrained LLM and combined with a natural-language prompt for label scoring. This preserves activity-relevant temporal and cross-channel structure while keeping LLM-side computation predictable across sensor configurations. STELLA also supports on-device personalization, adapting only the lightweight tokenizer on small amounts of user-specific labelled data and augmenting inference with a local retrieval context, keeping the LLM, user data, and retrieval on device. Across seven public HAR datasets and eight benchmark settings, STELLA achieves new state-of-the-art performance, improving over prior methods by up to 11.83% F1; on-device personalization yields up to a further 21.91% F1 as user data accumulates after deployment. STELLA also outperforms representative time-series tokenizers under the same LLM pipeline and achieves real-time inference under practical mobile and edge budgets, showing that efficient sensor tokenization is a practical path toward accurate, private, and personalized LLM-based HAR on edge devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STELLA，一种高效的传感器到LLM翻译框架，通过轻量级层次化分词器将多通道惯性数据压缩为紧凑的潜传感器令牌，在保持冻结预训练LLM不变的情况下实现设备上实时、精准且个性化的人体活动识别，在七个公开数据集上达到SOTA性能，F1提升最高达11.83%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的HAR方法难以在边缘设备上持续部署：原始传感器提示过长、云端推理增加延迟和隐私风险、微调LLM管道将通用模型转化为特定任务分类器，缺乏高效且保护隐私的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出STELLA框架：1) 轻量级层次化分词器将多通道惯性窗口压缩为固定数量的紧凑潜传感器令牌；2) 将令牌投影到冻结预训练LLM的嵌入空间并与自然语言提示结合进行标签评分；3) 支持设备上个性化，仅适配轻量分词器，保留LLM、用户数据和检索均在设备端。
AI.result: 在七个公开HAR数据集和八个基准设置上达到新SOTA，F1最高提升11.83%；设备上个性化后F1进一步提升21.91%；优于代表性时间序列分词器；在移动和边缘设备上实现实时推理。
AI.conclusion: 高效的传感器分词是在边缘设备上实现准确、私密且个性化LLM-based HAR的实用路径。

title: K9-Bench: Evaluating Multimodal LLMs on Canine-Centric Videos
summary: MLLMs have shown strong zero-shot capabilities across diverse inputs such as across images, video, audio, and text. A crucial, yet underexplored, application of these models lies in understanding and modeling animal-centric scenarios. As animals are integral to millions of households, benchmarking next-generation AI models on pet-focused tasks, ranging from recognizing distress signals to enabling responsive robotic companions, is essential for building AI systems that can work alongside us. We introduce K9-Bench, a novel benchmark focused on real-world domestic dog videos, specifically targeting canine action and interaction understanding via approximately 5000 question-answer pairs across 907 videos spanning 5 distinct task categories that test long-form, canine-centric multimodal reasoning in MLLMs. To create this dataset, we propose a scalable, VLM/LLM-powered data generation pipeline that automatically mines canine-centric videos from the web and curates QA pairs requiring fine-grained, multi-hop reasoning over canine actions and temporally extended interaction sequences. We implement bias mitigation strategies designed to eliminate biases introduced by VLMs during dataset curation. Through extensive experimentation, we find that frontier MLLMs exhibit limited zero-shot performance on canine-centric tasks: although state-of-the-art closed-source models outperform open-source counterparts, they still struggle with compositional reasoning over subtle posture and interaction cues spread over long horizons. We observe that generic chain-of-thought prompting provides only modest performance for such long-horizon reasoning. Beyond a novel dataset for canine activity analysis, K9-Bench provides a general-purpose dataset construction pipeline that can be adapted to other low-data domains for quantitative analysis. Our project website is available at: https://ogmenrobotics.github.io/K9Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出K9-Bench，一个针对家犬视频中动作与交互理解的多模态基准测试，包含907个视频中的约5000个问答对，覆盖5类任务。研究发现前沿多模态大模型在犬类任务上零样本表现有限，且通用思维链提示对长程推理帮助不大。同时提出了可扩展的VLM/LLM驱动的数据生成流水线及偏差缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 尽管MLLMs在跨图像、视频、音频和文本等多种输入上表现出强大的零样本能力，但它们在理解动物中心场景方面的应用尚未充分探索。由于动物在数百万家庭中不可或缺，评估下一代AI模型在宠物任务上的表现（从识别痛苦信号到响应式机器人伴侣）对于构建能与人类协作的AI系统至关重要。
AI.method: 1) 构建K9-Bench基准数据集：通过可扩展的VLM/LLM驱动数据生成流水线，自动从网络挖掘犬类中心视频，并策划需要细粒度、多跳推理的QA对。2) 设计偏差缓解策略以消除VLM在数据策划过程中引入的偏差。3) 对多个前沿MLLMs进行零样本性能评估，包括闭源和开源模型，并测试通用思维链提示的效果。
AI.result: 前沿MLLMs在犬类中心任务上零样本表现有限；最先进的闭源模型优于开源模型，但在长时间跨度下的细微姿态和交互线索的组合推理上仍然困难；通用思维链提示对这类长程推理仅提供适度改进。
AI.conclusion: K9-Bench不仅为犬类行为分析提供了新颖数据集，还提供了一个可适应其他低数据领域进行定量分析的通用数据集构建流水线，为动物中心AI研究奠定了基础。

title: The Remarkable Effectiveness of Providing AI Agents with Natural Language Tools: A Replication Study Validating NLT Performance Across 14 Models
comment: 28 pages, 6 figures, replication study, replication of arXiv:2510.14453 findings
summary: This study independently replicates and extends the Natural Language Tools (NLT) framework of Johnson et al.~(2025), which questions the use of structured tool calling in large language model (LLM) agentic systems. We evaluated NLT across 14 models and 8,560 trials, adding newer frontier, reasoning, and open-weight models to the original set. The results confirm the core findings and add detail. NLT improves tool-calling accuracy by 14.9 percentage points overall (62.3\% versus 47.4\% structured) and reduces critical errors by 93\% (51 versus 755 errors). The gains depend on model capability: models without native tool calling, reasoning models, and smaller models gain substantially (+24.0pp to +43.1pp), while heavily optimized frontier models (GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro) show smaller or reversed advantages. This matches recent analyses of reinforcement-learning-optimized tool use (Martinez, 2025). NLT also cuts token usage by 25.2\%. The reliability and efficiency advantages compound in recursive agentic workflows, where agents chain many tool calls across sub-agents: a structured failure triggers retries, fallback routing, and coordination overhead, while NLT avoids most of that cost at the source. This work makes three contributions: (1) the first independent validation of NLT using open-source tooling, (2) evidence that model capability moderates NLT's advantages (Chen et al., 2025; Zhang et al., 2025), and (3) a measurement of NLT's reliability benefit (93\% fewer errors), its most deployment-relevant property given the known fragility of structured tool calling. NLT is a practical alternative to structured tool calling, especially for production systems that value reliability over parseability.

AI.tldr: 本研究独立复现并扩展了Johnson等人(2025)的自然语言工具(NLT)框架。在14个模型、8560次试验中，NLT相比结构化工具调用整体准确率提升14.9个百分点（62.3% vs 47.4%），关键错误减少93%（51 vs 755），token使用量降低25.2%。收益因模型能力而异：无原生工具调用能力的模型、推理模型和小模型收益显著（+24.0~+43.1pp），而经过强化学习优化的前沿模型（GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro）收益较小甚至反向。贡献包括：(1)首次使用开源工具对NLT进行独立验证；(2)证明模型能力调节NLT优势；(3)量化NLT的可靠性收益（93%更少错误）。NLT是结构化工具调用的实用替代方案，尤其适用于重视可靠性而非可解析性的生产系统。
AI.motivation: 质疑大规模语言模型(LLM)智能体系统中使用结构化工具调用的必要性，探索自然语言工具(NLT)是否可作为更可靠且高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 独立复现Johnson等人(2025)的NLT框架，扩展了原始模型集合（新增前沿模型、推理模型和开源模型），在14个模型上的8560次试验中进行系统评估，比较NLT与结构化工具调用的准确率、错误率和token使用量。
AI.result: NLT整体工具调用准确率提升14.9个百分点（62.3% vs 47.4%），关键错误减少93%（51 vs 755错误），token使用量降低25.2%。模型能力是调节变量：无原生工具调用能力模型(+24.0~+43.1pp)收益最大，前沿优化模型收益较小或反向。递归智能体工作流中优势进一步放大。
AI.conclusion: NLT是结构化工具调用的实用替代方案，尤其适用于重视可靠性的生产系统。模型能力是NLT优势的关键调节变量，且NLT在递归智能体工作流中的可靠性和效率优势会累积放大。

title: Language models guide symbolic equation discovery by controlling search
summary: Scientific equation discovery must combine broad domain priors with strict numerical testing. Symbolic regression supplies numerical grounding but faces a combinatorial search space, whereas many language-model systems ask the model to propose or select formulas directly. We test a different division of labour. We compare role specifications in which the language model acts as equation author, candidate decider or search controller, alongside end-to-end language-model and purely numerical baselines. In the controller setting we propose here, implemented as LLM-PySR, language models specify variables, operators, transformations and search depth; symbolic regression enumerates and fits expressions; and deterministic metrics govern retention. Across 74 AI-Feynman equations and seven complex formula-recovery tasks, search control achieved the strongest observed balance of accuracy, complexity, stability and cost. On an independent battery dataset, LLM-PySR identified a compact piecewise-linear relation between early voltage-curve displacement and cycle life. The results suggest that language models should shape hypothesis exploration rather than decide which equations survive.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM-PySR，将语言模型作为搜索控制器，与符号回归结合进行科学方程发现。在多项基准测试中，该方法在准确性、复杂性、稳定性和成本之间取得最佳平衡，并成功从电池数据中发现了一个分段线性关系。
AI.motivation: 纯粹基于语言模型的方程发现方法利用语义先验但缺乏数值验证，而纯符号回归方法虽具数值基础却面临组合搜索空间爆炸的问题。作者旨在探索更优的分工模式，将语言模型的领域知识与符号回归的数值严谨性有机结合。
AI.method: 比较了语言模型在方程发现中的三种角色规范：方程作者（直接提出公式）、候选决策者（筛选公式）和搜索控制器（本文提出的方案）。在控制器模式下，LLM负责指定变量、算子、变换和搜索深度，符号回归负责枚举和拟合表达式，确定性指标负责保留结果。
AI.result: 在74个AI-Feynman方程和7个复杂公式恢复任务上，搜索控制模式在准确性、复杂性、稳定性和成本方面达到最强平衡。在独立电池数据集上，LLM-PySR发现了早期电压曲线位移与循环寿命之间的紧凑分段线性关系。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型应塑造假设探索的方向，而非决定哪些方程能够存活下来。搜索控制器范式为科学方程发现提供了一种更有效的人机协作方式。

title: Stacked LoRA for Subject-Adaptive EEG Foundation Models in Motor Imagery Decoding
comment: 10 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Accepted at the 2026 IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence (WCCI 2026), Maastricht, Netherlands
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) decoding for brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) faces a major challenge: substantial inter-subject variability limits effective cross-subject generalization. Consequently, practical systems still rely largely on subject-specific models trained from scratch and requiring individual recalibration. EEG foundation models have recently emerged as a promising alternative; however, even large pretrained models cannot simply be used as fixed feature extractors and still require additional adaptation before they can be reliably applied to downstream tasks. In this work, we address this challenge through targeted adaptation strategies. Building on recent EEG foundation models such as REVE, LaBraM, and LUNA, we examine the impact of different low-rank adaptation strategies on motor imagery classification. We propose a framework that structurally decouples subject-invariant knowledge from subject-specific neural signatures: the low-rank update at each adapted layer is split into a Global adapter, trained jointly across all subjects, and Subject-Specific adapters, each absorbing individual variability. To assess the contribution of each path, we compare three adaptation strategies: (i) subject-specific LoRA (ii) global LoRA and (iii) stacked LoRA, combining both Global and Subject Specific adapters. Experiments on BCI Competition IV-2a, PhysioNet Motor Imagery, and the clinical Zuo2025 benchmark show that Stacked LoRA effectively mitigates inter-subject variability, achieving the best accuracy in the large majority of backbone and dataset combinations. Our analysis further reveals that the optimal balance between the global and subject-specific paths depends on the target population: a shared adapter is sufficient for large, diverse cohorts, whereas subject-specific adaptation is decisive under the high inter-session variability of clinical recordings.

AI.tldr: 本文针对EEG解码中跨被试泛化难题，提出Stacked LoRA框架，将低秩适配解耦为全局适配器（共享知识）和个体适配器（个体变异），在三个基准数据集上验证了该方法能有效缓解被试间差异，并分析了全局与个体适配的最优平衡取决于目标人群特性。
AI.motivation: EEG解码面临显著的跨被试差异，现有方法仍需针对每个被试单独校准。尽管EEG基础模型（如REVE、LaBraM、LUNA）涌现，但即使预训练后也不能直接作为固定特征提取器，仍需额外适配才能可靠应用于下游任务。本文旨在通过有针对性的适配策略解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出Stacked LoRA框架，将低秩适配分解为两条路径：全局适配器（Global Adapter，跨所有被试联合训练，捕获被试不变知识）与个体适配器（Subject-Specific Adapter，吸收每个被试的个体变异）。对比三种策略：(i) 个体LoRA、(ii) 全局LoRA、(iii) Stacked LoRA（两者组合）。
AI.result: 在BCI Competition IV-2a、PhysioNet Motor Imagery及临床Zuo2025基准上，Stacked LoRA在大部分骨干网络与数据集组合中取得最佳准确率。分析表明，全局与个体适配的最优平衡取决于目标人群：大规模多样化队列中共享适配器即足够，而高会话间变异的临床记录中个体适配至关重要。
AI.conclusion: Stacked LoRA通过解耦全局共享知识与个体变异，有效缓解EEG跨被试变异，且适配策略的选择应依据目标人群特征（多样性 vs. 会话间不稳定性）灵活调整。

title: S-EMBER: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Streaming Egocentric Memory Retrieval
summary: As wearable devices enable continuous first-person recording, AI assistants must reason across long time horizons to recall past experiences-a capability known as episodic memory. Current benchmarks often rely on offline evaluation with access to entire video files, failing to simulate the streaming reality of wearable intelligence. We introduce S-EMBER (Streaming Egocentric Memory Benchmark for Episodic Retrieval), a large-scale benchmark comprising 3,141 videos totaling 388 hours of organic activity captured via Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses. S-EMBER formalizes grounded streaming episodic retrieval, a paradigm shift from global offline search to causal, active recall triggered by visual events in a continuous stream. We provide 9,448 QA pairs requiring manual visual proof through precise temporal localization and supporting flexible response lengths to simulate natural human-AI interaction. Our extensive benchmarking of frontier models uncovers a localization paradox: while semantic reasoning improves with parameter scale, temporal grounding precision remains a stagnant architectural bottleneck that does not benefit from brute-force increases in model size, resolution, or frame density. S-EMBER establishes a hardware-authentic foundation for developing grounded, reliable episodic memory in the next generation of wearable AI agents.

AI.tldr: 提出了S-EMBER基准，包含3141个视频（388小时）的穿戴式设备第一人称视角数据，用于评估AI的流式情节记忆检索能力。发现时间定位精度不随模型规模增大而提升的"定位悖论"。
AI.motivation: 现有基准依赖离线评估（可访问完整视频），无法模拟可穿戴AI设备在连续流式数据中实时检索记忆的真实场景。
AI.method: 构建S-EMBER基准：使用Ray-Ban Meta智能眼镜采集3141个视频/388小时数据，设计9,448个QA对，要求从连续流中因果性地、主动地检索被视觉事件触发的记忆。
AI.result: 发现定位悖论：语义推理能力随参数规模提升，但时间定位精度是架构性瓶颈，不受模型规模、分辨率或帧密度的增强影响。
AI.conclusion: S-EMBER为可穿戴AI代理的地面化、可靠的情节记忆开发提供了硬件真实的评估基础。

title: NormWorlds-CF: Solver-Verified Counterfactual Normative Reasoning with Metamorphic-Relation GRPO
summary: Language models can reach the right normative verdict for the wrong reason. We introduce NormWorlds-CF, a solver-verified environment for counterfactual normative reasoning in executable rule worlds. Its deterministic solver produces final answers, proof and falsification certificates, argument statuses, support sets, and paired-world change labels, enabling supervision and evaluation without LLM judges. The benchmark contains staged SFT diagnostics and a compact paired-world task with 270 root families and 1080 canonical-to-variant pairs. The SFT diagnostics show that final-answer supervision is an unsafe proxy: answer-only SFT reaches perfect accuracy on answer tasks but scores zero on falsification, while proof-plus-falsification training with targeted replay reaches strong all-task accuracy. For the structured-change task, we introduce metamorphic-relation GRPO (MR-GRPO), a class-conditioned reward for GRPO that gives partial credit for relation families and solver-visible change fields. In matched 1.7B continuation experiments, MR-GRPO improves held-out relation accuracy and relation-family correctness, and reduces wrong-family error, compared to sparse and answer-only GRPO. In Qwen3-4B three-seed validation, answer-only reward improves answer-change fields but weakens relation-family structure, sparse reward preserves coarse relation labels best, and MR-GRPO delivers the strongest balanced performance across answer-change, support-change, status-change, and soft root-level metamorphic-relation metrics. These results show that verified counterfactual structure can shape post-training beyond final answers, while exact full change-record generation, invariant subtype recognition, and out-of-distribution (OOD) transfer remain open problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 NormWorlds-CF，一个基于可执行规则世界的反事实规范推理环境，利用确定性求解器提供证明与证伪监督。研究表明，仅监督最终答案不安全，而结合证明与证伪训练及 MR-GRPO 方法能显著提升结构化变更任务的准确性。
AI.motivation: 语言模型可能"答对但理由错误"（正确规范判断源自错误推理），现有依赖 LLM 作为评估者的方法无法可靠验证推理过程。因此需要一种可验证的环境来监督和评估反事实规范推理，避免仅关注最终答案的虚假正确性。
AI.method: 构建 NormWorlds-CF 环境，使用确定性求解器生成最终答案、证明/证伪证书、论证状态、支持集和变更标签。提出 SFT 诊断（对比仅答案监督 vs. 证明+证伪训练）和 MR-GRPO（基于变形关系的类条件奖励进行分组相对策略优化）。
AI.result: 仅答案监督的 SFT 在答案任务上完美但证伪得零分；证明+证伪训练达到强全任务准确率。MR-GRPO 在 1.7B 和 Qwen3-4B 实验中提升关系准确率、减少错误族类，相比稀疏奖励和仅答案奖励实现最佳平衡性能。
AI.conclusion: 可验证的反事实结构能超越最终答案来塑造后训练，但精确的完整变更记录生成、不变子类型识别和分布外迁移仍是开放问题。

title: A Clustering-Based Framework for Identifying Suspicious Trading Patterns in Capital Market
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE 2nd International Conference on Quantum Photonics, Artificial Intelligence & Networking (QPAIN), 2026. This is the authors preprint version. The final version is available via IEEE Xplore
summary: Market manipulation is the dubious practice of manipulating stock prices in order to make a quick profit, which truly degrades confidence on trading platforms. We implemented an unsupervised fraud-detection toolkit that begins with K-Means++ clustering to address this issue. A dataset of roughly one million financial transactions from 2012 to 2024 is used. In order to identify fraudulent trades and categorize them using market practice heuristic thresholds, the study suggests a clustering-based pipeline. The method highlights 2.02% of trades as suspicious where 51.10% clearly indicate spoofing, 0.10% indicate pump and dump, 0.55% indicate insider trading, 1.43% indicate a fake breakout, and 46.83% are unclassified. Despite the lack of ground truth, the model's performance is confirmed by a Silhouette Score of 0.561.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于K-Means++聚类的无监督欺诈检测工具包，用于识别金融市场中的操纵行为。对约100万笔2012-2024年的交易数据进行分析，标记2.02%的交易为可疑，其中51.10%为虚假报价（spoofing），0.10%为拉高出货（pump and dump），0.55%为内幕交易，1.43%为虚假突破，46.83%未分类。轮廓系数0.561验证了模型性能。
AI.motivation: 市场操纵行为严重损害交易平台的公信力，传统依赖有监督学习的方法因缺乏标注数据而受限，因此需要无监督的异常检测方案来识别欺诈交易。
AI.method: 采用K-Means++聚类算法构建无监督欺诈检测流水线，通过对约100万笔交易数据进行聚类，并利用市场实践中的启发式阈值对聚类结果进行分类，识别不同类型的市场操纵行为。
AI.result: 2.02%的交易被标记为可疑，其中虚假报价占51.10%，拉高出货占0.10%，内幕交易占0.55%，虚假突破占1.43%，另有46.83%无法分类。模型轮廓系数为0.561。
AI.conclusion: 无监督聚类方法可在缺乏真实标注的情况下有效识别市场操纵行为，轮廓系数0.561表明聚类质量可接受，但仍有近半数可疑交易无法明确归类，需进一步完善分类规则。

title: Heterogeneous Graph Condensation via Role-Aware Clustering
summary: Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks (HGNNs) have exhibited remarkable efficacy in modeling complex systems with multiple types of nodes and relations, yet their training on large-scale heterogeneous graphs remains computationally prohibitive. Although graph condensation methods can effectively improve learning efficiency on large-scale graphs, existing condensation processes are mainly designed for homogeneous graphs and typically rely on computationally expensive gradient matching or bilevel optimization paradigms, rendering them impractical for heterogeneous settings. To address these limitations, we propose HGC-RC, a simple yet effective role-aware heterogeneous graph condensation framework. Specifically, HGC-RC first extracts semantically enhanced node embeddings via lightweight propagation. It then introduces a role-aware hybrid clustering strategy consisting of class-partitioned clustering for labeled target nodes to preserve class distributions and unsupervised type-wise clustering for non-target nodes to retain critical cross-type connectivity. Finally, a compact heterogeneous graph is efficiently reconstructed based on the resulting cluster assignments. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HGC-RC outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, offering a practical pathway to accelerate HGNN training on large-scale heterogeneous graphs without sacrificing task performance

AI.tldr: HGC-RC提出了一种基于角色感知的异构图压缩框架，通过轻量传播、混合聚类和高效重构，在不牺牲任务性能的前提下加速大规模异构图神经网络的训练。
AI.motivation: 现有异构图神经网络在大规模图上训练计算成本高昂，而图压缩方法多针对同构图设计，且依赖昂贵的梯度匹配或双层优化，在异构场景下不实用。
AI.method: 1. 轻量传播提取语义增强的节点嵌入；2. 角色感知混合聚类（对标记目标节点进行类分区聚类保持类别分布，对非目标节点进行无监督类型聚类保留跨类型连接）；3. 基于聚类结果高效重构紧凑异构图。
AI.result: 实验结果表明HGC-RC在多个基准上优于现有方法，能有效加速大规模异构图上的HGNN训练且不损失任务性能。
AI.conclusion: HGC-RC为在大规模异构图上加速HGNN训练提供了一种简单、高效且实用的解决方案。

title: An Automated Multimodal Glaucoma Detection Framework Using ViT and a Stacking-Based Ensemble
summary: Glaucoma is a progressive eye disease that can lead to irreversible vision loss if not detected at an early stage. Conventional diagnostic procedures are often time-consuming and rely heavily on expert interpretation, limiting their scalability for large-scale screening. In this study, glaucoma detection is investigated under two evaluation settings: sample-wise, where individual samples are analyzed independently, and patient-wise, where data from each patient are aggregated for final prediction. An automated multimodal framework is proposed that integrates fundus images with clinical data. Under the sample-wise setting, detection is performed using fundus images and clinical features individually, as well as through their multimodal combination. Under the patient-wise setting, predictions are obtained by aggregating multiple fundus image representations with corresponding clinical information for each patient. Deep visual features are extracted using a Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture and classified using classical machine-learning models, with a stacking-based ensemble of the three best-performing classifiers employed to optimize performance. Experiments conducted on the publicly available PAPILA dataset demonstrate strong diagnostic performance, achieving 97.47% accuracy and a 97.50% F1-score for sample-wise multimodal classification, and 98.97% accuracy and F1-score for subject-wise detection. The proposed framework is further deployed as an end-to-end web-based platform to support automated glaucoma screening and clinical decision support.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动化多模态框架，结合眼底图像和临床数据，在样本级和患者级两种评估设置下检测青光眼。基于Vision Transformer提取深度视觉特征，结合堆叠集成分类器，在PAPILA数据集上实现了97.47%的样本级准确率和98.97%的患者级准确率，并部署为端到端网络平台。
AI.motivation: 传统青光眼诊断流程耗时且依赖专家解读，难以大规模筛查。因此，本文旨在开发一种自动化、可扩展的多模态检测框架，以提升筛查效率和诊断准确性。
AI.method: 采用Vision Transformer (ViT) 提取眼底图像深度视觉特征，结合临床数据进行多模态融合。在样本级设置下独立分析单个样本；在患者级设置下聚合多个眼底图像表征与临床信息。使用三种最佳机器学习分类器构建堆叠集成模型优化性能。
AI.result: 在PAPILA公开数据集上，样本级多模态分类准确率达97.47%，F1-score为97.50%；患者级（subject-wise）检测准确率和F1-score均达98.97%。
AI.conclusion: 该多模态框架在青光眼检测中表现出色，且已部署为端到端网络平台，可支持自动化筛查和临床决策辅助，具有实际应用价值。

title: TRACER: Early Failure Detection for Task-Oriented Dialogue
summary: Task-oriented dialogue systems often fail before the final breakdown is obvious, but most evaluation only measures failure after the conversation has already gone wrong. We present TRACER, a method for early failure detection in task-oriented dialogue. TRACER predicts from a partial dialogue whether the full conversation will eventually fail by combining simple trajectory signals from belief-state changes with text representations of the evolving dialogue state. We evaluate the method in both oracle and generated belief-state settings, and test how well it works when only 25%, 50%, 75%, or 100% of the dialogue is visible. Across these settings, TRACER detects useful failure signals well before the end of the conversation and outperforms heuristic, classical, and single-stream baselines. These results suggest that early failure detection can provide a practical warning signal for dialogue systems before the interaction fully breaks down.

AI.tldr: TRACER是一种通过结合信念状态变化轨迹与对话文本表征，在对话早期（仅25%-75%时）即可预测任务型对话系统最终失败的方法，优于多种基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有任务型对话系统评估多是在对话彻底失败后才测量，缺乏在对话尚未完全崩溃前进行早期失败预测的能力，无法提供及时预警。
AI.method: TRACER从部分对话中预测完整对话是否会失败，通过融合信念状态变化的简单轨迹信号与演进对话状态的文本表征，在Oracle和生成式信念状态两种设定下评估，并测试不同可见比例（25%、50%、75%、100%）的效果。
AI.result: 在多种设定下，TRACER能在对话结束前就检测到有用的失败信号，且性能优于启发式方法、经典方法和单流基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 早期失败检测可以为对话系统提供实用的预警信号，在交互完全崩溃前发出警告。

title: Observable- and Positional-Encoding-Dependent Symmetry Readout from Neural Network Weights
summary: Post-hoc analysis of trained neural network weights often seeks to recover geometric structure directly from the parameters. We show that, for positional-encoding-equipped neural fields, the symmetry visible from weights is not the true symmetry group itself, but an observable symmetry set determined by the trained parameters, the positional encoding (PE), and readout observable. We formulate this dependence through an exact observability hierarchy, $G_{\mathrm{obs}}^{\mathrm{exact}} \subseteq G_{\mathrm{lift}}^{\mathrm{exact}}(φ) \cap G_{\mathrm{true}}$, where $G_{\mathrm{lift}}^{\mathrm{exact}}(φ)$ is the set of input transformations that the PE can exactly lift to the feature space. The hierarchy implies that even when a target function has a geometric symmetry, that symmetry may be structurally invisible to weight-level observables if the PE does not represent the corresponding transformation. We test this prediction using MLPs trained on two-dimensional signed distance functions with multiple shape symmetry groups, positional encodings, and Gram-based observables. The results show a consistent PE-dependent pattern: DyadicAxisPE supports $D_4$-sensitive readout but structurally suppresses $D_3$ rotations, TriAxisPE yields lower $D_3$ / $D_6$ readout scores under the tested Gram observables by replacing coordinate axes with three 120-degree-separated axes, and random Fourier features mainly exhibit a $π$-rotation response under these readouts. These findings show that PE design affects not only approximation behavior but also which structures are accessible to post-hoc weight-level readouts. This provides a basis for a principled observable-dependent symmetry readout.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了神经场中位置编码(PE)如何影响权重层面可观测的对称性，发现PE设计决定了哪些真实对称性能被事后分析检测到，并提出了精确可观测性层次结构理论。
AI.motivation: 现有的事后权重分析常直接从参数中恢复几何结构，但忽略了位置编码对对称性可观测性的影响，作者希望厘清权重层面能观测到的对称性是否等于真实对称群。
AI.method: 提出精确可观测性层次结构 $G_{\mathrm{obs}}^{\mathrm{exact}} \subseteq G_{\mathrm{lift}}^{\mathrm{exact}}(φ) \cap G_{\mathrm{true}}$，并通过在二维符号距离函数上训练MLP，使用不同PE（DyadicAxisPE、TriAxisPE、随机傅里叶特征）和Gram观测器进行实验验证。
AI.result: DyadicAxisPE支持 $D_4$ 敏感读取但抑制 $D_3$ 旋转；TriAxisPE在Gram观测下 $D_3$/$D_6$ 读取分数较低；随机傅里叶特征主要只表现出 $π$ 旋转响应。结果呈现一致的PE依赖模式。
AI.conclusion: PE设计不仅影响神经场的逼近行为，还决定了哪些结构能被事后权重级读取访问，为基于观测器的原则性对称性读取提供了理论基础。

title: Property-Constrained 3D Porous Media Reconstruction from 2D Images via Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to the 87th EAGE Annual Conference & Exhibition, Aberdeen, UK, June 2026
summary: This study presents a conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) framework for generating 3D porous media volumes with controlled porosity, trained exclusively on 2D thin section images. The key innovation lies in combining property-conditioned generation with 2D-to-3D reconstruction, eliminating the need for expensive 3D training data while maintaining control over petrophysical properties. The framework employs a hybrid architecture with a 3D generator and 2D discriminator, where multi-axis slice extraction enables learning 3D-consistent structures from 2D training data. Porosity labels are extracted using an Enhanced U-Net segmentation model. The methodology was demonstrated on two carbonate samples with different lithologies: dolomite-anhydrite and pure dolomite. Results show that the framework successfully generates realistic 3D volumes capturing lithological features such as anhydrite inclusions and fine crystalline textures. Porosity control achieved an $R^2$ of 0.93, with mean absolute errors of 0.019 and 0.010 for the heterogeneous and homogeneous samples, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）框架，仅使用2D薄片图像即可生成可控孔隙度的3D多孔介质体积，通过3D生成器与2D判别器的混合架构实现2D到3D重建，在两种碳酸盐岩样品上验证了有效性，孔隙度控制R²达0.93。
AI.motivation: 传统3D多孔介质生成需要昂贵的3D训练数据，本研究旨在消除这一瓶颈，仅利用易获取的2D薄片图像生成3D体积，同时保持对孔隙度等岩石物理性质的控制。
AI.method: 采用cGAN框架，结合3D生成器与2D判别器；通过多轴切片提取从2D训练数据学习3D一致结构；使用Enhanced U-Net分割模型提取孔隙度标签作为条件输入。
AI.result: 成功生成包含岩相特征（如硬石膏包裹体、细晶结构）的逼真3D体积；孔隙度控制R²为0.93，异质样品和均质样品的平均绝对误差分别为0.019和0.010。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能在无3D训练数据条件下生成属性可控的3D多孔介质，为数字岩石物理提供经济高效的解决方案。

title: BanglaMemeEvidence: A Multimodal Benchmark Dataset for Explanatory Evidence Detection in Bengali Memes
comment: Accepted at 6th International Conference on Innovations in Computational Intelligence and Computer Vision (ICICV 2026)
summary: Memes have become influential communication tools on social media, combining viral visuals with concise messaging to convey impactful ideas. While substantial research has examined the affective dimensions of memes, key challenges such as detecting harmful content, identifying cyberbullying, and performing accurate sentiment analysis remain critical, largely due to the need for deeper contextual understanding. In this paper, we introduce MemeEvidenceDetect, a hybrid task aimed at analyzing a meme and its contextual information to identify specific sentences that explain or elucidate its meaning and humor. To support this task, we present BanglaMemeEvidence, a curated dataset of 2,917 Bengali memes, emphasizing its significance as a resource for the Bangla language. Each meme is annotated with natural language explanations, including Meme OCR, Meme Context, and Evidence Sentences, alongside relevance scores that reflect the relationship between a meme and its corresponding annotations. To address the gap in dynamically inferring a meme's context, we propose BengaliMemeEvidenceNet, a hybrid multimodal framework that integrates textual and visual features for comprehensive meme representation. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of BengaliMemeEvidenceNet, achieving an F1 score of 0.74. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to focus on evidence detection in Bengali memes, marking a notable step forward in the analysis of memes in low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了面向孟加拉语模因的混合任务 MemeEvidenceDetect，构建了包含 2,917 个模因的 BanglaMemeEvidence 数据集，并设计了融合文本与视觉特征的多模态框架 BengaliMemeEvidenceNet，在证据检测任务上取得了 0.74 的 F1 分数，是首个针对孟加拉语模因证据检测的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有模因研究多关注情感维度，但在有害内容检测、网络欺凌识别和情感分析等任务中仍面临挑战，主要缺乏对模因上下文的深层理解。此外，低资源语言（如孟加拉语）的模因分析研究几乎空白。
AI.method: 提出混合任务 MemeEvidenceDetect，构建 BanglaMemeEvidence 数据集（2,917 个孟加拉语模因），每个模因标注了 OCR 文本、上下文信息和证据句子及其相关性评分。提出 BengaliMemeEvidenceNet，一个融合文本与视觉特征的多模态框架。
AI.result: BengaliMemeEvidenceNet 在证据检测任务上取得了 0.74 的 F1 分数。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个针对孟加拉语模因证据检测的研究，为低资源语言模因分析提供了新思路和基准资源，具有重要的学术价值和实践意义。

title: Unsupervised Features Mining via Activation Geometry
summary: Interpretability methods aim to reveal the features represented inside large language models (LLMs). Many existing methods begin with labeled examples of a human-defined concept that may reflect human biases, and then identify how that concept is represented within the model, for example in its activation space or through other decomposition methods. We introduce \emph{Mining via Activation Geometry} (MAG), a simple unsupervised framework for extracting reasoning features from model activations by prepending the same natural-language instruction $Q$ to every input $p$, where $Q$ defines the reasoning feature of interest, such as ``Can this object be found in the desert?'' or ``Is this prompt malicious?'' We measure how the instruction changes the model's internal representation using $m(Q \mid p) - m(p)$ at a single readout point. We explore eight different MAGs. The extracted reasoning features predict the models' own world understanding and judgment, can be approximated into a single activation direction, we found that some features are more linearly represented and some less, this linear representation, which is vector steering, can change the LLMs' decisions through activation steering by injecting reasoning features. Finally, we use the same method to select the best training datasets for prompt-injection classifier probes: while similarity between ordinary activations is almost unrelated to downstream performance, RFD-based similarity achieves $94.7\%$ Top-1 and $100\%$ Top-2 accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAG（基于激活几何的挖掘）方法，通过向输入添加统一指令并计算激活差异，无监督地从LLM中提取推理特征。这些特征能预测模型判断、可通过向量操控改变模型决策，并用于高效选择训练数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法依赖人工标注的概念示例（可能引入人类偏见），且需要预先定义概念。本文希望提出一种无监督、无需人工标注的框架，直接从模型激活中提取推理特征。
AI.method: MAG方法：对每个输入p，添加统一自然语言指令Q，计算m(Q|p) - m(p)在单一读出点的激活差异作为推理特征。探索8种不同的MAG，并通过近似为单个激活方向实现向量操控。
AI.result: 1）提取的推理特征可预测模型自身判断；2）可近似为单一方向，线性程度因特征而异；3）通过激活操控可改变模型决策；4）基于RFD相似性选择训练数据集，Top-1准确率94.7%，Top-2达100%。
AI.conclusion: MAG提供了一种无监督、高效的可解释性方法，不仅能揭示LLM内部推理特征，还能用于模型操控和数据选择，且与下游性能高度相关。

title: Integrating Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Safe Reinforcement Learning in a 1-DoF Helicopter System
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) offers powerful control for industrial cyber-physical systems (ICPSs), but its "black-box" exploration risks violating strict hardware safety limits. Typically, these constraints are managed through complex reward shaping. In this work-in-progress paper, we embed a differentiable physics model directly into the proximal policy optimization (PPO) actor loss function. By simulating short-horizon future trajectories during training, the policy is penalized for anticipated safety violations independent of the task-reward signal. Evaluated on a simulated 1-degree-of-freedom helicopter testbed with strict pitch constraints, our physics-informed soft regularizations substantially reduce constraint violations while maintaining reliable target tracking.

AI.tldr: 本文在PPO算法的actor损失函数中嵌入可微物理模型，通过对未来短时轨迹的模拟来惩罚预期安全违规，在不依赖复杂奖励塑形的情况下减少对ICPS硬件安全约束的违反。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在工业信息物理系统中存在"黑箱"探索问题，容易违反严格的硬件安全限制，而传统方法依赖复杂的奖励塑形来管理约束，效率较低。
AI.method: 将可微物理模型直接嵌入PPO的actor损失函数中，在训练时模拟短期未来轨迹，对预期的安全违规行为施加惩罚，该惩罚独立于任务奖励信号。
AI.result: 在模拟的1自由度直升机测试平台上，该方法显著减少了俯仰角约束的违规次数，同时保持了可靠的目标跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息启发的软正则化方法能够在不改变奖励函数的前提下有效降低安全约束违规，为ICPS的安全强化学习提供了一种可行思路。

title: Aircraft Detection in Satellite Imagery using Deep Learning Object Detectors
summary: The object detection in satellite imagery has garnered considerable attention due to its extensive real-world applications and the inherent challenges it presents, including noise, fluctuating image quality, and intricate backgrounds. This paper proposed a framework for object detection that combines image enhancement and Deep Learning (DL) to make detection more accurate. First, a Gabor filter is used to process the input image to bring out important features and reduce noise. Then, normalization is applied to make sure that the data is evenly distributed so that the model works properly. After that, a model based on YOLOv11 is used to quickly learn and find object features. The proposed method achieves a mAP of 95%, precision of 97%, recall of 85%, and F1-score of 91%, which demonstrates the superior aircraft detection performance. These results show the framework accurately identify aircraft in satellite imagery and is suitable for real-time applications such as surveillance, air traffic monitoring and remote sensing analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Gabor滤波图像增强与YOLOv11的卫星图像飞机检测框架，在保持实时性的同时实现了95% mAP、97%精确率的高精度检测性能。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像中的目标检测面临噪声、图像质量波动和复杂背景等固有挑战，现有方法在精度和实时性上难以兼顾，需要更鲁棒且高效的检测方案。
AI.method: 首先使用Gabor滤波器提取重要特征并降噪，随后进行数据归一化处理，最后基于YOLOv11模型进行快速特征学习与目标检测。
AI.result: mAP为95%，精确率97%，召回率85%，F1-score 91%，在卫星图像飞机检测任务上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能准确识别卫星图像中的飞机，适用于监控、空中交通管制和遥感分析等实时应用场景。

title: Candidate-Constrained Retrieval-Augmented Generation for LongEval-RAG: System Design and Empirical Analysis
summary: We present a candidate-constrained retrieval-augmented generation system for LongEval-RAG, where each query is associated with an organizer-provided candidate set and all retrieved evidence and final citations must remain within that set. The system combines deterministic provenance tracking with passage-based retrieval, deterministic query expansion, pseudo-relevance feedback (PRF), reciprocal rank fusion (RRF), lightweight evidence reranking, citation-aware evidence aggregation, and optional MiniLM sentence reranking. We evaluate ten pipeline variants using a primary organizer evaluation and a supplementary self-generated diagnostic protocol. The primary evaluation shows that the strongest balanced variant is rule-minilm: a rule-based chunking pipeline with query expansion, PRF, RRF, reranking, citation prior, and late MiniLM sentence selection. This variant obtains the highest BERTScore, retrieval precision, nugget coverage, and average grade among our submissions. The result suggests that the main gain does not come from more complex semantic or topic-shift chunking, but from pairing stable rule-based evidence units with sentence-level neural selection before generation. The supplementary LLM-judge evaluation remains useful for early diagnosis and additional analysis, but it emphasizes different systems than the primary gold-answer and nugget-based evaluation, highlighting the need for multi-metric RAG evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向LongEval-RAG的候选约束检索增强生成系统，通过结合规则分块、查询扩展、伪相关反馈、互惠排名融合、轻量级证据重排序和MiniLM句子选择等组件，在组织者提供的候选集内进行检索和引用。最佳变体"rule-minilm"在BERTScore、检索精度、nugget覆盖率和平均等级上表现最优，验证了规则分块加句子级神经选择的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统在长文本场景中处理候选集约束时，复杂语义分块方法效果有限，需要一种在候选集限定下兼顾检索精度和引用准确性的高效方案。
AI.method: 系统采用确定性溯源追踪、基于段落的检索、确定性查询扩展、伪相关反馈、互惠排名融合、轻量级证据重排序、引用感知证据聚合，以及可选的MiniLM句子重排序。共评估了十种管道变体。
AI.result: 最佳变体rule-minilm取得最高的BERTScore、检索精度、nugget覆盖率和平均等级。主要增益来自规则分块与句子级神经选择的组合，而非更复杂的语义或主题偏移分块。
AI.conclusion: 规则分块加句子级神经选择的简单组合优于复杂分块策略；辅助LLM评估与基于黄金答案的评估在系统排序上存在差异，强调了多指标RAG评估的必要性。

title: Biological Motifs for Agentic Control
summary:
The transition of Large Language Models (LLMs) from passive generators to autonomous agents has introduced significant challenges in reliability, security, and state management. Current agentic architectures are often constructed ad-hoc, prone to hallucination cascades, infinite loops, and prompt injection attacks. This paper argues that many of these failure modes can be analyzed using control motifs long studied in systems biology, provided the comparison is made at the level of typed interfaces and coordination structure rather than literal biological mechanism.
  We develop a typed interface correspondence between Gene Regulatory Networks and agentic software systems using polynomial functors and wiring diagrams. Five biological motifs are mapped to composable software design patterns: Coherent Feed-Forward Loops for noise suppression, Adaptive Immunity for layered security, Mitochondrial Signaling for resource governance, Endosymbiosis for neuro-symbolic integration, and Morphogen Diffusion for spatially varying coordination. An epistemic topology layer derives Kripke-style knowledge operators from the wiring diagram's observation structure and proves four predictive theorems for multi-agent scaling.
  The core contributions are: (1) the Agentic Operad, a typed syntax for agent composition with provable error suppression bounds for feed-forward topologies; (2) an epistemic topology with four theorems (error amplification, sequential penalty, parallel acceleration, and tool density scaling) whose qualitative predictions are consistent with published multi-agent benchmarks; and (3) a six-layer progression from structure through development, grounded in autonomous learning frameworks and convergence proxies from the empirical literature. A reference implementation with 1,813 tests and 116 examples illustrates practical feasibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用系统生物学中的调控机制（基因调控网络、线粒体信号等）来建模和分析LLM智能体系统的故障模式，通过类型化接口和多项式函子建立形式化对应关系，并推导出关于多智能体扩展的四个预测定理。
AI.motivation: LLM从被动生成器转向自主智能体后，出现可靠性差、状态管理混乱、幻觉级联、无限循环和提示注入攻击等问题。现有架构多是临时拼凑，缺乏系统性的形式化分析框架。作者认为这些故障模式与系统生物学中长期研究的控制机制在类型接口和协调结构层面具有同构性。
AI.method: (1) 使用多项式函子和接线图建立基因调控网络与智能体软件系统之间的类型化接口对应关系；(2) 将五种生物学基序映射为可组合的软件设计模式；(3) 构建"智能体Operad"——一种带类型的智能体组合语法；(4) 引入认识论拓扑层，从接线图的观察结构推导出Kripke风格的知识算子；(5) 提出六层递进结构（从结构到发展），结合自主学习和收敛代理。
AI.result: (1) 前馈拓扑的错误抑制边界可证明；(2) 四个定性预测定理（误差放大、顺序惩罚、并行加速和工具密度缩放）与已发表的多智能体基准测试一致；(3) 参考实现包含1,813个测试和116个示例，证明了实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: 系统生物学中的控制基序为分析和设计更可靠的LLM智能体系统提供了形式化工具，类型化接口视角下的跨学科映射不仅具有理论一致性，而且在实际实现中也是可行的。

title: ACPO: Adaptive Credit Policy Optimization via Fine-Grained Surrogate Entropy
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has substantially improved the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs), but sparse outcome rewards still make token-level credit assignment difficult. Existing scalable RL methods typically assign trajectory-level rewards uniformly across tokens, while recent entropy-aware approaches either rely on coarse detached heuristics or directly optimize true entropy, which can introduce non-local gradient components misaligned with sampled-token policy updates. We propose Adaptive Credit Policy Optimization (ACPO), a token-level credit assignment framework based on a mode-local surrogate entropy. ACPO asymmetrically modulates policy updates by emphasizing uncertain decisions in successful rollouts and overconfident tokens in failed rollouts. We show that the surrogate admits deterministic entropy bounds and, under modal alignment and proximal updates, preserves the policy-gradient direction to leading order. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and coding benchmarks, including AIME 2025 and HumanEvalPro, show that ACPO consistently improves over strong RL baselines such as DAPO, GTPO, and SAPO.

AI.tldr: 提出ACPO，一种基于模态局部代理熵的token级信用分配框架，通过非对称地调节策略更新（强调成功轨迹中的不确定决策和失败轨迹中的过度自信token），在数学推理和代码生成任务上超越DAPO、GTPO、SAPO等强基线。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在LLM推理中面临稀疏结果奖励导致的token级信用分配困难，均匀分配轨迹级奖励或现有熵感知方法存在粗粒度或梯度对齐问题。
AI.method: 提出Adaptive Credit Policy Optimization (ACPO)，基于模态局部代理熵的token级信用分配框架。非对称地调节策略更新：成功轨迹中强调不确定决策，失败轨迹中强调过度自信token。代理熵具有确定性边界，在模态对齐和近端更新下保持策略梯度方向至主导阶。
AI.result: 在AIME 2025、HumanEvalPro等数学推理和代码基准上，ACPO一致优于DAPO、GTPO、SAPO等强RL基线。
AI.conclusion: ACPO通过更精细的token级信用分配有效提升LLM推理能力，为稀疏奖励场景下的策略优化提供了新范式。

title: VLRC: Vision-Language Reprojection Consistency as a scalable signal for better feed-forward 3D pretraining
summary: Feed-forward 3D models are commonly trained using either expensive geometric supervision or self-supervised photometric objectives, both of which provide incomplete learning signals. We introduce Vision-Language Reprojection Consistency (VLRC), a scalable auxiliary objective that exploits frozen vision-language representations as semantic multi-view supervision. Given a predicted 3D reconstruction, VLRC reprojects dense vision-language features across views and enforces feature consistency between corresponding image locations, requiring no additional 3D annotations. The objective integrates seamlessly with both self-supervised monocular reconstruction and supervised-pretrained feed-forward 3D models during unlabeled adaptation. By aligning geometry with language-grounded features, VLRC not only improves depth and camera estimation but also enables more coherent multi-view semantic fusion for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding. Experiments on indoor and outdoor benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains in 3D reconstruction accuracy and zero-shot open-vocabulary 3D semantic segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出VLRC方法，利用冻结的视觉-语言表征作为语义多视图监督信号，无需额外3D标注即可提升3D重建和开放词汇3D语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈3D模型训练依赖昂贵的几何监督或自监督光度目标，两者都提供不完整的学习信号，需要一种可扩展的辅助目标来补充语义信息。
AI.method: VLRC将预测的3D重建在多个视图上重投影稠密的视觉-语言特征，强制对应图像位置之间的特征一致性，无需额外3D标注，可无缝集成到自监督和预训练模型中。
AI.result: 在室内外基准测试中，VLRC在3D重建精度和零样本开放词汇3D语义分割任务上均取得一致改进。
AI.conclusion: VLRC通过将几何与语言锚定特征对齐，不仅提升了深度和相机估计，还实现了更一致的多视图语义融合，为开放词汇3D场景理解提供了有效方案。

title: Separating Representation from Reconstruction Enables Scalable Text Encoders
summary: While decoders have rapidly scaled, encoders have remained largely unchanged since BERT. We revisit this disparity by frozen backbone evaluation via probing. Under this lens, the representations of BERT encoders become increasingly $\textit{unexploitable}$ by frozen probes, despite improved perplexity. The misalignment originates in BERT's flat design, which couples representation learning to the token reconstruction loss. We propose $\textbf{CrossBERT}$, a two-part architecture that separates the learning of high-quality encoded representations from the rigid grounding of token reconstruction. This design further enables high masking ratios ($\ge 50\%$) and gradient collection over all tokens via a $\textit{Complementary Masking Strategy}$, respectively increasing throughput by $1.5$ to $2\times$ and sample efficiency by $2\times$. Overall, CrossBERT demonstrates monotonic scaling and superior performance on MTEB(eng, v2) and frozen GLUE benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrossBERT架构，将编码器表示学习与token重建解耦，通过互补掩码策略和高压掩码率（≥50%）实现训练吞吐量提升1.5-2倍、样本效率提升2倍，在MTEB和冻结GLUE上表现更优。
AI.motivation: 现有编码器（如BERT）由于扁平设计，将表示学习与token重建损失耦合，导致表征虽然困惑度改善，但逐渐变得无法被冻结探针有效利用（即表征可 exploitable 性下降）。
AI.method: 提出CrossBERT两阶段架构：第一部分学习高质量编码表示，第二部分负责token重建的刚性格接；同时引入互补掩码策略（Complementary Masking Strategy），使得所有token均可参与梯度更新，并支持≥50%的高掩码率。
AI.result: 训练吞吐量提升1.5-2倍，样本效率提升2倍；在MTEB（英文v2）和冻结GLUE基准上表现出单调扩展性和优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 解耦表示学习与重建损失能有效解决BERT中表征可 exploitable 性下降的问题，CrossBERT在效率和性能上均优于传统编码器架构。

title: Progress- and Reliability-Oriented Group Policy Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Group-based reinforcement learning (RL) has become an effective paradigm for improving large language model agents on long-horizon interactive tasks. To obtain finer-grained policy updates than trajectory-level optimization, recent work has moved toward step-level group-based RL, where intermediate steps are grouped and compared within a rollout batch. However, step-level advantage estimation is sensitive to how groups are formed: grouping by broad state keys improves coverage but may compare actions taken under different histories, while enforcing historical consistency yields fairer comparisons at the cost of fragmented groups and missing peer-comparison signal. In this paper, we propose ProGPO (Progress- and Reliability-Oriented Group Policy Optimization), a learned-critic-free method for context-consistent step-level learning. ProGPO keeps exact-prefix action comparison, and complements sparse peer comparisons with transition credit derived from rollout-based state potentials. To estimate these potentials reliably, ProGPO combines semantic expansion with inverse-variance fusion across history depths. We evaluate ProGPO on two challenging agentic tasks, ALFWorld and WebShop, with Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct. Results show that ProGPO improves over matched agentic RL baselines under comparable computational overhead, and additional Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct experiments further test the scalability of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProGPO，一种无需学习评论员的上下文一致步级组策略优化方法，通过精确前缀动作比较和基于rollout状态势能的过渡信用分配，解决步级组RL中分组敏感性问题。在ALFWorld和WebShop任务上，使用Qwen2.5-1.5B/3B-Instruct模型验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 步级组RL中优势估计对分组方式敏感：按状态键分组虽覆盖广但可能比较不同历史下的动作，保持历史一致性则导致组碎片化、缺少同伴比较信号。现有方法难以兼顾上下文一致性与充分的比较信号。
AI.method: ProGPO：1) 保持精确前缀动作比较（exact-prefix action comparison）；2) 用rollout状态势能（state potentials）补充稀疏的同伴比较信号；3) 通过语义扩展（semantic expansion）与逆方差融合（inverse-variance fusion）跨历史深度可靠估计势能。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop两个长程交互任务上，使用Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct进行评估，ProGPO在可比计算开销下优于匹配的agentic RL基线；在Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct上的进一步实验验证了方法的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: ProGPO通过上下文一致的步级学习有效提升了长程交互任务上的组RL性能，且无需学习评论员，具有良好的可扩展性。

title: Anticipatory Reinforcement Learning for Trajectory Tracking
