summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) in industrial control often suffers from lag and overshoot due to purely reactive control based on the current tracking error. To achieve anticipatory control without high computational overhead, we introduce a predictive formulation that augments the DRL state space with target velocities and future reference horizons. Evaluating eight configurations using proximal policy optimization (PPO) on a 1-degree-of-freedom (1-DoF) helicopter testbed, simulation results showed a 9-fold error reduction, lowering the mean absolute deviation from 2.73° to 0.31°. However, zero-shot transfer to physical hardware revealed a sim-to-real gap. Interestingly, a simpler configuration using a single, further look-ahead horizon matched the real-world top performance of the most complex model (1.11°). Overall, evaluating various combinations of prediction horizons and target velocities demonstrated that highly granular predictive data is not necessarily required for physical transfer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种预测性DRL方法，通过将目标速度和未来参考视野加入状态空间实现预判控制，在1-DoF直升机平台测试。仿真误差降低9倍（2.73°→0.31°），但物理迁移存在 sim-to-real 差距。有趣的是，最简配置（单个远视野）在实机上达到与最复杂模型相同的顶级性能（1.11°），说明高粒度预测数据并非物理迁移的必要条件。
AI.motivation: 工业控制中的DRL常因纯反应式控制（仅依赖当前跟踪误差）导致滞后和超调。为实现低计算开销的预判控制，作者引入预测公式（将目标速度与未来参考视野纳入状态空间），以提升DRL在物理系统中的控制精度与响应速度。
AI.method: 提出一种预测性DRL框架：在PPO算法的状态空间中增广目标速度和未来参考视野信息。在1-DoF直升机平台测试了8种配置（不同预测视野和速度组合），先进行仿真训练，再零样本迁移到物理硬件。
AI.result: 仿真中平均绝对偏差从2.73°降至0.31°（误差减少9倍）。但零样本物理迁移存在 sim-to-real 差距；最简配置（单个远视野）在实机上达到与最复杂模型相同的1.11°最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 高粒度预测数据对物理迁移并非必需；简化的预测配置（单个较远视野）足以在实机上取得最优控制效果，为工业DRL的实用化提供了低成本预判控制思路。

title: When Does Resolution Help a Frozen Backbone? Global Attention at Resolution Predicts Scalable Adaptation for Camouflaged and Marine Animal Segmentation
summary: Adapting frozen vision foundation models to fine-grained segmentation now largely depends on backbone selection. Whether the backbone applies global attention to a high-resolution token set predicts whether a low-rank adapter turns resolution into accuracy. Isotropic ViTs attend globally over the full grid and keep improving with resolution; hierarchical backbones confine early attention to local windows and pool the grid before their global stages, plateauing at lower resolutions. A controlled six-backbone study establishes the pattern, and editing the backbone points to the cause: pooling keeps the benefit, removing global attention does not. The effect is specific to low-rank adaptation. Under one fixed pipeline, SALT (Side-stem, Attention-gated U-Net, Low-rank Tuning), one RGB-only pass on a strong isotropic backbone wins the best S-measure on the four data-matched camouflaged sets, and leads every marine and salient set. It reaches a new state of the art on both marine-animal benchmarks (MAS3K mIoU 0.878).

AI.tldr: 冻结的视觉基础模型适应细粒度分割取决于骨干网络选择。全局注意力+高分辨率token集的各向同性ViT随分辨率提升表现持续改善，而层级骨干网络因局部注意力限制性能在较低分辨率平台期。基于六种骨干网络的对照实验证实了这一模式，并发现池化保留收益而移除全局注意力则无效。提出的SALT管线(侧干、注意力门控U-Net、低秩调优)在伪装/海洋/显著目标分割任务上达到新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 探究为何冻结的视觉基础模型在适应细粒度分割时性能与骨干网络选择高度相关，特别是分辨率和注意力机制类型的影响。
AI.method: 1) 六种骨干网络的受控对比实验 2) SALT管线(侧干+注意力门控U-Net+低秩调优) 3) 消融实验(池化vs全局注意力)
AI.result: 全局注意力的各向同性ViT随分辨率持续提升；层级骨干在低分辨率平台期。SALT在多个基准数据集达SOTA，MAS3K mIoU 0.878。
AI.conclusion: 全局注意力是低秩适应下分辨率收益的关键因素，且该效应仅适用于低秩适应范式。选择各向同性骨干可最大化细粒度分割性能。

title: CrossHallu: Do Hallucination Signals Generalize Across Languages and Domains in Large Language Model's Internals?
summary: Recent hallucination detection techniques in large language models (LLMs) focus on directly extracting features from a model's internal representations and training a classifier on these features to detect hallucinations, demonstrating promising results. Notwithstanding this advancement, most internal-state hallucination detection techniques have been explored predominantly in English, raising the question of whether such internal signals generalize across different languages and domains. To address this gap, we present CrossHallu, the first study to evaluate the cross-lingual and cross-domain generalization of hallucination detection using internal representations from six LLMs on the generative question-answering task. We conduct a systematic Arabic <-> English evaluation using TruthfulQA, an Arabic translated version of TruthfulQA, and HalluScore. This evaluation encompasses monolingual training and testing, cross-lingual transfer, cross-domain transfer, and combined cross-lingual and cross-domain transfer. The results reveal that internal-state hallucination signals in LLMs transfer across languages and domains for most models, with cross-lingual performance highly dependent on both class separability and language alignment in the feature space, whereas cross-domain transfer within Arabic varies depending on the training and testing datasets used for the hallucination detector. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/aishaalansari57/CrossHal.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统评估了基于LLM内部表征的幻觉检测在跨语言（阿拉伯语<->英语）和跨领域的泛化能力，发现内部信号在大多数模型中可迁移，但跨语言性能依赖于类别可分性和语言对齐，跨领域迁移则受数据集影响。
AI.motivation: 现有内部状态幻觉检测技术主要针对英语研究，尚不清楚这类内部信号是否能在不同语言和领域间通用。
AI.method: 提出了CrossHallu框架，在6个LLM上使用TruthfulQA及其阿拉伯语翻译版和HalluScore，系统进行了单语训练测试、跨语言迁移、跨领域迁移以及跨语言+跨领域组合迁移的实验。
AI.result: 内部状态幻觉信号在大多数模型中能跨语言和跨领域迁移；跨语言性能高度依赖特征空间中的类别可分性和语言对齐；阿拉伯语内的跨领域迁移则因训练/测试数据集不同而异。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明基于内部表征的幻觉检测具有一定的跨语言和跨领域泛化能力，但性能受特征空间对齐和数据集选择的影响，为该方向提供了重要的实证基础。

title: Shortcut Learning in Legal Judgment Prediction: Empirical Evidence from the UK Employment Tribunal
summary: Current Legal Judgment Prediction (LJP) is constrained by its reliance on post-hoc judicial materials, increasing the likelihood that models perform retrospective classification rather than true forecasting. This paper empirically investigates shortcut learning in this context by studying claim-level outcome prediction in UK Employment Tribunal (UKET) decisions. Using a corpus of 33,158 individual claims, we predict outcomes from claim texts and LLM-extracted case summaries, evaluating models ranging from interpretable TF-IDF-based classifiers to black-box LLMs. While headline predictive performance figures appear strong, we demonstrate that such performance in LJP systems trained on post-hoc judicial text can be driven by the retrospective nature of the source material. Stratifying the test data by human judgments of leakage reveals that performance increases where outcome-revealing cues are embedded in the narrative. Moreover, a model trained on just the 4% of features identified as leakage achieves high performance, outperforming human experts. These findings substantiate concerns that LJP performance may be exaggerated by linguistic artefacts. Yet this vulnerability is not fatal to the research agenda. Instead, post-hoc judgments might be treated as potentially contaminated texts, requiring active auditing. Retraining models after masking leakage features results in only a negligible reduction in Macro-F1. Hence, while models will opportunistically exploit shortcuts when available, they remain capable of extracting useful predictive signals when these artefacts are removed.

AI.tldr: 本文实证研究了法律判决预测（LJP）中的捷径学习问题，发现模型在UK Employment Tribunal数据集上的高表现主要源于利用事后司法材料中的结果泄露线索，而非真正的预测能力；但通过去污处理，模型仍能保留有用的预测信号。
AI.motivation: 当前法律判决预测模型依赖事后司法材料，可能导致模型进行回顾性分类而非真正预测，作者希望实证检验这种捷径学习问题及其严重程度。
AI.method: 使用33,158条英国劳动法庭索赔数据，从索赔文本和LLM提取的案例摘要中预测结果；通过人工判断对测试数据进行泄露分层，并训练仅使用泄露特征（4%）的模型；最后通过掩码泄露特征重新训练模型评估性能变化。
AI.result: 1）高预测性能主要由事后材料中的结果泄露线索驱动；2）仅用4%泄露特征的模型性能超过人类专家；3）去污后模型Macro-F1仅略有下降，说明模型仍能从非泄露特征中提取有用信号。
AI.conclusion: LJP性能可能被语言伪影夸大，但这一问题并非致命——事后判决文本应被视为可能受污染的材料并加以审计，去污后模型仍具备有效预测能力。

title: Sample-Efficient Pareto Front Modeling for Energy-Aware Reinforcement Learning Using Bayesian Optimization
summary: Industrial automation increasingly demands control strategies that balance operational performance with strict energy efficiency requirements. A common approach to solving this multi-objective problem, particularly within the framework of reinforcement learning (RL), is to formulate a single, scalar reward function that linearly combines the competing objectives. However, the manual weighting of these different objectives is heavily reliant on domain intuition, incredibly time-consuming, prone to human bias, and frequently fails to uncover optimal trade-off solutions. This work addresses the critical challenge of automating the weight selection process to systematically and efficiently discover the Pareto front of optimal trade-off policies. We formulate the weight selection process as a multi-objective Bayesian optimization (MOBO) problem and evaluate its sample efficiency against a standard uniform grid search baseline. Using a physical Quanser Aero 2 testbed configured for 1-DoF pitch control, our results demonstrate that the MOBO approach, utilizing the expected hypervolume improvement (qEHVI) acquisition function, consistently outperforms uniform grid sampling. MOBO achieves superior hypervolume and maximum spread, successfully identifying high-quality, diverse trade-off policies with a reduced evaluation budget, thereby enabling highly efficient energy-aware control in complex mechatronic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用多目标贝叶斯优化（MOBO）自动选择强化学习中的权重参数，以高效发现Pareto前沿最优折衷策略，在Quanser Aero 2平台上的实验表明，该方法在超体积和最大扩散指标上优于均匀网格搜索，显著提高了样本效率。
AI.motivation: 工业自动化中多目标强化学习依赖人工手动设定标量奖励函数的权重，耗时且易引入偏差，难以找到最优折衷解。本文旨在自动化和系统化权重选择过程，提高多目标优化效率。
AI.method: 将权重选择问题建模为多目标贝叶斯优化（MOBO），采用期望超体积改进（qEHVI）采集函数，在物理Quanser Aero 2平台上进行1-DoF俯仰控制实验，与均匀网格搜索基线进行样本效率对比。
AI.result: MOBO方法在超体积和最大扩散指标上均优于均匀网格搜索，能够以更少的评估预算识别出高质量、多样化的折衷策略。
AI.conclusion: MOBO能高效自动发现Pareto前沿，为复杂机电系统中节能感知的多目标控制提供了高效解决方案。

title: RayTun3R: Online Camera Adaptation in 3D Foundation Models
summary: Recent 3D foundation models, such as DUSt3R, MASt3R, VGGT, $π^3$, and Depth Anything 3, provide strong feed-forward depth and pose estimates on pinhole imagery, but degrade sharply under fisheye camera geometry. We show that this failure is partly caused by a pinhole camera bias in the positional encodings of pretrained 3D foundation models, and propose RayTun3R, a lightweight camera adaptation approach. It keeps the pretrained network fixed and adapts only lightweight components tied to token position and camera geometry. RayTun3R learns parameter-efficient residual corrections to absolute and rotary positional encodings, together with parameter-free tokenization and corrections to prediction-grid coordinates that remove residual pinhole assumptions. The resulting adapter contains only 10,752 trainable parameters and can be learned from a short temporal segment using geometric losses. Once adapted, RayTun3R transfers effectively to the remaining frames of the sequence without incurring additional runtime costs. Across diverse fisheye datasets with fields of view from $110^\circ$ to $200^\circ$, our adapter reduces rotation error by $2$-$12\times$ relative to the unadapted model, outperforms LoRA while using $\sim\!14\times$ fewer trainable parameters, improves pose over adaptation-free baselines while avoiding their multi-view inference cost, and remains competitive on depth accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RayTun3R，一种轻量级相机适配方法，通过仅调整位置编码和网格坐标（仅10,752个可训练参数），使预训练的3D基础模型（如DUSt3R、MASt3R等）在鱼眼相机图像上显著提升深度和位姿估计性能，旋转误差降低2-12倍，且无需额外推理成本。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D基础模型在针孔相机图像上表现优异，但在鱼眼相机（视场角110°-200°）下性能严重下降。作者发现部分原因在于预训练模型的位置编码存在针孔相机偏差，因此需要一种轻量级的适配方法来消除这一偏差。
AI.method: RayTun3R采用参数高效微调策略：1）对绝对位置编码和旋转位置编码学习残差修正；2）采用无参数的token化方式；3）修正预测网格坐标以消除残余的针孔假设。仅训练10,752个参数，利用短时间序列的几何损失进行学习，适配后可直接迁移到序列中其余帧。
AI.result: 在视场角110°-200°的多个鱼眼数据集上，旋转误差相比未适配模型降低2-12倍；比LoRA少约14倍可训练参数且表现更优；优于不依赖适配的基线方法且避免了多视图推理成本；深度精度具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: RayTun3R证明了通过极少量可训练参数对位置编码进行相机几何适配，即可有效消除针孔偏差，使预训练3D基础模型泛化到鱼眼相机，是一种轻量、高效且实用的解决方案。

title: Telescope: Improving Zero Shot Detection of LLM Generated Content By Measuring Token Repetition Probability
summary: Distinguishing Large Language Model (LLM) generated text from human writing is a critical and difficult challenge. While LLMs are trained to write like humans, we hypothesize that this training leaves an indelible mark. LLMs develop a particularly strong aversion to token repetition very early in training. This bias persists as a ''Vestigial Heuristic'' (a developmental artifact) that is activated in LLM-generated text, separating LLM from human writing. To probe this phenomenon, we introduce Telescope Perplexity, a metric that evaluates the token repetition of the model, $P(s_i | s_{1:i})$ . Our empirical investigation reveals that the Telescope Perplexity signature emerges early in pre-training, and Telescope Perplexity empirically enables highly effective zero-shot LLM detection. We show state-of-the-art or competitive performance across diverse datasets (including modern evaluation sets we introduce), reference models, and perturbation schemes with greater efficiency than other methods.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LLM在训练早期形成了对token重复的强烈厌恶，这种"残留启发式"成为区分LLM与人类写作的关键特征，并据此提出Telescope Perplexity指标，实现了高效且先进的零样本LLM检测。
AI.motivation: 区分LLM生成文本与人类写作是一项关键而困难的挑战，现有方法往往效率不高或依赖特定参考模型。
AI.method: 提出Telescope Perplexity指标，用于评估模型的token重复模式P(s_i | s_{1:i})，通过分析LLM在预训练早期形成的对token重复的偏见来进行检测。
AI.result: Telescope Perplexity在多种数据集、参考模型和扰动方案上实现了最先进或具有竞争力的零样本检测性能，且效率优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: LLM对token重复的厌恶是训练早期形成的固化偏见（残留启发式），这种特征可作为有效区分LLM与人类文本的可靠信号，Telescope Perplexity为此提供了高效实用的检测工具。

title: Agentic SABRE: An Uncertainty-Aware Neuro-Symbolic Multi-Agent Framework for Adaptive Ransomware Detection
summary: Ransomware has evolved into a complex, adaptive, and fast-moving adversary category in which static signatures and monolithic classifiers fail to generalise under concept drift, evasion, and behavioural polymorphism. In this paper, we present Agentic SABRE (Semantic-Behavioural Arbitration for Ransomware Evaluation), an uncertainty-aware, neuro-symbolic, multi-agent framework for adaptive ransomware detection. SABRE fuses semantic, representation-based evidence with behavioural, time-window forensic telemetry and employs Monte Carlo Dropout inference to quantify epistemic uncertainty for each agent. We introduce a decision-layer orchestrator that performs risk- and uncertainty-aware triage using two interpretable thresholds: a risk score and an uncertainty budget. High-confidence, high-risk samples are automatically contained, while uncertain or borderline cases are escalated to human analysts, establishing a flexible computational contract between autonomous response and analyst oversight. To support auditability and trust, SABRE integrates post-hoc explainability mechanisms, including gradient saliency, permutation importance, and counterfactual analysis, enabling both local and global interpretation of agent decisions. Extensive evaluation on RDset and RanSMAP demonstrates that Agentic SABRE preserves perfect discrimination on saturated semantic datasets, with AUC equal to 1.0, while improving robustness under weak behavioural signals. It achieves up to a 4.9 percent relative reduction in false escalations at equal recall while maintaining calibrated predictive uncertainty. Counterfactual analysis further shows that semantic and behavioural decisions can be reversed with bounded perturbation cost, indicating stable and interpretable decision boundaries.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Agentic SABRE的神经符号多智能体框架，融合语义与行为证据，结合不确定性量化与可解释性机制，实现自适应勒索软件检测，在保持完美判别力的同时降低误报率。
AI.motivation: 勒索软件已演变为复杂、自适应且快速变化的对抗类别，静态签名和单一分类器在面对概念漂移、规避攻击和行为多态性时无法有效泛化，亟需更鲁棒且可解释的检测方案。
AI.method: 构建多智能体框架SABRE，融合基于语义的表示证据和基于行为的时间窗取证数据；采用Monte Carlo Dropout量化每个智能体的认知不确定性；设计决策层编排器，基于风险评分和不确定性预算进行分诊；集成梯度显著性、排列重要性和反事实分析等事后可解释性机制。
AI.result: 在RDset和RanSMAP数据集上，语义饱和数据集AUC达到1.0；在弱行为信号下鲁棒性提升，等召回率下误报相对降低4.9%；反事实分析表明语义和行为决策可通过有界扰动成本反转，决策边界稳定且可解释。
AI.conclusion: Agentic SABRE通过不确定性感知的神经符号多智能体架构，在保持高性能检测的同时增强了系统鲁棒性和可解释性，为自主响应与人工分析之间建立了灵活的计算契约。

title: CuBAS: Information Geometric Curvature-Based Adaptive Sampling for Supervised Classification
summary: The informativeness of a training set is as consequential as its size, yet most sampling strategies remain agnostic to the intrinsic geometry of the data distribution. We introduce CuBAS (Curvature-Based Adaptive Sampling), an information-geometric framework for adaptive data selection in supervised classification, grounded in the q-state Potts Markov random field (MRF) model. The central insight is that a labeled dataset can be viewed as a statistical manifold, on which local curvature, estimated via the ratio of second to first-order observed Fisher information, faithfully encodes the geometric complexity of the data distribution. We construct a k-nearest-neighbor graph over the labeled data and derive a closed-form curvature score at each vertex from the Potts sufficient statistics. This curvature signal partitions the graph into two complementary regimes: low-curvature regions, corresponding to smooth, homogeneous clusters, and high-curvature regions, concentrated around decision boundaries that are disproportionately informative for classification. By selecting nodes from both regimes, CuBAS constructs compact yet maximally informative training subsets. Empirical evaluation across more than 60 benchmark datasets demonstrates consistent and statistically significant improvements over random sampling and uncertainty-based baselines, across a wide range of labeling budgets and classifier architectures. CuBAS is computationally efficient (linear in the number of k-NN graph edges), theoretically grounded in the differential geometry of statistical manifolds, and interpretable in terms of the local shape operator of the data manifold.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CuBAS框架，通过局部曲率估计数据的几何复杂度，在保持训练效率的同时构建信息量最大的训练子集。
AI.motivation: 现有采样策略忽视数据分布的固有几何结构，而训练集的信息量与其规模同等重要。
AI.method: 基于q态Potts马尔可夫随机场模型，将标注数据视为统计流形，利用二阶与一阶Fisher信息之比估计局部曲率；通过k近邻图划分低曲率（平滑同质簇）和高曲率（决策边界）区域，从两者中联合采样。
AI.result: 在60+基准数据集上，于多种标签预算和分类器架构下，CuBAS一致且统计显著地优于随机采样和基于不确定性的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CuBAS计算高效（线性复杂度）、理论扎实（统计流形微分几何），且具有可解释性（数据流形的局部形状算子）。

title: Global Pose Control for Generative View Synthesis in Normalized Object Coordinate Space
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page https://lizb6626.github.io/GlobalNVS/
summary: Novel View Synthesis (NVS) enables the generation of unseen views of a scene from a single or multiple images, allowing users to freely explore an object from any viewpoint. Despite the recent impressive qualitative improvements of generative models for this task, existing methods struggle to provide global and intuitive control of target viewpoints because they either use input-relative camera poses or are limited to generating sparse global views. This lack of global pose control severely limits the number of downstream tasks potentially enabled by NVS. To address this limitation, we propose a novel approach for precise camera control in a customizable Normalized Object Coordinate Space (NOCS), requiring single or few unposed images. Our method operates solely on the absolute camera pose of the target view in NOCS, eliminating the need for a relative world frame or camera poses of the input images. Unlike previous methods that treat NVS as a standalone generation task, we formulate it as an image editing problem and build upon state-of-the-art editing models to leverage their superior generalization capability. Camera information is injected as dedicated camera tokens via an in-context multi-modal conditioning strategy. To alleviate the inherent ambiguity of NOCS, we incorporate text descriptions that explicitly define the object's canonical coordinate frame, which also enhances generalization to unseen object categories. Furthermore, we curate a high-quality dataset with consistently aligned orientations and corresponding NOCS text definitions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method robustly generates novel views with accurate and consistent orientations from arbitrary unposed images across diverse categories, achieving state-of-the-art image quality and fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于NOCS（归一化物体坐标空间）的精确摄像机控制方法，通过将新视角合成视为图像编辑问题，利用文本描述消除歧义，实现从任意未摆姿图像生成精确、一致视角的SOTA效果。
AI.motivation: 现有NVS方法缺乏全局直观的视角控制，只能使用输入相关的摄像机姿态或生成稀疏全局视角，严重限制了NVS的下游任务应用。
AI.method: 1）在可定制的NOCS空间中基于绝对摄像机姿态工作，无需相对世界坐标系或输入图像姿态；2）将NVS公式化为图像编辑问题，利用现有编辑模型的泛化能力；3）通过上下文多模态条件注入专用摄像机token；4）引入文本描述显式定义物体规范坐标框架以消除NOCS歧义；5）构建高质量对齐数据集。
AI.result: 在多样化类别上，从任意未摆姿图像稳健生成具有准确一致方向的新视角，图像质量和保真度达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了NVS中缺少全局视角控制的问题，通过NOCS空间和图像编辑范式的结合，实现了更精确、更通用的新视角合成。

title: Speaker-Disentangled Chunk-Wise Regression for Syllabic Tokenization
comment: Accepted by IEEE Open Journal of Signal Processing (OJSP), 10 pages, 4 figures
summary: Unsupervised syllabic tokenization aims to learn discrete syllabic tokens that capture latent linguistic content-related structure from raw speech. Recent syllabic tokenization methods employ teacher-student distillation of the pretrained HuBERT to organize latent speech frame representations into syllabic segments. However, when trained with an utterance-level cross-entropy objective, the model predicts speaker identity rather than linguistic content, thereby compromising the purity of syllabic tokens. To address this problem, we propose a speaker-disentangled syllabic tokenizer that regresses speaker-perturbed student representations toward clean teacher targets within fixed-length chunks. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in syllable boundary detection and syllabic segment clustering. Moreover, a speech language model trained on our syllabic tokens achieves a 7% relative improvement in syntactic and semantic understanding over the phone-level SpiRit-LM.

AI.tldr: 提出一种说话人解耦的音节分词器，通过回归被说话人扰动后的学生表征到干净的教师目标，解决了无监督音节分词中说话人身份干扰问题，在音节边界检测和聚类上达到SOTA，并在语音语言模型中带来7%的语义理解提升。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督音节分词方法使用HuBERT的师生蒸馏，但在 utterance 级交叉熵训练下，模型倾向于预测说话人身份而非语言内容，导致音节token纯度下降。
AI.method: 提出说话人解耦的音节分词器（Speaker-Disentangled Syllabic Tokenizer），在固定长度块内将经过说话人扰动的学生表征回归到干净的教师目标，从而去除说话人信息，保留语言内容。
AI.result: 在音节边界检测和音节段聚类任务上达到SOTA；基于该token训练的语音语言模型在句法和语义理解上相比phone-level的SpiRit-LM提升7%。
AI.conclusion: 说话人解耦策略能有效提升音节token的语言内容纯度，从而改善下游语音语言模型的理解能力。

title: HAS-Bench: Evaluating LLM-Based Human-Agent Systems under Configurable Human Participation
summary: Large language models increasingly operate in settings where humans are active collaborators rather than passive task providers. We introduce HAS-Framework, a graph-based framework that represents humans and LLM-powered agents as first-class participants with explicit roles, permissions, communication paths, and action authority. Building on this framework, HAS-Bench evaluates Human-Agent Systems under configurable human participation across agency levels, interaction channels, and persona policies. The benchmark measures both task outcomes and process-level collaboration behavior, including clarification quality, feedback utilization, control calibration, safety, initiative, and interaction cost. Experiments across six domains show that human participation can substantially improve task completion and failure recovery, but the gains depend on when, how, and by whom human input is exercised.

AI.tldr: 提出HAS-Framework图框架和HAS-Bench基准，用于评估人类与LLM智能体在协作系统中的角色、权限和交互行为，实验表明人类参与能提升任务完成率和故障恢复，但效果取决于参与时机、方式和人员。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型越来越多地应用于人类作为主动协作者而非被动任务提供者的场景，现有工作缺乏对人类-智能体系统中人类参与的系统化建模与评估框架。
AI.method: 提出HAS-Framework图框架，将人类和LLM智能体视为一等参与者，定义角色、权限、通信路径和行动权威；构建HAS-Bench基准，在多个维度（代理级别、交互渠道、人物策略）配置人类参与，评估任务结果和过程级协作行为（澄清质量、反馈利用、控制校准、安全性、主动性、交互成本）。
AI.result: 在六个领域的实验中，人类参与能够显著提升任务完成率和故障恢复能力，但增益取决于人类输入被行使的时机、方式和人员。
AI.conclusion: 人类参与对LLM智能体系统有正面作用，但需要精细化设计参与时机、方式和人员配置，简单的"加入人类"并不总能带来最优效果。

title: Rethinking Neural Nonlinearity as Gating
summary: Activation functions are considered an essential primitive for neural nonlinearity, i.e., they enable neural networks to serve as universal approximators. In this paper, we show that this nonlinearity can also be achieved by input-conditioned threshold gating through branches as a universal primitive. We demonstrate that standard activations -- whether piecewise-linear (ReLU, PReLU, Hardtanh) or smooth (SiLU, Sigmoid, Tanh, GELU) -- are in fact instances of a single Threshold Gating (TG) primitive. For softmax, we show that it admits an exact TG conversion via its equivalent per-element Sigmoid form. We then validate these equivalences by converting pretrained networks across CNNs, transformer-based models, and recurrent architectures, preserving model performance without requiring retraining. Threshold Gating also enables training from scratch that goes beyond replacing existing activations, enabling gains in model compression, performance, and shorter training. We also propose a 'Minimal Branch Theorem' which relates the minimum number of required branches in our primitive to the trainability of general deep neural networks. In terms of hardware implementation, TG maps to a unified implementation in the case of analog in-memory systems, addressing the bottleneck of analog-to-digital and digital-to-analog converters (ADC/DAC) that is known to significantly impact power consumption and on-chip area.

AI.tldr: 本文提出阈值门控（Threshold Gating, TG）作为一种统一原语，证明标准激活函数（ReLU、SiLU、Softmax等）均可视为TG的特例，并能在不重训练的情况下替换预训练网络中的激活函数，同时支持从头训练，在模型压缩、性能和训练速度上带来提升。
AI.motivation: 当前神经网络依赖多种不同的激活函数来实现非线性，但这些函数的硬件实现（尤其是ADC/DAC）存在功耗和面积瓶颈。作者希望找到一种统一的原语，既能表达所有标准激活函数，又能简化硬件实现。
AI.method: 提出Threshold Gating (TG)原语，通过输入条件化的阈值门控分支实现非线性。证明ReLU、PReLU、Hardtanh、SiLU、Sigmoid、Tanh、GELU等激活函数均为TG的特例，Softmax可通过逐元素Sigmoid形式精确转换。提出"最小分支定理"关联所需分支数与深度神经网络的可训练性。
AI.result: 在CNN、Transformer、RNN等架构上验证了TG转换后的模型性能保持不变（无需重训练）；从头训练时在模型压缩、性能和训练速度上取得改进；在模拟存内计算系统中实现了统一的硬件映射，缓解了ADC/DAC瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 阈值门控是一种通用且高效的非线性原语，不仅统一了现有的激活函数，还为硬件实现和模型训练带来了实际收益。

title: Diagnosing Aerial-View Object Detectors with Foundational Image Generative Models
summary: Recent advances in large-scale image generative models enable photorealistic scene synthesis with controllable attributes. Beyond data augmentation, their potential as diagnostic tools for trained vision systems remains unexplored in the aerial and remote sensing domains. We introduce a synthetic diagnostic framework for aerial-view vehicle detection that combines text-guided generation, attribute-controlled editing, and automated attribute verification to construct a controllable synthetic testbed. This enables fine-grained evaluation of pretrained detectors under diverse scene types and environmental conditions that are difficult to isolate in real datasets. Across three detection architectures and three real aerial datasets, synthetic scene-wise performance trends closely match real-world weaknesses. Guided by these diagnostics, targeted supplementation with small real datasets from the identified weak categories yields improvements of up to 13% AP50 while requiring substantially fewer additional samples than non-targeted augmentation. Our results show that controlled synthetic probing can predict real-domain performance gaps and guide efficient data collection. The proposed diagnostic framework is modular and can incorporate alternative generative or vision-language models as capabilities evolve. Our code and datasets are available here: https://humansensinglab.github.io/AVODDiag/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可控合成图像诊断框架，用于评估航拍车辆检测模型。通过文本引导生成、属性编辑和自动验证，构建了合成测试集，揭示了真实场景中难以隔离的性能弱点，并指导高效数据补充，提升检测性能最高达13% AP50。
AI.motivation: 大尺度图像生成模型在航拍与遥感领域作为诊断工具尚未被探索，现有真实数据集难以隔离特定场景类型和环境条件进行细粒度评估。
AI.method: 提出合成诊断框架，结合文本引导生成、属性控制编辑与自动属性验证，构建可控合成测试床，对预训练检测器进行细粒度评估。
AI.result: 在三种检测架构和三个真实航拍数据集上，合成场景的性能趋势与真实弱点高度一致；基于诊断结果进行靶向数据补充，仅需少量样本即实现最高13% AP50的提升。
AI.conclusion: 受控合成探测能够预测真实域性能差距并指导高效数据收集，框架具有模块化扩展性。

title: Beyond Multilingual Averages: MTEB-PT, a Benchmark for Portuguese Sentence Encoders
comment: Accepted at BRACIS 2026 - 36th Brazilian Conference on Intelligent Systems
summary: Portuguese remains underrepresented in text embedding evaluation, despite being one of the most widely spoken languages in the world. As a result, embedding models are often selected based on English or multilingual metrics, while their effectiveness in Portuguese remains unclear. We present MTEB-PT, a Portuguese benchmark constructed from a subset of MMTEB, comprising 14 existing datasets across Semantic Textual Similarity (STS), classification, retrieval, and reranking. We use this benchmark to evaluate 17 open- and closed-source embedding models under a unified protocol. Our results show that Portuguese performance is strongly task-dependent: multilingual rankings do not reliably predict Portuguese-specific performance across task families, no single model dominates all settings, and models with stronger long-context capacity are particularly advantageous on longer-input tasks such as retrieval and reranking. The benchmark also shows that language-specific fine-tuning still improves model performance in Portuguese, especially on task types that match the adaptation data most closely. To examine this effect, we fine-tune three representative backbone models with Portuguese contrastive supervision and Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL). These benchmark-informed baselines yield their strongest gains on STS, consistent with the predominantly symmetric supervision used during training, while also improving retrieval and remaining competitive under dimensional truncation. We release the MTEB-PT benchmark, the fine-tuned models, and the training and evaluation code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MTEB-PT，一个面向葡萄牙语的文本嵌入评估基准，包含14个数据集，评测了17个嵌入模型。发现多语言排名无法可靠预测葡萄牙语特定任务表现，且语言特定微调能带来显著提升，特别是在STS任务上。
AI.motivation: 葡萄牙语虽然是全球使用最广泛的语言之一，但在文本嵌入评估领域仍被严重忽视。现有模型多基于英语或多语言指标选取，但它们在葡萄牙语上的实际效果尚不明确，缺乏针对葡萄牙语的系统评估基准。
AI.method: 从MMTEB中选取14个现有数据集构建MTEB-PT基准，涵盖STS、分类、检索和重排序四大任务类型。在统一协议下评估17个开源和闭源嵌入模型，并选取三个代表性骨干模型进行葡萄牙语对比监督和Matryoshka表示学习（MRL）微调。
AI.result: 葡萄牙语性能高度依赖任务类型；多语言排名不能可靠预测葡萄牙语任务表现；没有单一模型在所有任务上占优；长上下文能力在检索和重排序等长输入任务中具有优势；语言特定微调能提升性能，且STS任务提升最为显著（与训练数据匹配），同时检索任务也有改善，并在维度截断下保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: MTEB-PT为葡萄牙语嵌入模型评估提供了可靠基准，证明了语言特定微调的有效性，并揭示了多语言评估在低资源语言任务上的局限性。相关工作将为葡萄牙语NLP社区提供重要资源。

title: Do GUI Agents Believe Their Eyes? Diagnosing State-Belief Reliance on Pixels versus Structure
summary: Multimodal GUI agents read an interface through two redundant channels: the rendered pixels of a screenshot and a serialized structure such as a DOM or accessibility tree. Before acting, an agent forms a belief about the current interface state, but existing benchmarks score task success, element grounding, or attack resistance and do not ask whether that belief is drawn from the pixels. We formalize visual state reliance, the attribution of a state belief to pixels, structure, or priors, and measure it with paired single-channel interventions over 310 real web, mobile, and desktop probes. Every probe is scored by deterministic forced choice, with no model-generated item and no model judge. Our central metric is the Perception-Fusion Gap, the fraction of probes a model perceives correctly yet resolves toward structure under conflict. Across five models from three vendors, textual state beliefs defer to structure while image-only accuracy stays near ceiling, and Perception-Fusion Gap is positive for every model; non-text identity, by contrast, stays largely pixel-bound. The substitution is specific to the serialized-text and indexed-action channel, and coordinate-action agents are largely immune. For textual conflicts, a white-box ablation traces the effect to a single copied structural value, and in two live environments the conflict drives wrong actions and real task failure. Visual state reliance therefore gives a measurable diagnostic of whether agent state beliefs are visually grounded, and the errors it exposes propagate to actions.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了"视觉状态依赖"的概念，通过配对单通道干预测量GUI代理的状态信念是来自像素、结构还是先验，并引入"感知-融合差距"这一核心指标。研究发现，文本状态信念倾向于依赖结构信息而非视觉信息，而坐标动作代理则基本不受影响。这种冲突会导致实际任务失败。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试只评估任务成功率、元素定位或抗攻击能力，但没有询问代理的状态信念是否来源于像素（视觉信息）。作者希望形式化并测量GUI代理对视觉信息的依赖程度。
AI.method: 通过配对单通道干预设计，在310个真实网页、移动和桌面探针上进行确定性强制选择评估，不依赖模型生成或模型评判。提出"感知-融合差距"（Perception-Fusion Gap）作为核心指标。
AI.result: 五种模型均表现出正向的感知-融合差距，文本状态信念倾向于结构信息，而图像准确率保持接近上限。非文本身份代理则主要依赖像素。这种替代特定于序列化文本和索引动作通道，坐标动作代理基本免疫。
AI.conclusion: 视觉状态依赖提供了一个可测量的诊断方法，用于判断代理的状态信念是否基于视觉信息，并且这些误差会传播到实际动作中，导致任务失败。

title: Decentralised Federated Learning over Temporal Networks: The Role of Heterogeneities
summary: Decentralised federated learning, based on peer-to-peer communication, is increasingly proposed for on-device training of machine learning models, promising a privacy-preserving, communication-efficient training process with no risk of single-point failure. However, the role of structural and temporal inhomogeneities in such fully decentralised settings remains poorly understood. Here, we investigate their effects when model parameters are locally averaged during aggregation. We show that the decentralised federated learning process is governed, both in the early phase and the late, stationary limit, by the same dynamics as a lazy random-walk diffusion process on temporal networks. Based on this mapping, we demonstrate that the typical experimental scenario used in decentralised federated learning leads to unrealistically rapid convergence because of ignoring the temporal and structural inhomogeneities inherent in the communication network. We analyse real-world temporal networks and find that inhomogeneities most often dramatically slow down diffusion, hence the convergence process.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将去中心化联邦学习映射为时间网络上的惰性随机游走扩散过程，揭示了结构性和时间性不均匀性会显著拖慢模型收敛，并指出典型实验设置因忽略这些不均匀性而得出不切实际的快速收敛结果。
AI.motivation: 去中心化联邦学习虽被广泛提出，但其在完全去中心化设置下结构性和时间性不均匀性的影响仍不清楚，本文旨在探究这些因素对模型聚合收敛过程的作用。
AI.method: 将去中心化联邦学习（模型参数局部平均聚合）映射为时间网络上的惰性随机游走扩散过程，借此分析早期和稳态极限下的动力学行为。
AI.result: 典型实验设置因忽略通信网络内在的结构性和时间性不均匀性，导致得出不切实际的快速收敛结论；真实时间网络中的不均匀性通常会显著拖慢扩散及收敛过程。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化联邦学习的收敛动力学本质上受时间网络扩散过程支配，不均匀性是其性能评估中不可忽视的关键因素。

title: GRCD: Grounded Region Change Detection for Multi-Finding Chest X-Ray Pairs
summary: Radiologists routinely compare current and prior chest X-rays to track disease progression, producing follow-up reports that describe multiple findings, each localised to an anatomical region and annotated with a temporal change status. Existing automated methods either generate reports from a single image without modelling temporal context, or incorporate temporal information but do not ground their outputs spatially. The few approaches that combine temporal reasoning with spatial grounding are restricted to single-finding descriptions, leaving multi-finding reports with mixed change directions unaddressed. We present GRCD, a framework for grounded report generation from chest X-ray pairs in the multi-finding setting. We first construct a rigorously cleaned dataset of temporal chest X-ray pairs by identifying and correcting two systematic labelling errors in the source annotations. We then introduce a Region-Guided Change Token module that encodes per-region temporal change across anatomical structures and injects this signal into a language model through a dual-pathway strategy combining prepended spatial tokens with gated cross-attention. On a multi-finding test set, GRCD outperforms existing baselines on text generation and clinical accuracy metrics, with gains in change detection. Ablation studies confirm that the dual-pathway design outperforms either integration strategy in isolation on text and clinical metrics, and that region-level change encoding is necessary for multi-finding generation. Code is available at https://github.com/UTSA-VIRLab/GRCD

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRCD框架，通过区域引导的变化令牌模块和双路径策略，实现胸部X光片对的多发现象报告生成，并解决了源标注中的系统性错误。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么不建模时间上下文（单图生成），要么虽有时间信息但缺乏空间定位，少数结合时空推理的方法仅限于单发现象描述，无法处理多发现象及混合变化方向的报告。
AI.method: 1. 构建清洗后的时序胸部X光片对数据集，修正源标注中的两类系统性错误。2. 提出区域引导变化令牌模块（Region-Guided Change Token），编码每个解剖结构区域的时序变化。3. 采用双路径策略：预置空间令牌与门控交叉注意力结合，将变化信号注入语言模型。
AI.result: 在多发现象测试集上，GRCD在文本生成和临床准确性指标上优于现有基线，在变化检测方面有显著提升。消融实验证实双路径设计优于单一策略，区域级变化编码对多发现象生成至关重要。
AI.conclusion: GRCD通过区域级时序变化编码和双路径注入策略，有效解决了胸部X光片对的多发现象接地报告生成问题，代码已开源。

title: Semantic Integration and Lexical Expectation Shape N400 and P600 Dynamics During Naturalistic Reading
summary: Word surprisal is a well-established computational predictor of human neural responses during language comprehension, but it remains less clear whether local semantic fit explains neural response variation beyond lexical expectation during naturalistic reading. Using the Dublin EEG-based Reading Experiment Corpus (DERCo), this study examined whether contextual semantic relevance predicts word-locked EEG activity in the N400 and P600 windows. Contextual semantic relevance was computed as an attention-aware measure of how strongly a target word is semantically connected to its recent discourse context, and it was compared with GPT-based word surprisal. Across 22 participants and 32 EEG channels, we tested both predictors using regression-based ERP analyses and generalized additive mixed models while controlling for lexical variables and repeated observations. Both predictors were reliably associated with EEG responses, but they showed partly different temporal and scalp-level patterns. Surprisal captured expectancy-related variation, whereas contextual semantic relevance showed robust effects across N400- and P600-window mean voltages, with particularly strong explanatory support in the P600 window. Model comparisons indicated that contextual semantic relevance contributed explanatory value beyond lexical controls and surprisal. These findings suggest that naturalistic reading depends on both lexical expectation and local semantic integration, and that contextual semantic relevance offers an interpretable computational link between discourse semantic fit and ERP dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文利用DERCo脑电数据库，研究了语境语义相关性（Contextual Semantic Relevance）能否在词元惊讶度（word surprisal）之外，额外解释自然阅读中的N400和P600脑电反应。结果发现，两种预测因子都能预测EEG反应，但呈现不同的时空模式：惊讶度预测预期相关变异，而语境语义相关性在N400和P600窗口均有稳健效应，尤其在P600窗口解释力更强。
AI.motivation: 词元惊讶度虽已被证实能预测语言理解中的神经反应，但局部语义匹配（语义相关性）能否超越词汇预期效应、独立解释自然阅读中的脑电变异，尚不清楚。本文旨在探究语境语义相关性是否为N400和P600窗口的脑电活动提供超出词汇预期（惊讶度）的额外解释力。
AI.method: 使用DERCo数据库（22名被试、32个EEG通道）；以基于注意力的语境语义相关性（Contextual Semantic Relevance）和GPT词元惊讶度为预测因子；采用回归式ERP分析及广义加性混合模型（GAMMs），控制词汇变量和重复观测。
AI.result: 两种预测因子均可靠预测EEG反应，但时空模式不同：惊讶度与预期相关变异对应；语境语义相关性在N400和P600窗口均有稳健效应，P600窗口解释力尤强。模型比较显示，语境语义相关性在控制词汇变量和惊讶度后仍具有额外解释价值。
AI.conclusion: 自然阅读同时依赖词汇预期和局部语义整合，语境语义相关性提供了连接语篇语义匹配与ERP动态的可解释计算桥梁。

title: Server-side Anti-cheat in FPS games for Aimbot detection using Deep learning and Machine learning
summary: Modern video games are becoming more complex day by day. Most of these modern games are multiplayer first-person shooter (FPS) games. The rising popularity of FPS games emphasizes the need to combat cheating for fair and enjoyable gaming. As the number of players using cheating techniques like aimbots, wallhacks, and speed hacks is also increasing, we need a way to detect players who are using cheating tools to gain an unfair advantage over regular players. In this system, we focus exclusively on detecting aimbot cheats. Players who use aimbot cheats generally do not prioritize other aspects of the game. To distinguish between regular and cheating players, we identify specific features encompassing time-series data such as aim velocity, number of shots, distance to target, and more, along with behavioral data such as utility usage, player movement, and other gameplay patterns. Utilizing these features, we construct a server-side aimbot detection classifier named 'YAACS'. YAACS comprises a parser, a deep learning model, and intermediary connection utilities designed for integration with the game server. The proposed system achieves a classification accuracy of 88.6% with a false positive rate of 0.97% using a Stacked LSTM with Dense layers trained on sequences of 128 ticks (Tick Delta Negative=56, Tick Delta Positive=24), outperforming the Decision Tree baseline which achieves a higher accuracy of 96.2% but at a false positive rate of 2.68%, 2.76x worse than the best LSTM configuration. These results demonstrate that incorporating temporal context through sequence modelling is critical for minimising false accusations in FPS cheat detection.

AI.tldr: 提出YAACS系统，利用Stacked LSTM处理时间序列数据（瞄准速度、射击次数等）和行为数据，在128帧序列上实现88.6%准确率、0.97%误报率的瞄准作弊检测，相比决策树基线（96.2%准确率但2.68%误报率）误报率降低2.76倍。
AI.motivation: 现代FPS游戏作弊问题日益严重，需要有效检测使用aimbot等作弊工具的玩家，以保障公平游戏环境。
AI.method: 构建YAACS系统：解析器提取时间序列特征（瞄准速度、射击次数、目标距离等）和行为特征（道具使用、玩家移动等），使用Stacked LSTM+Dense layers在128帧序列上训练分类模型。
AI.result: Stacked LSTM配置达到88.6%准确率、0.97%误报率；决策树基线准确率96.2%但误报率2.68%（高出2.76倍）。
AI.conclusion: 在FPS作弊检测中，引入时间序列建模对降低误报率至关重要，即使牺牲部分准确率，也能显著减少对无辜玩家的错误指控。

title: Understanding electricity consumption behaviour through Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: Understanding how households consume electricity in response to socioeconomic and climatic drivers is important for decision-makers designing energy policies in a changing climate and under geopolitical tensions. Consumers respond differently to thermal stress depending on income, consumption habits and the surrounding built environment, a nonlinear behaviour that most approaches oversimplify. In this study, households are treated as agents interacting with complex environments, and Inverse Reinforcement Learning is used to represent their consumption behaviour as model implied reward functions. Specifically, we observe how these reward functions change when households undergo socioeconomic and climatic shocks. The framework is tested on different clusters of electricity consumption profiles in Italy. Clusters' reward functions are retrieved and used to understand how cooling behaviour changes from summer 2021 to summer 2022 and 2023, before, during and after the energy crisis and a heatwave. We find that these shocks reshaped cooling behaviour heterogeneously across consumer groups, in directions conditioned by their prior habits and built environment. Across the 2021 to 2023 summers, we identify a spectrum of responses: transient adjustments that receded as the shocks eased, durable shifts persisting into 2023, and consumers exhibiting negligible change. At the intradaily scale, groups comparable in socioeconomic and environmental context but differing in their daily timing of consumption responded distinctly, identifying time of use as a separate dimension of behavioural heterogeneity. Energy policies and demand-response schemes should therefore account not only for who consumers are and where they live, but for when they consume and whether their response to a shock persists.

AI.tldr: 本文利用逆强化学习将家庭用电行为建模为奖励函数，分析意大利不同消费群体在2021-2023年夏季经历能源危机和热浪冲击时的冷却行为变化，发现冲击对不同群体的影响具有异质性，且响应在时间维度和持续性上存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度简化了家庭在热应力下非线性用电行为，未能充分考虑社会经济、消费习惯和建筑环境的复杂交互。决策者需理解这些复杂驱动因素以制定适应气候变化和地缘政治紧张局势的能源政策。
AI.method: 将家庭视为与复杂环境交互的智能体，采用逆强化学习将消费行为建模为隐含奖励函数。通过观察奖励函数在社会经济和气候冲击下的变化，分析不同聚类群体的冷却行为变化。该方法在意大利不同用电轮廓聚类上测试，对比2021-2023年夏季（能源危机和热浪前后）的行为差异。
AI.result: 冲击对不同消费群体产生异质性影响，方向受其先前习惯和建筑环境制约。识别出三种响应谱：暂时性调整（随冲击缓解而消退）、持久性转变（持续至2023年）、以及几乎不变。此外，社会经济和环境背景相似但日内用电时间不同的群体，其响应也存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 能源政策和需求响应方案不仅应考虑消费者是谁（人群特征）和住在哪里（地理位置），还应考虑何时用电（时间维度）以及其对冲击的响应是否具有持续性。

title: Provable Pruning for Efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting via Coresets
comment: 39 pages, 15 figures, including supplementary material. Code: https://github.com/waseem-m/3dgs_provable_coresets
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-quality real-time novel-view synthesis, but practical scenes often contain millions of Gaussians, making compression essential for deployment on limited hardware. Existing reduction methods are effective but mostly heuristic: they provide no multiplicative approximation guarantee for the rendered objective, and thus rely heavily on costly post-pruning finetuning to recover quality. We ask a basic question: can a 3DGS scene be provably replaced by a much smaller weighted subset (coreset) while preserving the objective of interest? We first show that, in the unrestricted setting, no non-trivial multiplicative 3DGS coreset exists. We then show that multiplicative guarantees are not impossible, but resolution-dependent. For a prescribed rendering resolution, such as representative views or grids of views/rays, we provide the first weighted coreset construction theorem for 3DGS. The construction samples Gaussians by sensitivity: provable importance scores measuring each Gaussian's role in the full-scene objective. Finally, under explicit validity and log-transmittance stability assumptions, we turn this objective guarantee into a rendering guarantee. Empirically, our method is strongest where deployment needs it most: aggressive compression with no or minimal recovery compute. In prune-only and very short finetuning regimes, it achieves state-of-the-art performance, showing that principled importance estimation can be both theoretically meaningful and practically useful. Open-source code is available at https://github.com/waseem-m/3dgs_provable_coresets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个具有理论保证的3D高斯泼溅(3DGS)压缩方法，通过敏感度加权采样构建可证明的coreset，在激进压缩且无需或极少微调的场景下达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS压缩方法多为启发式，缺乏对渲染目标的乘法近似保证，严重依赖昂贵的后剪枝微调来恢复质量。作者探究能否将3DGS场景替换为更小的加权子集(coreset)并保持目标质量。
AI.method: 首先证明无约束下不存在非平凡乘法3DGS coreset，进而发现乘法保证依赖于分辨率。针对指定渲染分辨率，提出首个加权coreset构造定理，通过敏感度（重要性分数）采样高斯点。在显式有效性和对数透射率稳定性假设下，将目标保证转化为渲染保证。
AI.result: 在纯剪枝和极短微调场景下达到SOTA性能，证明基于原理的重要性估计既有理论意义又有实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明：1) 3DGS的乘法近似保证是分辨率依赖的；2) 基于敏感度加权的coreset方法能在激进压缩下保持质量；3) 理论驱动的方法在实际部署中（有限硬件、极少微调）表现最佳。

title: Detecting Hallucinations in Retrieval-Augmented Generation through Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation (GASP)
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces but does not eliminate hallucination, and existing detectors return a single answer-level score that does not indicate which sentence is unsupported, or why. To close this gap, we introduce Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation (GASP), a span-level detector that scores each answer sentence by how strongly its likelihood depends on the retrieved evidence, a quantity we term grounding sensitivity. GASP holds the answer fixed and re-scores it under the full context, under no context, and with each chunk removed, then measures the log-likelihood drops and Jensen-Shannon divergences (JSD). The likelihood of a grounded sentence collapses once its supporting passage is removed, whereas a hallucinated sentence is almost unaffected, a contrast we interpret by casting decoding as a random nonlinear iterated function system (RNIFS). We evaluate GASP on three benchmarks (RAGTruth, TofuEval, RAGBench) with three instruction-tuned scorers from two model families (Qwen2.5-0.5B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, and SmolLM2-1.7B) under a leakage-clean protocol. On RAGTruth it reaches a response-level area under the ROC curve (AUC) of about 0.73 and a span-level AUC of about 0.67, improving significantly over perplexity and by clear margins over length, whole-context natural language inference (NLI), and self-consistency baselines. The only baseline competitive at the span level is a well-configured chunk-level entailment verifier, which requires a separate model, whereas a training-free threshold on the grounding features matches the trained classifier without labeled data and serves as the default detector. Beyond RAGTruth, the signal transfers to TofuEval but not to short-answer question answering in RAGBench, showing GASP is best suited to outputs constructed from the retrieved context rather than answers recoverable from parametric knowledge.

AI.tldr: GASP是一种基于扰动的感知跨度检测器，通过测量每个答案句子对检索证据的依赖程度（即接地敏感性）来检测RAG中的幻觉，在RAGTruth上达到约0.73的响应级AUC和约0.67的跨度级AUC，优于困惑度、长度、NLI和自一致性等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统虽能减少幻觉但无法完全消除，而现有检测器只返回整个答案的单一分数，无法定位到具体哪个句子无依据或为何无依据。本文旨在提出一种能够进行句子级（span-level）幻觉检测的方法。
AI.method: GASP通过保持答案固定，在完整上下文、无上下文以及逐块移除上下文的条件下重新评分，测量对数似然下降和Jensen-Shannon散度，计算每个句子的"接地敏感性"（grounding sensitivity）。将解码过程解释为随机非线性迭代函数系统（RNIFS）来理论化有依据句子在支持段落移除后似然会骤降而幻觉句子几乎不受影响的现象。
AI.result: 在RAGTruth上达到响应级AUC约0.73，跨度级AUC约0.67，显著优于困惑度、长度、全上下文NLI和自一致性基线。仅需一个阈值即可匹配需要单独模型的块级蕴含验证器。信号可迁移到TofuEval，但不适用于短答案问答场景（RAGBench）。
AI.conclusion: GASP是一种无需训练数据的有效幻觉检测方法，特别适用于需要依赖检索上下文构建的长答案输出；但在答案可从参数知识中直接恢复的短问答场景中效果有限。

title: Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B: Compressing Hybrid MoE LLMs
summary: We present Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B, a compressed variant of Nemotron-3-Super optimized for interactive deployment. We designed the model to maximize server throughput under high user throughput constraints. In interactive serving workloads on a single 8xB200 node, Puzzle-75B-A9B achieves approximately 2x higher server throughput than Nemotron-3-Super at matched user throughput constraints. In ultra-long-context deployment on a single H100 GPU, the compressed model increases 1M-token concurrency from 1 request to 8 requests. Puzzle-75B-A9B is constructed using a multi-stage pipeline that combines the Iterative Puzzle compression framework with knowledge distillation, reinforcement learning, quantization, and a Multi-Token Prediction head. The compression process jointly optimizes heterogeneous MoE pruning, active parameter budget, and Mamba pruning to improve inference efficiency while preserving model quality. We evaluate Puzzle-75B-A9B on a broad suite of reasoning, coding, multilingual, long-context, and agentic benchmarks. Despite substantial compression, the model retains strong downstream accuracy relative to the parent model across a wide range of tasks. These results demonstrate that large hybrid MoE models can be substantially optimized for deployment efficiency while maintaining strong downstream capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B，一种通过多阶段压缩（迭代Puzzle压缩框架、知识蒸馏、强化学习、量化、多Token预测头）从Nemotron-3-Super压缩而来的模型。在8xB200节点上交互式服务吞吐量提升约2倍，在单H100 GPU上可将100万token并发从1提升至8请求，同时在推理、编码、多语言、长上下文和智能体等基准测试中保持较高精度。
AI.motivation: 为了将大型混合MoE模型优化到适合交互式部署（高用户吞吐量场景），在保持下游能力的同时大幅提升推理效率和服务吞吐量。
AI.method: 采用多阶段压缩流水线：迭代Puzzle压缩框架+知识蒸馏+强化学习+量化+多Token预测头。联合优化异构MoE剪枝、活跃参数预算和Mamba剪枝，以提升推理效率并保持模型质量。
AI.result: 在8xB200节点上，服务吞吐量相比原模型提升约2倍；单H100 GPU上，100万token长上下文并发从1请求提升到8请求。在推理、编程、多语言、长上下文和智能体等广泛基准测试中保持较强准确率。
AI.conclusion: 验证了大型混合MoE模型可以为了部署效率进行大幅压缩优化，同时仍能保持强大的下游任务能力，为高效交互式部署提供了可行方案。

title: A Bayesian Framework for Evaluating Scenario Compatibility in Generative Population Synthesis
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC)
summary: Scenario-based transportation analysis specifies future assumptions through aggregate population targets, whereas generative population synthesis models produce detailed individual-level realizations. When scenario targets are imposed on generative models, current practice relies on deterministic marginal calibration, implicitly assuming that the targets are compatible with the model's learned structural support. However, whether scenario-level constraints lie within the generative support--and how strongly they distort structural uncertainty--remains largely unexamined. We propose an ensemble-based Bayesian updating framework to quantify scenario compatibility in conditional population synthesis. A population-aware conditional variational autoencoder is developed to learn a distribution over plausible population structures while preserving aggregate fidelity. An ensemble of realizations sampled from the learned prior provides an empirical approximation of structural uncertainty. Scenario targets are treated as probabilistic evidence over aggregate statistics, and posterior weights are obtained through Bayesian updating across the ensemble. Scenario compatibility is quantified using effective sample size (ESS), which measures posterior concentration and the compression of structural uncertainty induced by conditioning. Experiments demonstrate that scenario impact depends not only on target magnitude but also on alignment with the learned joint structure, and reveal structural failure modes when targets fall outside prior ensemble support. The proposed framework provides a probabilistic diagnostic model for evaluating scenario feasibility and structural consistency before downstream projection and transportation planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于贝叶斯集成的框架，通过有效样本量（ESS）量化场景目标与生成式人口合成模型的结构兼容性，揭示场景约束对结构不确定性的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前基于场景的交通分析使用聚合目标，而生成式模型产生个体级实现。当场景目标施加于生成模型时，现有方法依赖确定性边际校准，但未检验场景约束是否在生成支持范围内，以及它们如何扭曲结构不确定性。
AI.method: 开发了种群感知的条件变分自编码器（population-aware CVAE）学习合理种群结构分布；通过从学习先验中采样实现集合近似结构不确定性；将场景目标作为聚合统计的概率证据，通过贝叶斯更新获得后验权重；使用有效样本量（ESS）量化场景兼容性。
AI.result: 实验表明，场景影响不仅取决于目标幅度，还取决于与学习到的联合结构的对齐程度；当目标超出先验集合支持范围时，会揭示结构失效模式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为下游预测和交通规划前评估场景可行性和结构一致性提供了概率诊断工具。

title: Signal from Space: Detecting Schools and Towers to Bridge the Digital Divide
summary: Reliable internet access is essential for modern education, yet millions of school-aged children especially in developing regions remain offline due to unconnected schools. The Giga Initiative aims to connect every school to the internet, but doing so at scale requires efficient methods to map schools and assess surrounding connectivity infrastructure without relying on sparse or noisy third-party datasets. In this work, we propose a scalable, vision-only framework that uses high-resolution satellite imagery and transfer learning to address both tasks simultaneously. By adapting pre-trained object detection models to new geographical regions with minimal labeled data, we detect schools and cell towers directly from space. We then analyze the spatial relationship between detected schools and nearby towers as a proxy for connectivity availability. This purely imagery-driven pipeline enables large-scale infrastructure mapping, reduces dependency on auxiliary data, and supports data-driven prioritization of connectivity investments in underserved areas. Our approach is demonstrated on real satellite imagery from Lesotho, showing strong performance across this region.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高分辨率卫星影像和迁移学习的纯视觉框架，可同时检测学校与信号塔，并评估学校周边网络连接情况，在莱索托的实验中表现良好。
AI.motivation: 全球仍有数百万学龄儿童因学校未联网而无法上网，Giga倡议旨在连接每所学校，但大规模实施需要高效的地图绘制和基础设施评估方法，现有的第三方数据稀疏且噪声大。
AI.method: 使用高分辨率卫星影像和迁移学习，通过微调预训练目标检测模型，在少量标注数据下同时检测学校和信号塔，并分析二者空间距离作为网络可用性代理指标。
AI.result: 在莱索托的真实卫星影像上进行了验证，展示了在该区域的强大性能。
AI.conclusion: 该纯图像驱动的流水线可实现大规模基础设施测绘，减少对辅助数据的依赖，并支持数据驱动的互联互通投资优先级决策。

title: Spinning Straw into Gold: Relabeling LLM Agent Trajectories in Hindsight for Successful Demonstrations
summary: Large language model agents operate in partially observable, long-horizon settings where obtaining supervision remains a major bottleneck. We address this by utilizing a source of supervision overlooked in existing post-training methods: unintended yet successful goals embedded within agent rollouts. Specifically, we introduce Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL), where an auxiliary LLM reviews each completed trajectory and relabels it with all of the natural-language goals the agent actually achieved. HSL then pairs the trajectory with its relabeled goals and uses these pairs for additional fine-tuning. To mitigate suboptimality in the relabeled data, we propose two learning techniques for HSL, irrelevant-action masking and sample reweighting. Our experiments show that HSL is flexible and compatible with existing post-training pipelines. It improves both SFT and DPO, with larger gains on long-horizon tasks with more diverse goal spaces. Moreover, HSL is sample-efficient: on ALFWorld, it surpasses baselines trained on the full dataset while using only one quarter of the ground-truth demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出后见之明监督学习（HSL），通过利用智能体轨迹中意外达成的目标进行重标记和微调，提升了LLM智能体在部分可观测、长周期任务中的表现，且样本效率高。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在部分可观测、长周期环境下面临监督信号获取困难的问题，现有后训练方法忽略了轨迹中意外达成但成功的潜在目标。
AI.method: HSL方法：1）用辅助LLM回顾已完成轨迹，重标记为实际达成的自然语言目标；2）将轨迹与重标记目标配对进行额外微调；3）提出无关动作掩码和样本重新加权两种技术缓解次优数据问题。
AI.result: HSL与SFT和DPO兼容，在长周期、多样化目标空间任务中提升更大；在ALFWorld上仅用1/4的真实演示数据即可超越完整数据集训练的基线。
AI.conclusion: HSL是一种灵活、样本高效的强化监督方法，能有效利用被忽视的成功信号，拓展了LLM智能体后训练的数据来源。

title: Decentralized Aggregation of LLM Predictions via Wagering Mechanisms
summary: It is increasingly common to aggregate predictions from multiple LLMs, each with domain expertise or access to private tools and data, to improve collective prediction performance. In decentralized settings, aggregation weights need to be determined without access to models' private information and should remain robust to strategic reporting. We propose a family of advantage-aligned wagering mechanisms for LLM aggregation (WALLA), in which each model reports a prediction and a learned wager, and predictions are aggregated using wagers as weights. WALLA introduces a leave-one-out baseline into the net payout function, yielding three desirable properties: (1) dominant-strategy incentive compatibility of prediction under arbitrary belief structure, (2) advantage--wager alignment, where the optimal wager is proportional to the model's expected score advantage, and (3) prediction-agnostic wager optimization, enabling decentralized learning of wager policies without requiring optimal predictions. We further instantiate two mechanism variants that trade off normality and no-arbitrage while maintaining a bounded worst-case deficit for the mechanism. Experiments on question-answering and forecasting benchmarks across heterogeneous models and private-information settings show that WALLA matches centralized aggregation methods in predictive performance, while simultaneously achieving decentralized learning, advantage-aligned aggregation weights, uncertainty awareness, and incentive-compatible prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为WALLA的机制，通过让多个LLM报告预测和可学习的赌注，在去中心化环境下实现激励兼容的聚合，同时保持鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 在去中心化场景中，多个LLM各自拥有领域专长或私有工具/数据，需要在不访问模型私有信息且对策略性报告保持鲁棒的情况下，确定聚合权重以提高集体预测性能。
AI.method: 提出优势对齐的赌注聚合机制（WALLA），每个模型报告预测和可学习赌注，以赌注作为权重聚合预测。通过引入留一基线到净支付函数中，实现预测的占优策略激励兼容性、优势-赌注对齐以及预测无关的赌注优化。还实例化了两种变体以平衡正态性和无套利性。
AI.result: 在问答和预测基准测试中，跨异构模型和私有信息设置下，WALLA在预测性能上与集中式聚合方法相当，同时实现了去中心化学习、优势对齐的聚合权重、不确定性感知和激励兼容的预测。
AI.conclusion: WALLA机制成功地在去中心化LLM聚合中实现了激励兼容、鲁棒性和性能之间的良好平衡，为隐私保护和去中心化场景下的模型集成提供了可行方案。

title: Reduced-Order Models: The Mother of World Models
summary: World models -- compressed latent representations of an environment that support action-conditioned prediction and planning -- are typically presented as a product of modern self-supervised learning. This paper argues that the functional anatomy of a world model was independently developed, deployed, and formally analyzed decades earlier in the model-order-reduction (MOR) and control literature, under different names and for a different purpose: the real-time operation of physical systems. We trace the anatomy across three communities. Low-dimensional models of turbulence built on proper orthogonal decomposition (POD) supplied latent dynamics learned from data of a chaotic environment; eigenface methods in early computer vision supplied the encoder-decoder half, including a primitive runtime validity check; and measurement-based POD frameworks for facility thermal control assembled the complete loop -- POD coefficients as latent state, parametric dependence on actuator setpoints as action conditioning, modal reconstruction as decoding, and, critically, a priori analytical error bounds as a verification layer that certified when the model's predictions could be trusted in closed loop. We then examine what each tradition possesses that the other lacks: MOR contributes verification, physical grounding, and extreme data efficiency; learned world models contribute nonlinear representation, transferability, and horizon. We argue that the outstanding obstacle to deploying world models in systems that cannot fail -- power, thermal, process control -- is not predictive fidelity but verifiability, and we outline a research agenda for physics-grounded, verifiable world models that unifies the two lineages.

AI.tldr: 本文追溯了世界模型（world models）的解剖学历史，发现其核心组件早在几十年前的模型降阶（MOR）与控制文献中就已独立发展、部署并形式化分析。文章比较了MOR和现代学习型世界模型的优缺点，指出当前世界模型在关键控制系统中落地的最大障碍不是预测精度，而是可验证性，并提出了融合两条技术路线的研究议程。
AI.motivation: 作者试图纠正一种知识遗忘，即世界模型并非仅来自现代自监督学习，其核心思想在控制与降阶领域早有先例。通过追溯历史，揭示两条路线各自的优势与不足，并为构建可在安全关键系统中部署的世界模型指明方向。
AI.method: 论文采用文献追溯与比较分析方法，追溯世界模型功能解剖学在三个社区的发展：湍流建模（POD）、早期计算机视觉（特征脸）、基于测量的POD框架（设施热控制），并将MOR与现代学习型世界模型进行对比。
AI.result: 发现MOR路线贡献了可验证性（先验误差界）、物理基础和极强数据效率；学习型世界模型贡献了非线性表示、可迁移性和长时间预测能力。两者各有所长，但目前缺乏统一。
AI.conclusion: 在不可失败的控制系统中，世界模型部署的最大障碍是可验证性而非预测保真度。作者提出了一个融合物理基础与可验证性的世界模型研究议程，以统一两条技术路线。

title: Biomechanics-aware Multi-view Markerless Motion Capture of Dexterous Hand Movements
summary: Markerless motion capture (MMC) techniques have been widely beneficial in biomechanical analysis of human movement; however, application to complex motions of the hand lags other musculoskeletal systems. The primary goal of this study was to evaluate the performance of a biomechanical reconstruction method that implements a gradient-based optimization approach with a biomechanical model in the loop for tracking dexterous, unconstrained hand movements using MMC. Using a custom, 8-camera setup, we acquired 121 video recordings from 6 participants performing 11 different tasks that spanned 6 hand postures, 5 object manipulation tasks, and involved motion of the proximal upper limb joints. Performance of the proposed MMC pipeline was directly compared to a more commonly adopted two-stage reconstruction method that first triangulates 2D keypoints from computer vision pose estimation algorithms to 3D and then enforces biomechanical constraints by solving a constrained inverse kinematics problem. Relative performance was assessed qualitatively by visual inspection and quantitatively using a computer vision metric. Our method generated solutions for all 121 video recordings; the two-stage method did not converge for 15% of the recordings. Across the remaining videos, our method produced more biomechanically plausible hand kinematics than the two-stage method and was more robust to occlusion effects during tasks that involved objects. The relative robustness of the end-to-end method suggests that it is more effective in utilizing the available 2D digital keypoint information. Automatic and biomechanically meaningful tracking of hand kinematics during dexterous movements has the potential to support clinical evaluation, rehabilitation monitoring, and studies of human motor control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度优化的生物力学模型在手部无标记运动捕捉方法，相比传统两步法（先三角化2D关键点再施加生物力学约束），该方法在121段视频中全部收敛（两步法15%未收敛），且在手部灵巧运动中表现出更高的生物力学合理性和对遮挡的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的无标记运动捕捉技术在下肢等部位已有广泛应用，但在手部复杂灵巧运动中的应用进展缓慢。手部运动涉及多关节协调、遮挡频繁，传统两步法（先三角化关键点再施加约束）容易不收敛或产生不合理的运动学结果。因此需要一种更鲁棒、端到端的生物力学重建方法。
AI.method: 采用梯度优化的端到端方法，将生物力学模型嵌入优化循环中，直接利用2D关键点信息进行重建。实验使用8台定制相机，采集6名参与者执行11种任务（6种手部姿势+5种物体操作）的121段视频，并与传统两步法（先三角化3D关键点，再通过逆向运动学施加约束）进行对比。
AI.result: 提出的方法在全部121段视频上均成功生成解；两步法在15%的视频中未收敛。在其余视频中，端到端方法生成的手部运动学更符合生物力学规律，且在涉及物体的任务中对遮挡效应更鲁棒，能更有效利用2D关键点信息。
AI.conclusion: 端到端的梯度优化生物力学重建方法在手部灵巧运动跟踪中显著优于传统两步法，具有自动化和生物力学可解释性的优势，有望支持临床评估、康复监测及人类运动控制研究。

title: Risk-Constrained Freshness-Aware Semantic Caching for Open-Web Retrieval-Augmented LLMs
summary: Semantic caching reduces the latency and cost of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) by serving cached answers to semantically similar queries, but most existing methods do not model the time-varying freshness of open-web evidence. We present FreshCache, a three-tier semantic cache that treats cache reuse as a risk-constrained temporal inference problem: before approving a cache hit, FreshCache estimates the probability that the cached result is stale using a fitted exponential decay model enhanced by a learned MLP, and approves reuse only when that probability falls below a per-tier error budget across answers (epsilon = 0.10), URL lists (epsilon = 0.20), and page content (epsilon = 0.35). This allows the system to degrade gracefully as entries age rather than forcing a binary choice between a stale hit and a full pipeline execution. We introduce FreshCache-Bench, a benchmark of 8,072 base queries across five freshness classes with ground truth staleness labels drawn from real web snapshots at 1, 12, 24 hours, and 7 days after a baseline crawl, expanded to 31,201 queries via paraphrase generation. At the 24-hour evaluation window, FreshCache_MLP achieves 97% search API savings at 0.1% hash-based stale error, and an LLM-judge evaluation on 396 confirmed change pairs shows that only 34.3% of detected content changes actually affect answer correctness, placing true answer-affecting stale error at approximately 0.034%. The rule-based FreshCache achieves 98% search savings at 3.3% stale error under a temporal holdout calibration, outperforming SemanticTTL (14.9% stale, 72% saved), vCache (7.2% stale, 47% saved), and SCALM (5.2% stale, 96% saved). Ablations show the temporal risk gate accounts for an 11.6 point reduction in stale error over similarity-only reuse, and the learned MLP reduces stale error a further 3.2 points over the rule-based model.

AI.tldr: FreshCache 是一个三层语义缓存系统，通过指数衰减模型和 MLP 估计缓存结果过时概率，并基于分层错误预算决定是否复用缓存，在 RAG 场景下大幅降低延迟和成本，同时严格控制陈旧错误率。
AI.motivation: 现有语义缓存方法未考虑开放网络证据随时间变化的新鲜度问题，导致缓存结果可能过时，缺乏对时效性的建模和风险控制。
AI.method: 将缓存复用建模为风险约束的时间推断问题：使用指数衰减模型 + 学习型 MLP 估计缓存过时概率，仅在概率低于分层错误预算（答案0.10、URL列表0.20、页面内容0.35）时批准复用。并构建了 FreshCache-Bench 基准数据集。
AI.result: FreshCache_MLP 在24小时窗口实现97%搜索API节省，哈希陈旧错误率仅0.1%；真实影响答案的陈旧错误约0.034%。规则版 FreshCache 以3.3%陈旧错误节省98%搜索，显著优于 SemanticTTL、vCache、SCALM。
AI.conclusion: 通过时间风险门控和分层错误预算，FreshCache 实现了缓存的优雅退化，在保证低陈旧错误率的同时大幅提升缓存命中率和搜索节省，为时效敏感的 RAG 系统提供了有效方案。

title: MechMath Agent Team: LLM Driven Agents for Mathematical Research
summary: AI reasoning has become a central focus in contemporary artificial intelligence, largely driven by the success of large language models. However, mathematical research, which is characterized by non-linear derivation paths, rigorous logical requirements, and protracted exploration cycles, poses severe challenges for existing reasoning systems. To overcome these limitations, we present the MechMath Agent Team (MMAT), which is a large language model driven agent designed to serve as a co-pilot throughout the full cycle of mathematical research. We design a tripartite Harness Architecture that decouples system responsibilities into Control, Execution, and Augmentation planes, thereby reconciling rigorous logical control with the agility demanded by open-ended research. Building upon this framework, we instantiate three specialized agents: a Knowledge Base Manager, a Natural Language Prover, and a Formal Language Prover, all operating in a closed loop to produce formally certified mathematical proofs. We evaluate MMAT on open problems in Number Theory, Algebraic Complexity Theory, Differential Algebra, Operator Algebra, and Inequalities. Across a two-month deployment, 11 problems have been solved, demonstrating its capacity to act as a co-pilot throughout the entire research cycle. The contributions are threefold: a general decoupled Harness Architecture for multi-agent mathematical reasoning, its concrete instantiation in the MMAT system, and empirical validation on a diverse suite of open problems.

AI.tldr: 提出MechMath Agent Team (MMAT)，一种基于大语言模型的智能体系统，采用三平面解耦架构（控制、执行、增强），通过知识库管理器、自然语言证明器和形式语言证明器三个专用智能体的闭环协作，在数论、代数复杂性理论等多个数学领域成功解决了11个开放问题。
AI.motivation: 数学研究具有非线性推导路径、严格的逻辑要求和漫长的探索周期，现有推理系统难以应对这些挑战，需要一种能够覆盖数学研究全流程的智能辅助系统。
AI.method: 设计了三平面解耦的Harness Architecture，将系统职责分离为控制平面、执行平面和增强平面；在此基础上实例化三个专用智能体：知识库管理器、自然语言证明器和形式语言证明器，三者闭环协作生成经过形式化验证的数学证明。
AI.result: 在数论、代数复杂性理论、微分代数、算子代数和不等式五个领域的开放问题上部署两个月，成功解决了11个问题，证明了该系统在全研究周期中充当副驾驶的能力。
AI.conclusion: 贡献包括：提出了面向多智能体数学推理的解耦Harness架构、MMAT系统的具体实现、以及在多样化开放问题上的实证验证。

title: OpFlow: Learning Opportunity-Conditioned Choice Potentials for Robust OD Flow Prediction
summary: Origin-destination (OD) flow prediction is central to urban analytics, yet deep models trained on raw counts remain vulnerable to distribution shift. The core problem is that raw count supervision cannot distinguish transferable choice mechanisms from environment-specific shortcuts. Raw OD count mixes two objects: how much demand an origin produces and how that demand is allocated across destinations. We argue that the transferable object is the exposure-to-choice law that maps spatial conditions to relative destination preferences. We propose OpFlow, a mechanism-constrained framework that learns row-centered choice potentials and reconstructs flows by combining the induced allocation with a separately calibrated origin scale. Under distribution shift, spatial exposures and the induced allocations are allowed to vary; what transfers is the conditional map from exposure states to relative choice potentials. Theoretically, we characterize the identifiable row-centered potential and show that classical spatial interaction laws are restricted log-potential cases. Controlled synthetic shifts and a real-world experiment show OpFlow improves robustness under environment shifts.

AI.tldr: 提出OpFlow框架，通过分离OD流量中的需求规模与选择偏好，学习可迁移的暴露-选择映射关系，提升分布偏移下的预测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型在原始计数上训练易受分布偏移影响，因为原始OD计数混杂了需求规模与分配偏好，难以区分可迁移的选择机制与环境特定捷径。
AI.method: 提出机制约束框架OpFlow，学习行中心化的选择势（choice potentials），结合单独标定的起点规模重构流量。分布偏移下允许空间暴露与分配变化，迁移的是从暴露状态到相对选择势的条件映射。
AI.result: 理论刻画了可识别的行中心化势，证明经典空间交互定律是受限的对数势特例；合成数据与真实实验表明OpFlow提升了环境偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: OD预测中可迁移的核心是暴露-选择法则而非原始计数，OpFlow通过机制约束分离变量实现更鲁棒的迁移。

title: Track the Noise, Move the World:3D-Grounded Motion-Consistent Noise for Controllable Video Generation
summary: Modern image-and-text-to-video diffusion models can synthesize highly realistic videos by iteratively denoising an initial Gaussian noise tensor conditioned on reference image and text inputs. However, existing approaches still lack precise and unified controllability over both object motion and camera motion within a single generation process. We present UniCaMo, a unified framework that enables simultaneous control of object trajectories and camera viewpoints by directly constructing the input noise of the diffusion model. Specifically, UniCaMo builds a shared 3D-grounded motion-consistent noise space across latent video frames. Sparse 3D point tracks are used to warp the Gaussian noise of the reference frame along desired object trajectories, while a virtual spherical noise representation provides globally consistent noise values for newly revealed scene regions under camera motion. By combining local track-guided noise warping with global sphere-based noise sampling, UniCaMo maintains geometric and temporal consistency under both object movement and viewpoint changes. Because UniCaMo modifies only the input noise, it requires no auxiliary adapters, control branches, or architectural changes to the underlying video diffusion model. With lightweight LoRA fine-tuning on large pretrained video diffusion models, including Wan 2.1 (14B), UniCaMo achieves state-of-the-art results in both video quality and motion controllability on standard controllable video generation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: UniCaMo提出了一个统一框架，通过构建3D运动一致性的噪声空间，同时控制视频生成中的物体轨迹和相机视角，无需修改基础扩散模型架构，仅靠LoRA微调即可实现高质量的可控视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有图像-文本到视频的扩散模型虽能生成高质量视频，但缺乏对物体运动和相机运动的同时、精确且统一的可控性。
AI.method: 构建共享的3D运动一致性噪声空间：利用稀疏3D点轨迹对参考帧的高斯噪声进行物体轨迹引导的扭曲，同时采用虚拟球面噪声表示为相机运动下新暴露的区域提供全局一致的噪声值，将局部轨迹引导的噪声扭曲与全局球面噪声采样相结合。
AI.result: 在标准可控视频生成基准上，经过轻量LoRA微调（包括在Wan 2.1 14B模型上），在视频质量和运动可控性方面均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: UniCaMo仅修改输入噪声而不需要额外的适配器、控制分支或架构改动，即可实现对物体运动和相机运动的统一控制，是一种高效且通用的可控视频生成方案。

title: CausalGame: Benchmarking Causal Thinking of LLM Agents in Games
comment: Zhenhao, Yongqiang, and Chenxi contributed equally to the project. A short version is accepted at the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026 as an Oral presentation. Project website https://causalgame.github.io/
summary: Building AI Scientist agents with Large Language Models (LLMs) has recently attracted growing attention. Since scientific discovery fundamentally relies on uncovering causal relationships from observations, the capability of causal thinking, i.e., distinguishing causation from correlation and recognizing hidden biases, is essential to LLM agents. Although a number of benchmarks exist for AI Scientists, none explicitly incorporate challenges from selection bias, measurement error, and hidden confounders that widely exist in real-world scientific discovery. To this end, we present CausalGame, a benchmark that evaluates the causal thinking capabilities of LLM agents through interactive games. CausalGame asks LLM agents to actively design experimental protocols, collect observation data, and derive a final solution with an explanation report. To emulate realistic scientific discovery challenges, we design 14 scenarios that incorporate selection bias, measurement error, and hidden confounders. Across 30 LLM agents, none demonstrates reliable causal thinking: the best model reaches only 68.0% survival against analytical optima of 78-85%, and merely 5-7% of sessions receive credits on the causal-reasoning rubrics. CausalGame provides a scalable and controlled testbed for evaluating the causal thinking of AI Scientist agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CausalGame基准，通过14个包含选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂因素的互动游戏场景，评估LLM智能体的因果思维能力。30个模型中最佳仅达到68%的生存率，且仅5-7%的会话获得因果推理评分，表明当前LLM智能体在因果推理上表现不可靠。
AI.motivation: 科学发现依赖于从观察中揭示因果关系，而现有AI科学家基准未考虑科学发现中普遍存在的选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂因素等挑战，因此需要一个专门评估LLM智能体因果思维能力的基准。
AI.method: 设计CausalGame基准，包含14个互动游戏场景，要求LLM智能体主动设计实验方案、收集观测数据并推导最终解决方案和解释报告。场景中嵌入了选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂因素三种科学发现中的常见挑战。
AI.result: 在30个LLM智能体测试中，最佳模型生存率仅68.0%（理论最优78-85%），仅5-7%的会话在因果推理评分中获得分数，表明所有模型均未表现出可靠的因果思维能力。
AI.conclusion: CausalGame可作为评估AI科学家智能体因果思维能力的可扩展、可控测试平台，揭示了当前LLM在因果推理方面的显著不足，为未来改进提供了方向。

title: LLM-as-a-Tutor: Policy-Aware Prompt Adaptation for Non-Verifiable RL
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) for non-verifiable instruction following increasingly relies on LLM judges with prompt-specific rubrics as reward signals. While recent methods adapt these rubrics to the evolving policy during training, the training prompts themselves remain static, drawn from fixed corpora. This static approach often results in a critical misalignment between prompt difficulty and policy capability, leaving the judge unable to recover a discriminative reward signal when prompts fail to elicit quality variance among rollouts. To address this misalignment, we introduce LLM-as-a-Tutor, a framework that extends the LLM's role from judge to tutor: a single model serves as an examiner that pairwise-compares policy rollouts to detect non-challenging prompts, and as a generator that appends atomic constraints to them. This append-only design monotonically raises difficulty in step with the policy's capability, producing a self-calibrating training signal without external difficulty schedules. On three complex instruction-following benchmarks, our method consistently outperforms both policy-unaware baselines and prior policy-adaptive methods that adapt rubrics or rewrite prompts, suggesting prompt adaptation as a missing axis of policy-awareness in non-verifiable RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM-as-a-Tutor框架，将LLM从评判者扩展为导师角色，通过自动检测非挑战性提示并追加原子约束，使提示难度随策略能力单调递增，解决了非可验证指令跟随中提示难度与策略能力不匹配的问题，在三个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有非可验证指令跟随的强化学习方法中，虽然评判者的评分标准会随策略演化而调整，但训练提示本身始终来自固定语料库，导致提示难度与策略能力之间出现严重错位，当提示无法引起rollout之间质量差异时，评判者无法恢复有区分度的奖励信号。
AI.method: LLM-as-a-Tutor框架让单一模型同时担任考官和生成器两种角色：作为考官，通过成对比较策略rollout来检测哪些提示不再具有挑战性；作为生成器，为这些非挑战性提示追加原子约束。这种仅追加的设计使得提示难度随策略能力单调递增，无需外部难度调度即可产生自校准的训练信号。
AI.result: 在三个复杂的指令跟随基准上，该方法一致优于不考虑策略的基线方法以及先前的策略自适应方法（如调整评分标准或重写提示），表明提示自适应是非可验证强化学习中一个被忽视的策略感知维度。
AI.conclusion: 提示自适应是非可验证强化学习中实现策略感知的关键缺失维度，通过让提示难度与策略能力动态对齐，可以显著提升指令跟随性能。

title: Transition Information Density: Morphological Trajectories, Synesthetic Perception, and Structured Interpolation in Neural Training (or: The Synesthetic AI)
comment: 38 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. Empirical results from structured interpolation training across four representational mediums. Pipeline scripts, experimental data, and the Synesthesia Grid algorithm available upon reasonable request
summary: Standard machine learning training presents data as discrete endpoint pairs, omitting the structure of the space between them. This paper introduces Transition Information Density (TID) -- the information content recoverable from structured intermediate states between categorically distinct training endpoints -- and Positional Identity, the defined location of an intermediate state on the A-to-B continuum. Both constructs are grounded in three empirical contexts: grapheme-color synesthesia, the Synesthesia Grid (a boundary-contour morphing algorithm instantiating TID in visual morphological space), and a four-condition training experiment across four representational mediums. Probes trained on structured interpolation at defined Positional Identities (C3) exhibit substantially lower intrinsic dimensionality than volume-matched controls (C2) in Phonetic/Linguistic (C3: 3.33 vs. C2: 10.81) and Semantic Description (C3: 4.59 vs. C2: 8.67) mediums. Visual and cross-modal mediums do not show this effect, establishing a modality boundary condition. A fixed-N=50 comparison confirms that Positional Identity structure, not sample count, drives the effect. Resolution N scales monotonically with representational richness. Pooled TwoNN analysis reveals globally collapsed representations in visual space (0.075) and globally consistent representations in phonetic space (0.977). The paper contributes a formal definition of TID and Positional Identity, a nine-metric shape characterization framework, and a four-condition experimental design isolating trajectory structure, data volume, and Positional Identity as distinct factors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出过渡信息密度（TID）和位置身份（Positional Identity）两个概念，通过实验证明结构化插值训练可降低表示的内在维度，并发现该效应存在模态边界条件。
AI.motivation: 标准机器学习训练将数据视为离散端点对，忽略了端点间空间的结构信息。作者认为这种结构信息（过渡信息密度）对学习表征有重要影响。
AI.method: 定义TID和Positional Identity，在三种经验背景下验证：书写颜色联觉、Synesthesia Grid算法、四条件训练实验（跨越四种表征媒介）。通过比较结构化插值训练（C3）与体量匹配的控制组（C2）的内在维度差异来评估效果。
AI.result: 在语音/语言和语义描述媒介中，C3组内在维度显著低于C2组（3.33 vs 10.81; 4.59 vs 8.67）。视觉和跨模态媒介未观察到该效应。Pooled TwoNN分析显示视觉空间表征全局坍缩（0.075），语音空间表征全局一致（0.977）。
AI.conclusion: 位置身份结构而非样本数量驱动了维度降低效应，该效应存在模态边界条件。论文贡献包括TID和Positional Identity的形式化定义、九指标形状表征框架、以及四条件实验设计。

title: Conversational Human Audio-visual Talking Dialogue Generation
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026 as a main paper
summary: Large-scale dyadic interactive audio-visual dialogue (DIAD) datasets provide fundamental data resources for developing humanoid interactive virtual agents and digital humans. However, collecting such data is time-consuming, expensive, and ethically sensitive. To address this, we propose CHAT, a new dyadic interactive audio-visual dialogue generation (DIADG) framework that generates diverse, paired, and mutually responsive speech-face dialogue clips from a single textual prompt. CHAT unifies large language models and talking face models with interactive audio and facial behaviour refinement modules, enabling the generation of aligned dyadic dialogue clips with diverse contents and facial identities. Experiments show that CHAT outperforms existing related methods designed for similar tasks under both objective and subjective evaluations. Moreover, our synthesised CHAT-AVD-50k dataset serves as effective pre-training data for downstream interactive head generation, consistently improving PerFRDiff and ReactDiff on REACT 2024. CHAT offers a scalable alternative to the costly and ethically sensitive collection of real dyadic interaction data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHAT框架，利用大语言模型和说话人脸模型从单一文本提示生成成对的、相互响应的对话音视频片段，解决了大规模交互式视听对话数据采集成本高、耗时且涉及伦理问题等挑战。
AI.motivation: 大规模双人交互视听对话数据对开发类人交互代理至关重要，但采集此类数据耗时、昂贵且涉及伦理敏感问题，因此需要一种可扩展的合成数据生成方法。
AI.method: 提出CHAT框架，融合大语言模型和说话人脸模型，结合交互式音频和行为精炼模块，从单一文本提示生成内容多样、身份可变的成对对话片段。
AI.result: 在客观和主观评估中均优于现有方法，合成的CHAT-AVD-50k数据集作为预训练数据能有效提升下游交互式头部生成任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: CHAT为真实双人交互数据采集提供了一种可扩展的替代方案，解决了高成本和伦理敏感性问题。

title: Legible-by-Construction: Attention and End-to-End Transformers
summary: A companion paper showed that a transformer's feed-forward layer can be rebuilt from explicit fuzzy set operations - intersection, set-difference, and a self-forgetting sequence quantifier - so its hidden units read as named logical operators at no cost to language-model quality.
