AI.motivation: 真实世界的检索结果常被污染：语义相关但包含细微错误、误导性框架或捏造信息的段落会影响LLM的生成事实性。现有RAG缺乏对此类污染的鲁棒防御。
AI.method: 构建基于NLI的跨文档声明图；应用Defended-Claims Gate，要么基于多源一致证据子集进行条件生成，要么阻断检索并依赖参数化知识。
AI.result: 在四个长文本QA基准和多种商用/开源LLM上，污染严重降低标准RAG性能，而MIRAGE在混合和完全污染场景下持续恢复事实性，并优于现有鲁棒RAG方法。
AI.conclusion: MIRAGE是一种有效的、即插即用的污染防御方案，能显著提升RAG在检索污染环境下的可靠性。

title: SiamixFormer: a fully-transformer Siamese network with temporal Fusion for accurate building detection and change detection in bi-temporal remote sensing images
summary: Building detection and change detection using remote sensing images can help urban and rescue planning. Moreover, they can be used for building damage assessment after natural disasters. Currently, most of the existing models for building detection use only one image (pre-disaster image) to detect buildings. This is based on the idea that post-disaster images reduce the model's performance because of presence of destroyed buildings. In this paper, we propose a siamese model, called SiamixFormer, which uses pre- and post-disaster images as input. Our model has two encoders and has a hierarchical transformer architecture. The output of each stage in both encoders is given to a temporal transformer for feature fusion in a way that query is generated from pre-disaster images and (key, value) is generated from post-disaster images. To this end, temporal features are also considered in feature fusion. Another advantage of using temporal transformers in feature fusion is that they can better maintain large receptive fields generated by transformer encoders compared with CNNs. Finally, the output of the temporal transformer is given to a simple MLP decoder at each stage. The SiamixFormer model is evaluated on xBD, and WHU datasets, for building detection and on LEVIR-CD and CDD datasets for change detection and could outperform the state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SiamixFormer，一个基于孪生网络和分层Transformer架构的模型，同时利用灾前和灾后遥感图像进行建筑物检测与变化检测。模型采用双编码器结构，通过时间Transformer进行特征融合（灾前图像生成query，灾后图像生成key/value），并在各阶段使用简单MLP解码器。在xBD、WHU、LEVIR-CD和CDD数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑物检测模型大多仅使用单张灾前图像，因为灾后图像中损毁建筑会降低模型性能。然而，灾后图像中包含了建筑损毁的关键信息，对灾害评估至关重要。因此，作者希望设计一个能同时利用灾前和灾后图像的模型，以提升建筑物检测和变化检测的效果。
AI.method: 提出SiamixFormer：1) 孪生双编码器结构，分别处理灾前和灾后图像；2) 分层Transformer架构作为编码器；3) 每个编码器阶段输出送入时间Transformer进行特征融合，其中query来自灾前图像，(key, value)来自灾后图像，从而保留时间特征；4) 时间Transformer相比CNN能更好保持Transformer编码器的大感受野；5) 各阶段使用简单MLP解码器输出结果。
AI.result: 在xBD和WHU数据集上进行建筑物检测评估，在LEVIR-CD和CDD数据集上进行变化检测评估，均超越了现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SiamixFormer有效证明了同时利用灾前和灾后图像进行建筑物检测和变化检测的可行性，通过时间Transformer融合双时相特征的方法优于仅使用单张图像的现有模型，为灾害评估提供了更有效的遥感分析工具。

title: Foundations of Equivariant Deep Learning: Unifying Graph and Sheaf Neural Networks
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 as a spotlight paper with oral presentation
summary: Symmetry is everywhere in nature and society. Geometric deep learning exploits symmetries in data to improve the performance and efficiency of deep learning systems. In this paper, we extend geometric deep learning to utilize richer symmetry structures. Specifically, we develop order-equivariant neural networks (OENN), which generalize standard graph message passing and sheaf neural networks via the theory of equivariant bundles over face posets (face categories). We (i) characterize all linear order-equivariant maps, (ii) build OENN layers, and (iii) prove universal approximation theorems (UATs) for continuous order-equivariant maps, which are new results even when restricted to sheaf neural networks (for which no UAT was known before). We illustrate the framework on graph and sheaf models. Our results can also be seen as extending the known UAT for graph neural networks to a more general setting that subsumes sheaf neural networks as well. In addition, we show that OENN can be extended further to CENN, Category-Equivariant Neural Network, which gives the general form of equivariant neural networks as well as of equivariant universal approximation theorems, allowing us to leverage categorical symmetry in data (e.g., non-invertible symmetries on multiple objects with compositional relations on those symmetries).

AI.tldr: 本文提出阶等变神经网络(OENN)，将几何深度学习推广到更丰富的对称结构上，通过面偏序集上的等变丛理论统一了图消息传递和层神经网络，并证明了连续阶等变映射的通用逼近定理，进一步扩展为范畴等变神经网络(CENN)。
AI.motivation: 几何深度学习利用数据中的对称性来提升性能，但现有方法对更丰富对称结构的利用不足，且层神经网络缺乏通用逼近定理。
AI.method: 基于面偏序集（面范畴）上的等变丛理论，刻画所有线性阶等变映射，构建OENN层，并证明连续阶等变映射的通用逼近定理。
AI.result: 首次为层神经网络建立通用逼近定理，统一了图神经网络和层神经网络的框架，并进一步推广到范畴等变神经网络(CENN)。
AI.conclusion: OENN和CENN为利用复杂数据中的范畴对称性（包括不可逆对称性和组合关系）提供了通用框架，扩展了等变神经网络的表达能力。

title: SNR-Adaptive Unified Diffusion for Multi-Task Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Accepted to IEEE SMC 2026. 6 pages, 15 figures
summary: Clinical cardiac imaging pipelines currently deploy separate models for each dataset and modality, incurring redundant training costs and precluding knowledge sharing across anatomically related tasks. Consolidating semi-supervised learning, unsupervised domain adaptation, and domain generalisation into one model is therefore a practical necessity, yet naive joint training exposes a fundamental barrier: conflicting label semantics between datasets collapse LA Dice from 90.31\% to 83.38\%, while gradient imbalance across tasks of unequal complexity suppresses the weaker tasks throughout training. We present UniT-Diff, a unified diffusion segmentation framework that resolves these conflicts through three targeted mechanisms. An 11-channel task-specific output space physically partitions label categories, eliminating cross-task gradient sign reversal by construction. SNR-Adaptive Task Conditioning (SATC) scales the task token by the log signal-to-noise ratio of the current diffusion timestep, suppressing domain-specific bias during coarse denoising and restoring full task guidance as the signal clears. Task-Type-Aware Conditional Dropout (TTACD) permanently removes the task token for domain-generalisation inputs, routing them through a shared neutral pathway that draws on cross-dataset cardiac anatomy rather than source-vendor statistics. Under a single parameter set, UniT-Diff surpasses independently trained task-specific baselines on all three benchmarks simultaneously: +0.87\% on LA, +1.77\% on MMWHS, and +0.88\% on MNMS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniT-Diff，一个统一扩散分割框架，通过三个机制解决多任务联合训练中的标签语义冲突和梯度不平衡问题，在三个心脏影像基准上超越独立训练的专用模型。
AI.motivation: 当前临床心脏影像流水线为每个数据集和模态分别部署独立模型，导致训练成本冗余，且阻碍了跨解剖相关任务的知识共享。将半监督学习、无监督域适应和域泛化整合到一个模型中具有实际必要性，但简单的联合训练面临两个根本障碍：标签语义冲突导致性能下降，以及梯度不平衡抑制弱任务的学习。
AI.method: UniT-Diff包含三个机制：(1) 11通道任务特定输出空间物理隔离标签类别，消除跨任务梯度符号反转；(2) SNR自适应任务条件(SATC)根据扩散时间步的信噪比缩放任务token，在粗去噪阶段抑制域特定偏差；(3) 任务类型感知条件丢弃(TTACD)对域泛化输入永久移除任务token，使其通过共享中性路径利用跨数据集的心脏解剖知识。
AI.result: 在单一参数集下，UniT-Diff同时在三个基准上超越独立训练的专用基线：LA提升+0.87%，MMWHS提升+1.77%，MNMS提升+0.88%。
AI.conclusion: UniT-Diff通过精心设计的机制成功解决了多任务统一训练中的冲突问题，验证了将多种学习范式整合到单一模型中的可行性，为临床心脏影像的统一建模提供了有效方案。

title: Rating the Pitch, Not the Product: User Evaluations of LLMs Reflect Expectations More Than Performance
summary: Imagine two users interact with the same LLM. One has been told it is the cutting-edge flagship model; the other, an older, weaker model. They walk away with markedly different ratings of its usefulness and intelligence, yet they used the same model. In a controlled study, 162 participants each used one of six LLMs from two families across three collaborative tasks, after first viewing a landing page that matched, overstated, or understated their model's true capability. This pre-interaction framing shifted user opinions and interaction behavior while task performance did not. Oversold users rated the model more favorably and used more directive prompting, while Undersold users wrote longer, more collaborative prompts. The quality of what users and the model produced together depended only on the model's true capability, not on what users were told. Participants' change in model impressions after use, measured across two impression measures, was not predicted by task performance ($β= -0.01$ and $0.11$, both n.s.), but by whether the model met users' expectations ($β= 0.47$ and $0.50$, both $p < .001$) and how confident they felt working with it ($β= 0.47$ and $0.36$, both $p < .001$). After interaction, users are still rating the pitch, not the product: user-elicited LLM evaluations, including the preference data driving public leaderboards, measure expectation management at least as much as the model itself.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过控制实验发现，用户对LLM的先验期望（如被提前告知模型是旗舰版还是旧版）会显著影响其主观评价和使用行为，但不会影响实际任务表现。用户对模型的印象变化主要取决于期望是否被满足和协作信心，而非实际任务表现。这揭示了当前LLM评估数据（如公众排行榜）中混杂了大量期望管理效应。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估依赖用户主观评价，但用户对模型的先验认知（如品牌声誉、宣传信息）可能强烈扭曲其实际体验和评价。作者希望分离“模型真实能力”与“用户期望”对评估结果的影响，揭示当前评估体系的潜在偏差。
AI.method: 162名参与者被分配到6个不同LLM（来自两个模型家族），在完成三项协作任务前，先看到匹配、夸大或低估模型真实能力的介绍页面。通过控制先验期望（匹配/夸大/低估）和模型真实能力，测量用户的主观评价、交互行为（如提示词长度、风格）和实际任务表现。
AI.result: 期望被夸大的用户给出更积极评价并使用更多指令性提示；期望被低估的用户写出更长、更具协作性的提示。任务表现仅取决于模型真实能力，不受用户期望影响。用户印象变化不取决于任务表现，而取决于期望是否被满足和协作信心。
AI.conclusion: 用户对LLM的评估本质上是在“评价宣传材料”而非“产品本身”。当前依赖用户偏好的LLM排行榜（如Chatbot Arena）至少同样程度上测量的是期望管理效果，而非纯粹模型能力。评估LLM时需要更严格地控制用户先验期望带来的偏差。

title: PotatoGANs: Utilizing Generative Adversarial Networks, Instance Segmentation, and Explainable AI for Enhanced Potato Disease Identification and Classification
summary: Numerous applications have resulted from the automation of agricultural disease segmentation using deep learning techniques. However, when applied to new conditions, these applications frequently face the difficulty of overfitting, resulting in lower segmentation performance. In the context of potato farming, where diseases have a large influence on yields, it is critical for the agricultural economy to quickly and properly identify these diseases. Traditional data augmentation approaches, such as rotation, flip, and translation, have limitations and frequently fail to provide strong generalization results. To address these issues, our research employs a novel approach termed as PotatoGANs. In this novel data augmentation approach, two types of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are utilized to generate synthetic potato disease images from healthy potato images. This approach not only expands the dataset but also adds variety, which helps to enhance model generalization. Using the Inception score as a measure, our experiments show the better quality and realisticness of the images created by PotatoGANs, emphasizing their capacity to resemble real disease images closely. The CycleGAN model outperforms the Pix2Pix GAN model in terms of image quality, as evidenced by its higher IS scores CycleGAN achieves higher Inception scores (IS) of 1.2001 and 1.0900 for black scurf and common scab, respectively. This synthetic data can significantly improve the training of large neural networks. It also reduces data collection costs while enhancing data diversity and generalization capabilities. Our work improves interpretability by combining three gradient-based Explainable AI algorithms (GradCAM, GradCAM++, and ScoreCAM) with three distinct CNN architectures (DenseNet169, Resnet152 V2, InceptionResNet V2) for potato disease classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PotatoGANs方法，利用两种GAN（CycleGAN和Pix2Pix）从健康马铃薯图像生成合成病害图像，以解决农业病害分割中的过拟合问题。实验表明CycleGAN生成图像质量更高（Inception分数分别为1.2001和1.0900），并结合三种可解释AI算法与三种CNN架构进行分类。
AI.motivation: 传统数据增强方法（旋转、翻转、平移等）在农业病害分割中泛化能力不足，导致模型在新条件下过拟合；同时马铃薯病害对产量影响重大，需要快速准确识别。
AI.method: 提出PotatoGANs方法，使用CycleGAN和Pix2Pix两种生成对抗网络从健康马铃薯图像生成合成病害图像进行数据增强；结合GradCAM、GradCAM++、ScoreCAM三种可解释AI算法与DenseNet169、Resnet152 V2、InceptionResNet V2三种CNN架构进行分类。
AI.result: CycleGAN在图像质量上优于Pix2Pix，对黑痣病和普通疮痂病的Inception分数分别达到1.2001和1.0900；生成图像具有较高的真实感和多样性。
AI.conclusion: PotatoGANs能有效生成高质量合成病害图像，降低数据收集成本，增强数据多样性和模型泛化能力，为马铃薯病害识别提供了有效方案。

title: Punching Above Their Weight: Classification-Head Fine-Tuning of Tiny Language Models (TLMs) for Verifiable Multiple-Choice Tasks
summary: We define Tiny Language Models (TLMs) as models below roughly 3B parameters that fit on mainstream consumer devices. We study how to adapt them for and use them on verifiable multiple-choice tasks. We compare three LoRA-based fine-tuning paradigms (label generation, gold only, and our discriminative classification head) on a unified setup across several Qwen3 models from 0.6B to 8B and five benchmarks: HellaSwag, WinoGrande, PIQA, SciQ and ARC-C. Classification-head fine-tuning reliably outperforms label generation (+2-3%) at the 0.6B and 1.7B scales. Further, TLMs fine-tuned using the discriminative method are competitive to zero-/few-shot GPT-3 (175B), PaLM (540B) and GPT-4. The performance we report for Qwen3-0.6B and Qwen3-1.7B are SOTA on HellaSwag, WinoGrande, and PIQA.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了参数低于约3B的"小语言模型"(TLMs)在可验证多项选择任务上的适配方法。比较了三种LoRA微调范式，发现分类头微调在小规模模型上显著优于标签生成，且微调后的TLMs在多个基准上达到SOTA，可与GPT-3、PaLM、GPT-4竞争。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型（如GPT-3、PaLM）参数量巨大（数十亿到数百亿），难以在消费级设备上部署。作者希望探索如何让小模型（<3B参数）在多项选择任务上也能达到与大模型竞争的性能，从而降低部署门槛。
AI.method: 定义TLMs为<3B参数的小模型；在Qwen3系列（0.6B-8B）上比较三种LoRA微调范式：1) 标签生成（label generation）、2) 仅金标准（gold only）、3) 判别式分类头（discriminative classification head）；在HellaSwag、WinoGrande、PIQA、SciQ、ARC-C五个基准上统一评估。
AI.result: 分类头微调在0.6B和1.7B规模上稳定优于标签生成（+2-3%）；微调后的TLMs与零样本/少样本的GPT-3(175B)、PaLM(540B)、GPT-4具有竞争力；Qwen3-0.6B和Qwen3-1.7B在HellaSwag、WinoGrande、PIQA上达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 小语言模型通过恰当的微调方法（尤其是判别式分类头）可以在多项选择任务上取得与大模型竞争甚至超越的表现，证明了模型小型化与高效微调结合的有效路径。

title: ExpoMotion: A Large-Scale Benchmark and A Householder Projection Network for Multi-Exposure Fusion
summary: Multi-Exposure Fusion (MEF) effectively extends dynamic range, but practical deployment is hindered by motion-induced ghosting and the scarcity of high-quality dynamic benchmarks. Current benchmarks largely neglect dynamic scenes and lack reliable ground truth, making it difficult to handle the complexity of real-world motions. In response, we introduce ExpoMotion, a large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate deghosting capabilities. Comprising 1,738 sequences and 10,909 images across diverse environments, it covers a wide range of motions and provides high-fidelity GTs constructed through an expert-guided acquisition pipeline. To tackle the complex dynamics and extreme conditions captured in this benchmark, we propose the Householder Orthogonal Projection network (HOP), which revisits MEF deghosting from a mathematical perspective via Householder transformation, decoupling multi-frame alignment into exposure pre-alignment and ghost filtering. Specifically, the Global Priors Illumination Alignment (GPIA) module first rectifies drastic dynamic range discrepancies by utilizing global statistics for exposure harmonization. Regarding ghost removal, our Householder Orthogonal Attention (HOA) models artifacts as orthogonal perturbations. By employing a dynamic Householder reflector, HOA effectively projects ghosts out of the feature manifold while preserving high-frequency details. Experiments demonstrate that our ExpoMotion dataset enables superior generalization and artifact-free detail restoration, while also validating the effectiveness and efficiency of the HOP method. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/Leo-LiuYao/ExpoMotion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出大规模动态多曝光融合基准数据集ExpoMotion（1738序列/10909图像）及Householder正交投影网络（HOP），通过Householder变换从数学角度解耦对齐与去鬼影，在动态场景中实现无鬼影的细节恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有MEF基准缺乏动态场景和可靠真值，难以处理真实世界中的运动鬼影问题。
AI.method: 1. 构建ExpoMotion数据集（专家引导采集+高保真GT）；2. 提出HOP网络，包含GPIA模块（全局统计量曝光对齐）和HOA模块（动态Householder反射器正交投影去除鬼影）。
AI.result: ExpoMotion数据集使模型泛化能力更强且恢复无鬼影细节；HOP方法在去鬼影效果和效率上均有效。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了动态MEF基准空白，Householder正交投影为去鬼影提供了新的数学视角，数据集和代码已开源。

title: EdgeBench: Unveiling Scaling Laws of Learning from Real-World Environments
summary: Pretraining scaling laws reveal that model capability improves predictably with data and compute. But learning from real world environments after deployment remains far less understood. Analyzing roughly 38,000 hours of agent interaction with the environment across 134 real world tasks, we find, to the best of our knowledge, the first evidence that overall performance during environment learning follows a log-sigmoid scaling law with remarkably high precision, reaching R^2 = 0.998. Across model generations, we also find that agent learning speed roughly doubles every three months. This discovery stems from EdgeBench, a suite of 134 real world tasks with ultra-long horizons, spanning scientific discovery, software engineering, combinatorial optimization, professional knowledge work, formal mathematics, and interactive games. Each task sustains at least 12 hours of continuous agent operation under rich, multilevel feedback, and is built through substantial expert effort. We publicly release 51 tasks and our full evaluation framework to accelerate the study of how agents learn from real world experience.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对134个真实世界任务、约38,000小时智能体交互数据的分析，首次发现智能体在环境学习中的整体性能遵循对数Sigmoid缩放定律（R²=0.998），且智能体学习速度大约每三个月翻倍。研究基于EdgeBench基准套件，涵盖科学发现、软件工程等多个领域，并公开了51个任务及评估框架。
AI.motivation: 预训练阶段的缩放定律已被广泛研究，但智能体在部署后从真实环境中学习的规律仍未被充分理解。本文旨在探索智能体在真实世界环境中学习时的性能缩放行为。
AI.method: 构造了EdgeBench基准套件，包含134个真实世界任务，每个任务需至少12小时连续操作，具备多层次反馈。收集约38,000小时交互数据，拟合性能与数据量的关系，分析缩放定律模式及跨代模型的学习速度变化。
AI.result: 发现整体性能遵循对数Sigmoid缩放定律，拟合精度极高（R²=0.998）；智能体学习速度大约每三个月翻倍。
AI.conclusion: 真实世界环境学习存在高度可预测的缩放规律，为后续研究智能体持续学习能力提供了基础。公开部分任务和框架以促进该领域发展。

title: Specific Domain Ontology Construction Using Large Language Models
summary: Ontologies are useful structures to organize and maintain information that can be understood both by humans and systems. However, since their manual crafting is a laborious task, many specific domains lack reference ontologies. The outstanding ability for understanding natural language demonstrated by the Large Language Models (LLMs) has motivated their application to aid on a variety of fields, including on ontology development. This work presents the experimentation with a technique that uses LLMs in the role of domain experts to build conceptual hierarchies for a given initial concept. Twenty ontologies automatically constructed for the domain of the Brazilian maritime territory (a.k.a the Blue Amazon) using GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 were then evaluated by human experts. The models were able to construct overall coherent conceptualizations of the domain, but none of the outputs was completely satisfactory as a representation of the context without refinement.

AI.tldr: 本文实验了使用LLM（GPT-3.5和GPT-4）作为领域专家自动构建本体的技术，针对巴西海洋领土（蓝亚马逊）领域生成了20个本体，经人类专家评估发现模型能构建出整体连贯的概念化结构，但输出结果均需进一步完善才能成为满意的领域表示。
AI.motivation: 本体的人工构建工作繁重，许多特定领域缺乏参考本体，而LLM展现出的自然语言理解能力激发了将其应用于本体开发以减轻人工负担的动机。
AI.method: 利用LLM（GPT-3.5和GPT-4）扮演领域专家角色，针对给定的初始概念自动构建概念层次结构；在巴西海洋领土（蓝亚马逊）领域使用两种模型自动构建了20个本体。
AI.result: LLM能够构建出整体连贯的领域概念化结构，但没有任何一个自动生成的输出在未经精炼的情况下能够完全令人满意地表示该领域。
AI.conclusion: LLM可作为辅助工具参与本体构建，能产生合理的概念结构，但当前仍需人工介入进行精炼和修正才能达到参考本体的质量标准。

title: Stable Global Weighting of Flow Mixtures using Simplex Exponential Moving Average
summary: Normalising flows provide a powerful variational family for approximate inference, yet individual architectures often fail to generalise across heterogeneous posterior geometries. We revisit mixture-based flow formulations and introduce \emph{AMF\mbox{-}VI\mbox{-}sEMA}, a two-stage framework featuring a \emph{stable global weighting} mechanism based on a \emph{Simplex Exponential Moving Average} (sEMA) update. In Stage~1, a heterogeneous set of experts (\textsc{RealNVP}, \textsc{MAF}, \textsc{RBIG}) are trained independently to specialise in distinct structural regimes. In Stage~2, expert parameters are frozen and global mixture weights are learned through a temperature-controlled softmax of average log-likelihoods, followed by a smooth EMA update on the probability simplex. This design produces a tractable, data-agnostic gating mechanism (without per-sample gating or gradient backpropagation through weights) that adaptively reallocates capacity while avoiding component collapse. We evaluate the framework on ten posterior benchmarks: six canonical 2D synthetic families (Banana, X-Shaped, Bimodal, Multimodal, Two-moons, Rings) and four real/low-dimensional Bayesian targets (BLR, BPR, Weibull, Real-GMM2), with stronger baselines (\textsc{NICE}, \textsc{ResFlow}, and EM-Mixing). Comprehensive evaluation covers NLL, KL divergence, Wasserstein-2 distance, and MMD, together with diagnostics of mixture dynamics, hyperparameter sensitivity, and cross-seed robustness. Empirically, \emph{AMF\mbox{-}VI\mbox{-}sEMA} achieves consistent NLL improvements over its predecessor \emph{AMF\mbox{-}VI} and avoids the catastrophic transport failures of single-flow baselines, while maintaining stable weight trajectories ($N_{\mathrm{eff}}{>}1.4$ on all datasets) with minimal computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出AMF-VI-sEMA框架，通过两阶段训练（独立专家+冻结专家学习全局混合权重）和基于单纯形指数移动平均（sEMA）的稳定加权机制，在异构后验推断中优于单流基线方法。
AI.motivation: 归一化流作为变分推断的强大工具，但单个流架构难以泛化到异构的后验几何结构，现有混合流方法存在组件崩溃等问题。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：Stage 1 独立训练多个异构专家流（RealNVP, MAF, RBIG）；Stage 2 冻结专家参数，通过温度控制的softmax平均对数似然学习全局混合权重，并在概率单纯形上进行平滑EMA更新，实现无需逐样本门控或梯度反向传播的数据无关门控机制。
AI.result: 在10个后验基准上（6个2D合成+4个真实/低维贝叶斯任务）评估，AMF-VI-sEMA在NLL指标上一致优于前身AMF-VI，避免了单流基线的灾难性传输失败，所有数据集上有效样本量Neff>1.4，计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: 提出的sEMA稳定全局加权机制有效避免了组件崩溃，自适应地重新分配容量，在异构后验推断任务中表现稳健且高效。

title: Vidu S1: A Real-Time Interactive Video Generation Model
summary: We introduce Vidu S1, a real-time interactive video generation model supporting voice control of digital characters. Users can control video generation content at any moment through voice instructions. Vidu S1 supports infinite-length real-time video generation without blurring, drift, or visual distortion. Built with TurboDiffusion and TurboServe, Vidu S1 outputs 540p real-time videos at up to 42 FPS on regular consumer GPUs. Users can upload custom images of real people, anime, and pets, and choose different voice tones for personalized experiences. Experiments show that Vidu S1 achieves the best performance across all test metrics while fully meeting real-time inference requirements. A playable online demo is available at https://vidu.com/vidu-stream.

AI.tldr: Vidu S1是一个支持语音控制的实时交互式视频生成模型，能够通过语音指令控制数字角色，实现无限时长、无模糊、无漂移的实时视频生成，在消费级GPU上可达42FPS的540p视频输出。
AI.motivation: 提出一种支持实时语音交互控制的视频生成模型，解决现有视频生成中缺乏实时交互控制、存在视觉失真等问题。
AI.method: 基于TurboDiffusion和TurboServe构建，支持用户通过语音指令实时控制视频生成内容，支持自定义人物/宠物图像及多种语音音色。
AI.result: 在所有测试指标上取得最佳性能，在消费级GPU上实现540p/42FPS的实时推理，支持无限时长无视觉失真的视频生成。
AI.conclusion: Vidu S1成功实现了实时交互式视频生成，证明了语音控制数字角色的可行性和高效性。

title: RABBiT: Rapidly adaptive BOLD foundation model via brain-tuning for accurate zero-shot and few-shot prediction of speech-elicited responses in the brain
summary: Language understanding in the brain is context-dependent, varying across experimental stimuli and individuals, which makes it difficult to build computational models that generalize across both. This calls for a foundation model of language-evoked brain activity that can capture shared structure while adapting efficiently to new participants and inputs. We introduce RABBiT (Rapidly Adaptive BOLD foundation model via BraIn-Tuning), a compact audio-to-fMRI encoder designed for accurate zero- and few-shot prediction. A comprehensive evaluation on 324 participants across multiple unseen fMRI datasets shows that RABBiT enables accurate zero-shot prediction of fMRI responses to natural speech across auditory and language-selective regions, surpassing the SOTA foundation model for fMRI and predictions based on group averages. With as little as 10 minutes of participant-specific data, RABBiT further improves performance via parameter-efficient tuning, substantially outperforming per-participant linear models. RABBiT's performance is driven by two key innovations: (1) learned region-specific attention, and (2) a decomposition of brain responses into shared and subject-specific components, combined with a brain-tuned speech backbone. In addition to supporting strong predictive accuracy, the structured, region-specific representations that RABBiT learns enable interpretability. By eliminating the need for extensive per-participant data and model fitting, RABBiT enables scalable population-level analyses of language in the human brain. We make the code available at https://github.com/bridge-ai-neuro/rabbit.

AI.tldr: RABBiT是一种用于预测大脑对语言刺激的fMRI响应的音频到fMRI编码器基础模型，通过区域特定注意力和脑响应分解实现零样本和少样本预测，仅需10分钟个体数据即可超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 大脑对语言的理解具有上下文依赖性，随实验刺激和个体差异而变化，现有模型难以同时跨被试和跨输入泛化，因此需要一种既能捕获共享结构又能高效适应新被试和输入的基础模型。
AI.method: 提出RABBiT框架，核心创新包括：(1)学习区域特定注意力机制；(2)将脑响应分解为共享成分和个体特定成分；(3)结合脑调优的语音骨干网络。通过参数高效微调，仅需10分钟个体数据即可适配新被试。
AI.result: 在324名被试、多个未见fMRI数据集上，RABBiT在零样本预测中超越现有SOTA基础模型和群体平均预测；通过10分钟个体数据微调后，性能进一步显著超过每个被试单独训练的线性模型，尤其在听觉和语言选择性脑区表现优异。
AI.conclusion: RABBiT消除了对大量个体数据和模型拟合的需求，实现了可扩展的人群级语言脑活动分析，其结构化的区域特定表征还具有良好的可解释性。

title: Adversarial LassoNet: Robust Feature Selection via Stability-Driven Sparse Learning
summary: Sparse feature selection is critical for high-dimensional machine learning, yet traditional $\ell_1$-regularized methods are often brittle under observational noise and spurious correlations, leading to unstable feature supports and degraded generalization. Although adversarial training has been widely used to improve model robustness, its interaction with hierarchical sparse feature selection remains underexplored. In this work, we propose Adversarial LassoNet (AdLNet), a stability-driven sparse feature selection framework that integrates input-space adversarial perturbations with the hierarchical sparsity mechanism of LassoNet. We derive a tractable first-order adversarial approximation under local smoothness assumptions and provide an NTK-inspired spectral analysis to characterize how perturbation-driven training can reduce gradient concentration. Experiments on high-dimensional SERS data, six public benchmark datasets, and ColoredMNIST show that AdLNet maintains competitive sparse-selection performance while improving out-of-distribution robustness by 4.4\% and feature support reproducibility by 6.3\% under nearly matched support sparsity on ColoredMNIST. On the high-dimensional lung cancer screening dataset, AdLNet achieves a 5.3\% test accuracy gain and a 6.0\% AUC improvement over vanilla LassoNet. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/719573/Adversarial-LassoNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdLNet，将对抗训练与LassoNet的分层稀疏机制结合，在高维特征选择中提升稳定性和鲁棒性，在多个数据集上取得约4-6%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统ℓ₁正则化方法在高维场景下对观测噪声和虚假相关敏感，导致特征支持集不稳定、泛化能力下降。对抗训练虽能提升鲁棒性，但其与分层稀疏特征选择的交互机制尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出Adversarial LassoNet (AdLNet)，将输入空间的对抗扰动与LassoNet的分层稀疏机制相结合；推导了局部光滑假设下的一阶对抗近似；并引入NTK启发的谱分析来刻画扰动训练如何降低梯度集中度。
AI.result: 在ColoredMNIST上，OOD鲁棒性提升4.4%，特征支持集可重复性提升6.3%；在高维肺癌筛查数据集上，测试准确率提升5.3%，AUC提升6.0%。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练与分层稀疏选择可以协同工作，在保持稀疏选择性能的同时显著提升模型的鲁棒性和特征稳定性。

title: A Multi-Task Deep Learning Framework for Real-Time Intelligent Video Surveillance with Temporal Event Validation
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures. Project repository available at: https://github.com/DumitruEstera/ai-surveillance-system
summary: Modern video surveillance systems generate far more video streams than human operators can effectively monitor, making automated analysis essential for timely detection of security events. This paper presents a unified multi-task deep learning framework that simultaneously performs face recognition with zone-based authorization, automatic license plate recognition, weapon detection, fire and smoke detection, and human action recognition on a shared GPU platform. Among the integrated modules, two task-specific deep-learning models are proposed in this work to address scenarios that are insufficiently represented in publicly available datasets: a single-class weapon detector fine-tuned on a merged and relabeled dataset, achieving a mean average precision (mAP@0.5) of 0.947, and a SlowFast-R50 action recognition model trained on a purpose-built vandalism dataset comprising 614 video clips, achieving 94.33% classification accuracy. To improve robustness in continuous video, all detection modules are integrated into a temporal event-validation architecture based on multi-frame confirmation, confidence-weighted voting, and cascaded filtering, transforming frame-level predictions into reliable security events. Each module is evaluated independently on established public datasets (LFW, D-Fire, FIRESENSE, and UCF-Crime), followed by integrated end-to-end system evaluation. The proposed temporal validation strategy reduces the fire and smoke false-alarm rate from 52% to 4% and improves video license plate exact-match accuracy from 66.7% to 81.8%, while the complete framework maintains real-time operation with a per-frame latency below 100 ms on commodity hardware. These results demonstrate that combining specialized deep-learning models with temporal event validation provides an effective and practical solution for reliable real-time intelligent video surveillance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一的多任务深度学习框架，在共享GPU平台上同时执行人脸识别（区域授权）、车牌识别、武器检测、火灾烟雾检测及人体动作识别，并通过时序事件验证架构将帧级预测转化为可靠的安全事件，显著降低误报率（火灾烟雾误报率从52%降至4%，车牌准确率从66.7%提升至81.8%），且在商用硬件上保持实时运行（帧延迟<100ms）。
AI.motivation: 现代视频监控系统产生的视频流远超人工监控能力，亟需自动化分析以实现安全事件的及时检测。现有公开数据集对某些场景（如武器检测、破坏行为识别）覆盖不足，且单独模块缺乏统一的时序验证机制，导致误报率高。
AI.method: 1) 提出统一多任务深度学习框架，集成人脸识别（区域授权）、车牌识别、武器检测、火灾烟雾检测、动作识别五个模块；2) 提出两个专用模型：基于合并重标数据集微调的单类武器检测器（mAP@0.5=0.947），以及基于614个视频剪辑构建的破坏行为数据集的SlowFast-R50动作识别模型（准确率94.33%）；3) 设计时序事件验证架构，包括多帧确认、置信度加权投票和级联过滤，将帧级预测转化为可靠事件。
AI.result: 武器检测mAP@0.5达0.947，破坏行为识别准确率94.33%；时序验证将火灾烟雾误报率从52%降至4%，车牌精确匹配准确率从66.7%提升至81.8%；完整框架在商用硬件上帧延迟低于100ms，保持实时运行。
AI.conclusion: 将专用深度学习模型与时序事件验证相结合，为实时智能视频监控提供了一种有效且实用的解决方案，在降低误报率的同时保持高性能和实时性。

title: Unified Audio Intelligence Without Regressing on Text Intelligence
summary: Audio intelligence involves understanding, reasoning about, and generating both audio and speech. In this work, we introduce Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B (Audex), a unified audio-text LLM built on Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B, a strong text-only MoE LLM. Audex adopts a simple unified design with a single Transformer decoder: audio inputs are encoded and projected into the text embedding space, while text tokens and quantized audio output tokens are treated uniformly during generation. This architecture enables strong audio-text fusion, seamless multimodal generation, and compatibility with standard LLM training and inference infrastructure. For training, we meticulously curate audio-text datasets comprising 157.4B audio tokens and 320.5B text tokens. We apply multi-stage supervised training on these datasets, followed by text-only Cascade RL and multi-domain on-policy distillation. Audex delivers state-of-the-art audio understanding, speech recognition and translation, text-to-speech, audio generation, and speech-to-speech generation, while preserving very compelling reasoning, alignment, knowledge, long-context, and agentic capabilities of its text-only LLM backbone with marginal or no regression. We release the model checkpoints to facilitate open research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Audex，一个基于Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B的统一音频-文本大语言模型，通过简单统一的Transformer解码器架构和精心策划的157.4B音频token+320.5B文本token训练数据，在多阶段监督训练和强化学习后，在音频理解、语音识别翻译、文本转语音、音频生成和语音转语音生成等任务上达到SOTA，同时保持了文本LLM骨干的推理、对齐、知识、长上下文和智能体能力。
AI.motivation: 构建一个统一的音频-文本多模态大语言模型，能够同时处理音频理解和生成任务，同时保留强大的文本推理能力，解决现有模型在音频理解和生成任务上的局限性。
AI.method: 采用基于Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B文本MoE LLM的单一Transformer解码器架构，音频输入编码投影到文本嵌入空间，文本token和量化音频输出token统一处理。使用157.4B音频token和320.5B文本token进行多阶段监督训练，结合文本Cascade RL和多领域基于策略的蒸馏。
AI.result: 在音频理解、语音识别与翻译、文本转语音、音频生成、语音转语音生成等任务上达到SOTA，同时在文本推理、对齐、知识、长上下文和智能体能力上几乎没有退步。
AI.conclusion: 简单统一的Transformer解码器设计结合大规模精心策划的训练数据和多阶段训练策略，能够构建强大的统一音频-文本大语言模型，在多种音频任务上达到最优性能，同时保留原始文本模型的核心能力。

title: NeSy-CSA: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Open-Ended Critical Scenario Attribution
summary: Understanding why discovered scenarios become critical in scenario-based testing is essential for effectively leveraging them in decision-making systems. Reasoning about such criticality can be formulated as an attribution problem. However, across different decision-making tasks, the causes of criticality may involve diverse state variables, interaction patterns, and failure mechanisms, making attribution an inherently open-ended problem beyond predefined explanation spaces. Existing attribution methods still struggle to balance open-ended reasoning flexibility with the interpretability and traceability required for critical scenario reasoning. To address this limitation, we propose NeSy-CSA, a neuro-symbolic framework that transforms open-ended critical scenario attribution from unconstrained explanation generation into structured and traceable reasoning. NeSy-CSA narrows the attribution space by selecting relevant factors, makes the reasoning process traceable through a dependency-aware evidence graph, and executes symbolic reasoning procedures derived from atomic operations, coordinated with evidence-constrained neural inference to support flexible open-ended attribution. We further introduce a process-level and result-level assessment module to evaluate the structural validity of the attribution process and the behavioral effectiveness of the attribution results under controlled interventions. Experiments across four decision-making environments show that NeSy-CSA improves two intervention-based measures of attribution effectiveness by 18.32% and 13.67% over LLM-based baselines. These results demonstrate its potential to transform discovered critical scenarios into reusable knowledge for subsequent testing and safety analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出神经符号框架NeSy-CSA，将关键场景归因从无约束解释生成转化为结构化可追溯推理，在四个决策环境中相比LLM基线提升归因效果18.32%和13.67%。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法难以在开放推理灵活性与可解释性、可追溯性之间取得平衡，而关键场景归因本质上是开放性问题，超出预定义解释空间。
AI.method: NeSy-CSA框架：通过选择相关因子缩小归因空间，构建依赖感知证据图实现推理可追溯，结合原子操作驱动的符号推理与证据约束的神经推理，支持开放归因。
AI.result: 在四个决策环境中，NeSy-CSA在两种干预式归因有效性指标上分别比LLM基线提升18.32%和13.67%。
AI.conclusion: NeSy-CSA能将发现的关键场景转化为可重用知识，用于后续测试和安全分析，展示了神经符号方法在场景归因中的潜力。

title: Text as Partial Constraint: Core-Residual Alignment for Robust Vision-Language Learning
summary: Vision-language alignment powers open-vocabulary recognition, retrieval, and LVLM grounding, yet natural captions are often underspecified, making similarity brittle and overly confident under paraphrase and omitted details. We aim to learn representations whose matching is stable across caption views and whose confidence reflects how strongly text constrains an image. We propose Text as Partial Constraint (TPC), a core-residual alignment framework that treats multi-view captions as incomplete supervision. It distills a consensus semantic core as the alignment target, learns a single-view core predictor for standard inference with one query, and explicitly discourages vision-language similarity from depending on the orthogonal unsaid residual. An uncertainty-aware contrastive objective further softens alignment when caption views disagree, reducing overconfident updates under weak language constraints. Across zero-shot recognition and adversarial robustness, TPC achieves 81.42/64.05 Top-1 clean/robust accuracy on ImageNet and 76.19/52.03 on an Avg-14 transfer suite, while improving LVLM transfer with 85.16 POPE F1 and 59.57 OKVQA accuracy under an LLaVA-1.5-7B stack. These results suggest that modeling text as a partial constraint is a practical and principled route to more reliable vision-language representations under underspecified language supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Text as Partial Constraint (TPC)框架，将多视角字幕视为不完整监督，通过蒸馏共识语义核心作为对齐目标，并显式抑制视觉-语言相似度对"未说出的残差"的依赖，以学习更稳定的视觉-语言表征。
AI.motivation: 自然语言字幕往往信息不完整（underspecified），导致视觉-语言对齐在释义或细节缺失时脆弱且过度自信。现有方法未能处理这种不完全监督问题。
AI.method: 提出TPC（Text as Partial Constraint）核心-残差对齐框架：(1) 从多视角字幕中蒸馏共识语义核心作为对齐目标；(2) 学习单视图核心预测器用于标准推理；(3) 显式抑制视觉-语言相似度对正交的"未说出的残差"的依赖；(4) 不确定性感知的对比学习目标在字幕视图不一致时软化对齐。
AI.result: 零样本识别和对抗鲁棒性上，ImageNet Top-1清洁/鲁棒准确率达81.42/64.05，Avg-14迁移套件达76.19/52.03；LVLM迁移中LLaVA-1.5-7B上POPE F1达85.16，OKVQA准确率达59.57。
AI.conclusion: 将文本建模为部分约束是处理不完全语言监督下的视觉-语言表征的实用且原则性强的途径，能有效提升表征的可靠性。

title: Progressive Refinement: An Iterative Pseudo-Labeling Approach for Mandarin-English Code-Switching ASR
summary: Code-switching (CS), alternating languages within the same utterance, poses significant challenges for automatic speech recognition (ASR) due to limited CS training data. This paper applies an iterative pseudo-labeling training approach to CS-ASR for the first time, demonstrating its effectiveness in leveraging unlabeled data to improve CS-ASR performance. The approach comprises three phases: pseudo-label generation, two-stage bilingual model training, and iterative improvements. It begins by generating pseudo-labels from a large unlabeled corpus, creating a semi-supervised dataset. This dataset supports a two-stage training framework where the model is pre-trained and then fine-tuned on supervised CS data. Iterative refinements further enhance the model's accuracy in handling complex CS scenarios. Our approach significantly advances CS-ASR systems, achieving notable Mix Error Rate (MER) reductions on SEAME's devman (6.35%) and devsge (8.29%) subsets.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将迭代伪标签训练方法应用于语码转换（CS）的自动语音识别（ASR），通过无标注数据生成伪标签、两阶段双语模型训练和迭代优化，在SEAME数据集上实现了显著的混合错误率（MER）降低。
AI.motivation: 语码转换ASR面临训练数据稀缺的挑战，现有方法难以有效利用无标注数据提升性能。
AI.method: 提出三阶段迭代伪标签训练方法：(1) 从大量无标注语料生成伪标签构建半监督数据集；(2) 两阶段训练：先预训练模型，再在监督CS数据上微调；(3) 迭代优化进一步提升模型处理复杂CS场景的能力。
AI.result: 在SEAME数据集上，devman子集MER降低6.35%，devsge子集MER降低8.29%。
AI.conclusion: 迭代伪标签训练能有效利用无标注数据显著提升CS-ASR性能，为语码转换识别提供了新的解决思路。

title: A Unified Framework for Quantized and Continuous Strong Lottery Tickets
summary: The Strong Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (SLTH) asserts that sufficiently overparameterized, randomly initialized neural networks contain sparse subnetworks that, even without any training, can match the performance of a small trained network on a given dataset. A key mathematical tool in the theoretical study of SLTH has been the Random Subset Sum Problem (RSSP). The SLTH has recently been extended to the quantized setting, where the network weights are sampled from a discrete set rather than from a continuous interval. These new results are however far from those in arbitrary-precision setting in several ways. In this work, we provide an analysis of the RSSP in the discrete setting, and use it to derive tight SLTH guarantees in the quantized case. Our analysis obtain tight bounds on the failure probability of finding a strong lottery ticket in the quantized regime, providing an exponential improvement over previous results. Most importantly, it unifies the literature by showing that both approximate representations in the continuous setting and exact representations in quantized settings naturally emerge as limiting cases of our results. This perspective not only sharpens existing bounds but also provides a cohesive framework that simultaneously handles approximation and rounding errors.

AI.tldr: 本文对离散随机子集和问题进行了分析，并用于推导量化场景下强彩票假设（SLTH）的严格保证，在失败概率上实现指数级改进，并统一了连续与量化两种设定下的理论框架。
AI.motivation: 现有的量化SLTH结果远不如任意精度设定下的成果，缺乏统一的理论框架，且失败概率界不够紧致。
AI.method: 对离散设定下的随机子集和问题（RSSP）进行理论分析，并利用该分析推导量化SLTH的紧致保证，同时证明连续近似表示与量化精确表示可作为所提结果的极限情况。
AI.result: 在量化设定下获得了失败概率的指数级改进（更紧的界），并统一了连续与量化两种场景的理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅改进了现有界，还提供了一个同时处理近似误差和舍入误差的统一框架，将连续与量化SLTH作为特例包含在内。

title: DistillH-Mamba: A Hypergraph-Mamba-Based Knowledge Distillation Model for Efficient Impact Fall Detection
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures. Published in IEEE Sensors Journal, 2025
summary: Falls among the elderly represent a significant public health concern due to their prevalence, consequences, and societal burden. While deep learning has improved fall detection, accurately identifying impact moments (when an individual hits the ground) remains challenging. Additionally, current algorithms often rely on complex models with high computational demands, limiting real-time deployment feasibility. In this work, we propose DistillH-Mamba, a novel architecture for impact fall detection that addresses these challenges through three key innovations: First, we introduce a hypergraph-based approach that captures higher-order relationships between multiple joints simultaneously, enabling more accurate modeling of complex interactions during impact falls. Second, we integrate the Mamba architecture with hypergraphs for impact detection, significantly accelerating processing speed while efficiently capturing both long-term dependencies and sudden skeletal motion changes. Third, we employ relational knowledge distillation that preserves crucial spatial-temporal relationships while reducing computational demands for real-time impact fall detection. Evaluated on the 3D Skeletons UP-Fall and UMAFall datasets, our DistillH-Mamba model achieves 97.38% accuracy in detecting impact within fall events and 73.8% reduction in inference time compared to its teacher model, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in both precision and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DistillH-Mamba架构，通过超图建模、Mamba集成和关系知识蒸馏，在跌倒检测中实现97.38%准确率并减少73.8%推理时间。
AI.motivation: 老年人跌倒是重大公共卫生问题，现有深度学习方法在准确识别冲击时刻（人与地面接触瞬间）方面仍有困难，且模型复杂度高、计算需求大，难以实时部署。
AI.method: 提出DistillH-Mamba架构，包含三项创新：1）基于超图的方法捕获多关节间高阶关系；2）将Mamba架构与超图集成，加速处理速度并捕捉长期依赖与突然骨骼运动变化；3）采用关系知识蒸馏，保留时空关系的同时降低计算需求。
AI.result: 在3D Skeletons UP-Fall和UMAFall数据集上，冲击检测准确率达97.38%，推理时间相比教师模型减少73.8%，在精度和效率上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DistillH-Mamba通过超图、Mamba与知识蒸馏的有机结合，有效平衡了跌倒冲击检测的准确性与实时性，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: Streaming Neural Speech Codecs through Time-Invariant Representations
summary:
Neural speech codecs are increasingly used as intermediate representations in codec-based speech generation systems. TiCodec introduces a factorized representation that separates time-varying speech content from time-invariant information through a Time-Invariant Representation Extraction (TIRE) module, potentially reducing the amount of information that must be modeled at the frame-level.
  In this work, we investigate the nature of the information captured by TIRE representations and their suitability for low-latency speech processing. Using a series of probing tasks, we analyze the influence of the encoder layer and show that intermediate layers capture complementary speaker- and environment-related information while containing little linguistic content. We further study several segment selection strategies for TIRE training and demonstrate that cross-file sampling improves the robustness of invariant representations. Based on these findings, we propose Dual-TIRE, a multi-level architecture that exploits the complementarity of different encoder layers and improves speech reconstruction quality and speaker similarity.
  Finally, we evaluate TiCodec in a streaming inference setting using successive 660ms processing blocks. Results show that streaming operation can be achieved without significant degradation in reconstruction performance, highlighting the potential of factorized neural codec representations for future low-latency speech generation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究TiCodec中时间不变性表示（TIRE）的特性，提出Dual-TIRE多层级架构，并验证其在低延迟流式推理场景下的可行性。
AI.motivation: 探究TiCodec中TIRE表示所捕获信息的本质，以及如何提升其在低延迟语音处理中的适用性。
AI.method: 通过探针任务分析编码器层级信息；研究TIRE训练中的片段选择策略；提出Dual-TIRE多层级架构；在流式推理场景下评估性能。
AI.result: 中间层捕获说话人和环境信息但含少量语言内容；跨文件采样提升表示的鲁棒性；Dual-TIRE提升重建质量和说话人相似度；660ms分块的流式推理无明显性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 因子化神经编解码表示可用于低延迟语音生成系统，Dual-TIRE架构有效利用层级互补性提升性能。

title: A Gradient Flow Perspective on Minimum MMD Estimation
summary: Minimum maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) estimation has emerged as a robust and likelihood-free alternative to maximum likelihood estimation for parameter estimation. Yet, despite its practical success, the associated optimization problem remains poorly understood, with theoretical guarantees for existing algorithms hinging on convexity assumptions that rarely hold in practice. We address this gap by proposing a preconditioned gradient descent (PGD) scheme, establishing its asymptotic \emph{global} convergence under explicit gradient-dominance and projection-residual conditions. Our approach is inspired by recent progress on MMD gradient flows, a nonparametric descent scheme on the space of probability measures. We provide extensive empirical evidence that our PGD scheme outperforms standard gradient descent across a range of challenging parameter estimation and composite hypothesis testing problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种预条件梯度下降（PGD）方案用于最小最大均值差异（MMD）估计，在梯度支配性和投影残差条件下建立了渐近全局收敛性保证，并在参数估计和复合假设检验中优于标准梯度下降。
AI.motivation: MMD估计虽在实践中成功，但其优化问题缺乏理论理解，现有算法的理论保证依赖于现实中很少成立的凸性假设。
AI.method: 提出预条件梯度下降（PGD）方案，受MMD梯度流（概率测度空间上的非参数下降方案）启发，在梯度支配性和投影残差条件下分析其渐近全局收敛性。
AI.result: 在参数估计和复合假设检验等挑战性问题上，PGD方案在经验上显著优于标准梯度下降。
AI.conclusion: PGD为MMD估计提供了首个非凸场景下的全局收敛理论保证，并展现出实际优越性。

title: Rethinking Brain Decoding with CLIP: The Role of Adversarial Robustness
summary: Brain decoding aims to uncover neural mechanisms by inferring stimulus-related representations from brain signals. In fMRI studies, this is typically achieved by mapping fMRI responses to the latent representations of computational models. Recently, CLIP has become a popular choice for brain decoding due to its rich vision--language embedding space. However, aligning fMRI signals with CLIP representations remains challenging. As CLIP is not explicitly optimized for neural alignment, its representations may capture statistically predictive cues that are only partially reflected in brain activity, limiting decoding performance. In this paper, we investigate whether adversarially robust representations improve neural decoding with CLIP. Adversarial training suppresses non-robust features and promotes more stable, perceptually structured representations, which may better align with brain activity. We evaluate this by fixing the fMRI decoder and varying only the target representation (standard CLIP vs. robust variants) on fMRI-image retrieval and zero-shot classification tasks across NSD and GOD datasets. Empirical results show that this simple change consistently improves task performance and yields stronger alignment across multiple metrics. Attribution analysis further reveals consistently low agreement between standard CLIP and its robust variants, suggesting that adversarial robustness reorganizes feature importance in the visual representation. These findings suggest that the choice of target representation influences neural decoding performance and that adversarial robustness may serve as a useful criterion for brain decoding.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对抗性鲁棒表示是否能改善基于CLIP的神经解码（fMRI脑解码）。实验发现，用对抗性训练后的CLIP变体替代标准CLIP作为目标表示，能持续提升fMRI图像检索和零样本分类性能，且鲁棒表示与大脑活动的对齐更强。归因分析显示标准CLIP与鲁棒变体的特征重要性差异显著，表明对抗性鲁棒性可重组视觉表示特征，有望成为脑解码的有效准则。
AI.motivation: CLIP虽被广泛用于fMRI脑解码，但其表示并非针对神经对齐优化，导致与大脑活动的对齐有限。作者探索对抗性鲁棒表示是否能通过抑制非鲁棒特征、增强感知结构化表示来改善神经解码性能。
AI.method: 固定fMRI解码器不变，仅替换目标表示（标准CLIP vs. 对抗性训练鲁棒变体），在NSD和GOD数据集上执行fMRI-图像检索和零样本分类任务，并通过多种指标评估对齐性能，辅以归因分析。
AI.result: 对抗性鲁棒CLIP变体在两项任务上均一致优于标准CLIP，多种对齐指标显著提升。归因分析表明标准CLIP与鲁棒变体在特征重要性上一致性很低。
AI.conclusion: 目标表示的选择影响神经解码性能，对抗性鲁棒性可作为脑解码的有效准则，有助于更好地对齐大脑活动。

title: SalAngaBhava: A Sinhala Market Dataset for Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis
summary: Sentiment analysis has been a primary domain under Natural Language Processing (NLP) from its inception as it plays a vital role in both real-world and research applications. In high-resource languages, this has been extended a step further, and instead of predicting sentiment at the sentence level, models have been developed to detect more fine-grained sentiments at aspect level. However, in order to conduct this fine-grained Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA), datasets annotated with aspects and sentiments toward the said aspects is required. Such datasets are lacking for low-resources languages among which, we can count Sinhala, an Indo-Aryan languages used primarily in Sri Lanka. In this work, we introduce, SalAngaBhava, a new Sinhala Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis dataset which contains Sinhala product reviews that are manually labeled with aspect terms and the associated sentiments (positive, negative, neutral). The data was collected from domain-relevant sources such as user-generated reviews and comments, and was annotated following carefully defined guidelines to ensure consistency and quality. The dataset consists of sentences and aspect-sentiment pairs, encompassing a considerable range of aspects from several domains. The analysis confirms that the dataset is well-structured and sufficiently balanced for ABSA research. This dataset can be used as a benchmark and facilitates further studies related to Sinhala natural language processing, and low-resource sentiment analysis tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SalAngaBhava，一个针对僧伽罗语（低资源语言）的方面级情感分析（ABSA）数据集，包含手动标注了方面术语和情感（正面、负面、中性）的产品评论，旨在填补低资源语言在细粒度情感分析方面的数据空白。
AI.motivation: 高资源语言已有方面级情感分析（ABSA）数据集和模型，但低资源语言（如僧伽罗语）缺乏此类细粒度情感分析所需的标注数据，限制了相关研究的发展。
AI.method: 从用户生成评论等来源收集僧伽罗语产品评论数据，按照严格定义的标注指南，人工标注方面术语及其对应的情感极性（正面、负面、中性），构建了SalAngaBhava数据集。
AI.result: 构建了一个包含句子和方面-情感对的数据集，涵盖多个领域，数据分析表明该数据集结构良好、平衡性足够用于ABSA研究。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集可作为僧伽罗语ABSA研究的基准，促进低资源语言自然语言处理和情感分析任务的进一步研究。

title: AdaptiveSD A Stability-Aware, Runtime-Adaptive Speculative Decoding Framework with Multi-Policy Orchestration for CPU-Constrained LLM Inference
summary: With the rise of small quantized GGUF-based language models and their increasing use for on-device inference tasks, we have seen the growing need for an approach capable of reliably delivering these models at scale even under severe memory bandwidth constraints such as those imposed by pure CPU implementations. Fixed-depth speculative decoding has emerged as one promising technique, but in practice, it often leads to performance degradation due to either bandwidth saturation, instability, or even catastrophic resource exhaustion resulting in system failure. To overcome this problem, we introduce AdaptiveSD, a fully runtime-adaptive speculative decoding framework aimed at ensuring robust, reliable execution across the spectrum of model types and workloads. Our solution consists of four tightly-coupled components working together in a continuous feedback loop: a Runtime Monitoring Engine tracking multiple signals relevant to ongoing computation, an Adaptive Draft Controller enforcing an eleven rule policy hierarchy prioritizing system resource preservation over raw draft count, a Dynamic Policy Engine employing a suite of heuristic and reinforcement learning techniques to dynamically modify policies depending upon workload behavior, and finally, a KV Cache Coordination Layer managing cache states with fine-grained control through INT8 shadow buffers and position aware evictions. While conventional approaches focus solely on maximizing throughput, we instead assess the effectiveness of our approach based on several key metrics including wasted drafted compute and inter-token latency dispersion alongside standard measures of speculative efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出AdaptiveSD，一种全运行时自适应推测解码框架，通过四个紧耦合组件（运行时监控引擎、自适应草稿控制器、动态策略引擎、KV缓存协调层）的持续反馈循环，确保在CPU内存带宽受限环境下各种模型和负载的稳定可靠执行。
AI.motivation: 固定深度推测解码在实际CPU推理中常因带宽饱和、不稳定性甚至资源耗尽导致性能下降甚至系统崩溃，需要一种能自适应调节的可靠方案。
AI.method: AdaptiveSD包含四个紧耦合组件：1) 运行时监控引擎跟踪多个信号；2) 自适应草稿控制器执行十一规则策略层级（优先保障系统资源）；3) 动态策略引擎结合启发式与强化学习动态调整策略；4) KV缓存协调层通过INT8影子缓冲区和位置感知驱逐实现细粒度缓存管理。
AI.result: 与仅最大化吞吐量的传统方法不同，本文从浪费的草稿计算量、令牌间延迟离散度以及标准推测效率等多个维度评估效果。
AI.conclusion: AdaptiveSD通过运行时自适应机制在CPU内存带宽受限场景下实现了推测解码的鲁棒性和可靠性，而非一味追求吞吐量最大化。

title: FairFlow: Demystifying and Mitigating Stereotype Bias in Text-to-Image Diffusion Transformers
summary: Multimodal diffusion transformers (MM-DiTs) have emerged as the prevalent backbone for modern text-to-image generation systems. However, they exhibit critical alignment vulnerabilities, systematically manifesting severe stereotype biases even under benign prompts. This poses a significant risk of algorithmic discrimination in deployed systems. Since most existing mitigation strategies were tailored for legacy U-Net architectures, the precise remediation of these vulnerabilities in MM-DiTs remains a critical open challenge. In this work, we first investigate the root cause of this vulnerability via mechanistic analysis. We reveal that bias representations in MM-DiTs are not uniformly distributed across depth, but are mediated by a sparse set of layers functioning as internal semantic binding hubs. These hubs exhibit a stage-wise propagation driving bias manifestation: early hubs establish the structural templates susceptible to bias, middle hubs actively extract core stereotypical concepts from textual conditioning, and late hubs globally solidify these biases through visual self-attention. Leveraging these architectural insights, we propose FairFlow, an intrinsic, mechanism-guided mitigation framework. FairFlow acts as an internal regulator by employing sparse steering: it learns attribute-specific fair directions and injects them exclusively at the identified semantic hubs within a constrained inference window. Evaluations on FLUX.1-dev and Stable Diffusion~3 demonstrate that FairFlow effectively neutralizes these stereotypical vulnerabilities across gender, race, and intersectional settings, achieving an optimal fairness-fidelity balance. With near-zero inference overhead and robustness to complex prompts, FairFlow provides a lightweight and practical bias mitigation for large-scale deployed MM-DiT systems. Code and datasets will be publicly released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多模态扩散Transformer（MM-DiT）存在系统性偏见问题，通过机制分析揭示偏见由少数语义绑定枢纽层分阶段传播，提出FairFlow方法在这些枢纽层注入公平方向向量，在不影响生成质量的前提下高效消除性别、种族等偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有偏见缓解方法主要针对U-Net架构设计，不适用于当前主流的MM-DiT架构，亟需针对MM-DiT的偏见缓解方案。
AI.method: 首先通过机制分析发现MM-DiT中偏见由稀疏的语义绑定枢纽层分阶段传播（早期建立模板、中期提取刻板概念、晚期固化偏见），提出FairFlow在这些枢纽层通过稀疏引导注入属性特定的公平方向向量。
AI.result: 在FLUX.1-dev和SD3上，FairFlow有效消除性别、种族及交叉偏见，在公平性与生成质量间达到最优平衡，推理开销近乎为零，且对复杂提示词具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FairFlow是一种轻量级、实用的大规模MM-DiT系统偏见缓解方法，可在部署系统中高效运行。

title: How Much is Left? LLMs Linearly Encode Their Remaining Output Length
summary: Large language models generate one token at a time, yet their responses show remarkably consistent length structure: step-by-step solutions converge in predictable token counts, retrievals stop after a few sentences, retractions extend responses by measurable amounts. We ask whether the model carries an internal estimate of how much response remains. Training minimal-capacity linear probes on frozen hidden states of three open-weight 7-8B models across seven completion-style datasets, we find three converging pieces of evidence. First, total response length is linearly decodable from the prompt's last hidden state alone, before any output is emitted. Second, probe directions trained on natural-language datasets transfer broadly, including to controlled synthetic completions never seen in training, outperforming a statistical baseline; the converse direction generally fails, and this asymmetry is itself informative. Third, on curated high-loss completions, the probe's per-position estimate shifts upward at the moment the model retracts and restarts a partial solution, a directional behavior no position-only predictor can reproduce (qualitative, not aggregate). We frame this as approximate estimation of remaining generation length, distinct from exact-counting impossibility results for transformers, and interpret it as evidence that LLMs maintain a plan-like internal representation of output length (decodable, not necessarily used causally).

AI.tldr: 研究发现LLM在生成前就能通过隐藏状态线性解码出响应总长度，该估计具有跨数据集迁移能力，并在模型修正输出时发生方向性偏移，表明模型内部存在可解码的输出长度规划表征。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM是否在内部维持一个关于剩余生成长度的估计（即"计划"），尽管Transformer理论上无法精确计数，但模型可能具备近似长度感知能力。
AI.method: 在三个7-8B开源模型的冻结隐藏状态上训练最小容量线性探针，使用七个完成型数据集，进行跨数据集迁移实验和高质量损失样本上的定向分析。
AI.result: 1) 响应总长度可从提示词最后隐藏状态线性解码；2) 探针方向可跨数据集迁移（自然→合成），反向迁移失败；3) 在模型撤回并重写部分解时，探针估计发生方向性上移，非位置预测器无法复现。
AI.conclusion: LLM内部存在可解码的输出长度近似估计（非精确计数），这暗示模型维持了一种类似"计划"的生成长度内部表征。

title: CDCP: Conditional Diffusion Model with Contextual Prompts for Multi-task Offline Safe Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multi-task offline safe reinforcement learning (RL) promises to learn a shared optimal safe policy from offline data across multiple tasks. This paradigm provides an effective means for the widespread application of RL in multi-task scenarios with high risk and interaction costs. However, the triple challenges of multi-tasking, safety constraints, and out-of-distribution (OOD) actions pose a significant hurdle for existing methods to ensure safety while maximizing reward returns. In this work, we propose a Conditional Diffusion model with Contextual Prompts (CDCP) to address these challenges. Concretely, we first rethink the requirements and challenges in current multi-task decision-making and control scenarios and establish the objectives of multi-task offline safe RL. Subsequently, we transform the multi-task constrained optimization problem into a conditional generation problem using the diffusion model. Based on this, we design a classifier-free guided cost-constraint strategy to provide flexible cost constraints and eliminate extrapolation errors from OOD actions via supervised learning. Additionally, we introduce a novel contextual prompting method to enhance multi-task representation accuracy and adaptability to unseen tasks. A gradient loss synchronization strategy is also introduced to eliminate gradient interference, improving training stability. Finally, extensive experiments demonstrate that the CDCP algorithm exhibits higher performance and safety in multi-task scenarios than the current state-of-the-art baseline methods. It meets different cost constraints without further training, providing a more flexible cost-constraint solution for the multi-task safe RL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出条件扩散模型与上下文提示（CDCP），通过将多任务离线安全强化学习转化为条件生成问题，利用无分类器引导的成本约束策略、上下文提示方法和梯度损失同步策略，解决多任务、安全约束和OOD动作三大挑战，实验表明其优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 多任务离线安全强化学习面临多任务性、安全约束和分布外动作的三重挑战，现有方法难以在保证安全的同时最大化奖励回报。
AI.method: 1) 将多任务约束优化问题转化为扩散模型的条件生成问题；2) 无分类器引导的成本约束策略，通过监督学习消除OOD动作的外推误差；3) 上下文提示方法增强多任务表示准确性和对未见过任务的适应性；4) 梯度损失同步策略消除梯度干扰，提升训练稳定性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，CDCP算法在多任务场景下比当前最先进的基线方法具有更高的性能和安全性，无需进一步训练即可满足不同的成本约束。
AI.conclusion: CDCP为多任务安全强化学习提供了一种更灵活的成本约束解决方案，有效解决了多任务、安全约束和OOD动作的三重挑战。

title: BVS: Bayesian Visual Search with Multimodal Large Language Model for Fine-grained Perception
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. Project page with code: https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/BVS_ICML2026
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate impressive general capabilities, they struggle with fine-grained perception in ultra-high-resolution (UHR) images, particularly for tiny objects in cluttered scenes. Existing methods face a dilemma: they either rely on inefficient prior-free scanning, or depend on static prior-driven heuristics that lack posterior correction to rectify initial model biases. To address this, we propose BVS (Bayesian Visual Search), a framework that formulates perception as a global optimization problem over a continuous spatial-scale manifold. Specifically, BVS bridges prior guidance with posterior correction: it utilizes an early-stop attention rollout of MLLM to construct reasoning-aware priors, while employing a scale-aware non-stationary kernel and GP-UCB to dynamically rectify noise and recover missing information in the prior through iterative local observations. We provide theoretical guarantees via sub-linear regret bounds, and extensive experiments demonstrate that BVS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with a superior trade-off between accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出BVS（贝叶斯视觉搜索）框架，将超高分辨率图像中的细粒度感知建模为连续空间-尺度流形上的全局优化问题，通过贝叶斯优化实现先验引导与后验校正的动态平衡，在精度与效率间取得更优权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在处理超高分辨率图像中的小目标时存在困境：要么依赖低效的无先验扫描，要么依赖静态先验驱动的启发式方法，缺乏后验校正来修正初始模型偏差。
AI.method: 提出BVS框架：1) 利用MLLM的早期停止注意力构建推理感知先验；2) 采用尺度感知非平稳核与GP-UCB动态校正噪声、恢复先验中缺失信息；3) 通过迭代局部观测实现全局优化。
AI.result: 提供了次线性遗憾界的理论保证，实验表明BVS显著优于最先进基线，在准确性与效率之间实现了更优权衡。
AI.conclusion: 将视觉感知形式化为贝叶斯优化问题，通过先验引导与后验校正的桥接，有效解决了超高分辨率图像中微小目标的精细感知难题。

title: Faithfulness to Refusal: A Causal Audit of Neuron Selectors
summary: Attribution scores increasingly identify which neuron rows of a language model matter for applications such as pruning, interpretability, and editing for safety, yet whether they identify causally important rows is rarely tested directly. We address this with two paired audits built on one-shot neuron-row zeroing. We first audit selectors at the language-modeling level: attribution methods substantially outperform activation and magnitude-based baselines at identifying dispensable rows across five LLMs. We then adapt the same intervention into a behavior test by driving it with a contrastive harmful-versus-benign signal; the attributed rows are sufficient to install refusal on hate and crime while keeping benign over-refusal low and preserving language model fluency, and specific in that layer-matched random controls at the same depths fail. Highly rank-stable selectors can be among the least causally valid. Refusal moreover lives in a redundant subspace, where different attribution methods install it through largely disjoint row sets, so the recovered edit is one realization of a sufficient set rather than a unique mechanism. Together, these findings show that rank-stability proxies miss the kinds of selector failures a direct causal audit can surface.%

AI.tldr: 本文通过直接因果审计方法验证了注意力分数在识别语言模型重要神经元行方面的有效性，发现其优于激活值和幅度基线，但稳定性高的选择器可能因果有效性低，且拒绝行为存在于冗余子空间中。
AI.motivation: 尽管注意力分数被广泛用于剪枝、可解释性和安全编辑等任务，但它们是否能识别出因果上重要的神经元行很少被直接测试。作者希望填补这一验证缺口。
AI.method: 采用单次神经元行归零干预，在语言建模层面和行为测试层面进行配对审计。行为测试中引入有害vs良性对比信号来安装拒绝机制，并比较不同归因方法的效果。
AI.result: 归因方法在识别可丢弃行方面显著优于激活值和幅度基线；归因行足以安装拒绝机制且保持流畅性，而随机控制失败；高排名稳定性的选择器因果有效性可能最低；拒绝行为存在于冗余子空间中，不同方法通过不重叠的行集实现。
AI.conclusion: 排名稳定性代理指标无法捕捉直接因果审计才能发现的失效模式，直接因果审计对于验证归因方法至关重要。

title: Transformers with Physics-Informed Encodings and Simulation-Based Inference for Robust Detection of Eccentric Binary Black Holes in Pulsar Timing Array Data
summary: Pulsar timing arrays (PTAs) provide a unique window into nanohertz gravitational waves (GWs), but extracting astrophysical parameters from noisy, long-baseline timing residuals remains computationally challenging with traditional Bayesian techniques due to the high dimensionality of the parameter space, complex and correlated noise models, and the cost of repeated likelihood evaluations. We introduce a Transformer with a physics-informed positional-encoding framework for the efficient inference of eccentric binary black holes in relativistic orbits from PTA data. Our approach embeds analytical GW phase evolution directly into the model through structured positional encodings, enabling the network to learn physically meaningful representations from raw PTA timing residuals. We then use generative models, including discrete and continuous conditional normalizing flows, to infer posterior distributions within a simulation-based inference framework. Across a range of signal-to-noise ratios, the proposed method achieves improved accuracy, sharper posteriors, and faster inference compared to physics-agnostic baselines. While presented for deterministic white-noise signals, the modular framework readily generalizes to realistic PTA analyses incorporating red noise and additional components. This work highlights the potential of physics-aware deep learning models as scalable alternatives to conventional inference pipelines for next-generation PTA datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合物理信息位置编码的Transformer框架，用于从脉冲星计时阵列数据中高效推断偏心双黑洞参数，并利用条件归一化流进行仿真推演，相比传统方法在精度、后验锐度和速度上均有提升。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯方法在处理PTA数据时面临高维参数空间、复杂噪声模型和大量似然计算的高昂成本，亟需一种更高效的替代方案进行毫赫兹引力波参数推断。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构，通过物理信息位置编码将引力波相位演化嵌入模型中，再结合离散/连续条件归一化流进行基于仿真推演的贝叶斯后验推断。
AI.result: 在不同信噪比下，该方法相比无物理先验的基线模型取得了更高的推断精度、更尖锐的后验分布以及更快的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 该物理感知的深度学习框架有望成为下一代PTA数据集处理中可扩展的替代方案，且模块化设计易于推广到含红噪声等更真实场景。

title: Seeing Through WiFi: Lightweight Human Pose Estimation with Dynamic Kernel Attention
comment: Submitted for possible publication (13 pages, 7 tables, 11 figures)
summary: WiFi-based human pose estimation (HPE) enables the detection and interpretation of human body positions and movements without the need for wearable devices while preserving individual privacy concerns. Implementing this solution requires enhancing model performance and maintaining efficiency, especially on resource-constrained devices. This paper introduces a novel framework, WiLHPE, for lightweight and efficient human pose estimation using WiFi CSI signals. Empowered by a camera-based model during training, WiLHPE processes raw WiFi signals directly to estimate human poses in the testing phase. It employs a novel neural network architecture to dynamically learn convolutional kernels and apply attention mechanisms across channel and frequency spaces. This innovative method diversifies the kernels to improve the recognition capabilities of WiFi signals without adding complexity, ensuring efficiency. Additionally, the Tree-Structured Parzen Estimator algorithm is employed to optimize the critical hyperparameters of the neural network efficiently, minimizing the time required for optimal hyperparameter search compared to heuristic methods. Results from experiments on both the MM-Fi and WiPose datasets highlight the superiority of WiLHPE over state-of-the-art approaches, achieving 85.96% and 94.27% at PCK50, respectively, with minimal computational overhead. Notably, WiLHPE performs impressively even under challenging conditions, maintaining around 80% at PCK50 under AWGN noise with an error variance of 0.5.

AI.tldr: WiLHPE是一个利用WiFi CSI信号进行轻量级高效人体姿态估计的框架，通过动态卷积核和注意力机制，结合TPE超参数优化，在MM-Fi和WiPose数据集上分别达到85.96%和94.27%的PCK50，且计算开销极小。
AI.motivation: 现有WiFi-based HPE方法面临模型性能与资源受限设备效率之间的矛盾，需要一种既能保持高精度又轻量高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出WiLHPE框架：(1) 训练阶段借助相机模型辅助，测试阶段直接处理原始WiFi CSI信号；(2) 设计新型神经网络架构，动态学习卷积核并在通道和频率空间应用注意力机制；(3) 使用Tree-Structured Parzen Estimator (TPE)算法优化关键超参数。
AI.result: 在MM-Fi数据集上PCK50达到85.96%，在WiPose数据集上达到94.27%；在AWGN噪声（误差方差0.5）下仍保持约80%的PCK50，计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: WiLHPE在保证高精度和鲁棒性的同时实现了轻量化，适用于资源受限设备上的WiFi人体姿态估计任务。

title: REDDIT: Correcting Model-Generated Timestamp Drift in ASR without Forgetting via Replay-Based Distribution Editing
summary: Modern autoregressive ASR systems can emit timestamps as decoded tokens, enabling timestamped transcription without frame-level aligners or inference-time post-processing. We show that these generated timestamps can drift across long non-speech spans: the transcript may remain plausible, but the decoded time axis drifts away from the audio. We study this non-speech-induced timestamp drift with self-built gap and long-gap benchmarks across 15 evaluated timestamp-producing ASR and audio-language systems. Naive timestamp-corrected fine-tuning improves alignment but can severely degrade non-target ASR behavior, exposing a forgetting problem. We propose REDDIT(REplay-based Distribution eDITing), a lightweight two-stage post-training framework that corrects timestamps while avoiding this catastrophic forgetting: it first edits timestamp targets under the model's own replayed decoder context while matching the frozen base distribution on non-timestamp tokens, then applies a short edited-prefix refinement stage. In this framework, we construct correction supervision without human transcripts or human timestamp annotations by combining VAD-trimmed speech spans with inserted non-speech gaps and known concatenation offsets. On Whisper-tiny, 34.9 hours of targeted correction audio used and only 1.6% of model parameters updated, raising long-gap mIoU from 38.7% to 95.0% and reducing mixed-gap out-of-domain AAS from 2752 ms to 223 ms while preserving CV-en MER at 41.3% (versus 524.2% for ordinary SFT decoder tuning).

AI.tldr: 提出REDDIT框架，通过两阶段后训练纠正ASR系统在长时间非语音段产生的漂移时间戳，仅更新1.6%参数、使用34.9小时数据，将长间隔mIoU从38.7%提升至95.0%，同时避免灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现代自回归ASR系统在解码时生成时间戳，但在长非语音段中时间轴会漂移，导致转录看似合理但时间戳偏离音频实际位置。
AI.method: REDDIT（基于重放的分布编辑）：两阶段后训练框架。第一阶段在模型自身重放解码器上下文下编辑时间戳目标，同时冻结非时间戳token的分布；第二阶段进行编辑前缀微调。通过VAD裁剪语音段、插入非语音间隙和已知拼接偏移构建监督数据，无需人工标注。
AI.result: Whisper-tiny上，34.9小时校正音频，更新1.6%参数，长间隔mIoU从38.7%提升至95.0%，混合间隔域外AAS从2752ms降至223ms，CV-en MER保持41.3%（普通SFT为524.2%）。
AI.conclusion: REDDIT能有效纠正非语音段时间戳漂移，同时避免灾难性遗忘，是一种轻量级、无需人工标注的校正方案。

title: NeuroOnline: Bridging Pretraining and Online Adaptation for EEG Foundation Models
summary: EEG foundation models have shown strong potential in learning generalized representations across subjects and tasks. However, most existing approaches follow a pretraining-static deployment paradigm, which suffers from two key limitations: (1) misalignment between pretraining objectives and downstream tasks, and (2) limited adaptability to distribution shifts in online settings. We propose Online Neural Adaptation (NeuroOnline), a unified framework that enables continuous adaptation in online scenarios. NeuroOnline integrates two complementary mechanisms: (1) multi-view consistency learning, which enforces cross-view alignment to promote consistent and task-relevant representations, and (2) context-aware representation modulation, which leverages a learnable context prompt with cross-attention to dynamically adapt representations to evolving data distributions. Together, these mechanisms unify representation alignment and dynamic adaptation. Experiments on multiple EEG benchmarks show that NeuroOnline consistently outperforms strong baselines in online settings, achieving better performance under distribution shifts. Ablation and sensitivity studies further validate the necessity of each component and the effectiveness of the overall design.

AI.tldr: 提出NeuroOnline框架，通过多视图一致性学习和上下文感知表征调制，实现EEG基础模型在在线场景下的连续自适应，解决预训练-静态部署范式的两大局限。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型采用预训练-静态部署范式，存在预训练目标与下游任务不一致、在线场景下对分布漂移适应性差两大问题。
AI.method: 提出NeuroOnline框架，包含两个互补机制：(1)多视图一致性学习，通过跨视图对齐促进一致且任务相关的表征；(2)上下文感知表征调制，利用可学习上下文提示与交叉注意力机制动态适应演化数据分布。
AI.result: 在多个EEG基准上，NeuroOnline在在线设置下始终优于强基线，在分布漂移场景下表现更佳。消融和敏感性实验验证了各组件的必要性和整体设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: NeuroOnline通过统一表征对齐与动态适应，有效解决了EEG基础模型在线部署中的两大局限，为在线EEG分析提供了新范式。

title: Fast 3D Foundation Model Initialized Gaussian Splatting
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Accepted at ICECET 2026
summary: This paper introduces a fast method for high-quality 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) reconstruction without traditional Structure-from-Motion (SfM). The proposed approach leverages 3D Foundation Models (3DFMs) for camera pose and point-cloud initialization, then jointly optimizes both camera poses and Gaussian primitives using a depth-guided loss function. This enables fast convergence even from rough initialization with as few as 50-60 input views. To further improve reconstruction quality in sparse-view scenarios, an MLP-based pose refinement module is introduced alongside depth-guided supervision from the foundation model. Extensive experiments on Mip-NeRF 360, Tanks and Temples, and RobustNeRF demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive reconstruction quality (23.61 dB PSNR, 0.19 LPIPS) while reducing training time to approximately three minutes per scene. The proposed method produces ready-to-use 3DGS models at a fraction of the time required by existing pipelines, making it suitable for near real-time applications in robotics, VR, and autonomous navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需传统SfM的快速3DGS重建方法，利用3D基础模型初始化相机位姿和点云，通过深度引导损失联合优化，在约50-60张输入视图下三分钟内完成高质量重建（23.61 dB PSNR, 0.19 LPIPS）。
AI.motivation: 传统3DGS依赖于SfM进行初始化，耗时长且在稀疏视图下鲁棒性差，难以满足近实时应用需求。作者希望消除SfM瓶颈，实现快速、高质量且支持稀疏视图的3DGS重建。
AI.method: 1) 利用3D基础模型(3DFMs)进行相机位姿和点云初始化；2) 引入深度引导损失函数联合优化相机位姿和高斯基元；3) 在稀疏视图场景下加入MLP位姿精炼模块，结合基础模型的深度引导监督实现快速收敛。
AI.result: 在Mip-NeRF 360、Tanks and Temples和RobustNeRF数据集上达到23.61 dB PSNR、0.19 LPIPS，训练时间约3分钟/场景，仅需50-60张输入视图。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持与现有3DGS管线相当的重建质量的同时，将训练时间降低到分钟级，适用于机器人、VR和自主导航等近实时应用场景。

title: SPEARBench: A Benchmark for Naturalness Evaluation in Streaming Speech-to-Speech Language Models
summary: Streaming speech-to-speech language models aim to answer spoken queries directly with synthetic speech. However, standard speech and text benchmarks do not capture whether these systems behave naturally in conversations, where timing, turn-taking, prosody, interpersonal stance, language and dialect consistency, and relationship-aware appropriateness jointly shape perceived quality. We introduce SPEARBench, a benchmark for evaluating naturalness in speech-to-speech language models from question-answer interactions. SPEARBench constructs controlled dialogue prompts from the Seamless Interaction corpus, runs inference across multiple models, and evaluates generated answers using a multidimensional protocol that covers response latency, interruptions, speech quality, ASR robustness, language and dialect consistency, emotional naturalness, interpersonal stance, and explainable distributional baselines. The benchmark includes original human answers as a reference condition and reports results for several contemporary models. Results show that current models can achieve high signal-level quality and low ASR error while still differing from human conversational behavior in latency, overlap, dialect preservation, emotional adaptation, and interpersonal stance dynamics.

AI.tldr: 提出了SPEARBench基准，用于评估语音到语音语言模型在对话中的自然性，涵盖延迟、打断、语音质量、方言一致性、情感自然性等多维度指标。实验发现当前模型虽信号质量高，但在对话行为（如延迟、方言保持、情感适应）上与人类仍有差距。
AI.motivation: 现有的语音和文本基准无法评估语音对话系统在真实对话中的自然性（如时机、话轮转换、韵律、人际立场、语言一致性等），因此需要专门的自然性评估基准。
AI.method: 从Seamless Interaction语料库构建受控对话提示，对多个模型进行推理，并使用包含响应延迟、打断、语音质量、ASR鲁棒性、语言/方言一致性、情感自然性、人际立场等多维度的评估协议，同时引入可解释的分布基线。
AI.result: 当前模型在信号质量和低ASR错误方面表现良好，但在延迟、话轮重叠、方言保持、情感适应和人际立场动态方面与人类对话行为存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 现有语音对话模型在表面信号质量上接近人类水平，但在深层的对话自然性特征（如时机、方言、情感、人际立场）上仍需改进，SPEARBench为这类评估提供了有效框架。

title: MPSelectTune: Prompt-type Selection for Fine-tuning improves Concept Unlearning in LLMs
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2025 - Reliable ML Workshop (https://openreview.net/forum?id=Jk8sOL97Tg#discussion)
summary: LLMs can be conveniently adapted to a diverse set of tasks, e.g, prediction, question-answering tasks, etc, using appropriate prompts with few-shot examples. Biased or harmful concepts, e.g. gender or bio-weapons, present in pre-trained LLMs can lead to unsafe or unethical responses for many such prompts. Removing such undesirable concepts robustly across different prompt types remains a challenging problem, since existing unlearning methods typically ignore the impact of prompt variation. In this paper, we explore a novel adversarial approach to use a joint prompt for the main task and concept task prediction. We show that fine-tuning using the ``worst prompt type'' for concept prediction (with the highest concept accuracy) improves the average unlearning performance over a fine-tuning method that uses a combination of all prompt types. Our proposed method, MPSelectTune, is a two-stage approach that minimizes the concept accuracy of the highest accuracy-prompt type, after fine-tuning using a novel multi-task loss using multiple prompt types. Experimental results on four benchmarks show $2 - 15\%$ main task accuracy improvements over recent baselines and while reducing the worst-case concept accuracy by up to $17\%$ compared to recent baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MPSelectTune方法，通过对抗性联合提示和两阶段微调策略，在保持主任务性能的同时更有效地消除LLM中的有害概念，相比现有方法在主任务准确率上提升2-15%，最坏情况概念准确率降低高达17%。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM概念遗忘方法忽略了提示变化对消除效果的影响，导致在不同提示类型下难以鲁棒地移除不良概念（如性别偏见、生物武器等有害知识）。
AI.method: 提出MPSelectTune两阶段方法：(1) 使用"最差提示类型"（概念准确率最高的提示类型）进行对抗性联合提示微调；(2) 采用多任务损失函数，在利用多种提示类型微调后，最小化准确率最高的提示类型的概念准确率。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试上，主任务准确率相比近期基线方法提升2-15%，最坏情况下的概念准确率降低高达17%。
AI.conclusion: 关注提示变异性对于鲁棒概念遗忘至关重要，所提出的对抗性多提示类型选择微调方法能有效平衡主任务性能与概念消除效果。

title: OpenGlass: A Sensing-Computing Split Architecture for Local MLLM-Driven Real-Time Visual Assistance
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 System Demonstrations. 11 pages, 5 figures, 8 tables
summary: We present OpenGlass, an open-source, privacy-oriented, local-first system for low-latency multimodal visual assistance, with a primary focus on blind and low-vision users. Cloud MLLM assistants offer strong visual understanding, but often require uploading first-person visual data and can suffer multi-second network delays; wearable glasses are ideal for sensing, but cannot host large models under tight compute and power budgets. OpenGlass addresses this gap with a sensing-computing split: an ESP32-based glasses-side unit captures visual context, while a nearby consumer-grade device performs local MLLM inference and local speech output, reducing cloud reliance and keeping raw egocentric visual data on user-controlled devices by default. We evaluate response quality, query-ready-to-audio latency, safety-aware abstention, and auditable logs. Under real ESP32 Wi-Fi capture, OpenGlass reaches 993 ms median user-to-audio latency with resized payloads and 1625 ms with raw 1280 x 720 payloads; 97.5% and 93.3% of trials fall below 2 s, respectively. OpenGlass is a user-initiated visual-assistance reference platform for obstacle/hazard awareness, sign/object queries, and image-quality self-checking, rather than a certified navigation aid. We release source code, hardware instructions, prompts, evaluation data, and logs.

AI.tldr: OpenGlass是一个面向盲人和低视力用户的开源、隐私优先、本地优先的低延迟多模态视觉辅助系统。它采用ESP32眼镜端+本地消费级设备的分体架构，实现边缘MLLM推理，中位用户到音频延迟低至993ms，97.5%的试次低于2秒，并支持安全感知的拒答和可审计日志。
AI.motivation: 现有云端MLLM助手虽然视觉理解能力强，但需要上传第一人称视觉数据（隐私问题）且网络延迟多秒；可穿戴眼镜适合感知但无法承载大模型。OpenGlass旨在填补这一空白，实现隐私保护下的低延迟视觉辅助。
AI.method: 采用感知-计算分离架构：ESP32芯片的眼镜端负责视觉上下文捕获，近端消费级设备（如手机/笔记本）执行本地MLLM推理和语音输出，默认不上传原始自我中心视觉数据到云端。
AI.result: 在真实ESP32 Wi-Fi捕获条件下，压缩载荷中位用户到音频延迟993ms，原始1280x720载荷为1625ms；分别有97.5%和93.3%的试次低于2秒。支持障碍物/危险感知、标志/物体查询、图像质量自检等功能。
AI.conclusion: OpenGlass是一个用户发起的视觉辅助参考平台，而非经过认证的导航辅助设备。系统已开源，包含源代码、硬件指令、提示词、评估数据和日志。

title: When Should Service Agents Reconsider? Difficulty-Routed Control in Customer-Service Operations
summary: Autonomous customer-service agents are shifting from conversational interfaces toward operational execution roles: they retrieve firm records, apply service policies, and execute backend writes such as refunds, cancellations, exchanges, order modifications, and reservation changes. This shift creates a service-control problem: firms must keep routine service fast and low-friction while preventing operational errors on requests where customer instructions, policy constraints, firm records, and backend writes interact. We propose a difficulty-routed service-control architecture that asks when service agents should reconsider before acting. A lightweight router keeps routine sessions on a low-cost baseline path and routes operationally coupled sessions to an escalated workflow. The escalated path uses conflict-aware communication and write-triggered reconsideration to concentrate deliberation and safeguards before consequential backend writes, rather than applying additional control uniformly across all service sessions. We evaluate the architecture on human-verified retail and airline tasks from $τ^{2}$-bench. In retail, the method improves reliability consistently on service requests with operational conflict. Routing evidence shows that stronger control is directed toward conflicted requests rather than broadly applied to routine ones. Dialogue and tool-use profiles suggest that gains do not come from indiscriminate interaction expansion or broader tool chains; instead, added turns and tool calls support evidence gathering, write separation, and pre-write reconsideration. Case-level evidence shows that the escalated workflow preserves fallback plans, binds retrieved records to the correct action, sequences writes, and decomposes multi-entity requests. Airline results extend the same service-control logic to reservation operations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于难度路由的服务控制架构，通过轻量路由器将常规会话保持在低成本基线路径，而将有操作耦合风险的会话路由到升级工作流中，该工作流利用冲突感知通信和写前重新审议来在关键后端写操作前集中检查和保障措施，从而在保持常规服务快速低摩擦的同时防止操作错误。在零售和航空任务上的评估表明，该方法能可靠地提高存在操作冲突的服务请求的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 自主客服代理正从对话界面转向操作执行角色（如退款、取消、订单修改等），这带来了服务控制问题：既要保持常规服务快速低摩擦，又要防止操作错误。现有方法对所有服务会话统一应用控制，效率低下。
AI.method: 提出难度路由服务控制架构：(1) 轻量路由器将常规会话保持在低成本基线路径；(2) 操作耦合的会话路由到升级工作流；(3) 升级路径使用冲突感知通信和写前重新审议，在关键后端写操作前集中检查和保障。
AI.result: 在零售和航空任务上评估。零售任务中，该方法能可靠地提高存在操作冲突的服务请求的可靠性。路由证据显示更强的控制被定向到冲突请求而非常规请求。对话和工具使用特征表明增益来自证据收集、写分离和写前重新审议，而非随意扩展交互。在航空任务中，相同的服务控制逻辑也适用于预订操作。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种有区分度的服务控制架构，能在常规请求上保持高效率，同时在存在操作风险时提供必要的安全保障，实验证明该方法有效且泛化到航空领域。

title: Order-based Causal Discovery for Multistage Processes
