Its unique optimizer is therefore the conditional expectation of the true reverse jump rate given the current noisy state, and its irreducible cost is the rate at which the forward process $Z_t$ destroys information about the clean data $Z_0$, $-\tfrac{d}{dt}I(Z_0; Z_t)$, so every noising process shares the same best achievable negative ELBO: the data entropy. For sequences with token-factorizing noise, the oracle projection yields three exact coordinates for the optimizer: denoiser, cavity (bridge plug-in), and score, with closed-form conversions among them. This framework identifies which law each loss in the literature actually optimizes, recovering MDM, UDM, SEDD, and GIDD as special cases; explains why denoiser and cavity coincide for masked diffusion but not for uniform diffusion; proves that a denoiser parameterization makes the uniform ELBO diverge at initialization while the bridge plug-in stays finite; and calibrates ELBO implementations exactly at initialization. Every identity is verified numerically, without approximation, on an exactly solvable model.

AI.tldr: 本文严格证明了离散扩散模型的负ELBO等于数据熵加上与Oracle反向过程的路径KL散度，其唯一优化器是真正的反向跳跃率的条件期望，而最小可达负ELBO即为数据熵。文章推导了优化器的三种等价坐标形式（去噪器、桥接预测器、分数），并揭示了现有方法（MDM、UDM、SEDD、GIDD）实际上优化的是哪个损失函数。
AI.motivation: 离散扩散模型中神经网络究竟在学习什么？现有方法对同一对象在不同坐标下的表达存在混淆，导致训练和采样过程不一致。作者希望通过严格的数学推导，澄清离散扩散模型的损失函数与优化目标之间的精确关系。
AI.method: 从连续时间马尔可夫链（CTMC）ELBO的严格推导出发（包含边界项），证明Oracle Distance定理：负ELBO精确等于数据熵加上学习过程与Oracle反向过程的路径KL散度。通过条件期望推导唯一优化器，并针对token因子化噪声给出三种精确坐标形式（去噪器、桥接预测器、分数）及其闭式转换关系。
AI.result: 1) 负ELBO = 数据熵 + 路径KL（不仅是下界）；2) 最优负ELBO = 数据熵；3) 优化器有三种等价坐标形式，可相互转换；4) 去噪器和桥接预测器在掩码扩散中一致，在均匀扩散中不一致；5) 去噪器参数化下均匀ELBO在初始化时发散，而桥接预测器保持有限；6) 可在初始化时精确校准ELBO实现。
AI.conclusion: 离散扩散模型的学习对象（去噪器/分数/桥接预测器）本质上是同一对象在不同坐标下的表达。该框架统一了现有多种方法，解释了它们之间的差异来源（如掩码vs均匀扩散），并为ELBO的精确实现提供了理论基础。

title: One Framework for All: Cross-Modal Membership Inference for Generative Models
summary: Large generative models across text-to-text, text-to-image, and image-to-text modalities have been shown to pose significant privacy risks. One fundamental threat is membership inference attacks (MIA), which aim to determine whether a given data point was used in a model's training set. Although prior work has investigated MIAs against these three classes of generative models, existing approaches treat them in isolation and are not cross-applicable, thereby limiting their real-world utility. To address this limitation, we present the first comprehensive study of a unified membership inference framework that applies across text-to-text, text-to-image, and image-to-text modalities. Our approach is grounded in a key modality-agnostic observation: the output distribution of a generative model can approximate its training data distribution. Leveraging this property, we model the distributions of model-generated outputs and auxiliary non-member samples in a shared embedding space, and perform membership inference via likelihood ratio testing. We conduct extensive experiments in a strict black-box setting under both partial-knowledge and zero-knowledge threat models, and evaluate membership inference against both fine-tuning and pre-training data. Experimental results demonstrate our approach's superior performance in comparison to existing state-of-the-art methods, which are typically optimized for a single model class.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出跨文本到文本、文本到图像、图像到文本三种模态的统一成员推理攻击框架，利用生成模型输出分布近似训练数据分布的特性，在共享嵌入空间通过似然比检验实现成员推断，在严格黑盒设置下优于现有单模态优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有成员推理攻击针对不同模态的生成模型（文本-文本、文本-图像、图像-文本）分别设计，方法互不通用，限制了实际应用中的可迁移性和实用性。本文旨在填补这一空白，提出跨模态统一的成员推理框架。
AI.method: 基于模态无关的关键观察：生成模型的输出分布可以近似其训练数据分布。通过将模型生成输出和辅助非成员样本投影到共享嵌入空间，利用似然比检验进行成员推断。实验在严格黑盒设置下进行，涵盖部分知识和零知识两种威胁模型，并评估了对微调和预训练数据的成员推理效果。
AI.result: 在文本到文本、文本到图像、图像到文本三种模态下，所提统一框架相比现有单模态优化方法取得了更优的性能，证明了跨模态统一方法的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态统一成员推理攻击是可行且有效的，该方法突破了现有方法模态隔离的限制，为生成模型的隐私风险评估提供了更通用的工具。

title: Moonstone: A Multimodal Foundation Model and Benchmark for Lunar Remote Sensing
summary: Decades of orbital missions have produced multi-modal remote sensing data for the Moon, spanning optical imagery, spectroscopy, thermal emission, radar, gravity, and elemental composition. Yet these datasets remain fragmented across archives, and no benchmark exists for evaluating machine learning on lunar data. We introduce Moonstone, the first multi-modal foundation model benchmark for lunar remote sensing. Our contributions are: (1) a 28-channel, 128 pixels-per-degree (~237 m) global lunar pretraining dataset from seven instrument families across five missions, (2) MG-MAE, a modality-grouped masked autoencoder with per-group convolutional tokenizers, a shared Vision Transformer encoder, attention masking for missing modalities, coverage-adaptive masking for heterogeneous spatial coverage, and spectral continuity regularization for physically plausible reconstructions, and (3) a benchmark of six downstream tasks covering classification, regression, and segmentation. MG-MAE pretrained features outperform scratch baselines on all tasks and surpass both ImageNet-pretrained and vanilla MAE baselines by large margins. Data and code are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ayushprd/Moonstone and https://github.com/ayushprd/Moonstone .

AI.tldr: 本文提出Moonstone，首个月球遥感多模态基础模型基准，包含28通道全球预训练数据集、MG-MAE自编码器以及六项下游任务基准。MG-MAE在多任务上显著超越基线模型。
AI.motivation: 月球轨道任务积累了多模态遥感数据，但这些数据集分散在不同档案中，缺乏统一的机器学习评估基准，阻碍了多模态月球数据的研究进展。
AI.method: 构建28通道、128像素/度全球月球预训练数据集；提出MG-MAE（模态分组掩码自编码器），包含逐组卷积分词器、共享ViT编码器、缺失模态注意力掩码、覆盖自适应掩码和光谱连续性正则化。
AI.result: MG-MAE预训练特征在所有六项下游任务上超越从头训练基线，且大幅优于ImageNet预训练和普通MAE基线。
AI.conclusion: Moonstone为月球遥感多模态学习提供了首个标准化基准，MG-MAE展示了多模态预训练在行星科学中的巨大潜力。

title: How Many Initial Points Does Bayesian Optimization Need?
comment: 4 pages. Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Decision-Making from Offline Datasets to Online Adaptation
summary: Bayesian Optimization (BO) generally begins with an initialization phase: a batch of $n_0$ uninformed evaluations. The choice of $n_0$ remains largely heuristic, and we empirically observe that the total cost (random initial points plus BO iterations needed to find the global optimum) is U-shaped in $n_0$, i.e., a practitioner wastes resources by selecting either too low or too high a value of $n_0$. We find this tradeoff persists across MLE, Bayesian MCMC, and exact GP hyperparameters, as well as across acquisition functions. Toward the latter, Thompson Sampling appears an exception, with both total cost and simple regret essentially $n_0$-agnostic, though higher in our experiments. We attribute this U-shape to the known boundary issue of variance-driven BO: BO burns early budget on corners of the hypercube before turning inward. We demonstrate this effect using a 3D BO trajectory where the exact hyperparameters are known. We conclude with practical recommendations: use multi-step lookahead BO where possible; otherwise use Thompson Sampling when $n_0$ cannot be tuned, and a generously large $n_0$ when it can.

AI.tldr: 本文发现贝叶斯优化的初始化样本数n0与总成本呈U型关系（过少或过多都会浪费资源），Thompson Sampling虽对n0不敏感但性能较低，最终建议在无法调优n0时使用Thompson Sampling，否则使用较大的n0或多步前瞻BO。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯优化中初始化样本数n0的选择长期依赖启发式方法，缺乏理论指导，且实践中发现n0过小或过大会浪费资源，因此需要系统研究n0的影响并提出实用建议。
AI.method: 通过大量实验对比不同n0取值下的总成本（随机初始点+BO迭代次数），考察MLE、贝叶斯MCMC、精确GP超参数及多种采集函数，特别分析了Thompson Sampling的表现，并用3D BO轨迹可视化边界效应。
AI.result: n0与总成本呈U型关系（过低或过高均浪费资源），该现象在各超参数估计方法和采集函数中普遍存在；Thompson Sampling对n0不敏感但性能较差（总成本和简单遗憾均更高）。U型成因归因于基于方差的BO的边界问题：早期预算消耗在超立方体角落。
AI.conclusion: 推荐在可能时使用多步前瞻BO；若无法调优n0则使用Thompson Sampling；若能调优则使用足够大的n0。

title: Do Medical Vision Language Models Actually See? A Counterfactual Grounding Framework and Hard-Negative Contrastive Training for Visually-Reliant Medical VLMs
summary: Large vision language models (VLMs) report strong accuracy on medical question-answering, yet it remains unclear whether they reason from visual evidence or exploit textual shortcuts. We introduce a counterfactual evaluation framework that decouples visual and textual contributions by substituting input images with controlled surrogates blank, pixel-shuffled, image-absent, and CLIP-retrieved hard negatives and derive a suite of grounding metrics including the Visual Reliance Score (VRS) and Visual Hallucination Rate (VHR). We further introduce CORAL (COntrastive Retrieval-Augmented Learning), a 7B-parameter LoRA fine-tune of Qwen2.5-VL-7B trained with a Contrastive Grounding Objective (CGO) that penalises answer invariance under hard-negative image swaps. On a paired controlled evaluation across four closed-form medical VQA benchmarks (PathVQA, PMC-VQA, SLAKE, VQA-RAD; n=400 total), CORAL improves macro accuracy by +6.7 pp (P(Delta>0)=0.988) and reduces VHR by 8.0 pp (P<0.001) over the matched Qwen2.5-VL-7B base; neither MedVLThinker RL variant achieves a significant gain on either metric. Cross-domain diagnostics further reveal that image substitution costs only <=6.5 pp on medical benchmarks versus 48-61 pp on general-domain tasks, situating the grounding gap that CGO targets. We discuss evaluation limitations openly including train/eval benchmark overlap and underpowered secondary metrics and release our framework, training code, and model weights to support reproducible grounding audits of medical VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出反事实评估框架（含VRS、VHR指标）和CORAL模型（基于对比检索增强学习），系统检验医学VLM是否真正依赖视觉证据而非文本捷径。CORAL在四个医学VQA基准上提升准确率+6.7pp、降低视觉幻觉率8.0pp，而RL变体无显著改善。跨域诊断显示医学任务中图像替换代价仅≤6.5pp，远低于通用任务（48-61pp），揭示了视觉-文本贡献的失衡。
AI.motivation: 现有医学VLM报告高准确率，但无法判断其回答是基于视觉证据还是利用了文本捷径（如训练集统计偏差）。作者希望解耦视觉与文本贡献，量化模型的视觉依赖程度。
AI.method: 1）构建反事实评估框架：用空白、像素打乱、缺失图像、CLIP硬负样本替换原始图像；2）提出VRS和VHR两个量化指标；3）提出CORAL模型：基于Qwen2.5-VL-7B，采用对比基础目标函数（CGO）进行LoRA微调，惩罚硬负样本图像替换下的答案不变性。
AI.result: CORAL在四个医学VQA基准（n=400）上宏平均准确率提升+6.7pp（P(Δ>0)=0.988），VHR降低8.0pp（P<0.001）。MedVLThinker RL变体无显著增益。跨域诊断：医学任务图像替换代价≤6.5pp，通用任务为48-61pp。
AI.conclusion: 医学VLM存在显著的视觉-文本贡献失衡（视觉依赖不足），CORAL通过对比学习有效增强了视觉证据利用，减少幻觉。作者开放评估框架、训练代码和模型权重以支持可复现的医学VLM接地审计。

title: Weak-to-Strong Generalization via Direct On-Policy Distillation
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a powerful recipe for improving language-model reasoning, but it is expensive to repeat on every new strong model because the target model must generate many rollouts during training. As models scale, post-training itself becomes a bottleneck. We study a weak-to-strong alternative: run RL on a smaller model where rollouts are cheaper, then reuse what that RL run learned to improve a stronger target model. Directly distilling the post-RL weak teacher is not enough, because the teacher's final policy mixes useful RL gains with the limitations of the smaller model. We propose Direct On-Policy Distillation (Direct-OPD), which transfers the teacher's RL-induced policy shift instead. Direct-OPD compares the post-RL teacher with its own pre-RL reference and treats their log-ratio as a dense implicit reward for the student. In plain terms, the checkpoint pair tells us which actions RL made the weak model more or less likely to take, and Direct-OPD applies that signal on the stronger student's own on-policy states. This directly reuses the weak model's RL supervision signal without training an explicit reward model or running sparse-reward RL on the target model. Empirically, Direct-OPD consistently leverages weaker teachers to improve stronger target models; notably, it boosts Qwen3-1.7B from 48.3% to 62.4% on AIME 2024 in just 4 hours on 8 A100 GPUs. It outperforms step-matched direct RL and enables the sequential composition of multiple policy shifts. Our results show that RL outcomes can be reused across model scales as implicit reward signals, not merely as final models to imitate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Direct-OPD方法，通过将小模型RL训练产生的策略偏移（即RL前后模型的log-ratio）作为隐式奖励信号，直接用于蒸馏到强学生模型上，避免了对强模型进行昂贵的RL训练。实验表明，该方法能用弱模型提升强模型性能（如Qwen3-1.7B在AIME 2024上从48.3%提升至62.4%），且训练效率极高。
AI.motivation: RLVR虽然能显著提升语言模型推理能力，但每次迭代新模型都需要大量rollout，成本极高。作者希望探索一种"弱到强"（weak-to-strong）的替代方案：先用小模型做便宜的RL训练，然后将RL学到的知识迁移到大模型上，避免对大模型重复进行昂贵的RL训练。
AI.method: Direct-OPD的核心思想是：将小模型RL训练前后形成的一对checkpoint（pre-RL和post-RL）的log-ratio作为隐式奖励信号。这个信号代表了"RL让模型对哪些动作更倾向于或更不倾向于选择"。然后将这个信号应用到强学生模型自己的on-policy状态上，进行蒸馏训练。不需要训练显式的奖励模型，也不需要让强模型做稀疏奖励的RL。
AI.result: Direct-OPD consistently leverages weaker teachers to improve stronger target models; notably, it boosts Qwen3-1.7B from 48.3% to 62.4% on AIME 2024 in just 4 hours on 8 A100 GPUs. It outperforms step-matched direct RL and enables the sequential composition of multiple policy shifts.
AI.conclusion: RL的训练结果可以跨模型规模复用，作为隐式奖励信号，而不仅仅是作为最终的模型来模仿。Direct-OPD证明了这种思路的有效性，为低成本、高效的后训练提供了新范式。

title: RL Forgets! Towards Continual Policy Optimization
summary: Continual post-training is becoming a central paradigm for adapting vision-language models to evolving tasks. Recent work has increasingly favored reinforcement learning over supervised fine-tuning, driven by the belief that reinforcement learning is inherently less prone to forgetting. However, the belief remains insufficiently validated, as existing evidence is largely drawn from outdated or homogeneous benchmarks. To revisit this assumption, we introduce MRCL, a Multimodal Reasoning Continual Learning benchmark built from diverse and recently released multimodal datasets. Experiments on MRCL show that reinforcement learning can still suffer from severe catastrophic forgetting during continual post-training. To address this challenge, we propose Continual Policy Optimization (CPO), a replay-free framework grounded in the prior-task behavioral KL objective. CPO uses a theoretically justified parameter-movement regularization to limit policy drift on previous tasks. Extensive experiments across multiple model scales demonstrate that CPO consistently reduces forgetting while preserving, and in some cases improving, pretrained model capabilities. On Qwen3-VL-8B, CPO reduces forgetting by 13.7\% and improves pretrained capability by 7.0\%. The implementation code is available at https://github.com/MaolinLuo/CPO.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑了"强化学习在持续后训练中天然不易遗忘"的普遍观点，提出了多模态推理持续学习基准MRCL，并设计了免回放的持续策略优化框架CPO，通过理论驱动的参数移动正则化有效缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有工作认为强化学习比监督微调更不易遗忘，但这一信念缺乏充分的验证，因为已有证据大多来自过时或同质化的基准测试。作者旨在重新审视这一假设。
AI.method: 提出CPO（Continual Policy Optimization）框架：基于先验任务的behavioral KL目标，使用理论证明的参数移动正则化来限制策略在先前任务上的漂移；无需回放缓冲区。
AI.result: 在MRCL基准上的实验表明，强化学习仍可能遭受严重的灾难性遗忘；CPO在多个模型规模上一致地减少了遗忘，同时在有的情况下还能保持甚至提升预训练模型能力。在Qwen3-VL-8B上，遗忘降低13.7%，预训练能力提升7.0%。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习并非天然抗遗忘，CPO作为一种免回放的持续策略优化方法，能够有效缓解多模态持续后训练中的灾难性遗忘。

title: ClinOCR-Bench: A Comprehensive Clinical Scanned Document Dataset for Optical Character Recognition Model Evaluation
summary: Extracting textual information from scanned medical documents, such as external laboratory reports and manually filled forms, has been a major challenge in modern electronic health records (EHRs). Recent advancements in vision language models (VLMs) have shown great promise over traditional OCR tools. However, at this point, most clinical OCR studies were conducted on private, institutional data. To our knowledge, there are few publicly available datasets for evaluating OCR models in the clinical domain. Furthermore, common scanning artifacts that undermine OCR performance are not reflected in those datasets, leaving a systematic evaluation unfeasible. Therefore, we release a publicly available, realistic-looking OCR benchmark dataset, ClinOCR-Bench, with 384 scanned images across 6 subsets: Normal, Handwriting, Poor Quality, Rotation, Tables, and Mix-artifacts. ClinOCR-Bench features: 1) diverse document types and layouts, 2) full coverage of common EHR scan artifacts, 3) protected health information-free, 4) template-aware train/test split, and 5) adequate sample size for OCR benchmarking. Baseline OCR performance was evaluated using state-of-the-art open-weight and proprietary VLMs. The dataset and documentation are available on GitHub (https://github.com/ClinOCR-Bench/ClinOCR-Bench).

AI.tldr: 本文发布了一个名为ClinOCR-Bench的临床OCR基准数据集，包含384张扫描图像（覆盖正常、手写、低质量、旋转、表格、混合伪影6个子集），用于评估视觉语言模型在医学文档OCR上的表现。该数据集具有多样性、伪影覆盖全、无PHI信息、模板感知划分等特点。
AI.motivation: 现有临床OCR研究多基于私有数据，缺乏公开可用的评估基准；同时已有数据集未反映常见的扫描伪影，导致无法进行系统性评估。
AI.method: 构建了ClinOCR-Bench数据集，包含384张扫描图像，涵盖6种伪影子集（正常、手写、低质量、旋转、表格、混合伪影），并使用开权重和专有VLM进行基线评估。
AI.result: 创建了一个包含384张扫描图像、6个子集的公开临床OCR基准数据集，并使用多种视觉语言模型进行了基线性能评估。
AI.conclusion: ClinOCR-Bench为临床文档OCR提供了标准化的公开评估基准，填补了该领域公开数据集的空白，有助于推动VLM在医学文档信息提取中的发展。

title: NKI-Agent: Domain-Specific Fine-Tuning and Agentic Tool Use for Neuron Kernel Generation
comment: 7 pages. Accepted at DL4C @ ICML 2026 Workshop
summary: Recent agentic approaches to LLM-based kernel generation have achieved impressive results on CUDA. For emerging AI accelerators such as AWS Trainium and Inferentia, automated kernel generation and optimization remain largely unaddressed. Writing kernels for these chips via the Neuron Kernel Interface (NKI) is particularly challenging: developers must navigate a multi-engine architecture, tile-based programming, and explicit data movement across multi-level memory hierarchy. Moreover, no publicly-available training data, benchmarks, or tool-augmented agents exist for this domain. We introduce NKI-Agent, the first system combining domain-specific supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with a compile-verify-fix agent loop for NKI kernel generation. We adapt the existing CUDA-Agent framework to Neuron hardware, curate 6,000 NKI kernel generation tasks for training, and construct NKIBench, a 250-task benchmark across three difficulty levels. Evaluated on real Trn1 hardware, NKI-Agent with Claude Opus 4.8 and a rank-aware system prompt achieves a 77.3% pass rate on the 150-task NKIBench. We show that tool use is critical: Opus 4.8 scores 6% in single-shot mode without agent tools. On a 60-task subset, we show that an SFT-trained Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B achieves 25.0% pass rate at 1/100th the cost, outperforming Claude Sonnet 4 (15.0%). We also report that Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with binary compilation reward fails to improve over SFT, providing guidance on reward design for RL-based kernel generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NKI-Agent，首个结合领域特定监督微调(SFT)与编译验证修复智能体循环的NKI内核生成系统。在AWS Trainium上，Claude Opus 4.8达到77.3%通过率，而单次生成仅6%；SFT训练的小模型以1/100成本达到25%，优于Claude Sonnet 4的15%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM内核生成方法（如CUDA-Agent）在CUDA上取得了成功，但针对新兴AI加速器（如AWS Trainium/Inferentia）的自动内核生成尚未被研究。NKI编程面临多引擎架构、tile编程、显式数据移动等挑战，且缺乏公开训练数据、基准和工具增强的智能体。
AI.method: 1) 将CUDA-Agent框架适配到Neuron硬件；2) 构建6000个NKI内核生成训练任务和250任务的NKIBench基准；3) 采用SFT（6K数据）+ 编译-验证-修复智能体循环；4) 实验了GRPO（组相对策略优化）强化学习方法。
AI.result: Claude Opus 4.8 + 智能体循环在150任务NKIBench上达77.3%通过率；无智能体工具时仅6%；SFT微调的Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B以1/100成本达25%，超Claude Sonnet 4的15%；GRPO+编译奖励未能超越SFT。
AI.conclusion: 工具增强的智能体循环对NKI内核生成至关重要；SFT能有效提升小模型性能并降低成本；GRPO的二进制编译奖励设计不足以提升效果，需更细致的奖励设计。

title: ViPo-MLLM: Visual-Pose Multimodal LLM for Gloss-Free Sign Language Translation
summary: Gloss-free Sign Language Translation (SLT) translates sign language videos into spoken-language sentences without gloss annotations, avoiding costly labeling but requiring fine-grained modeling of hands, body, and facial cues. Existing methods often use single-modality or weakly fused features, limiting performance. We propose ViPo-MLLM, a framework that integrates spatio-temporal RGB and human pose features. Dedicated encoders model intra-modal dynamics and cross-modal attention captures long-range dependencies. The fused representation is conditioned with a structured prompt and processed by an LLM trained with contrastive and language modeling objectives. The proposed model was evaluated on the PHOENIX14T and CSL-Daily datasets and achieved new state-of-the-art results on both datasets. Moreover, the ViPo-MLLM model attained competitive performance compared to gloss-based recognition approaches, confirming the effectiveness of the proposed pose cues and cross-modal attention mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 提出ViPo-MLLM框架，融合RGB和人体姿态特征进行无标注手语翻译，在PHOENIX14T和CSL-Daily上达到SOTA，性能接近有标注方法。
AI.motivation: 无标注手语翻译（Gloss-free SLT）可避免昂贵的人工标注，但现有方法多使用单模态或弱融合特征，对手部、身体和面部细节建模不足，性能受限。
AI.method: 提出ViPo-MLLM：1) 专用编码器分别建模RGB和人体姿态的时空动态；2) 跨模态注意力捕捉长程依赖；3) 融合特征通过结构化提示输入LLM，结合对比学习和语言建模目标训练。
AI.result: 在PHOENIX14T和CSL-Daily上达到新SOTA，且性能与基于标注（gloss-based）的识别方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 验证了人体姿态线索和跨模态注意力机制在无标注手语翻译中的有效性，其性能可接近有标注方法。

title: Learning Task-Sufficient World Models by Synergizing Agentic Exploration and Structured Modeling
summary: Learning and planning in imagination using world models provides an effective paradigm for training agents for decision-making. However, existing approaches often rely on high-dimensional latent spaces or generic visual embeddings that retain many factors irrelevant to control, limiting efficiency and generalization across tasks. To this end, we study how agents can learn world models with representations that are task-specific, minimal, and sufficient for decision-making. We achieve this via a closed-loop synergy between the agent and the world model, in which structured world-model learning distills task-sufficient representations from informative interaction data. On the agent side, agents actively probe the environment to collect informative trajectories that expose task-relevant latent factors, guided by an adaptive curriculum. On the world-model side, we learn structured representations over observations to distill compact, task-sufficient latent states from the collected interaction data. This synergy enables the empirical recovery of task-sufficient latent representations that capture all control-relevant factors. Leveraging these representations, the resulting policies achieve improved sample efficiency and generalization, including generalization across skills, object-skill compositions, and previously unseen tasks on standard continuous-control and robotic-manipulation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过智能体与世界模型之间的闭环协同机制，学习任务特定、最小且充分的潜在表征，从而提升世界模型的样本效率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型方法依赖高维潜在空间或通用视觉嵌入，包含了大量与控制无关的因子，导致效率低下且跨任务泛化能力有限。因此，需要学习任务特定的、精简的、对决策充分的表征。
AI.method: 构建智能体与世界模型的闭环协同：智能端通过自适应课程主动采集信息丰富的轨迹，暴露任务相关潜在因子；世界模型端从采集的交互数据中学习结构化表征，蒸馏出紧凑、任务充分的潜在状态。
AI.result: 成功恢复了任务充分的潜在表征，捕获了所有控制相关因子；基于这些表征的策略在样本效率和泛化能力上均有提升，包括跨技能、跨物体-技能组合以及未见任务上的泛化。
AI.conclusion: 智能体与世界模型之间的闭环协同能够学习到更优的潜在表征，显著提升决策效率与泛化能力，是训练智能体进行决策的有效范式。

title: From Geometric Labels to Semantic Understanding of Indoor Building Components Using Multimodal Large Language Models
comment: 46 pages, 13 figures, accepted by Automation in Construction journal
summary: Point cloud-based understanding has become an important enabler for facility operation and maintenance involving indoor building components. However, existing methods output only discrete labels without explaining component functions or natural language interactions. This paper proposes Building-MLLM, a point cloud-centered multimodal large language model (MLLM) for indoor components, which models point clouds and instructions to generate responses across Simple Recognition, Complex Captioning, and Multi-Engineering Question Answering tasks. Building-MLLM addresses semantic concentration through four domain-specific mechanisms: Point Information Enhancer for task-relevant semantics, Geometry-Preserving Regularization preventing geometric erosion, fixed textual prefix for domain stabilization, and multi-dimensional LoRA balancing recognition with reasoning. A multi-constraint progressive instruction-generation engine is developed to compile a synthetic point cloud-text dataset with 4198 objects, 37,782 instruction-following pairs, and 47 categories. Experiments show that Building-MLLM achieves 88.00%, 65.10%, and 68.14% on the three task types, respectively, demonstrating superior indoor component language understanding and providing initial generalizability in transfer inference on other real-world datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出Building-MLLM，一种以点云为中心的多模态大语言模型，用于室内建筑构件的理解与语言交互，通过四种领域特定机制和多约束渐进式指令生成引擎，在三个任务上取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于点云的室内构件理解方法仅输出离散标签，无法解释构件功能或进行自然语言交互，亟需一种能够结合点云和指令生成自然语言响应的模型。
AI.method: 提出Building-MLLM，包含四个域特定机制：Point Information Enhancer（增强任务相关语义）、Geometry-Preserving Regularization（防止几何信息退化）、固定文本前缀（稳定域内表示）、多维度LoRA（平衡识别与推理）。并开发多约束渐进式指令生成引擎，构建大规模合成点云-文本数据集。
AI.result: 在Simple Recognition、Complex Captioning、Multi-Engineering QA三个任务上分别达到88.00%、65.10%、68.14%的准确率，并在其他真实数据集上展现出初步的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Building-MLLM有效实现了室内构件层面的点云语言理解，为设施运维中的自然语言交互提供了可行方案，但复杂描述和工程问答任务仍有提升空间。

title: Environmental Drivers of Respiratory Disease: A District Level Analysis
summary: Sri Lanka has experienced a decade of progressive forest degradation and rising atmospheric pollution, yet district-level respiratory admissions have paradoxically declined, pointing to the confounding role of healthcare access. This study addresses that gap by constructing an 11-year (2014-2024) panel dataset across all 25 administrative districts, integrating satellite-derived vegetation indices, fire radiative power, pollutant concentrations (particulate matter (PM2.5), nitrogen dioxide (NO2), sulfur dioxide (SO2)), carbon flux metrics and population-normalized respiratory admission rates. Two temporally validated XGBoost models were created for annual district-level respiratory rate (R^2 = 0.937) and monthly PM2.5 concentration (R^2 = 0.976) with generalization validated in 21 out of 25 districts (Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) <= 20%). Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) analysis established that cumulative air quality burden is the overwhelming driver of respiratory rate variance (80.1%), ahead of forest degradation (15.6%) and fire activity (4.3%). The Forest-Air-Health (FAH) Risk Index used these SHAP-derived weights to find the districts with the highest risk: Colombo (FAH = 0.802), Gampaha (0.708), and Kalutara (0.682). These findings present the inaugural evidence-based, district-level framework correlating environmental degradation with respiratory health in Sri Lanka, establishing a quantitative basis for focused public health and environmental policy.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了斯里兰卡25个行政区11年（2014-2024）的面板数据，利用两个XGBoost模型（年呼吸率R²=0.937，月PM2.5浓度R²=0.976）和SHAP分析，发现累积空气质量负担是呼吸系统疾病率的主要驱动因素（80.1%），并提出了森林-空气-健康（FAH）风险指数，识别出科伦坡等高风险区。
AI.motivation: 斯里兰卡森林退化和空气污染日益严重，但地区级呼吸科入院率却反常下降，提示医疗可及性存在混淆效应。现有研究缺乏综合环境因素与呼吸健康的多区县、长时间尺度联合分析框架。
AI.method: 构建了包含卫星植被指数、火辐射功率、污染物浓度（PM2.5、NO₂、SO₂）、碳通量及人口标准化呼吸入院率的11年面板数据；分别训练了年呼吸率和月PM2.5浓度的XGBoost模型（两模型R²分别为0.937和0.976）；使用SHAP分析量化各环境因素贡献；基于SHAP权重构建FAH风险指数。
AI.result: XGBoost模型在21/25个区泛化良好（MAPE≤20%）。SHAP显示空气质量累积负担贡献80.1%，森林退化15.6%，火灾活动4.3%。FAH指数最高风险区：科伦坡（0.802）、甘帕哈（0.708）、卡卢特勒（0.682）。
AI.conclusion: 首次为斯里兰卡提供了基于证据的区级环境退化与呼吸健康关联框架，明确了空气质量是呼吸健康的首要环境风险因素，为精准公共卫生和环境政策提供了量化依据。

title: IPDiff: Diffusion-driven ORSI Salient Object Detection with Information Reconstruction and Multi-Prior Guidance
summary: Existing Salient Object Detection in Optical Remote Sensing Image (ORSI-SOD) methods mainly adopt the static inference strategy, which uses fixed trained model parameters for saliency inference in the testing phase. This means that even if the generated saliency map has errors, it cannot be further optimized. In this paper, we propose the novel IPDiff, a Diffusion-driven ORSI-SOD method with Information Reconstruction and Multi-Prior Guidance. We build IPDiff based on a unique dynamic optimization strategy, which endows IPDiff with the ability to iteratively optimize saliency maps with a dynamic parameter. Specifically, we formulate ORSI-SOD as a conditional diffusion problem in IPDiff. IPDiff first extracts informative conditional priors from ORSIs, including the saliency prior and the hierarchical priors, in the prior network with the assistance of the information reconstruction-driven attention module. The saliency prior can provide positional information of salient objects, while the hierarchical priors can provide specific detail and semantic information of salient objects. Under the guidance of these priors, IPDiff then iteratively denoises random noise as the timestep dynamically changes in the denoising network, generating saliency maps that are close to ground truths. Notably, we simultaneously supervise IPDiff in both spatial and spectral domains through a hybrid loss function to achieve efficient network training. Comprehensive experiments on public ORSSD, EORSSD, and ORSI-4199 datasets demonstrate that our proposed IPDiff achieves the best performance compared to 46 state-of-the-art methods. The code and results of our method are available at https://github.com/MathLee/IPDiff.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IPDiff，一种基于扩散模型的遥感图像显著目标检测方法，通过信息重建和多先验引导的动态优化策略，在多个数据集上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ORSI-SOD方法采用静态推理策略，模型参数固定，生成的显著图即使存在错误也无法进一步优化，缺乏动态调整能力。
AI.method: 1) 将ORSI-SOD建模为条件扩散问题；2) 设计先验网络，利用信息重建驱动注意模块提取显著性先验（目标位置）和层级先验（细节与语义）；3) 在去噪网络中，随着时间步动态变化，迭代去噪生成显著图；4) 使用混合损失函数在空间域和频谱域同时监督训练。
AI.result: 在ORSSD、EORSSD和ORSI-4199三个公开数据集上，与46种SOTA方法相比，IPDiff取得了最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型驱动的动态优化策略能有效提升遥感图像显著目标检测的效果，信息重建和多先验引导是关键设计。

title: Full-Stack FP4: Stable LLM Pretraining with Quantized Projections, Optimizers, and Attention
summary: Recent NVFP4 pretraining methods mainly target transformer linear layers, leaving optimizer states, optimizer arithmetic and attention underexplored in 4-bit pipelines. This critical gap blocks stable full-stack 4-bit pretraining, as the three core modules exhibit unique numerical failure patterns: linear layers hit hard quantization noise limits with dimension-propagated error amplification; AdamW second moments are heavy-tailed non-negative values fragile to low-precision denominators; attention carries error-prone computation paths demanding strict forward-backward quantization consistency. We propose Full-Stack FP4, the first complete NVFP4 pretraining framework resolving all three stability bottlenecks via module-wise precision strategies. For linear projections, LoRA-SVD lightweight decomposition suppresses quantization noise and breaks the direct-quantization error ceiling, shrinking the linear-only loss gap from 1.40% to 0.61%. For optimizers, we design AdamW second-moment transformation for robust NVFP4 storage and fully support native NVFP4 Newton-Schulz iterations for the Root (Muon) optimizer. For attention, a mixed-precision scheme quantizes Q/K/V and backward dS while guarding vulnerable paths in BF16, paired with unified tensor reuse to sustain forward-backward alignment. We further analyze fast error accumulation in naive low-bit matrix multiplication and the extreme sensitivity of PV / dOV^T attention branches. All modules are plug-and-play with cumulative stability and efficiency improvements. Our 3B/64B-token pretraining validates near-BF16 performance with merely 1.47% loss gap, verifying feasible stable end-to-end NVFP4 LLM pretraining.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个完整的Full-Stack FP4框架，通过模块级精度策略解决了NVFP4预训练中线性层、优化器状态和注意力机制的数值不稳定问题，在3B/64B-token预训练中仅1.47%的loss差距，接近BF16性能。
AI.motivation: 现有NVFP4预训练方法主要针对Transformer线性层，忽略了优化器状态、优化器算法和注意力机制在4-bit流水线中的数值稳定性问题，这三个核心模块存在独特的数值失败模式，阻碍了稳定全栈4-bit预训练的实现。
AI.method: 提出Full-Stack FP4框架：1) 线性层使用LoRA-SVD轻量级分解抑制量化噪声；2) 优化器设计AdamW二阶矩变换实现鲁棒NVFP4存储，并支持原生NVFP4 Newton-Schulz迭代；3) 注意力机制采用混合精度方案，Q/K/V和反向dS量化，关键路径保持BF16精度，配合统一张量复用保持前后向对齐。
AI.result: 线性层loss差距从1.40%缩小到0.61%；3B/64B-token预训练仅1.47%的loss差距，接近BF16性能。
AI.conclusion: Full-Stack FP4验证了稳定可行的端到端NVFP4 LLM预训练，所有模块即插即用，实现了累积稳定性和效率提升。

title: Leveraging Pathology Co-occurrence for Test-Time Adaptation in Chest X-Ray Diagnosis
summary: Medical imaging models often degrade when deployed at new clinical sites due to differences in imaging equipment, protocols, and patient populations. Test-time adaptation (TTA) addresses this by updating a pretrained model using only unlabeled target data, without access to source data. However, existing TTA methods were designed for single-label classification on natural image benchmarks, minimizing entropy uniformly across all samples without considering label dependencies. This overlooks a key property of multi-label medical imaging: pathologies do not occur independently but exhibit structured co-occurrence patterns. In this work, we propose Co-occurrence Weighted Adaptation (CoWA), which leverages disease co-occurrence patterns as a reliability signal for adaptation. CoWA estimates label co-occurrence structure from model predictions and downweights samples that deviate from expected patterns, enabling adaptation to rely more on consistent predictions while reducing the impact of noisy ones. We evaluate CoWA on chest X-ray benchmarks under domain shifts and demonstrate consistent improvements over established baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出CoWA方法，利用疾病共现模式作为可靠性信号，在测试时自适应多标签医疗影像分类，有效处理领域偏移。
AI.motivation: 现有TTA方法针对单标签自然图像设计，忽略了多标签医学影像中病理之间存在结构化共现模式这一关键特性。
AI.method: CoWA从模型预测中估计标签共现结构，对偏离预期模式的样本降低权重，使自适应过程更依赖一致预测，减少噪声影响。
AI.result: 在胸部X光基准数据集上，CoWA在领域偏移场景下持续优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用疾病共现模式作为可靠性信号，能有效提升多标签医学影像模型在目标领域的测试时自适应性能。

title: Covert Trait Propagation Is Representation Alignment: Mechanistic Evidence from Hidden-Channel Distillation
summary: A student model trained on pure uniform noise can still inherit its teacher's digit-classification ability, provided the two share initialization. Previous work proves this transfer is guaranteed when the teacher's learning rate is small enough, but does not explain where in the network the channel lives or what sets its capacity. Working in an MLP distillation setting on MNIST, we show these channels are not purely informational: geometric alignment gates access to the information the channel carries. Shared initialization makes the output projection W_2 a common coordinate key, and KL gradients reshape the student's input projection W_0 until its hidden representations align with the teacher's. We call this covert trait propagation (CTP). Five experiments support this mechanism: channel closure tracks weight drift, not teacher accuracy; freezing W_0 destroys transfer while freezing W_2 leaves it intact; multi-teacher ensembles cancel out despite each teacher carrying comparable label information; and linear centered kernel alignment (CKA) tracks student accuracy at r=0.98 across a continuous initialization sweep. Applying the same geometric lens to cross-token behavioral entanglement (CTBE) in instruction-tuned LLMs, we find the effect appears to be activated by alignment training, acting on an inherited substrate, and that the standard log-ratio metric produces an apparent frequency bias that is largely a circularity artifact.

AI.tldr: 本文发现学生模型在纯噪声上训练仍能继承教师分类能力，核心机制是几何对齐（共享初始化使输出投影成为坐标键，KL梯度重塑输入投影使隐藏表示对齐），并揭示了隐性特征传播（CTP）的运作原理；同时将此几何视角应用于指令微调LLM中的跨token行为纠缠（CTBE），发现其由对齐训练激活且标准度量存在伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有工作证明小学习率下教师-学生蒸馏可以保证能力迁移，但未解释迁移发生的具体网络位置以及容量由什么决定，作者希望填补这一空白。
AI.method: 在MLP蒸馏（MNIST）设定下，通过共享初始化、KL梯度分析、通道关闭实验、冻结不同层、多教师集成、CKA相关性分析等实验，揭示几何对齐机制；并将同样视角应用于LLM的CTBE现象分析。
AI.result: 通道关闭跟踪权重漂移而非教师准确率；冻结输入投影破坏迁移而冻结输出投影不影响；多教师集成相互抵消；线性CKA与学生准确率相关系数达0.98。CTBE由对齐训练激活，标准log-ratio度量存在循环伪影导致的频率偏差。
AI.conclusion: 知识迁移的关键在于几何对齐而非纯粹信息通道，共享初始化提供的坐标键和KL梯度驱动的表示对齐是核心机制；该几何视角同样能解释CTBE现象，并揭示了标准度量中的伪影问题。

title: ProxyUp: Training-Free Proxy-Conditioned Video Generation for Controllable Dynamics
summary: Precise control over complex dynamics remains challenging for modern video generative models, as text prompts alone often cannot specify physically plausible, fine-grained motion and interactions. We introduce $\textit{proxy-conditioned video generation}$, where a coarse proxy video from physics-based simulation or real-world recording serves as a dynamics carrier to control foreground object motion. Given a proxy video and a text prompt, the goal is to synthesize a new video that preserves the proxy dynamics while generating novel content and plausible interactions aligned with the prompt. Since paired proxy-target videos are difficult to obtain, we propose $\textbf{ProxyUp}$, a training-free framework built on pretrained video generative models. ProxyUp first inverts the proxy video into an intermediate latent representation and applies $\textbf{region-wise latent noising}$, preserving motion-critical proxy latents while injecting noise into regions intended for text-driven regeneration. To mitigate the distribution mismatch and weak foreground-background coupling introduced by this heuristic latent composition, we further propose $\textbf{Stochastic Flow Relaxation (SFR)}$, which progressively relaxes the composed latent toward the model's learned distribution before ODE sampling. Experiments on both simulation and real-world proxies show that ProxyUp outperforms strong video editing and motion transfer baselines in dynamic fidelity and text alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProxyUp，一种无需训练的框架，通过代理视频（物理模拟或真实记录）控制视频生成中的前景物体运动。核心包括区域潜在噪声化（保留运动关键区域，注入噪声到需文本重生成的区域）和随机流松弛（缓解分布不匹配）。实验表明在动态保真度和文本对齐上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 文本提示无法精准指定复杂、物理合理的细粒度运动和交互，现有视频生成模型对此控制不足，且难以获取成对的代理-目标视频数据。
AI.method: 1) 代理视频逆映射到中间潜在表示；2) 区域潜在噪声化：保留运动关键区域潜在变量，对需文本驱动重生成的区域注入噪声；3) 随机流松弛（SFR）：在ODE采样前逐步将组合潜在变量松弛到模型学习到的分布，以缓解分布不匹配和前后景耦合弱问题。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界代理数据上，ProxyUp在动态保真度和文本对齐方面优于视频编辑和运动迁移基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需训练的代理条件视频生成框架，有效解决了文本提示对复杂运动控制不足的问题，通过创新的潜在空间组合和分布松弛策略实现了高保真动态控制。

title: Knowledge-Informed Local Causal Discovery of Optimal Adjustment Sets
summary: Local causal discovery is a scalable alternative to global structure learning. However, it can struggle to identify valid adjustment sets in data-scarce settings because of finite-sample uncertainty, incomplete local neighborhoods, and unresolved Markov equivalence. Although many application domains provide structured background knowledge, its integration into local causal discovery remains limited. We propose b-LOAD, a knowledge-informed extension of the LOAD algorithm for local discovery of optimal adjustment sets. b-LOAD incorporates prior edge constraints directly into the local structure-learning procedure and uses Meek's rules to expand the discovery frontier dynamically, yielding a knowledge-constrained partially directed graph over the relevant local subgraph. This strategy helps prevent structurally relevant nodes introduced by prior knowledge from being excluded by local search. We prove that, under sound background knowledge, the procedure monotonically refines the admissible equivalence class and can enlarge the set of identifiable causal queries, enabling recovery of optimal adjustment sets that are not identifiable from observational conditional-independence information alone. Empirically, b-LOAD improves downstream causal effect estimation relative to purely data-driven and standard knowledge-augmented baselines, particularly in data-scarce and structurally complex regimes. Results on real-world biological networks show that locally targeted prior knowledge provides the largest gains and remains beneficial under moderate structural noise. These findings position b-LOAD as a scalable approach for converting fragmented domain knowledge into more reliable causal-effect estimation.

AI.tldr: b-LOAD是一种将先验边约束融入局部因果发现过程的算法，通过Meek规则动态扩展发现边界，在数据稀缺和结构复杂场景下显著提升最优调整集识别和因果效应估计的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 局部因果发现在数据稀缺场景中面临有限样本不确定性、局部邻域不完整和马尔可夫等价类未解决等问题，难以识别有效的调整集；而现有的背景知识整合方法在局部因果发现中仍有限。
AI.method: 提出b-LOAD算法，将先验边约束直接嵌入局部结构学习过程，利用Meek规则动态扩展发现边界，构建知识约束下的局部偏有向图，逐步精化可容许等价类。
AI.result: 在理论层面证明了在合理背景知识下过程单调精化等价类并扩大可识别因果查询集；实验表明b-LOAD在数据稀缺和结构复杂场景下优于纯数据驱动和标准知识增强基线，在真实生物网络中对局部先验知识最为受益。
AI.conclusion: b-LOAD提供了一种可扩展的方法，将碎片化的领域知识转化为更可靠的因果效应估计，尤其适合数据稀缺场景下的实际应用。

title: Attending to Multimodal Generation One Token at a Time
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) generate responses autoregressively, integrating visual and linguistic information in an evolving context. Prior work on interpretability has focused on individual layers and circuits (where), leaving the token-level dynamics of multimodal computation during generation (when) underexplored. We address this gap and study attention shifts as per semantic role; tracking model attention to image, text, instruction, and previously generated tokens, One Token at a Time (OTaT). We introduce multimodal tasks that require explicit switching between visual and textual context within a single response. Across two mainstream model families and four open-weight MLLMs of varying sizes, we establish consistent patterns: attention to image peaks at tokens requiring image-derived information, instruction tokens are revisited during task transitions, and attention to previously generated tokens increases as the generation progresses. Causal attention blocking interventions validate the functional role of these trends. We profile model behavior under disrupted attention and observe responses falling back to language priors, or exhibiting cross-modal leakage, denial, or recovery. Finally, informed of the attention dynamics through our novel analysis, we propose a simple test-time intervention to boost attention to the relevant modality at the right time, significantly improving multimodal task performance.

AI.tldr: 本文通过逐token追踪多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）生成过程中的注意力动态，发现注意力在不同语义角色（图像、文本、指令、已生成token）间有规律地切换，并提出一种基于注意力动态的测试时干预方法，显著提升了多模态任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性研究关注MLLMs的独立层和电路（where），忽略了生成过程中token级别的多模态计算动态（when）。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统研究生成过程中注意力如何随时间变化。
AI.method: 提出"一次一个token"（OTaT）方法，逐token追踪注意力分布；设计需要单一响应中明确切换视觉与文本上下文的多模态任务；在两类主流模型家族、四种不同规模的开源MLLMs上进行实验；采用因果注意力阻断干预验证注意力变化的功能作用。
AI.result: 发现一致性模式：图像注意力在需要图像信息的token处达到峰值；任务转换时重新关注指令token；对已生成token的注意力随生成过程增加。注意力被打断时，模型会退化为语言先验或出现跨模态泄露、否认或恢复行为。基于发现的注意力动态，提出的测试时干预方法显著提升了多模态任务性能。
AI.conclusion: MLLMs在生成过程中展现出规律性的注意力切换模式，理解这些动态有助于诊断模型行为并设计有效的干预策略来提升性能。

title: A Deep Learning-based surrogate model for Severe Accidents in nuclear reactors using ASTEC
summary: Integral codes like the Accident Source Term Evaluation Code (ASTEC) are powerful tools to study the physics of Severe Accidents (SAs) in nuclear reactors. Real time SA simulators can also be helpful in training operators of nuclear plants to react correctly to malfunctions. However, SA simulators can take up to several days per simulation, making their use infeasible for real time applications. In this work we show how to speed up a SA simulator with a fast, Deep Learning based (DL), surrogate model (SM). The SM is built as a combination of a dimensionality reduction stage, via an AutoEncoder, and a time-stepping stage, via a Neural Ordinary Differential Equation. The data on which the SM is trained are obtained from the ASTEC simulator, by sampling a set of operator actions for station blackout (SBO) and loss-of-coolant accidents (LOCA). The objective of the developed SM is to approximate multiple spatio-temporal fields for the thermal-hydraulic physics, core degradation, and fission product release modules in ASTEC's vessel domain. The SM predicts simultaneously around $80$ different physical variables (both scalar and fields), maintaining a stable autoregressive rollout up to $50$ thousand time steps. In addition, the AutoEncoder achieves a dimensionality reduction by a factor of over $300$, which allows the SM to predict up to $40$ hours of simulation in under a minute, both on CPU and GPU. This work is the first study of the capabilities and limits of DL based surrogate modeling in approximating the challenging, highly non-linear physics of ASTEC.

AI.tldr: 本文利用深度学习（自动编码器+神经ODE）构建ASTEC严重事故模拟器的快速代理模型，实现40小时仿真在1分钟内完成，同时预测约80个物理变量，并保持5万时间步的稳定自回归滚动。
AI.motivation: 传统严重事故模拟器（如ASTEC）计算耗时长达数天，无法用于实时训练操作员应对核事故。作者希望通过深度学习代理模型大幅加速仿真过程。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：1）使用自动编码器（AutoEncoder）将高维时空场降维300倍以上；2）使用神经常微分方程（Neural ODE）在潜空间中进行时间步进。模型基于ASTEC在SBO和LOCA事故场景下的数据进行训练。
AI.result: 代理模型可同时预测约80个物理变量（标量和场），实现5万时间步的稳定自回归预测；压缩比超过300倍；可在CPU和GPU上1分钟内完成40小时仿真。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次系统性研究深度学习代理模型在高度非线性、复杂ASTEC物理仿真中的能力与局限性，为实时核事故模拟与操作员培训提供了可行方案。

title: Operator-on-F complements value-equivalence: a planning-time diagnostic for latent world models
comment: Accepted at the RLC 2026 World Model Workshop
summary: World-model evaluation for model-based reinforcement learning typically asks whether the learned model predicts reward and value well, which can leave planning-relevant errors in the model's latent rollouts unmeasured. We introduce a complementary diagnostic, operator-on-F, that compares a model's k-step latent pushforward to the environment's on an observable subset F, using the model's own predictor. On a TD-MPC2 size sweep over cheetah-run, reward-prediction error stays within [0.028, 0.091] for every model size - only about 3x variation - so an unnormalized reward-fit check has narrow resolution to distinguish them; the (unnormalized) Bellman residual and reward error themselves have weak relationships with return (Spearman -0.10 and -0.30). Operator error spans 0.28 to 2.62 over the same sizes. At 317M the operator error is 2.62 - an order of magnitude above the 0.28-0.36 cluster - and the planning return collapses to 0.9, while reward-prediction error (0.091) is the highest of the five but stays within the same small [0.028, 0.091] range as the rest of the sweep. The rank correlation between operator error and return loss is -0.90 (anchor-bootstrap 95% CI [-0.90, -0.70] at n=5 sizes; leave-one-out removal of any single size leaves it at -0.80 or stronger). The operator also returns informative, architecture-discriminating estimates in a cross-architecture comparison between TD-MPC2 and a pure-SSL latent world model. The operator diagnostic complements value-equivalence rather than replacing it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的诊断指标 operator-on-F，用于评估模型在潜在空间推演中的规划相关错误，弥补了传统奖励预测误差在分辨率上的不足。实验表明该指标与规划回报损失高度相关（Spearman -0.90），能有效区分不同模型规模与架构的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 传统的世界模型评估（如奖励预测误差、价值等价）无法有效捕捉模型在潜在空间推演（latent rollouts）中与规划相关的错误，导致评估分辨率不足，难以区分不同模型性能的差异。
AI.method: 提出 operator-on-F 诊断方法，通过比较模型在可观测子集 F 上的 k 步潜在推演（latent pushforward）与真实环境的推演结果，使用模型自身的预测器进行评估。该方法作为价值等价（value-equivalence）的补充，而非替代。
AI.result: 在 cheetah-run 任务上，TD-MPC2 不同规模模型的奖励预测误差仅 [0.028, 0.091]（3x 变化），而 operator error 跨度 0.28-2.62（约 9.4x 变化）。317M 模型 operator error 为 2.62，规划回报降至 0.9。operator error 与回报损失的秩相关系数为 -0.90。跨架构比较中，operator 也能有效区分 TD-MPC2 与纯 SSL 潜在世界模型。
AI.conclusion: Operator-on-F 诊断指标能有效捕捉规划相关的潜在推演错误，在分辨率上优于传统奖励预测误差，并且与规划表现高度相关，可作为价值等价的补充工具用于世界模型评估。

title: Exploring SAM Supervision for Fine-Grained UAV Target Segmentation under Data Scarcity
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) target segmentation remains challenging due to the small size of objects, appearance variations, cluttered backgrounds, and the scarcity of densely annotated data. These factors hinder the performance and practical deployment of lightweight segmentation models in real-world UAV applications. To address this problem, this paper investigates the use of SAM3 (Segment Anything Model 3) as a pseudo-label generator for training compact segmentation networks. Specifically, two supervision paradigms are explored: (i) direct pseudo-supervision using unaltered SAM3-generated masks, and (ii) a refinement strategy that re-applies SAM3 to localized image patches for improved mask quality. Based on these paradigms, a two-stage SAM3-guided pseudo-label generation framework is proposed. In the first stage, SAM3 generates coarse masks for initial object localization. The localized regions are subsequently cropped into patches and processed by SAM3 again to generate fine masks with accurate object boundaries and discard false positives. The resulting coarse and fine masks are then used as pseudo-labels to optimize a lightweight network, termed IPS-Seg, which consists of three components: an IdentityFormer backbone for feature extraction, an Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling module for multi-scale context aggregation, and a PixelShuffle-based decoder for spatial resolution recovery. Extensive experiments under multiple supervision settings demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. The results show that IPS-Seg achieves a favorable trade-off between segmentation accuracy and computational efficiency while benefiting consistently from the proposed pseudo-label generation strategy. These findings highlight the potential of large-scale foundation models as annotation sources for training compact task-specific segmentation networks in low-label vision domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用SAM3生成伪标签来训练轻量级无人机目标分割网络IPS-Seg的方法，通过粗到细的两阶段伪标签生成策略，在分割精度与计算效率之间取得了良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 无人机目标分割面临目标小、外观变化大、背景杂乱以及标注数据稀缺等挑战，导致轻量级分割模型在实际部署中性能受限。
AI.method: 提出两阶段SAM3引导的伪标签生成框架：第一阶段用SAM3生成粗掩膜进行初始定位，第二阶段对裁剪的局部区域再次使用SAM3生成精细掩膜。基于此训练轻量级网络IPS-Seg，包含IdentityFormer骨干、ASPP多尺度模块和PixelShuffle解码器。
AI.result: 在多种监督设置下的实验表明，IPS-Seg在分割精度与计算效率之间取得了良好的平衡，且所提出的伪标签生成策略能持续带来性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 大型基础模型作为标注源在低标签视觉领域训练轻量级任务特定分割网络具有巨大潜力。

title: Regime-Conditional Stabilisation of LLM-Augmented Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a natural interface for translating human objectives into reward signals for cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), yet the training-time dynamics of this integration remain poorly understood. We show that dynamically updating LLM-generated reward weights during off-policy MARL violates the stationarity assumption of Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS) and contaminates the experience replay buffer, whose stored transitions carry reward labels computed under stale shaping weights. We characterise the result as a regime-dependent failure whose severity depends on how competent the unshaped baseline already is. To control it we propose two stabilisation strategies: a Phase-Based Freeze Schedule that enforces strict stationarity within training phases, and Exponential Moving Average (EMA) smoothing that bounds per-episode weight drift. We evaluate across three cooperative environments and five random seeds with QMIX, complemented by an exploratory VDN extension, yielding a three-regime taxonomy. In the augmentative regime (Simple Spread), where the baseline is functional (74.4 %), EMA significantly improves success to 86.7 % ($+12.3$ pp, $p<0.01$) while naive dynamic updates collapse it to 15.2 %. In the essential regime (Level-Based Foraging), where the baseline is broken (0.1 %), any shaping unlocks the task (95.9 % under EMA). In the supplementary regime (SMAC 3m), where the baseline is near-saturated (98.8 %), stabilised shaping preserves performance (99.9 %) while unstabilised shaping adds variance without gain. These findings establish reward-signal stationarity as a necessary design constraint and indicate that regime placement is a practical predictor of whether dynamic LLM shaping helps or harms.

AI.tldr: 动态更新LLM生成的奖励权重会破坏MARL中PBRS的平稳性假设并污染经验回放缓冲区，本文提出两种稳定策略（阶段冻结调度和指数移动平均平滑），通过三环境实验验证了动态LLM奖励塑形效果取决于未塑形基线的能力水平，并建立了三区间分类法。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM能为多智能体强化学习提供自然的奖励信号接口，但训练过程中动态更新LLM奖励权重的动力学特性尚不明确，需要系统研究这种集成带来的潜在问题。
AI.method: 提出两种稳定策略：Phase-Based Freeze Schedule（阶段冻结调度，在训练阶段内强制保持平稳性）和EMA平滑（限制每轮权重漂移），在三个合作环境（Simple Spread、Level-Based Foraging、SMAC 3m）中用QMIX和VDN进行实验验证。
AI.result: 建立了三区间分类法：增补区间（基线功能良好74.4%），EMA提升至86.7%（+12.3%），动态更新崩溃至15.2%；关键区间（基线几乎无效0.1%），任何塑形都能解锁任务（EMA下95.9%）；补充区间（基线接近饱和98.8%），稳定塑形保持99.9%，不稳定的塑形增加方差无收益。
AI.conclusion: 奖励信号平稳性是必要设计约束，区间定位是预测动态LLM塑形是否有益的实用指标。

title: GeoSAM-Lite: A Lightweight Foundation Model for Onboard Remote Sensing Segmentation
summary: The deployment of large-scale foundation models like Segment Anything Model (SAM) on resource-constrained Earth observation platforms is hindered by prohibitive computational costs and the domain shift between natural and remote sensing imagery. To address these challenges, we propose \textit{Geo}spatial \textit{S}egment \textit{A}nything \textit{M}odel-Lite (GeoSAM-Lite), a lightweight, prompt-free segmentation framework designed for efficient onboard remote sensing segmentation. GeoSAM-Lite incorporates two core innovations: (1) Geospatial-Domain Initialization (Geo-Init), a domain-aware pre-training strategy that distills geospatial priors from a specialized teacher to bridge the domain gap; and (2) Feature Fusion Layers (FFL), which recalibrate spatial features and restore high-frequency boundary cues to overcome the capacity bottlenecks of lightweight backbones. Experiments across representative datasets, with a primary focus on cloud scenarios to evaluate performance under extreme scale variations and complex boundaries, demonstrate that GeoSAM-Lite achieves competitive accuracy while reducing parameters by 92.8\% compared to the heavyweight RSAM-Seg. By establishing a superior Pareto frontier between efficiency and fidelity, GeoSAM-Lite offers a practical solution for real-time segmentation on edge devices.

AI.tldr: GeoSAM-Lite是一个轻量级、无需提示的遥感分割框架，通过地理域初始化和特征融合层两大创新，在减少92.8%参数量的同时保持竞争性精度，适用于资源受限的边缘设备实时分割。
AI.motivation: 大规模基础模型（如SAM）在资源受限的地球观测平台上部署面临计算成本过高和自然图像与遥感图像之间存在域差异两大挑战。
AI.method: 提出GeoSAM-Lite框架，包含两个核心创新：(1) 地理域初始化——通过知识蒸馏从专用教师模型获取地理空间先验，弥合域差距；(2) 特征融合层——重新校准空间特征并恢复高频边界线索，克服轻量级骨干网络的容量瓶颈。
AI.result: 在代表性数据集上（重点评估云场景），GeoSAM-Lite在参数减少92.8%的情况下实现了与重量级模型RSAM-Seg相竞争的精度，建立了效率与保真度的优越帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: GeoSAM-Lite为边缘设备上的实时分割提供了一种实用解决方案，有效平衡了计算效率与分割精度。

title: LeukocyteCount: Automatic Identification and Counting for leukocytes using Deep Learning
summary: Diagnosing and monitoring diseases frequently involves the analysis of human biological samples, with blood analysis being pivotal. Specifically, leukocytes, or white blood cells (WBCs), are essential markers for evaluating the body's defense mechanisms against infections. Traditional methods for WBC counting and classification are labor-intensive and prone to inaccuracies, primarily due to human error. The conventional processes for blood cell analysis, especially those concerning WBCs, are beset with difficulties. These include the laborious nature of manual counting and the susceptibility to errors, which can significantly impact the accuracy and reliability of disease diagnosis and monitoring. This study proposes an automated, machine learning-based solution aimed at mitigating the identified challenges. By employing a hybrid model that integrates Yolov5 for the detection of WBCs, coupled with a finely tuned, pre-trained MobileNetV2 model and a Logistic Regression classifier, the study innovates in the accurate identification, counting, and classification of WBCs into four distinct types. The methodology leverages the BCCD dataset for training and validation purposes. The application of the proposed hybrid machine learning model has yielded remarkable results, demonstrating a detection accuracy rate of 98\% through the Yolov5 stage, and an unparalleled classification accuracy of 99.04\% in subsequent stages utilizing MobileNetV2 and Logistic Regression. Additionally, Our proposed YOLOv5-based RBC detection module achieves an F1 score of 99.73\%, which outperforms the baseline. These findings underscore the model's potential in transforming traditional laboratory practices for WBC analysis, offering a path towards more accurate, efficient, and reliable disease diagnostics and monitoring.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合Yolov5检测、MobileNetV2与逻辑回归分类的混合机器学习模型，用于白细胞自动识别、计数和分类，检测准确率98%，分类准确率99.04%，F1分数99.73%。
AI.motivation: 传统白细胞计数与分类依赖人工操作，耗时且易出错，影响疾病诊断与监测的准确性和可靠性。
AI.method: 采用混合模型：Yolov5用于白细胞检测，微调预训练MobileNetV2结合逻辑回归分类器，将白细胞分为四类，使用BCCD数据集训练验证。
AI.result: Yolov5检测准确率98%，MobileNetV2+逻辑回归分类准确率99.04%，YOLOv5的红细胞检测模块F1分数99.73%，超越基线。
AI.conclusion: 该混合模型有望变革传统实验室白细胞分析实践，实现更准确、高效、可靠的疾病诊断与监测。

title: Sparse-View Surface Reconstruction using Gaussian Splatting through High-Confidence Depth Propagation with Normal Priors
summary: 3D reconstruction from sparse views is a challenging task in 3D computer vision. Recent studies on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have achieved remarkable results with sparse views in novel view synthesis, yet reconstructing high-quality geometric surfaces from sparse views remains a challenge, due to the limited geometry clues and the discreteness of Gaussians. In this paper, we propose a novel 3DGS-based method for high-fidelity surface reconstruction from sparse views. Our key insight is to introduce a normal-guided depth propagation approach, which can extend depth information from high-confidence regions to constrain the depth in low-confidence areas. Additionally, we propose an abnormal depth edge-aware regularization to address depth discontinuities caused by the discreteness of Gaussians. Extensive experiments on DTU and Tanks-and-Temples datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in sparse view surface reconstruction. Project page: https://hanl2010.github.io/DP-GS.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的新方法DP-GS，通过法线引导的深度传播和异常深度边缘感知正则化，从稀疏视角实现高保真表面重建，在DTU和Tanks-and-Temples数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS方法在稀疏视角的新视角合成上表现不错，但由于几何线索有限和高斯的离散性，难以从稀疏视角重建高质量几何表面。
AI.method: 1) 法线引导的深度传播：将深度信息从高置信度区域扩展到低置信度区域；2) 异常深度边缘感知正则化：处理高斯离散性导致的深度不连续问题。
AI.result: 在DTU和Tanks-and-Temples数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在稀疏视角表面重建任务中优于当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的法线引导深度传播与边缘感知正则化有效解决了稀疏视角下几何重建的难点，实现了高保真表面重建。

title: Two Black Boxes, One Solver: Encoder Probing and Decoder Attribution for Neural Multi-Attribute VRP under Hard-Mask and Recourse Decoders
comment: Accepted at the IJCAI-ECAI 2026 Workshop on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI), Bremen, Germany. 8 pages
summary: Neural autoregressive solvers for the Multi-Attribute Vehicle Routing Problem (MAVRP) reach competitive cost but offer no per-step justification, a problem when dispatchers must validate, accept, or compare them. We open two complementary black boxes in one protocol. On the encoder side, linear probes, spontaneous-organization metrics, rank-based richness measures, and discovered-direction analyses with intervention validation characterize how the latent represents constraint families at the graph, node, and edge level. On the decoder side, three attribution methods (gradient, integrated gradients, DeepLIFT) feed three reading angles: abductive, contrastive against the best feasible alternative, and counterfactual (smallest input change that switches the action or restores feasibility). Explanations are scored on fidelity, concentration, stability, sanity, and actionability. Across six variants combining three encoders (Attention baseline, Unimp, UnimpMoe) with two decoders (Hard-Mask, Recourse), we find that graph inductive bias improves both representational predictability and decoder sanity, that the Mixture-of-Experts encoder represents constraints in a distributed rather than axis-aligned way, and that the Recourse training regime, not merely its softer mask, produces policies that represent infeasibility usefully, exposing make-feasible counterfactuals that Hard-Mask policies fail to produce even when fed infeasible alternatives externally.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多属性车辆路径问题（MAVRP）的神经自回归求解器，提出了一个解释性协议，从编码器和解码器两个层面打开黑箱。编码侧分析潜在表示对约束的表征方式，解码侧使用三种归因方法提供溯因、对比和反事实解释。实验发现图归纳偏置提升表征可预测性，MoE编码器以分布式方式表征约束，Recourse训练策略能产生有意义的反事实解释。
AI.motivation: 神经自回归求解器在MAVRP上虽能达到有竞争力的成本，但缺乏每一步决策的合理性解释，导致调度员无法验证、接受或比较这些解。
AI.method: 提出一个两阶段解释协议：编码器侧使用线性探针、自组织度量、基于秩的丰富度度量以及干预验证的发现方向分析；解码器侧使用三种归因方法（梯度、积分梯度、DeepLIFT）提供溯因、对比和反事实三种解读角度，并从保真度、集中度、稳定性、理智性和可行动性五个维度评分。
AI.result: 图归纳偏置提升表征可预测性和解码器理智性；MoE编码器以分布式而非轴对齐方式表征约束；Recourse训练策略产生有意义的"使其可行"反事实，而Hard-Mask策略即使外部注入不可行替代方案也无法产生。
AI.conclusion: 该协议能有效解释神经MAVRP求解器的内部机制，揭示了不同架构和训练策略对表征可解释性的影响，为实际调度场景中的验证和比较提供了理论基础。

title: Self-Improving Diffusion Classifiers with Minority Preference Optimization
summary: Prior studies have demonstrated that diffusion classifiers achieve robust zero-shot classification performance. However, their effectiveness is strongly tied to the pretraining data distribution: they perform well in majority, high-density regions of the data manifold, but are significantly less accurate in minority, low-density regions. Although prior works on minority sampling have focused on generating more minority-like images, what minority sampling fundamentally enables beyond generation remains underexplored. In this paper, we reveal a direct relationship between minority sampling in generation and the perception capability of diffusion classifiers. Specifically, we show that enhancing minority sampling broadens the coverage of underrepresented regions on the data manifold, thereby improving diffusion-based recognition. To exploit this connection, we propose \textit{Self-Improving Diffusion Classifiers with Minority Preference Optimization} (MiPO), which fine-tunes a pretrained diffusion model using minority preference rewards. Using only arbitrary caption data, MiPO generates candidate samples, rewards those that better cover minority regions, and optimizes the model with LoRA and Group Relative Policy Optimization, without additional image data, external foundation models, or external reward models. This enables stable, prompt-adaptive minority sampling and translates low-density generative coverage into improved zero-shot diffusion classification. To sum up, we show that diffusion classifier perception is biased toward majority regions, demonstrate that this bias can be alleviated through minority preference optimization, and evaluate MiPO on five standard datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MiPO方法，通过少数偏好优化微调扩散模型，增强少数类采样，从而改善扩散分类器在低密度区域的零样本分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散分类器在零样本分类中表现不错，但在数据流形的少数、低密度区域准确性显著下降。现有少数采样工作主要关注生成更多少数类图像，但少数采样对分类感知能力的影响尚未被探索。
AI.method: 提出MiPO（Self-Improving Diffusion Classifiers with Minority Preference Optimization），利用少数偏好奖励对预训练扩散模型进行微调。仅使用任意字幕数据，生成候选样本，奖励覆盖少数区域的样本，通过LoRA和Group Relative Policy Optimization优化模型，无需额外图像数据、外部基础模型或奖励模型。
AI.result: MiPO实现了稳定、提示自适应的少数采样，将低密度生成覆盖转化为改进的零样本扩散分类性能，在五个标准数据集上进行了评估。
AI.conclusion: 扩散分类器的感知偏向多数区域，这种偏差可以通过少数偏好优化来缓解。

title: Beyond travel mode: urban context shapes active mobility's mental health effects over time
summary: Active mobility is widely promoted for sustainable and healthier living, but whether it translates into equitable mental health benefits across individuals and places over time remains unknown. Using causal machine learning and causal deep learning in 264168 UK adults, we find substantial inequalities in individualized effects of active mobility on anxiety, depression, and common mental disorders. These inequalities widen over time and are strongly structured by urban context. For example, anxiety risk at follow-up ranges from a 40.6% reduction to a 10.1% increase across individuals, versus a 10.4% reduction to a 0.1% increase at baseline. Benefits are greatest in greener, safer, less polluted, and less deprived neighborhood environments, with 81.8% of individuals experiencing above-average benefits and mean anxiety risk reduced by 26.4%, versus 10.4% of individuals and 7.4% reduction in the least supportive environments. Urban compact form further modifies these effects through nonlinear interactions with neighborhood environments, amplifying benefits only under supportive conditions. Despite these strong environmental gradients, genetic moderation is negligible. These findings suggest universal active mobility promotion could widen health inequalities if individual and contextual differences are not accounted for.

AI.tldr: 通过对264,168名英国成年人进行因果机器学习和因果深度学习分析，研究发现积极出行对焦虑、抑郁和常见精神障碍的个体化效应存在显著不平等，且这种不平等随时间加剧。环境因素（绿色空间、安全、低污染、低剥夺）显著调节效应大小，而遗传因素影响可忽略不计。若忽视个体和环境差异，普遍推广积极出行可能扩大健康不平等。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已表明积极出行对健康有益，但个体间和区域间的心理健康获益是否平等，以及这种不平等如何随时间变化，尚不清楚。本文旨在揭示积极出行心理健康效应的异质性及其结构因素。
AI.method: 基于264,168名英国成年人的纵向数据，采用因果机器学习（Causal Machine Learning）和因果深度学习（Causal Deep Learning）方法，估计积极出行对焦虑、抑郁和常见精神障碍的个体化因果效应，并分析效应随时间和城市环境的异质性。
AI.result: 积极出行对心理健康的影响存在巨大个体差异：随访期焦虑风险从降低40.6%到增加10.1%不等（基线时为降低10.4%到增加0.1%）。在绿色、安全、低污染、低剥夺社区中，81.8%的个体获得高于平均水平的益处，平均焦虑风险降低26.4%；而最不友好环境中仅10.4%个体获益，平均降低7.4%。城市紧凑形态通过非线性交互放大或削弱效应。遗传因素的调节作用可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 积极出行的心理健康效应高度不平等且随时间扩大，主要受城市环境而非遗传因素驱动。若推广政策不考虑个体和情境差异，可能无意中加剧健康不平等。

title: City-Level 3D Surface Reconstruction with Viewpoint Orientation Partitioning and Scene Completion
summary: Multi-view 3D surface reconstruction is a longstanding challenge in computer vision. Although recent large-scale reconstruction methods based on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieve impressive novel-view synthesis, producing high-quality surfaces over large scenes remains difficult, due to complex geometry, long optimization, and limited memory. In this paper, we propose a novel yet simple partitioning method to efficiently and faithfully reconstruct large-scale scene surfaces. Our key insight lies in a scene partitioning method based on viewpoint orientation. This partitioning approach ensures that views with similar orientations are jointly involved for more accurate depth estimations, leading to precise surface reconstructions and balanced computation on multiple GPUs in parallel. In addition, we propose a strategy to detect and repair missing regions in the initial point cloud caused by sparse viewpoints or insufficient textures, thereby further improving the geometric quality. Extensive experiments on the GauU-Scene, MatrixCity, and UrbanScene3D datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in surface reconstruction for large-scale scenes. Project page: https://hanl2010.github.io/VOP-GS.

AI.tldr: 提出基于视角方向划分的场景分割方法，结合缺失区域检测修复策略，实现大规模场景的高质量3D表面重建，在多个数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3DGS的大规模场景重建方法在处理复杂几何、长优化时间和有限内存方面仍存在困难，难以生成高质量表面。
AI.method: 1) 基于视角方向（viewpoint orientation）的场景划分方法，使相似视角联合参与深度估计；2) 多GPU并行均衡计算；3) 初始点云缺失区域检测与修复策略。
AI.result: 在GauU-Scene、MatrixCity、UrbanScene3D数据集上，表面重建质量超越当前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的视角方向划分与缺失修复方法能有效提升大规模场景的3D表面重建精度和效率。

title: Lyapunov-Guided Training for Hardware-Safe Neural Networks Under Fixed-Point Arithmetic
summary: Low-precision neural networks are attractive for resource-constrained hardware, but fixed-point arithmetic introduces failure modes that are often hidden by idealised quantisation models. In particular, two's-complement overflow wrapping can corrupt hidden activations by changing both their magnitude and sign, leading to unstable numerical error propagation and severe accuracy degradation. This paper proposes a Lyapunov-stabilised quantisation framework for low-precision neural networks operating under hardware-style wrapping arithmetic. The hidden-state energy is monitored through a layerwise Lyapunov function, and a monotone projection is applied to enforce bounded and non-increasing state evolution across depth. The method is evaluated on MNIST using a compact patch-based transformer under post-training quantisation and quantisation-aware training with fixed-point bit-widths from 4 to 16 bits. Monte Carlo results show that unconstrained wrapped quantisation-aware training collapses to near-chance accuracy across 6-16 bits, with activation overflow rates exceeding 11%. In contrast, the proposed monotone Lyapunov projection suppresses activation overflow to below 0.012% and restores stable low-precision learning, achieving 86.55% accuracy at 12 bits. These results demonstrate that Lyapunov-based state control can act as a hardware-aware stabilisation mechanism for reliable fixed-point neural inference and training.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于李雅普诺夫稳定性的量化框架，通过单调投影约束隐藏状态能量，有效抑制了低精度神经网络在硬件级补码算术中的溢出问题，在12比特位宽下恢复至86.55%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 低精度神经网络在资源受限硬件上有吸引力，但定点算术中的补码溢出会导致隐藏状态幅度和符号改变，引发数值误差传播和精度严重下降，现有理想化量化模型忽视了这一问题。
AI.method: 提出李雅普诺夫稳定量化框架：通过逐层李雅普诺夫函数监测隐藏状态能量，施加单调投影约束以确保状态演化有界且非递增，在4-16位定点位宽下进行后训练量化和量化感知训练。
AI.result: 在MNIST上的紧凑patch-based transformer实验中，无约束的量化感知训练在6-16位下准确率接近随机水平（激活溢出率>11%）；而所提方法将激活溢出率降至0.012%以下，在12位下达到86.55%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 基于李雅普诺夫的状态控制可作为硬件感知的稳定化机制，保障可靠的定点神经推理与训练。

title: Rethinking Depth Pruning for Vision Transformers: A Heterogeneity-Aware Perspective
summary: While prior studies have successfully compressed vision Transformers (ViTs) through various pruning techniques, most have concentrated on width pruning to achieve significant reductions in model size. Depth pruning, which removes entire layers from a ViT, is notoriously difficult for accuracy recovery despite its potential to deliver higher speedups, limiting the acceleration achieved by existing joint width-and-depth pruning methods. In this work, we reveal that the failure of existing depth pruning methods lies in their neglect of heterogeneity between different layers, and we introduce HetDPT, a heterogeneity-aware depth pruning method that avoids dimension mismatch. Comprehensive experiments on ImageNet-1K, CIFAR-100, COCO, and ADE20K validate our method: HetDPT achieves a 1.58$\times$ speedup for DeiT-B while maintaining accuracy and a 1.39$\times$ speedup for DeiT-S with nearly no accuracy degradation. Furthermore, when combined with width pruning, HetDPT+ sets a new state-of-the-art record in extreme ViT pruning, enhancing the acceleration ratio from 4.24$\times$ to 5.19$\times$ for the Isomorphic-Pruning-2.6G configuration while maintaining near-lossless accuracy; our code is available at https://github.com/Efficient-AI-for-All/HetDPT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HetDPT，一种针对Vision Transformer的异构感知深度剪枝方法，通过考虑层间异质性解决深度剪枝中的维度不匹配问题，在多个数据集上实现显著加速且几乎无损精度。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT剪枝方法多聚焦于宽度剪枝，深度剪枝虽能带来更高加速比，但精度恢复困难。作者发现失败原因是忽视了不同层之间的异质性（heterogeneity），因此需要一种能够感知层差异性的深度剪枝方法。
AI.method: 提出HetDPT（Heterogeneity-aware Depth Pruning），一种考虑层间异质性的深度剪枝方法，通过避免维度不匹配问题来实现有效的层剪枝；同时可与宽度剪枝结合形成HetDPT+，实现联合剪枝。
AI.result: DeiT-B上实现1.58×加速比且保持精度；DeiT-S上实现1.39×加速比且几乎无损；与宽度剪枝结合后，在Isomorphic-Pruning-2.6G配置下将加速比从4.24×提升至5.19×，刷新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: HetDPT及HetDPT+在多种ViT模型和多个数据集上验证了有效性，在深度剪枝和联合剪枝任务中均取得了领先性能，代码已开源。

title: ManifoldFlow: SPD-Relaxed Stiefel Layers with Learnable Singular Spectrum
summary: Orthogonal and Stiefel layers give neural weights exact spectral control, but they also impose a strong modeling constraint: all represented singular values are fixed at one. Many settings that benefit from an orthonormal basis still need direction-dependent attenuation or amplification. We introduce ManifoldFlow, a minimal relaxation of a fixed-spectrum Stiefel layer that keeps the basis on the Stiefel manifold while learning a bounded positive spectrum through W = Q S^{1/2}, with Q^T Q = I and S positive definite. Since W^T W = S, the eigenvalues of S are exactly the squared singular values of the realized weight, making eigenvalue clipping a direct singular-value control mechanism. Across paired sequence, tabular, and image experiments, the learnable SPD spectrum improves the fixed-spectrum Stiefel counterpart in the reported settings where the Stiefel prior is useful, with the largest gains in recurrent language-model projections. Boundary cases in convolutional classifier heads clarify the intended scope: ManifoldFlow is not a universal dense-layer replacement, but a spectrum-learnable Stiefel relaxation for settings where an orthonormal basis is a useful prior. When the basis should be orthonormal, its spectrum need not be frozen. Code available at https://github.com/Hik289/manifold_flow

AI.tldr: 本文提出 ManifoldFlow，一种对固定谱 Stiefel 层的松弛方法，通过 W = Q S^{1/2} 参数化，在保留 Stiefel 流形约束（Q^T Q = I）的同时学习有界正谱 S，使权重既能保持正交基结构又能进行方向依赖的衰减或放大，实验表明该方法在序列、表格和图像任务上优于固定谱 Stiefel 层。
AI.motivation: 正交/Stiefel 层虽能精确控制神经网络的谱，但所有奇异值固定为 1，无法实现方向依赖的衰减或放大。许多需要正交基但同时也需要谱调节的场景受此限制，因此需要一种既能保持 Stiefel 流形结构又能学习灵活谱的方法。
AI.method: 将权重矩阵分解为 W = Q S^{1/2}，其中 Q 满足 Q^T Q = I（保持在 Stiefel 流形上），S 为正定矩阵。由于 W^T W = S，S 的特征值即为权重奇异值的平方，因此可通过特征值裁剪实现对奇异值的直接控制。
AI.result: 在配对序列、表格和图像实验中，可学习的 SPD 谱在多个 Stiefel 先验有用的场景中优于固定谱 Stiefel 层，其中循环语言模型投影的提升最大。卷积分类器头部的边界案例明确了方法适用范围。
AI.conclusion: ManifoldFlow 不是通用全连接层替代品，而是面向正交基先验有用场景的可学习谱 Stiefel 松弛方法。当基需要正交时，其谱不必冻结。代码已开源。

title: G$^2$TAM: Geometry Grounded Track Anything Model
summary: Human spatial understanding arises from jointly perceiving geometry and semantics, enabling consistent object identification and localization across viewpoints and time. Current video segmentation models depend on explicit object appearance memory banks for instance tracking, yet they remain vulnerable to large viewpoint changes and long-term occlusions. Leveraging the spatial consistency afforded by modern feed-forward 3D reconstruction models, we propose the Geometry Grounded Tracking Anything Model (G$^2$TAM), a unified framework for promptable instance tracking in 3D using only unordered RGB images or videos. G$^2$TAM employs spatially aligned geometric representations as implicit memory, ensuring stable instance identity and localization across frames and views. At its core is a cross-modal spatial encoder that integrates visual and textual prompts into a shared geometric space, enabling end-to-end spatial reconstruction and instance-consistent mask prediction. To support training and evaluation, we construct InsTrack, a large-scale dataset with a dedicated validation split for benchmarking. Extensive experiments show that G$^2$TAM delivers strong cross-view consistency, promptable instance spatial tracking, video object segmentation and spatial reconstruction, establishing a foundation for interactive, geometry-grounded spatial reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出G²TAM，一种利用3D重建模型的几何一致性进行实例跟踪的框架，通过几何特征作为隐式记忆，实现跨视角、跨时间的稳定实例分割与跟踪，并构建了大规模数据集InsTrack进行验证。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分割模型依赖显式外观记忆库进行实例跟踪，但在大视角变化和长期遮挡下表现脆弱，缺乏几何空间一致性。
AI.method: 提出G²TAM框架，核心是跨模态空间编码器，将视觉和文本提示整合到共享的几何空间中，利用前馈式3D重建模型提供的空间一致性作为隐式记忆，实现端到端空间重建和实例一致掩码预测。
AI.result: 在跨视角一致性、可提示实例空间跟踪、视频目标分割和空间重建等任务上表现优异，构建的InsTrack数据集提供了新的基准。
AI.conclusion: G²TAM为交互式、基于几何空间推理的实例跟踪提供了新范式，验证了几何特征作为隐式记忆的有效性。

title: Auto: The AGI Compiler
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, 1 algorithm. Code: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/auto
summary: Every LLM agent run re-derives its behavior token by token on a frontier model: brilliant, expensive, slow, and unbounded. We present Auto, a compiler that records live agent behavior, measures which parts are secretly deterministic, extracts them into verified programs or distilled specialists, and emits cognition binaries: WebAssembly artifacts whose manifests carry measured guarantees and whose declared capabilities are physically enforced by the sandbox. A tiered runtime executes compiled behavior behind conformally calibrated guards; guard trips deopt to the reference agent, and the captured trace recompiles back down, so nothing is figured out twice. We use "AGI compiler" in one narrow, testable sense: a system that autonomously converts novel experience into permanent, verified, near-free skill while measuring what it does not know. On AUTO-BENCH, a benchmark we introduce and pre-register, 87.1% of 560 recorded frontier-agent spans are witnessed-deterministic (three of the four censused task families measure 100.0%). On a 300-item stream with three scheduled distribution shifts, the closed loop compiles three artifact generations and drives marginal cost from 59 to 2 micro-dollars per item (6.4x end-to-end) at 96.9% parity on witnessed inputs with zero errors. The same stream also quantifies the failure modes: a loose guard silently mislabels 48.9% of compiled answers, and an unfaithful deopt reference causes the verification gate to refuse recompilation. Calibration and reference fidelity, not model capability, decide whether cheap stays correct. Code: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/auto

AI.tldr: 本文提出Auto——一个将LLM Agent行为编译为WebAssembly工件（"认知二进制"）的编译器。通过对87.1%的Agent行为进行确定性提取，在300个样本的流式任务中，将边际成本从59微美元降至2微美元（6.4倍），同时保持96.9%的输入一致性。核心教训：校准与参考忠实度比模型能力更决定低成本能否保持正确。
AI.motivation: 每次LLM Agent运行都在从头逐token推理，虽然能力强大但昂贵、缓慢且不可扩展。作者希望将那些本质上确定性的行为模式自动提取出来，变为廉价、可验证且可复用的程序，避免重复计算。
AI.method: Auto包含三阶段：①记录Agent的实时行为轨迹；②测量哪些部分是"秘密确定性的"，将其提取为已验证的程序或蒸馏后的专家模型；③编译为WebAssembly"认知二进制"，其声明能力受沙箱物理强制执行。运行时采用分层执行：编译后的行为由校准后的守卫监控，守卫触发则回退到原始Agent，捕获的轨迹再次编译回下层，形成"从未被重复解决两次"的闭环。
AI.result: AUTO-BENCH基准上，560段前沿Agent记录中87.1%被判定为见证确定性（4个任务族中有3个达100.0%）。在含3次分布迁移的300项流式任务中，闭环生成3代工件，边际成本从59降至2微美元（端到端6.4倍），在见证输入上维持96.9%一致性且零错误。同时揭示了失败模式：松动守卫导致48.9%编译答案被错误标记；不忠实的回退参考导致验证门拒绝重新编译。
AI.conclusion: 校准（守卫的准确性）和参考忠实度（回退机制的可信度）是决定低成本方案能否保持正确性的关键因素，而非模型能力本身。

title: InfraNet: Quality-Aware RGB Guidance for Efficient Infrared Object Detection
summary: Robust object detection under adverse visual conditions remains a long-standing challenge for multi-modal perception systems. Existing fusion-based methods typically require both RGB and infrared (IR) inputs, and treat them equally during both training and inference, which compromises their robustness when the RGB modality becomes unreliable or unavailable. In this case, we propose \textbf{InfraNet}, an IR-centric quality-aware framework that regulates RGB guidance during training and supports flexible RGB--IR or IR-only deployment. InfraNet employs an asymmetric architecture where the primary IR pathway extracts multi-scale infrared features for predictions, while the auxiliary RGB pathway provides reliability-controlled supervisory signals. The core of InfraNet is \textbf{QualGate}, a quality-aware fusion module that learns a task-oriented control signal to suppress unreliable RGB guidance and compensate IR features during cross-modal training. Built upon InfraNet, we design two architectural variants: a lightweight IR-only architecture InfraNet-IR and an RGB--IR architecture InfraNet-RGB-IR. Our method is evaluated through extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets (LLVIP, FLIR-Aligned, M$^3$FD, and DroneVehicle), showing strong or competitive accuracy in challenging low-light and adverse weather conditions. Notably, InfraNet maintains high efficiency in IR-only inference, making it both accurate and computationally efficient.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InfraNet，一种以红外为中心、质量感知的多模态目标检测框架，通过非对称架构和QualGate模块实现鲁棒的RGB-IR或纯IR部署，在四个基准数据集上表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有基于融合的方法在训练和推理时平等对待RGB和红外模态，当RGB模态不可靠或不可用时，其鲁棒性严重受损。为解决这一长期挑战，作者提出以红外为中心的质量感知框架。
AI.method: 提出InfraNet，采用非对称架构：主路径提取红外多尺度特征用于预测，辅助RGB路径提供可靠性控制的监督信号。核心模块QualGate学习任务导向的控制信号，抑制不可靠的RGB引导并补偿红外特征。设计了轻量级纯红外架构InfraNet-IR和RGB-IR架构InfraNet-RGB-IR两种变体。
AI.result: 在LLVIP、FLIR-Aligned、M³FD和DroneVehicle四个基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，在低光照和恶劣天气条件下显示出强或具有竞争力的准确性。纯红外推理保持高效率，兼具准确性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: InfraNet通过质量感知的跨模态训练策略，有效解决了RGB不可靠时的鲁棒性问题，同时支持灵活的部署方式，为多模态目标检测提供了一种实用且高效的解决方案。

title: Predicting Therapeutic Outcome via Aligning Patient-Specific Knowledge Graph and Gene-Level Perturbation Representations
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Accepted at BIOKDD 2026, held in conjunction with ACM SIGKDD 2026
summary: Accurate prediction of patient-specific therapeutic response from pre-treatment transcriptomes is hindered by the scarcity of matched clinical response labels and post-treatment molecular profiles. Preclinical transfer-learning models can simulate drug-induced expression changes but are often hard to interpret and unstable, whereas knowledge-graph methods provide mechanistic context yet remain static and fail to capture drug-induced transcriptomic perturbation dynamics. We propose PREDIKTOR, a patient-centered multi-view framework that aligns a personalized network view with a transferable transcriptomic perturbation view to predict clinical drug response. For each patient, we construct an individualized gene regulatory network from tumor expression using DysRegNet and augment it with drug-target links from DrugBank; a graph neural encoder yields a drug-centric, mechanistically grounded embedding. In parallel, a frozen condition-specific gene-gene attention model pretrained on LINCS L1000 generates a simulated post-perturbation transcriptomic profile for the same patient-drug pair. We align the two views in a shared latent space via a CLIP-style contrastive objective with drug-context hard negatives, then concatenate the representations for end-to-end response classification. On TCGA, PREDIKTOR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines under patient-, drug-, and tissue-split evaluations, and transfers zero-shot to the I-SPY2 trial, improving AUROC by 5.6% over competing methods. The aligned embeddings yield stable gene and pathway attributions that recover known mechanisms, supporting actionable and interpretable precision oncology.

AI.tldr: PREDIKTOR是一个患者中心的多视图框架，通过整合个性化基因调控网络（来自DysRegNet）和可迁移的转录组扰动视图（来自LINCS L1000预训练模型），利用CLIP风格对比学习对齐两种表征，实现临床药物反应的准确预测，在TCGA和I-SPY2上均优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法面临两大挑战：预训练迁移学习模型难以解释且不稳定，知识图谱方法虽提供机制背景但静态不变，无法捕捉药物诱导的转录组扰动动态。亟需一种既能提供可解释机制又能捕获动态表达变化的方法。
AI.method: PREDIKTOR构建双视图：(1) 个性化网络视图——利用DysRegNet从患者肿瘤表达构建个体化基因调控网络，结合DrugBank药物-靶点链接，通过图神经网络编码得到药物中心的机制性嵌入；(2) 转录组扰动视图——使用在LINCS L1000上预训练的冻结条件特异性基因-基因注意力模型，生成患者-药物对的模拟后扰动表达谱。通过CLIP风格对比学习（含药物上下文难负样本）对齐两视图的潜在空间，拼接后用于端到端响应分类。
AI.result: 在TCGA上，PREDIKTOR在患者、药物和组织分割评估中均优于现有基线；零样本迁移到I-SPY2临床试验，AUROC提升5.6%。对齐的嵌入产生稳定的基因和通路归因，可恢复已知机制。
